**And take it from Attorney General Holder: we have to fight back. **
Trump and his MAGA allies are assaulting our democracy and openly defying basic principles of fair elections and fair representation. In the House, Republicans passed the SAVE Act, which could **disenfranchise millions of Americans**. Ahead of the next U.S. census, Republicans are working to **undercount communities of color** , which would mean less representation in the halls of power. And the GOP spent months attempting to **steal a state supreme court seat** in North Carolina.
When we fight for fair elections with fair maps, we’re defending the very foundation of our democracy against everyone who’s trying to undermine it.

body:
Trump ‘doesn’t know’ if he has to uphold the Constitution?
| Kamala Harris just broke her silence: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89905?t=6&akid=19791%2E878179%2EUe4N_m) **_She’s COMPLETELY right..._**

**IF** Democrats don’t step up and take action, we will lose this war against Trump — _and he will go on to serve a THIRD term, with support from the MAGA trifecta!_

**BUT IF** every Democrat in your state steps up right now and joins leaders like Kamala Harris in the Anti-Trump Task Force, [**_we’ll have the support we need to STOP TRUMP before it’s too late! »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89905?t=7&akid=19791%2E878179%2EUe4N_m) | [5,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: HEED KAMALA HARRIS’ WARNING AND JOIN THE ANTI-TRUMP TASK FORCE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89905?t=8&akid=19791%2E878179%2EUe4N_m)

_The Voter Protection Project_

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19791%2E878179%2EUe4N_m). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19791%2E878179%2EUe4N_m).**

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Demand that Congress delivers on the People's Promise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=CMCd/4GHUjW9iZ4RdFVCSyryB8N+P/CgzfyuvmayOQjD8srdRkr90jd787stD0UuQDkuKRMnWOe3XWv+ZhQOZdYmgiabBrTY5Ie07m7ChaM=]
Folks,
President Trump and his allies have spent the past 100 days attacking our rights, undermining our democracy, and enriching the ultra-wealthy, while driving up the cost of living for working-class Americans. It’s a deliberate strategy to distract and divide us while they seize power and wealth.
We see through their games. It’s time to join together and demand something different — not just by resisting their agenda, but by offering our own that guarantees justice, equality, and opportunity for ALL.
That’s why we’re calling on every elected official—from Congress to city hall—to deliver on what we’re calling The People’s Promise .
Learn more and sign on to The People's Promise today >> [https://peoplespromise.us/add-your-name-2/?source=043025swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://peoplespromise.us/add-your-name-2/?source=043025swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
Here are the key points:
* An Economy That Works for Everyone: All workers earn a livable wage and have the right to unionize. Americans can afford essentials like quality healthcare, housing, and childcare.
* A Government for the People: The wealthiest among us pay their fair share in taxes. Every child can count on the quality education they deserve, and every person has access to a strong safety net they can count on when they need it.
* Equal Rights & Opportunity for All: Nobody’s freedom can be taken without due process. Our votes are protected and counted. And our neighborhoods are free from hate and discrimination.
These aren’t radical demands—they’re the bare minimum. It’s time for our elected leaders to deliver.
Add your name right now and demand a return of government for the people and by the people immediately >> [https://peoplespromise.us/add-your-name-2/?source=043025swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]

clean_body: | | | ! The Supreme Court just CAVED to the ACLU — halting ALL new deportations. Why? Because the Democrats claim illegal aliens have a “right” to due process. The result? MS-13 thugs, cartel traffickers, and foreign terrorists are now roaming free in our country — on YOUR dime — waiting MONTHS to YEARS for their court dates. This isn’t a serious reading into constitutional law... This is left-wing activism taking over our highest court. Here at Pathway to Victory, we understand that a nation with NO border is NO nation at all. That’s why we’re demanding SCOTUS to resume all deportations. We need YOU to to have the maximum impact. Will you sign our petition right away? This isn’t just about collecting signatures. This is about showing SCOTUS that We The PeopleDO NOT APPROVE of dangerous illegal aliens staying in our country. They DO NOT have the “right” to due process. They DO NOT have the “right” to live off our tax dollars. They DO NOT have the “right” to live in America! SCOTUS must be held accountable. President Trump must be empowered. And our nation must be defended. | | |

* – Targeting political opponents,
* – Issuing sweeping executive orders that bypass Congress,
* _– And much much more._

| |
---
| | | | | They're like a swarm of angry hornets - relentless and vicious.

The Democrats, Fake News Media, and DC Swamp won't stop until they've taken down your President and every Republican with the guts to stand alongside him.

Since 2016, they've targeted President Trump, throwing everything at the wall and hoping something sticks. Nothing has.

So now they're adjusting their approach.

_They know_ President Trump's agenda only becomes law if it passes the House - and Conservatives are in control.

_They know_ that stripping us of our House Majority hands them the power to impeach, investigate, and bring Trump's entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT.

_And they know_ taking back the House would be game, set, match for everything Conservatives have fought for.

body:
DOGE is already saving America BILLIONS!

|
---
| | |
The waste and abuse are finally being exposed. **Elon Musk's DOGE has blown the lid off USAID's most egregious boondoggles, and it's worse than we thought.**

Here are just a few of the outrageous programs that USAID and our government was funding with YOUR tax dollars:

❌ **$1.5 million** to "advance DEI in Serbia's workplaces and business communities"
❌ **$70,000** for a "DEI musical" in Ireland
❌ **$47,000** for a "transgender opera" in Colombia
❌ **$32,000** for a "transgender comic book" in Peru
❌ **$2 million** for sex changes and "LGBT activism" in Guatemala
❌ **$6 million** to "fund tourism" in Egypt
❌ **Millions** of dollars to EcoHealth Alliance for COVID research
❌ **Funding** for contraceptive initiatives and programs that benefited terrorists in several countries

It's no wonder that Secretary of State Marco Rubio has called for a complete overhaul of USAID. **But we need to hear from YOU, Peter**.

**[Take our USAID audit survey](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/rwunM0DMKNAeOov82uQpWA3PtcHuzpfyX1in0gzEKpw61BQH6q82oF5S_XebflJItVB0LWvbKRlHCd02qyS9801rVqXv_JwI2HjsnvcxFC0vMQ2nTdDjTshmBI0Z78Bkly1pqvt_HjB1Gx9V-3o74gqKX3hUla1sBA63h0ijuRHRnVUMcVol6Tnfb8DWxmz9auNsRN93VmfYXS9DZz4_lVtrft5FwnTfuu5o0ithV9S1YyTawOmcGOpYob4APoVehOFbtqJ5YXZnqdo3DaJtQBu5slxPlgw74-mbjnBZTr98hUtHeopZTbCoe2v6NmIFCp-d0yfQFzOtdmzpzRoT0aQtgGXOpvDakyKf1df2wmh_RsSGemY9lyTG_L000uVR6UhIa1HW0XRqNpbdqTuZe2iXNBLd0HaWNJWWHihDRjDd6icMFY9bZuiWP0sLoLNITU1h4HM0EHG9XaIjXFkbI0G1sVsPn3pPFyXAuuBE4NhWhzGEq1MZCg/dfkYuoYfTD5bqOEMZB35300gftdOe5vZ/8 "Take our USAID audit survey")** and tell us which programs you think are the biggest waste of taxpayer dollars. # [What I Learned By Reading Pope Leo's Entire Twitter History](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=163154532&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMTU0NTMyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDY3NTQyNDMsImV4cCI6MTc0OTM0NjI0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hzjpLTxEVnEHoRUv8FKKPdILcFGHlMAjrQIfXFK_nDA)
### The Pope and I agree on a lot...but not everything
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| May 9
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=163154532&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMTU0NTMyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0Njc1NDI0MywiZXhwIjoxNzQ5MzQ2MjQzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6lhWLf3UYbvLRVXFSGqCI-Qs1B6SnoSSz0z9JBaclWY&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=163154532&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMTU0NTMyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDY3NTQyNDMsImV4cCI6MTc0OTM0NjI0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hzjpLTxEVnEHoRUv8FKKPdILcFGHlMAjrQIfXFK_nDA&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=163154532&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMTU0NTMyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDY3NTQyNDMsImV4cCI6MTc0OTM0NjI0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hzjpLTxEVnEHoRUv8FKKPdILcFGHlMAjrQIfXFK_nDA)
---
| | [](https://substack..VzaxY1_E1uwZLd60qp3QQZpg0g_mrfwkTZIhlBZp-V4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/what-i-learned-by-reading-pope-leos?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Robert Frances Prevost, now known as Pope Leo XIV, hails from Chicago, Illinois, my home city--one of the top 10 most diverse cities in the United States.
In a time of deep political division and escalating global crises, Pope Leo is emerging as a powerful advocate for justice, human rights, and moral clarity. His public stances on issues ranging from combatting gun violence, to protecting immigration rights, to abolishing the death penalty are reflections of his faith and bold assertions of humanity's shared responsibility to uphold dignity and compassion for all people. However, and likewise, his staunch anti-abortion view is one of deep concern, given what we know about the harm abortion bans enact on women.
Here's what I learned by reading Pope Leo's entire Twitter history. **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ayyLFfXA09TUyOnT6tjNqqpeMKH2gWySHctSN4M-040?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=163154532)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/84cb3aba-818a-426e-9f9e-a151dd0538f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Newly elected Pope Leo XIV appears on the balcony of St. Peter's Basilica at the Vatican on Thursday. (Alessandra Tarantino/AP)
### Upholding Justice and Opposing the Death Penalty
Pope Leo has made clear his staunch opposition to the death penalty. His tweet from March 5, 2015, simply stating, _" It's time to end the death penalty,"_ reflects his firm belief that state-sanctioned executions are not only morally indefensible but contrary to the essence of justice.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dcd8c3fe-8c8f-4de4-86dd-f0cc9c41c7b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Pope's stance aligns with growing global recognition that capital punishment is a violation of human rights, disproportionately affecting marginalized communities, and often riddled with wrongful convictions. His call for abolition is a reminder that justice should be restorative, not retributive.
### Defending the Vulnerable: Immigrants and Refugees
The Pope's commitment to human rights extends deeply into his advocacy for immigrants and refugees.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/495a041f-f7bf-46de-96e7-296919d30f28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
His public denouncement of Donald Trump's anti-immigrant rhetoric and his visible support for Syrian refugees speaks volumes. On January 27, 2017, he reposted the famous and heartbreaking image of a Syrian child, bloodied and battered, with the caption: _" We're banning all Syrian refugees? The men, women, and children who most need help? What an immoral nation we are becoming. Jesus weeps."_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/31291276-5d74-492f-ace9-04f19e8c8d7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
His words call attention to the moral crisis of denying sanctuary to those fleeing war and persecution, echoing a core principle of faith: to welcome the stranger and protect the vulnerable. Pope Leo has likewise openly condemned the Trump administration's child separation policy, and the caging of children.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cd33dcb5-4346-4a55-8d9f-d7c50de72c8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In another repost, he called out the racist undertones of Trump's policies, highlighting how terms like "_bad hombres_ " fuel nativism and bigotry.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/87c7af38-ba87-4916-bdd1-e08595af353f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And most recently, he's openly opposed the cruelty of JD Vance, as he demonizes immigrants with bizarre faith based justifications.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/be466103-825e-44bf-aa70-154aacab5e39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Pope's voice on these issues is not just compassionate--it is courageous, cutting through political noise to demand that America live up to its ideals of liberty and justice for all.
### Combating Gun Violence and Demanding Action
Gun violence is a uniquely American epidemic, and Pope Leo has not shied away from calling out political inaction. His retweet of Senator Chris Murphy's powerful statement after the Las Vegas shooting--_" Your cowardice to act cannot be whitewashed by thoughts and prayers. None of this ends unless we do something to stop it."_--is a testament to his belief in action over rhetoric.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c92e317f-eec0-4bf0-86e0-3d4525e5554f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Pope's alignment with leaders who demand legislative action on gun control is a bold stance that underscores his commitment to safeguarding lives.
**If you 're finding value in this article and research, I invite you to become a free or paid subscriber.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ayyLFfXA09TUyOnT6tjNqqpeMKH2gWySHctSN4M-040?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=163154532)
### Racial Justice and Moral Leadership
On May 30, 2020, amidst nationwide protests for racial justice after police murdered George Floyd, Pope Leo tweeted, _" Thank you! We need to hear more from leaders in the Church, to reject racism and seek justice."_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1047580d-a763-4868-8118-6c25e7d2f310?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
On the same day he elevated additional voices for racial justice. And these were not isolated tweets. I found tweets from years prior celebrating racial justice.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7b095b56-57da-43e7-ac0a-b89a9df6dfe8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Back in 2014 Pope Leo celebrated the International Day for the Elimination of Racial Discrimination. His call for moral leadership in the face of racial injustice highlights his understanding that silence is complicity.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/29057838-a613-41b8-af2c-52ee9bc793f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Prevost's consistent advocacy for racial equality and justice is a reminder that the fight for civil rights is far from over and requires voices of faith and moral clarity to lead the charge.
### Climate Action as a Moral Imperative
Prevost's environmental advocacy is equally strong. He publicly urged Donald Trump to read _Laudato Si '_, Pope Francis' encyclical on climate change, calling for immediate action to protect the environment. His retweet from June 1, 2017, emphasized the urgency of combating climate change, aligning with global scientific consensus that protecting the planet is not just a political issue but a moral one.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7223d98a-6fb7-4b70-a62e-8ee34e6086b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
He's additionally recognized that religion and science are not enemies, and should be treated as such. Like his predecessor, the late Pope Francis, Pope Leo is continuing an important tradition of ensuring that those of faith also embrace science.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4aaf01a2-6cbc-4de5-a2fe-dbfcc18c887f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As the current anti-science administration dismantles critical regulations and departments, one can only hope that Pope Leo might influence _someone_ in the Trump regime to reverse course and instead re-embrace science based policy.
### Abortion Bans and Denial of Reproductive Rights
While Pope Leo is on the right, just, and moral side of many critical human rights issues, his stance on abortion and reproductive justice is deeply problematic, contrary to proven life saving measures, and harms the safety of women and children. Pope Leo has repeatedly called to defunded critical and life saving reproductive healthcare.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3c34fe79-e910-4001-b6e0-64f9757a01f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
He has called to defund reproductive healthcare on the Federal level as well.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/27f82c14-00e2-4271-a1a6-2bb77f8f02bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As is well documented, every global study done on abortion bans has proven that they do not actually save lives. Instead, they dramatically and painfully increase infant and maternal mortality. It is no accident that 9 of the top 10 states with the highest infant and maternal mortality are Red states that ban or restrict reproductive health access, while 9 of the top 10 states with the lowest rates of infant and maternal mortality are Blue states with accessible and affordable reproductive health access.
We must say it plainly--Pope Leo is on the wrong side of this matter of basic healthcare for women. I am hopeful he will listen to science and change his stance.
### Where Does Pope Leo Stand on Palestine & Genocide?
Pope Francis was a champion of justice for Palestine, openly and repeatedly demanding a ceasefire. He famously called the Catholic Parish in Gaza nearly every night, praying for their safety and security. Pope Francis made no excuses for the U.S. funded and Netanyahu inflicted genocide on the Palestinian people.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/43e78471-aa38-4d71-ad19-9539687a4790?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
However, I was unable to find any remarks by Pope Leo on this perpetual human rights atrocity. My hope is that he follows in the footsteps of his predecessor and loudly condemns this injustice. Reuters reports that "Gaza's tiny Christian community told them that they were happy about the election of the new pope, adding they were also confident he would give importance to the war-ravaged enclave like Francis did."
### Conclusion
Pope Leo XIV's bold stances on issues like racial justice, climate action, and ending the death penalty reveal a leader unafraid to challenge political powers in defense of human rights. His unwavering support for immigrants and refugees stands as a testament to his commitment to compassion and justice. However, his views on abortion and reproductive healthcare starkly contradict his otherwise progressive and compassionate advocacy, posing significant risks to women's health and autonomy.
As the world watches his papacy unfold, the critical question remains: will Pope Leo XIV carry forward the legacy of moral courage his predecessor championed, especially when it comes to Palestine and the broader fight for global human rights?
The world is waiting--and watching.

body:
The corporate media wants your attention—and they'll say just about anything to get it.

| [No Clickbait - No woke Agenda - No Wasting Time](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh1ogmvl91mlb3iek71ek69dg1rompvul239j5i8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge8oj6cth2bs)

**JUST** REAL **NEWS**

---

The corporate media wants your attention—and they'll say just about anything to get it.

We don't work for them. We work for you (for free*).

^ more on that in a minute

**Now ask yourself:**
1. | Wouldn’t it be nice to trust the voices you're listening to?
---|---
2. | Wouldn’t it be even better if you didn’t have to dig through biased, clickbait headlines to understand what’s really going on?
3. | How much time have you wasted trying to figure out what's true and what’s noise?

[There is a better way!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr0v5gfa1d1773frguaiuktfee9r8q0fhsn79cqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge8oj6cth2bs)

Instead of being just another victim of the mainstream media spin, listen to [**The Flyover Podcast**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo96692ujil41q08f72uv1foaept4ducshduc710_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge8oj6cth2bs) — your free, go-to audio and video podcast for the day’s most important stories.

No slant. Just facts, context, and common sense conversation across politics, business, culture, and beyond. Each episode is designed to be quick, clear, and actually helpful—so you can stay informed without the BS.

🎧 -- 100% FREE
📲 -- Delivered straight to YouTube and your favorite podcast app
⏱️ -- No time wasted—just smart, unbiased breakdowns

The media landscape is shifting. People are fed up. Nearly half of Americans say they don’t trust national news organizations—and for good reason. The corporate media lost the plot.

Now, millions of Americans are finding smarter ways to stay informed.

Don’t get left behind.

[**Subscribe to The Flyover Podcast today—while it’s still free**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjk9avmgkvvp42mg08rb3u9snf0dnoba07ft8t0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge8oj6cth2bs).

\-- Flyover Team

**P.S.** _Yes, it’s free—for now. But we can’t promise it always will be. As we grow, we may need to limit access or introduce paid options to keep it sustainable. So grab your spot early—while you still can._

[**→ _Listen now and take back your news_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zauqmlk4pc44mam3pv5l07imferf7isp9bp6q130_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge8oj6cth2bs).**

No spin. No noise. Just facts that fly straight.

The corporate media wants your attention—and they'll say just about anything to get it.

🎧 -- 100% FREE

Don’t get left behind.

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6bcpa8urtb9t2l2nrjbhch7ot2id26u7dcocjh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge2o76c1h2bs)
---
| |
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlthbsquco8gnq96u4thtjnal9fiirk8unfjdhio_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge2o76c1h2bs) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zijqaf3qc3qnpcuoa21du83feff3hkfiddsbpapg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge2o76c1h2bs)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Friend – I’m counting on you right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign

| | | [](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zduhqpj6kup9icj9rvsgb10f44ur27fm5tqo2bt8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge2o76cdh2bs)
---
My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
[ **DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zm1a07culmmp1q4kjc5lin4c2dsts0hqcvdu5uh8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge2o76cdh2bs)
---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. clean_body: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign | | | My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Friend, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!" If you can't afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, "please keep me and my team in your prayers and add your endorsement today:" I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! name: Dave McCormick
subject: History
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
Last November’s election changed the course of history.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd6rkua9ucmisbk4pk4g8id88io7e94oj8jr8ar8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge2o75cph2bs)

Friend,

Last November's election changed the course of history.

Right now, our nation is in a unique position to make an incredible impact on the lives of every American.

We have a Republican House, Senate, and White House.

But here's the catch--despite going through an incredibly tough and historic election, _**the real work has only just begun.**_
[SUPPORT AN AMERICA FIRST AGENDA NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr058gk6e0oppkk63tj2kas23om2s23dorstkcq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge2o75cph2bs)
---

Americans had a choice last November: more of Biden's failed liberal agenda, or a new path forward--one with conservative solutions and real change.

Believe me, I've been pouring myself into the job since day one. I even have a white board in my office to make sure the things I'm doing aligns with the promises I made when I ran for Senator.

As I take up the daily fight for our country, I'm asking a simple favor. **[Can you chip in just a few dollars to help me continue to get through this week?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhid222i5b7dngol5as5r079u4adhdn2t0smo4n0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge2o75cph2bs)**

**[If you have more to spare--say $50 or even $75 or more, I'd be especially grateful. But even $3 will go a long way.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgt0mfib7v2qs7obnsb44cac74rbu6pad753ck8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge2o75cph2bs)**

I know the past four years have been tough. Too many families struggled to pay the bills under Biden's economy. Parents have been frustrated over so many of our nation's schools spending more energy on indoctrinating our children than teaching them reading and math. Rising crime has left cities in disarray, and forced too many businesses to close their doors.

Americans spent the past four years desperate for real solutions. Now, we're working to deliver strong conservative solutions each day.

It's why I'm fighting to fulfill my promises to stop reckless spending sprees, listen to parents, and restore law and order in our communities. We're working to combat the fentanyl epidemic, secure our borders, and unleash American energy.

The bottom line: I'm fighting to give Americans the conservative changes they've been looking for, but I can't do this fight alone.

As a combat veteran, I've been in plenty of tough fights. I've never backed down. I'm not backing down in this one, and I hope you won't either.

People like you helped me get this far, and people like you can continue to carry me through every day as I fight for the great people of Pennsylvania and America.

**[So if you have anything to spare as I continue this fight for our country's future, please chip in today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdrer6mvgnsv29r9tmpe2tghmpg9u0skr4uopnv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge2o75cph2bs)**

Thank you,
Dave
[DONATE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrm4limegsl0mocge2grjdatbhje0ed17pbbp060_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge2o75cph2bs)
---

Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick.
---

PO BOX 23537
PITTSBURGH, PA 15222

body:
Sign up for our free online course, “Totalitarian Novels,” taught by Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhn6pj579h60md3r7sst614odiif65nbgg8st2lg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge2o76c1h2bs)
---
Sign up for our free online course, "Totalitarian Novels," taught by Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn.

In this course, Dr. Arnn explores the oppressive nature of totalitarian governments by looking at some of the best literature on the subject: George Orwell's _1984_ , Aldous Huxley's _Brave New World_ , Arthur Koestler's _Darkness at Noon_ , and C.S. Lewis's _That Hideous Strength_.

In the third lecture, Dr. Arnn examines the regime in Aldous Huxley's _Brave New World_ , which relies on pleasure and consumerism to keep its citizens docile.

Click the secure link below to start today:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/totalitarian-novels**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0aodg31n2arnfcjgukt3s7p9khgdv077u5hscdg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3ctge2o76c1h2bs)

## American Chosen as Pope Leo XIV
[Chicago-born Cardinal Robert Prevost](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z79uwyAQgPGngS0WuQMTBoZ28JauHS0M5-Qq_EcYGeXtq3Tv_Ek_6fu-j_fAmdfHV1jI13kbU-D8GkGBuShzUe5z1DL5mQgIJfmr1b29oUWQT39DndI8Q-8wTkmZEEMkDNYR9cFElOzfkDLKKWsc6I7wmkxPUaF1FicntKLEdSvdz8ZrfdKcX9tJpYvbIrN_1rofAj8EDAKG1lo3TfHdBAwrtUPAkPkkAUNcdSO7l1OXKotPe-Oc-eit0OqxBM5_Yv138fTwGwAA__8tHFNW) was elected Pope on Thursday, becoming the first American to lead the Catholic Church. Taking the name Pope Leo XIV, the 69-year-old former missionary in Peru greeted cheering crowds in St. Peter’s Square with a message of peace and unity. Watch [the address here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uhDAQhJ8GOiOzBowLF0lx3aVNiXze5djIYGQcrHv7iKRONz_SaPR93qe748Db88OtZPMcJ3QcXhNI6IXshTTvU1ejnYmAVE221d2gR6UV1It1ZibUCDjOSqIc2hG0b1sw3pEevanZXkOyl0bq3kDXkGqxH8hLpY1WD1N1kpBzTM1X5C0vNIdXPCk1Pq51sEvO-1GptwpuFdxKKc3zsVE5rrqC2yWvPKaAf1bscSeR4oNSFnuiMx5ZHDuRX8TpMnu3CZ9iwUMUl_0ieBPzdwjiZKRYJ4t74RD4GHTVyefqOPxeyf-yOS38BAAA__-jh2j1). Prevost had previously [shared posts critical](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D-P4yAQBfBPgzuiCX-MXVDcFe5y7ZUWgXEyK2wQkHj97VdOv8008_TT0_t_m2-OIm2Pf25F25Y0B0fxmAUIzUFzGP_Oqgt2QRQoO7RXo3ozSCNF97T6bu4KBheCdoP3Qfge1SivflCDBgUd2RMCDSMYPQp1QXkNukcP0oxG3kemAAO1VC5fibb2xCUe6Y3l4tPaRftsLVcm_zAxMTFtR061nS8mphNmYoLPGZiYXpVvuNczhzvPKSOPmPg3vXnNuDV-oCuVF2w7YqPtwX2hRp7qytPCW3mtmecUyROeSldsyDvFSLU3TMFjdRQ_vdqvQ72t-AkAAP__cKxqrA) of U.S. immigration policies and supportive of gun control, while maintaining traditional Catholic positions on abortion and euthanasia.

Despite political differences, Trump congratulated the new pope, calling his election a “great honor” for the U.S.
## US, UK Strike Tariff Deal
The U.S. and the United Kingdom unveiled the [framework of a trade deal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7Fu8yAURp8Gb1jXFxN-Boa_g7d07WiBuSSkECIgsfL2lbt3-6RPOkfn67yebUzxfvm0mUwPZfU2pveKgJKD5KA_1nnwJhAhiYHMpOaT-ieUwOFqyEkxBRISnPAQXCAE4bWEaQ5qc3qI5gCBBA1KapxHEpOXJ9pAKK2E02wG8rGXOt5KvPcrhfQuL6rjVvKQzLX3R2PiP8OF4bLv-7i5dqe9HT_D5ZgMl2fjz2_e6zM_eOu2Zqo821upvFfriXuyieEyVOMfe0wptpNiM1yyjenX1P9Mfxn8CQAA__93llwZ) Thursday, preserving a 10% import tariff while expanding U.S. access to British markets for beef, ethanol, and other goods. In exchange, the U.K. will fast-track American imports, drop some non-tariff barriers, and buy $10 billion in Boeing aircraft. The first 100,000 U.K.-made cars imported annually will be capped at the lower tariff, with the rest subject to 25%. British Prime Minister Keir Starmer called it a "historic day." Though details remain unfinished, both leaders framed it as a win. Following the announcement, [stocks climbed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFvwyAQBeBfgzdb5ACfb2BoB2_p2tEicMQ0OEQ2jZV_Xzl7l7c86Xt63-fp7FJO9-uXW9jWWKbgUn5NIMG00rSSPifdBBuZgVXD9oS6x0Ghgma2WiL1GIZAg78ggmIiE2mIkcD35JtkD0gaSRINge5YnYLp2UuFhOpCQksOqZa1-ynpXmeO-VWevHa-LE22c62PTagPAaOAcd_3zt8v_igFjActYJTvQAHjVou_tYtbb1zbWoJ7tTk9uf19BFd56-a65Ga14bGnnNPWo9DyuriU32v13_tPC38BAAD__4fAWu0), the Dow rose 254 points, while the S&P 500 and Nasdaq also posted solid gains.
## White House Unveils Air Traffic Overhaul
President Trump’s administration is proposing a sweeping [modernization of the U.S. air traffic control system](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LuO2zAQheGnoboxaF50KVh4kajbNFukNGhyZE1CkQpFmdDbB3K_3QADfMD5f3_ePy0Fis9fdkFTpnT3lsJxF1xo4Br48HFXjTcTokDZoLl2qu162UnRzOahpfT9Vdm-b73DQalW6we6nluLzumGzAlxzQfe6UGoC8qr1y06Lruhk4-BKY6eSsqXP4limXEKR3phvri0NMHMpawbkzcmRibGWutl2eL5Y2LECPvGxFjQzTGF9DyYGO2LbKEUz5MylGyniRy4FEtOAU56tnsAG2Pao0MPjwNK3pcVrF8o0lbyG4AZM8IGdbYFKsLfmOqJZrjdrj__xfLF5JgceSZ_fJz9sG5fmNcmG79WCoG2tmOKPxdL4b2mfJv3ZcT_AAAA___N6oCZ), citing fatal crashes and antiquated technology as urgent reasons for action. The plan, unveiled Thursday, includes six new air traffic control centers, upgrades at more than 4,600 sites, and replacement of 600 radars. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy compared the update to “going from a flip phone to a smartphone,” noting some [FAA systems still use floppy disks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAUhH-N2YjgPTBhYGiHbOna0SLwiKmwsTBJlH9fuXu3O510-vR9X6erzyWv9y-_kOupTtHn8p5AgOZCc2E_J8WiS0RAyMhJo0ZzRoPAZieFGqOBEcjfLChUAay5oZbJGG0ssOyOI6GFFUZbUCdCGfVIQaCxBm92UIJi7rWdfmpe-0ypvOuT2inUhRU3977tA34McBng4reVXvsxHaX1HAodKTfem08pBx7q2lstfCt-JR6a32faeW-PZePxkdKbnwlRSbRaioRWhzORsEgSlfekE7Hm4vbKpeR9NIMS98Xn8ofT__XzdPAbAAD__zwMZd0). The White House wants full upfront funding from Congress, estimated to start at $12.5 billion, with a projected completion by 2028.

Taking the name Pope Leo XIV, the 69-year-old former missionary in Peru greeted cheering crowds in St. Peter’s Square with a message of peace and unity. Watch . Prevost had previously of U.S. immigration policies and supportive of gun control, while maintaining traditional Catholic positions on abortion and euthanasia. Despite political differences, Trump congratulated the new pope, calling his election a “great honor” for the U.S. US, UK Strike Tariff Deal The U.S. and the United Kingdom unveiled the Thursday, preserving a 10% import tariff while expanding U.S. access to British markets for beef, ethanol, and other goods. In exchange, the U.K. will fast-track American imports, drop some non-tariff barriers, and buy $10 billion in Boeing aircraft. The first 100,000 U.K.-made cars imported annually will be capped at the lower tariff, with the rest subject to 25%. British Prime Minister Keir Starmer called it a "historic day." Though details remain unfinished, both leaders framed it as a win. Following the announcement, , the Dow rose 254 points, while the S&P 500 and Nasdaq also posted solid gains. White House Unveils Air Traffic Overhaul President Trump’s administration is proposing a sweeping , citing fatal crashes and antiquated technology as urgent reasons for action. The plan, unveiled Thursday, includes six new air traffic control centers, upgrades at more than 4,600 sites, and replacement of 600 radars. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy compared the update to “going from a flip phone to a smartphone,” noting some . The White House wants full upfront funding from Congress, estimated to start at $12.5 billion, with a projected completion by 2028. name: Ernest Lineberger
subject: Update from Ernest Lineberger, May 8, 2025
body:
Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress!

As you know, the Trump administration, supported by our representative
Gill, has continued to do horrible and wrongful things with their
government position. From setting up methods to use influence for direct
profit, to working to squeeze money out of necessary government services
without any care for consequences to the public, to the continued spread of
misinformation, and outright denying any requirement to follow the
constitution or yield to any court action against them. All of this is
sickening, and yet motivating me to work harder to flip this seat in the US
House from its current MAGA resident, to restore oppositional power to
congress to bring this evil to a halt and work to support our citizens.
People’s Needs Come First!

How can you help?

1. Ask your friends, neighbors, anyone nearby if they would like to have
a congressional representative who puts their needs first, brings them real
news of the view from DC, and listens to their concerns and issues. That
is what I’m promising. Not trickery for wealthy greed. Not party politics.

2. Help me find new and better ways to share my message throughout the
district. Invite me to your groups, church, or other event. I’m happy to
be prepared to speak or to be more reserved.

3. Volunteer. You don’t have to know what you want to volunteer to do.
Our volunteer coordinator will work to give you opportunities. There is
much to be done. Indoors and outside. Our campaign doesn’t have the cash
to pay a staff, so without volunteer help it doesn’t get done if I don’t do
it.

4. Join our $10 a month club (or whatever level works best for you).
It’s easy at LinebergerforUScongress.com
<https://www.linebergerforuscongress.com/>

This email will go out to about 2400 friends. Out of that group, this ask
could raise twice what we spent on our 2024 campaign. That is a good start
to making a strong run to flip this seat. I’ll talk more about our
accomplishments with money later.

5. Share, share, share. We need to make sure that everyone in our
district knows about Ernest Lineberger as the Better Choice for their
congressman. He’s a veteran (Gill’s not). He wants to recover our economy
and government services so everyone can lead a quality life (DOGE will
not). He supports the constitution (rather than impeaching judges like
Gill). Sharing is caring. Don’t let our voters make the same mistake of
just going along with the Republican club. Help them see what is best for
them. It’s an easy choice. It’s not a trick.

We have about a year and a half until the general election, time to work
and work to find those Republican voters who are figuring out that none of
Trump’s actions are helping them. We need to engage and win them over.

I’ve been out and about getting better acquainted with our community and
letting them get to know me.
Here is a quick list.

Blue Tsunami Democratic Club in Richardson, attended and introduced myself
Beyond the Ballot held by DFW METRO NAACP, National Coalition of 100 Black
Women, & 100 Black Men
Carrollton Democratic Club Dinner meeting featuring Sheila Taylor and others
Held a Town Hall in Aubrey with Linsey Fagan and the great group of Denton
Town Hall Planning
Attended Mr. Gill’s event with the Wise County Republicans
Spoke up with a real question about his activities on the DOGE
committee vs concerns for veterans,
social security, health care services and more that we all depend
on regardless of party.
The room listened.
Block walked in Providence Village for Town Council candidate, David Vartian
Attended and introduced myself to The Crossroads Town Council
Voted to Re-elect Veteran Sheila Taylor to the LISD School Board on the
first day of early voting
Participated in a volunteer event at Trusted World, supporting clothing,
food and other needs
Attended and was introduced to the crowd at Beto’s Democracy in Action:
Denton Town Hall
Visited Flower Mound United Methodist Church attending adult Sunday school
and worship
Attended and introduced myself to the Denton County Commissioner’s Court;
Speaking up for Vote Centers on election day, and funding for
Span/ Meals on Wheels of Denton County
Visited the new office spaces for the Denton County Democratic Party
Attended a board meeting for Span/ Meals on Wheels of Denton County (as a
board member)
Supported and attended the 2025 LULAC Scholarship Awards Banquet (as a
member of LULAC)
Hosted a May Day Protest Rally at Hebron and Old Denton with 150
participants, including Carrollton Dems
Attended and introduced myself to the Decatur Veterans Mixer with the Wise
County DAV and more
Helped Poll Greet in Providence Village with Town Council Candidate David
Vartian
Attended worship and adult Sunday School at my home church
Attended and introduced myself to The Lewisville City Council, enjoying the
farewell to Brandon Jones
Attended and introduced myself to The Colony City Council
Participated in the weekly podcast, Let’s talk about it with Stephanie
Draper and others

It looks like a long list, but there were other events I couldn’t attend.
I give this list partly to show that I am dedicated to this task of serving
as a candidate and community leader.

Here are the biggies for the near future. Hopefully, I’ll get to attend
all of these and more.
Flying Kites with Carrollton Pride on Saturday, May 10th (I won this big
time last year!)
Visit another area church, maybe the friendly and open to all Creekwood
Christian Church in Flower Mound
Attend LISD School Board swearing in of Sheila Taylor Monday, May 12th
Host a Town Hall with the Robson Ranch Democratic Committee since Mr. Gill
isn’t hosting them
Tuesday, May 13th, 6 PM at Robson Ranch
Attending Footloose, 80’s Dance Party fundraiser for SPAN/ Meals on Wheels
in Flower Mound, May 17th
Attend and introduce myself to the Flower Mound City Council, May 19th
Attend Flower Mound Dems meeting Wednesday, May 21st
Attend and introduce myself to the Aubrey City Council, May 22nd
Memorial Day, TBD, Monday, May 26th
Attend Little Elm Veterans Event Wednesday, June 4th

We have been actively raising money with weekly fundraising emails, some
targeting texting and more to fund current and future voter outreach. Our
digital advertising campaign began last month and has achieved 70,000
impressions. This method is useful to put my name out to more people than
I haven’t reached personally. It’s not as good as personal, but it’s a
start. We want people to know and be looking for my name on their ballot
come November.

One of our fundraising emails had an error that many wouldn’t recognize,
but one lawyer did. She wrote back politely pointing out the error. I
replied with a ‘thank you’ and a deeper thank you for helping me to get
things right in the future. Apparently, that was enough of a personal
touch because she wrote back again. Here’s a small excerpt:

“I didn't know much about your race until you responded to my email
yesterday and I decided to look into it. Count me in as a Lineberger
supporter all the way. I looked through your Facebook page and Ballotpedia,
and I can see your heart, drive, and motivation. I wish you all the best in
the coming election, and look forward to your victory over that slick brat,
Brandon Gill. If I can ever be of assistance to your campaign, please let
me know.”
That meant a lot. Obviously, this isn’t a swing vote, but it’s
solid support. This is how I want everyone I meet or interact with feel.
Home, safe, warm, fresh cookies, ... whatever that really good feeling is for
them. A safe harbor in a storm of political nonsense. And motivated to
pitch in and help to make this a reality.

Thank you for your support! Just like the email mentioned above, you are
the key to winning this election and recovering our government services and
American ideals.

Putting People’s Needs First! Before Wealthy Greed and Before Party
Politics!

Ernest Lineberger

Your Candidate for US House (Texas CD26)

name: Melton for Iowa
subject: Melton for Iowa 2026: I'm running again, and I hope you join us!
body:

|
# Melton for Iowa 2026
---
---
| Hello Peter,
I'm Running Again for Iowa's 4th Congressional District
The 4th District is being left behind--by corrupt corporate interests, by a Republican party that no longer listens to its own voters, and by an incumbent in Randy Feenstra who refuses to show up for the people and who is beholden to the billionaires. I'm running again in 2026 because we've helped build a growing grassroots movement with energy that is surging across the 4th, and we can't afford to start over.
What We Accomplished in 2024

* Outperformed our 2022 campaign in 33 of 36 counties and held steady in the other 3
* Earned tens of thousands of votes from non-Democrats and hit our district's Cook Rating expectation in a down cycle for Dems
* Earned a 97% "happily support" rating per our anonymous surveys post-election
* Ran a corporate PAC-free campaign that sparked impactful conversations across the state and partisan divide about:
* Iowa's cancer crisis
* Water quality
* Eminent Domain abuse-driven CO2 pipelines
* Helped rebuild county parties, recruit new candidates, and energize rural Iowa

GOP Panic Was Real

* In 2024, we earned the unprecedented endorsement of our opponent Randy Feenstra's Republican primary challenger.
* Forced Iowa GOP leadership into damage control mode with a week of panic tweeting that made national news
* They attacked their own voters instead of reflecting on what's gone wrong and why they have the least popular governor in the country, which will hurt them in '26

A Movement, Not a Party Line

* This race isn't red vs. blue--it's we the people vs. the oligarchs and their puppets
* I reject:
* Corporate PAC money
* D.C. handlers
* The status quo
* I have always put people over party, don't rely on national party money, and will run on our values without blindly leaning on national party talking points.

The Feenstra Record

* Avoids pre-announced public town halls and was the only Congressional candidate in Iowa the last two cycles to refuse a public debate
* Refuses all federal community improvement funds for our district, leaving our tax dollars on the table, while the other three Iowa Congressional Republicans bring millions back to their communities every year
* Has taken tens of thousands from CO2 pipeline backers and publicly supported the eminent domain-abuse driven pipelines before I silenced him
* Has not had success writing bills that become law
* Touts Trump's agenda and has remained silent on the many unpopular aspects of Trump's 2nd term--even when it hurts farmers and Main Street here in the 4th

Why 2026 is Different

* Trump's 2nd midterm in 2026 will probably mirror his first midterm in 2018--when J.D. Scholten nearly flipped this seat.
* More non-Democrats who liked our vision but couldn't bring themselves to vote for a Democratic candidate in '24 are ready to join us '26, as they didn't vote for what Trump is doing, and certainly don't like Feenstra's support of it.

The Trump Agenda Feenstra Remains Silent On?

* Market access for farmers and our Medicaid and SNAP benefits--Slashed.
* Small businesses on Main St. and Free Speech--Crushed.
* Layoffs to fund his tax cuts for his billionaire friends--Surging.
* The coming jump in inflation--Painful.

What I Believe

* Progress takes time and consistency when running a grassroots campaign targeted to gain people's trust across partisan lines
* We need candidates out here to run multiple times to keep this momentum going to challenge the status quo to deliver change for the 4th

Join Us
Help get this campaign off to a great start, per below! 💙 Contribute: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m4i26](https://fpglcyebb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015LjB_NprJQgk_fIfBgcBMMuhKofLhzXocpgsDW13aW3RJx6xUplU489XcR8kL7wm9xwPAqFqOW17H1Q-0nVQDIpdZry59I_-rniRsRMrVYBk7CdnuV1SEJJ3aOvit2NTdYb560Rz8vXoq18OPnEdcFTXIaxW3T9eiBaDLWg97rM=&c=wL8QefvYMYTvxiB3mJ-jUGTdS_XYiaYnfxSb34uWYzBJyjVCxlahuw==&ch=EjIhnRYHTJdPwmOvbTDu3cCTPBbiqSHoqelq3BdVsDHLXVe0NrYfuQ==) 📬 Or mail a check to: Melton for Iowa PO Box 36 Webster City, IA 50595
Let's keep fighting the good fight together! Ryan Melton

---

---
| |
---
|

clean_body: | | | | | == | | == | Melton for Iowa 2026 | Hello Peter, I'm Running Again for Iowa's 4th Congressional District The 4th District is being left behind--by corrupt corporate interests, by a Republican party that no longer listens to its own voters, and by an incumbent in Randy Feenstra who refuses to show up for the people and who is beholden to the billionaires. I'm running again in 2026 because we've helped build a growing grassroots movement with energy that is surging across the 4th, and we can't afford to start over. What We Accomplished in 2024 Outperformed our 2022 campaign in 33 of 36 counties and held steady in the other 3 Earned tens of thousands of votes from non-Democrats and hit our district's Cook Rating expectation in a down cycle for Dems Earned a 97% "happily support" rating per our anonymous surveys post-election Ran a corporate PAC-free campaign that sparked impactful conversations across the state and partisan divide about: Iowa's cancer crisis Water quality Eminent Domain abuse-driven CO2 pipelines Helped rebuild county parties, recruit new candidates, and energize rural Iowa GOP Panic Was Real In 2024, we earned the unprecedented endorsement of our opponent Randy Feenstra's Republican primary challenger. Forced Iowa GOP leadership into damage control mode with a week of panic tweeting that made national news They attacked their own voters instead of reflecting on what's gone wrong and why they have the least popular governor in the country, which will hurt them in '26 A Movement, Not a Party Line This race isn't red vs. blue--it's we the people vs. the oligarchs and their puppets I reject: Corporate PAC money D.C. handlers The status quo I have always put people over party, don't rely on national party money, and will run on our values without blindly leaning on national party talking points. The Feenstra Record Avoids pre-announced public town halls and was the only Congressional candidate in Iowa the last two cycles to refuse a public debate Refuses all federal community improvement funds for our district, leaving our tax dollars on the table, while the other three Iowa Congressional Republicans bring millions back to their communities every year Has taken tens of thousands from CO2 pipeline backers and publicly supported the eminent domain-abuse driven pipelines before I silenced him Has not had success writing bills that become law Touts Trump's agenda and has remained silent on the many unpopular aspects of Trump's 2nd term--even when it hurts farmers and Main Street here in the 4th Why 2026 is Different Trump's 2nd midterm in 2026 will probably mirror his first midterm in 2018--when J.D. Scholten nearly flipped this seat. More non-Democrats who liked our vision but couldn't bring themselves to vote for a Democratic candidate in '24 are ready to join us '26, as they didn't vote for what Trump is doing, and certainly don't like Feenstra's support of it. The Trump Agenda Feenstra Remains Silent On? Market access for farmers and our Medicaid and SNAP benefits--Slashed. Small businesses on Main St. and Free Speech--Crushed. Layoffs to fund his tax cuts for his billionaire friends--Surging. The coming jump in inflation--Painful. What I Believe Progress takes time and consistency when running a grassroots campaign targeted to gain people's trust across partisan lines We need candidates out here to run multiple times to keep this momentum going to challenge the status quo to deliver change for the 4th Join Us Help get this campaign off to a great start, per below! 💙 Contribute: == 📬 Or mail a check to: Melton for Iowa PO Box 36 Webster City, IA 50595 Let's keep fighting the good fight together! Ryan Melton | | | | | | | | | == | == == == | == | P.O. Box 36, Webster City, Iowa, 50595 melton4iowa@gmail.com | mailto:melton4iowa@gmail.com | | | | Political Campaign | PO BOX 36 | Webster City, IA 50595 US | | | | | | |

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Tell Congress: We’re Taxed Enough Already
body:
This is why the Tea Party started—don’t let them raise our taxes now instead of cutting spending.
| | | |
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aadbb624/1edb9794aad49d25)
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** The tea party movement began because of the out-of-control spending in Washington, D.C.--and because hardworking Americans were already taxed enough already. This is still true today. **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ TAKE ACTION ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aadbb624/1edb9794aad49d27)
---
| **** While we're all thankful for President Trump's first-term tax cuts, recent news reports now indicate that some on Capitol Hill are considering tax increases instead of making the necessary spending cuts. That's completely unacceptable. **It 's not the American people's job to pay more just because Congress won't say no to special interests or rein in the bloated federal budget.** We've been here before. But this time, the stakes are higher than ever. **We have a narrow, once-in-a-lifetime opportunity** **to pass a budget that reflects** **America First priorities** : limited government, lower taxes, a strong economy, and real fiscal discipline. But if Congress raises taxes instead of cutting spending, they will destroy this chance to rebuild the economy, reduce the debt, and deliver on the promises that got President Trump elected. We may never get another shot at this--and if they fail now, the chances of getting one again grow slimmer by the day. **That 's why America needs the conservative grassroots to take immediate action, **and why we've created a clear, [step-by-step how-to guide](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aadbb624/1edb9794aad49d29 "https://www.teapartypatriots.org/download-budgetbattle-guide/") with everything you need to ensure Congress gets the message. Use it, share it, and help make sure your voice is heard in this fight.****____**** **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ DOWNLOAD THE GUIDE ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aadbb624/1edb9794aad49d2b)
---
| **** ******** The government doesn't need more of your money--it needs discipline. **We 're taxed enough already. It's time to cut the spending, not your paycheck.**** ****_Let 's make sure Congress hears us._**
In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aadbb624/1edb9794aad49d2d)
---
|
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aadbb624/1edb9794aad49d2f)

| Peter,
It's the final push before Medley Long's special election for State Rep this Tuesday, May 13th. Please, join us on the campaign trail!
🚪 Last Weekend of Door Knocking & Phone Banking in District
Meet up at 8 West St, Beverly
* Saturday May 10 & Sunday May 11
* Morning shift meets at 10a, afternoon shift meets at 3p
* P.S. - the campaign's home base on Election Day will be here too. Come over to make GOTV calls any time on Election Day May 13th.

📞 "The Night Before" Phone Banking at MassGOP HQ
MassGOP HQ, 85 Merrimac St, Boston
* Monday, May 12 | 4:00 - 7:00 PM

PLEASE, JOIN US TO MAKE THE FINAL PUSH to send Medley Long to Beacon Hill!

## McKinney Airport Adding Passenger Service
The McKinney City Council has approved $72 million in contracts to expand the city’s airport by adding a 46,600-square-foot commercial passenger terminal. The [expansion will provide North Texas travelers with an alternative](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3O4yAURJ8Gd0T8GDCFi23cZdstrQtcErQYLEzi5O1X3lf4qilmNNI5f-7rHVJO5fEbNpz7J9a14Hlk7B3bCs7V3vfX8cTDQcoNY22b5dsqmFCUKcrsGiDl7zoOYXYsWD7gzM2ozTQpPg3P2dlJQwhyAq2VRieAj2aKUQkJ1tgwpPk6Y4pZzhlX-jZGKZ2Rchq9jTIiGRmG1Gu79Sd2_MAR87e-sd183YY8P3vfDyJ_EbEQsZzneTsjwFUSsUDryWckYukN3piJWDb_N5WCX1qgp1ogU0htr61T_OxQjlQL9TXndMWr9C_1tRy9vfw1p_FVQioPCvve6hsDEYuYDNWeodKSU6O0omPQSB2io8oKHo30nDExtDnsZ8o5HdqQkT02SPk_Rf-Z-_cs_gUAAP__P_CZGw) to DFW International Airport and Love Field as soon as next year. Local sales taxes and over $88 million in grants from the county, state, and federal governments will fund the expansion. Officials expect the project to [add up to $400 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SnDAQhJ9GZNrSHwgFCpyQnVOH1ADD7pQltCXNHbt-eheOnF_SUdfXXd-vj_kDKNFx_wkZI7_2Mh94toTMWGdYlsL8_GwPbAtQqriXmoPOs1Gml6qXKswbUHrPrtvioragO4zau8GPY6_H7hEHP4AJuAanlQ29DQ5gNEvvrQnew9BRvGCqV0Frpfvh5nZrF2_t6Naw2x2FU7gRl3rjBzK-oO3pXb6w3taSuxQfzM8m7A9hJmGm8zxvW4Y7_KEDr4Yw01pyxroSJFkRksTGwCjMdC0LM6kr8vqbjgPfsmHClZtcPiltWJvcS5XETR54yv9QQPVZKkvGmumAJMzU1bg9T0qJ2uCFU_cMlP7d5O_J_YrmbwAAAP__K-iPNA) in annual revenue to the airport’s current $330 million. The new terminal will open with three gates and could [eventually accommodate five](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbvO5CwMhq-GdIwIkFOR4m_SfX-7ZeSAmaDlJPCc7n6Vqbbfxo0f-fGr99fP_gM--HT_HyKu9HZ5T_hqAYmw7nAcmag82ontAB8qulzj0sddCjlwMXCx7BZ8-Oy6s-sh7NJ3uPaTHqd5Hvq5O1c7zCABZiv0CHpUzqCanBrVDBpA6c6v1zExiKXvRT-MN-2UOialZm0WpxwyLdB6yvVGJxK-obnwyU-sN5NjF9aTqDSm_mNyY3IzOcZH8vTxsYChi2FysxACNO5yJf7KlU4mt2h--5Twc63xiSGXiImY3K5_mNzEd4x_kdzkRzI-cCil5ic27h7J-nTnJieqYOir4OBruUyENfoEgeO7QGo-Jya3rq62vHwIvo0T0-IewYdvFPq3Ap6r_BMAAP__ANSdng). Two budget airlines are reportedly looking at offering flights when the project is completed. Voters previously rejected two bond proposals for the expansion, which has [dominated McKinney politics](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O4yAUhZ8Gd0SA8V9BkWLdzbRbWtdwidFgsODGTt5-lXmFrc_R0fm-v1_LF4QY0uMbdjT08nlJeNWIRFgWWNdMdDzrhnWFEAv6XPZJ7osSquOi42JaHIT4XnTjzCrcJBs0ctD9MI6dHJvN9OM02A4sygG0023vrBqsG1fVg_Cib4L5jIlOTFIK2fU37dt2Hdp21HbyrUemBbpAudxoQ8IXVB_f-cRys3lvotmIjsraO1MzU_N1Xbe9pk_G1IyJPytTMxU4MTI1f-iYmm1EKOi4z4UT_GD2nu_2J6SEbw7HUfKJlftnciE9uM2JCliqv30I5ciFOL4OSDXkxNQMhd_v8k_8zrUpxh1XiDHUfmBaPHYI8fcq_Z_g06h_AQAA__9UAZKh) for much of the last year. Candidates in runoff elections for mayor and an at-large city council seat have expressed opposing views on the issue.
## Abbott Urges Lawmakers to Pass Bail Reform
Gov. Greg Abbott is calling on lawmakers to [approve two bail reform proposals](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOwyAUBNDT4M4WH2xjCopt3GXbLS0InxgJmwh-4uT2K2-OsP1oRm9-LsvFxhT327fd0NAr5GXHoyYkwrJY5zLR_VFXrM7GVDDksmnYFsHF0PKh5XrxNqb30jfeOO41NGhA9aOapgGmZjWCcw9Scz9qGJWDq0RwiBqCC2KUqonmLOMD1wAchrHrg5ROSTn1Vx1kQNZz9JFy6WhFwpetIb3zE0t3zVuTzEp0r0x-MTEzMR_H0YX8UvZRKe5nhIn5NDEx3_Kz_Zhal3fffjxtyY_dk3UJm2L8_YgpxToq1vPbZmP6m6H_nfM04jcAAP__PIR5xw) before the legislative session concludes in a few weeks. In February, the Texas Senate [approved constitutional amendments](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2y4yAMBeCnsTs8gPEPBcU27u62W3pkI2ImGDygxMnb7zh5hNtKozP6zr-f-Qd88PH2F3Y09HJpjniWgESYZ1iWRHQ8yoZlAR8yupR3LfZZctkx3jGuZws-vGdVW7Nwq0WNRgyqH8axE2O9Gac0RzmuoIRbtOh6FOOoB6mBWzs4XXtzhfGOayG46PpGubZdhrYd1apd67BSHK2nlBvakPAFxYV3emJu1rTXwWxER6naP5WcKjmd59ncXxCvZSWnS1PJ6XPGjhQ8-fUafGnsa2MXjn117IQcC7O4pzUDFRYTMUpsgfXOLMQb5vQobM1-9xHClVVnY4_Th-BLP1SK33bw4fMc_a7Sp5H_AwAA__9vr43O) that would deny bail to illegal immigrants accused of a felony and suspects charged with violent crimes unless there’s “clear and convincing evidence” they won’t pose a danger to others. The amendments must receive two-thirds support in each chamber and the approval of a majority of voters before they can become effective. Republican lawmakers in the House say the measures [don’t have enough support](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpDAQhJ8Gsh7Zxgw4IBjpjmwvvRAZuw3W-gfZPcPu25-4eYTNWuqqUn3192P50D74tP3RESf6cnlJeNaARFgWva6Z6HjWHeuqfSjocomKx0Uw0QPrganFah--F9naaWVW8RYnPsj7MI49H9t9GpVxTvYWmWJOaGZWawVzyO-rkVKp1k9XGOuZ4pzx_n6TruvWoetGaZTrHDaSofWUy412JPzS1YXv_MJyMzm2YdqJjtp0j0bMjZjP87zFmq5fI2ZM8KyNmI8cPHlzndtlTRETXWpPO5iQzSeQN58-bbDlF2wFN3jTQ4ULHd7soDdMVoPTBis8j92HAKsmCtiIWRd4PPjviL9yWyZ7nD4EX-9DI9kWtQ__C9PPZn5N4l8AAAD___JXlFU) among Democrats to pass at the moment. Abbott has stopped short of saying he would call a special session to pass bail reform, which has been [blocked in the House](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQhZ_G7oj4GWwoKLZxd7fd0hrM4KDFIcI4vvftV04eYbuR5ujT-c6fr_kLU06P9Tdu5Np3LPODzj1Ta1Rn9L609jz2O-0eU64US92s2GbJpWZcM27ngCn_zNAH53mwoicnRhhGY7Qw_d2NCqIZQNoFSI3aR6WAg0HU0kQF2Cd3wbjmVggu9HCDqJQflTKw2KgidcAppFbqrd2p0TfuMf-UF9XbUrY-u3trz71Tvzo5dXI6z_P293XQ9ezkhLWlJVMnp8urk9Oz5NTScp1vFsu0pj1jO-qVWiut7OPNLmX2cWa1HI_Q0L9RcrAsDosSATzzCJqBGiXzwRqmeTDDgCgQxr668DxTzmkfxg74umHK79bt_7Z-OfkvAAD__9MIkVg) after passing the Senate in past sessions.
## Texas Waterparks Among Best in U.S.
A _USA Today_ list of the [nation’s top 10 waterparks](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD3OozAURVdjOpD_wHbhYhq6TDsleuDnYI2Jkf0Skt2PMlv46nt1jnT-3JYbpJwe999woKd3LMsDr5aRCOsC61qIzmfbsa2QcsVY6uHEsUgux56PPXdLgJQ_i-6CX3lwokMvjJ6MtaOw3e4tD0EbtHIS0YALuMVgHLpx40GBdV3yXxgfuROCi3EadFRqNUpZvbmoIjLNMSQqdaAdCd_QYv6UF9ZhK0eX_U50NqZ-MTkzOQu-YqPh2YBKgM_3w-QMF9TQmJy_Y1-eFEqp_QWEtT-h_mVy7qoP55VyTm0yTPP7ASn_V9DPwry8_BcAAP__nDN4EQ) includes two in Texas: the SeaWorld-owned Aquatica San Antonio and Splashway Waterpark in Sheridan. [Splashway](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ugzAUhZ8GNpD_gcFDlmzp0FTKaBl8HawajOxbSN6-SvoIXY-Ozvn03S7mYkMM6_3DLqDx4ZNZ4SgRECEbO44JcfspM5TRhpjBp7wMdDGMMNkQ2ZDBOBvi04ja6ZG4gdagaSdU1_eS9vWsfceI7DwfpVDKKcGUoq4DpdwAlk19HfRrjEgyUEqoVK3wnI8d572YBs89VIKAC5hyizMgPGzx8Zl2yO2UljrqGXErFT9V7Fyx83EcLeawWbeHkt6dip1PiNlOGNJqPmEPcDR3qZTijeNMCMlZ8xeX5rpFW-bDPs3NIuTN5u_mOkMOzq7m6_XezrjEOmu3HSHGUFRXCXJfbIhvIPyfxl2z3wAAAP__E6iISg) is the top-ranked waterpark in the annual list. It boasts a lazy river that snakes under waterfalls, the Midnight Storm—a tube slide that shoots riders through twists and turns in complete darkness—and the dizzying Tubular Tornado. At No. 10 on the list, the tropical-themed [Aquatica San Antonio](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2PozAYhH8NdCB_Yly4oEmXK-5O2tIy2IRXMpi130Dy71fJNttvNxqNRo-ej6u9Ooiw3f64NRh8zMlu4SwxIIZs3TgmxP1ellBGBzGHOeVV09UywmRDZEO09Q7i04ram5F4TetgqBKd6ntJ-3oxjEkfpBRyInyWWlPaKaG5nIiUymtRg3mdEUk0pYTKrhUz56PivBeTnvkcKkGCB0y5xSVgeLgyx2c6Qm6ntNbRLIh7qfhQsUvFLud5tphhd_6Akt6bil0GxOwmhLTZv-GAcDa3jmjZNZ6zTiqlmu-6NMPn3SFMzv5zmx02TBuk5ke2_18E7YJrrLPx-wkxQulUJchtdRDfUPg7lYdhXwEAAP__SlOI1Q) offers up-close marine life encounters, high-thrill slides, and plenty of places to relax and play. Families can touch and feed stingrays, brave the near-vertical Breakaway Falls slide, or splash around in the massive Big Surf Shores wave pool. This summer is [predicted to be a hot one](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOpSAQRb9Gd_UCKKgLFy-TOKue7SxNKcWDBMRAvbb77yf2L8z2VFLn3vv3Y_3AEMPx-oOJZv5yeT3oqpGYqay4bZn5fFdPdcMQC7lc0iTTqoTSIDSIabUY4vfat3behJ1kS7McejOMo5Zj62eFZDdrtDSuH1WPWu-m6wY0VptNG2rDfD8TWkxSCqnNo3ddtw1dN_b75DpHTS_IBs7lwZ6YvrC6-J0_qTz2nNo4e-azNt2zUUujluu6Hqke961RCx3wrjclZE-lUQvns3IugW7s8wU-M1whRggML2IIB_xIgH2oUN8pUQFPhaDC5ZHBYblRBYwJD9zhLGTDzhVcLnCXadSCBZ5P-ev3ZkxbZnvehlDN0PTilTDEn-z8f4t_zupfAAAA__8neZZm). name: House GOP
subject: Agenda 47 is in jeopardy
body:
This is an urgent memo from the House GOP. We need your eyes on it right now.

| | | | |
---
President Donald J. Trump was elected to **_DRAIN THE SWAMP_** ,**_ SLASH WASTEFUL SPENDING_**, and **_PUT AMERICA FIRST_** _**!**_
Friend, how do we enact his bold agenda? We codify it into law with our annual appropriation bill!
But right now, radical Democrats and their Deep State allies are fighting tooth and nail to block Agenda 47.
Democrats are hell-bent on keeping the status quo and bankrupting our nation - but that’s exactly what voters rejected at the ballot box when they voted for a GOP trifecta last November.
President Trump won a landslide election victory in 2024. The American people voted for radical change and we need to make absolutely sure that we deliver President Trump's agenda.
[HELP US DEFEND TRUMP'S AGENDA](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asbL/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
We can’t let the Left steamroll President Trump’s vision.
**_[We need to make sure House Republicans have everything they need to stand up to the Democrats and their allies in the Deep State](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asbL/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**** _._**
[JOIN THE FIGHT TO DELIVER AGENDA 47](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asbL/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**__[If you’re not ready to give up on this movement then please rush an urgent contribution of any amount to make sure House Republicans have the resources to FIGHT BACK against Democrat obstruction](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asbL/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_._**
This fight isn’t over. We must hold the line in Congress to make sure President Trump is able to deliver the America First policies that he promised to the American People. We need your help to make it to the finish line by protecting our majority.
_With Perseverance,_
**House GOP**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asbL/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NDkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb63fdc7b-9f62-4d86-a3db-fa35b9bbe2cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Just a buck
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I'm putting my own skin in the game, just like President Trump did in 2024, because I believe in this country and I believe in you.

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwNTA5XzdHLUk1LjExNDUxMF90MTYzNzkxNS0zNjIzJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDUwOV83Ry1JNS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2Mzc5MTUtMzYyMyJ9/aLWTUouMN-6t0QPL21_3ZQ)Hey, it's Vivek -
I need your help. This mission to revive American greatness can't be accomplished with money alone. **
****It requires a movement - an army of patriotic Americans who are ready to take a stand and say "ENOUGH" to Big Government.******Here's what we're going to do:
* Cut red tape
* Slash taxes
* Empower families
* Unleash innovation
* And put you, the citizen, back in charge

I'm not running to control you - I'm running to set you free.
And now I'm asking you to take one small step with me: [Chip in $1 today.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwNTA5XzdHLUk1LjExNDUxMF90MTYzNzkxNS0zNjIzJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDUwOV83Ry1JNS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2Mzc5MTUtMzYyMyJ9/eZ9yV2RRufGm7fGh2UJJwQ)** **
Yes - just a buck.
Not because it will fund the whole campaign, but because it sends a powerful message: that you, and millions of other proud Americans, believe in what we're building TOGETHER.
A campaign built by everyday citizens, not career politicians. That's how we win.
[Do you think you could do me that favor today?](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwNTA5XzdHLUk1LjExNDUxMF90MTYzNzkxNS0zNjIzJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDUwOV83Ry1JNS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2Mzc5MTUtMzYyMyJ9/DUa4mUyvkTqBKYEf7it9Lg)****[Chip in just $1 right now
