name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 5/9/2025
body:
CPW tracks four suspected wolf dens, ranchers brace for more uncertainty
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Happy Friday!

🚨 Don’t wait—[get your Mountain Majesty Gala tickets now](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Seats are going fast for our biggest event of the year, featuring **Eric Trump** as our keynote speaker on June 21. This is your chance to stand with Colorado conservatives, celebrate our movement, and fuel the fight for freedom. 🎟️ Tickets are limited—and once they’re gone, they’re gone. [Grab yours today](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) before it’s too late!
Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** The 2025 session is officially _sine die_ , but the work continues—bills await Polis’ signature, and a special session is still possible. Don’t miss our _full session recap_ in Sunday’s News Digest. This week, the Senate rejected Polis’ pick for [judicial oversight](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) amid ongoing misconduct scandals, and Colorado approved a new graduation requirement: [financial literacy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Colorado is tracking up to [four possible wolf dens](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and deploying range riders to protect livestock. Meanwhile, District 49 near Colorado Springs is advancing a policy to [ban transgender students](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) from playing on teams matching their gender identity.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** President Trump announced a [major trade deal](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) with the U.K., including $5B in exports, a steel zone, and $10B in Boeing orders. Meanwhile, Chicago’s Cardinal Robert Francis Provost was elected Pope Leo XIV, becoming the [first American pope in history](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Shaina Cole urges caution on [gender-affirming care](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), warning of serious risks to children and calling for stronger safeguards. Dr. Brian Joondeph highlights how Trump’s base is [shifting toward Hispanic](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and working-class voters, challenging outdated media narratives.
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, May 9, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[CPW tracks four suspected wolf dens, ranchers brace for more uncertainty](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [POST INDEPENDENT](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
For wolves, the beginning of May signals the end of denning season.
While Colorado Parks and Wildlife is tracking up to four pairs of wolves that could be denning, none have been confirmed, according to Eric Odell, the agency’s wolf conservation program manager.
“We are monitoring one to three to four pairs of animals that could be denning,” Odell said at the May 7 meeting for the agency’s commission.
The agency is “sussing out” these potential dens using data from the GPS collars that the majority of Colorado’s wolves are wearing.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[School board in El Paso County moves to restrict transgender athletes, citing safety and fairness](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A school board near Colorado Springs advanced a policy banning transgender students from joining sports teams that match their gender identity. The final vote is expected soon, with supporters citing safety and fairness, and opponents warning of legal and emotional harm.
* The policy cites a Trump-era executive order threatening to cut federal funding for schools that allow trans athletes, putting it at odds with Colorado’s anti-discrimination laws and drawing warnings of potential lawsuits.
* Local officials and over 60 other education leaders statewide have urged the CHSAA to align with the federal order—though the association remains neutral.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[GET YOUR TICKET HERE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Cole: The hidden risks of gender-affirming care demand Colorado’s restraint](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Cole highlights serious long-term effects of gender-affirming treatments for minors—including irreversible infertility, bone loss, cardiovascular issues, and permanent physical changes—often introduced before children are developmentally capable of understanding the consequences.
* Studies show little long-term mental health improvement after hormone therapy, raising doubts about early intervention benefits.
* Cole warns that social media and activist parenting can rush kids into medical decisions, urging Colorado to adopt stronger safeguards and evaluation standards.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Hunter: “Don’t scatter roses after I’m gone” – what my wife’s words taught me during Brain Cancer Awareness Month](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER****| COMMENTARY | MAY 7** _For decades, I’ve stood in uniform beside the flag-draped coffins of fellow servicemen. I’ve stood at the front of church sanctuaries to bless weddings full of joy and eulogize lives full of sorrow. I’ve held hands with the grieving, prayed over the broken, and offered words when there were no words._
__
**[Boebert presses FBI, joins Trump and allies rallying to free ‘political prisoner’ Tina Peters](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | MAY 7** _Rep. Lauren Boebert is demanding federal action on behalf of Tina Peters, the former Mesa County Clerk sentenced to nine years in prison over her efforts to preserve election records following the 2020 election. In a March 21 letter to FBI Director Kash Patel, Boebert called the case a “staggeringly harsh” example of political prosecution and urged the bureau to investigate potential violations of Peters’ civil rights._
__
**[Backlash ignored: Senate approves HB25-1312 without parental rights protections](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | MAY 7** _After weeks of public backlash, failed compromise efforts, and a marathon Senate floor debate, Colorado lawmakers gave final approval Tuesday to HB25-1312 – a bill that critics say severs parents from decisions about their children’s identities in school._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🏗️ DID YOU KNOW?** The U.S. ranks as the world’s **second-largest manufacturing nation** —right behind China. Leading U.S. manufacturing sectors by value include chemical products, food and beverages (including tobacco), and computer and electronic goods.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "It is a matter of great satisfaction to me to hope that my children will be in circumstances to receive a good education. Mine was defective and I feel the inconvenience, if not the misfortune of not receiving a classical education. Knowledge is the food of genius, and my son, let no opportunity escape you to treasure up knowledge." – Sam Houston
|

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Stand with Charlie Kirk, Vivek, and Kirk Cameron
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
Let’s Make California Golden Again!

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt5orirqa7nacudkndnsktfsp0g28ek4dq414rl0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3g6apb2c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running to be the next Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense. To make **_[_California Golden Again_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq54hikrhi3lg3d7evop2b7g7683rk1h49k98cd0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3g6apb2c1h2bs)_.** Our grassroots movement is already gaining steam, and some of the strongest leaders in the conservative movement have already endorsed my campaign.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu86prh9bvct89dd6q30lsa9ghousc3iomu49cr0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3g6apb2c1h2bs)
---
There’s nowhere better than California. But everyone can see how badly things have gone off track. We were once the land of opportunity but now we have America’s highest prices for gas, power outages are a regular occurrence, and almost a million Californians don’t have access to clean drinking water. Today we’re sadly famous for dystopian scenes of crime, chaos, and squalor. Let’s make California the land of opportunity again with:
---
# GREAT JOBS
---
# **GREAT HOMES**
---
# **GREAT KIDS**
---
We need to make California an inspiration again, not a warning of what not to do. There’s only one way to do it. We need to end the Democrat one-party rule that got us into this mess. California is ready for a change. In 2024 almost every county shifted away from the Democrats. Since Gavin Newsom took office, **one million new Republican voters** have registered. Earlier this year a poll found that **48%** of Californians would consider voting for a Republican governor. I’m honored to have strong conservative leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy, Charlie Kirk, and Kirk Cameron endorsing me, but your personal endorsement matters more to me.
---
[ **PLEASE ENDORSE MY CAMPAIGN TODAY!** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9bn3e5qbu50eg3j88kbv6a3fp6vlfro6i1qiup8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3g6apb2c1h2bs)
---
To win, we’re building a grassroots movement. I know what I believe and what it takes to save California. Your contribution of **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will get our message to millions of voters. I’m the only candidate that can win and I promise _I will never bend the knee to the left_. I truly appreciate your help.
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmlvm24uqsgdv3f5i0ilgb3lc4jsln3r86qdtp1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3g6apb2c1h2bs)
---
With your support, we’ll make **California Golden Again.**
---
Steve HiltonCandidate for Governor of California
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsj934nril1hr43rhomfu298eq4gervllch1i770_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3g6apb2c1h2bs)
---
# Meet Steve Hilton
---
I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again.
---
[ **SUPPORT STEVE** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ah2ve0i534fskmb30har08lkvrt99jac9tdbfg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3g6apb2c1h2bs)
---
|
---

FPPC ID#1480425
---

name: All On The Line
subject: BREAKING: Alabama decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This is a testament to Alabamians who have fought so hard for equal representation
|
---

**BREAKING: A federal court declares that Alabama’s congressional map must follow the Voting Rights Act**
Peter,
In a big win for fairness in Alabama, a federal court ruled in _Caster v. Allen_ that Black Alabamians will continue to vote under a fair congressional map. This is a testament to Alabamians who have fought so hard for equal representation — and now have the most representative congressional map of their lifetimes.
The state of Alabama has repeatedly tried to dilute the voting power of its Black population. Despite Black voters making up 27% of the voting age population, the state enacted a congressional map that allowed Black Alabamians the opportunity to elect a candidate of their choice in only one district. Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), filed the first legal challenge to that map, which resulted in the Supreme Court striking the map down for violating Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act (VRA) in _Allen v. Milligan_.
But that hasn’t stopped Alabama lawmakers, who have continued to undermine, ignore, and outright challenge the decision. The NRF has supported the plaintiffs who’ve fought back to preserve this VRA-compliant map throughout.
Look: We’re not surprised that Alabama’s VRA-compliant map faced this attack. Anti-democracy gerrymanderers will stop at nothing to unjustly win and hold on to power. Today’s decision means Black voters, despite constant efforts to diminish their voting power, will continue to make their voices heard in two districts for the rest of the decade.
**Whether Alabama, Florida, or Louisiana: All On The Line is committed to pushing back against anti-democracy forces wherever and whenever they come for our rights.**
[**Donate now to support this critical work as we mobilize for fair maps and fair representation across the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107363247/544461261/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_ALWin_email_20250509-AOTL-Tier1-ALWin_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250509-AOTL-Tier1-ALWin_&utm_campaign=ALWin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcyZWIwOTIzLWNkMmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wyJDrDP6411A2la2jEeYThM7ILkd4EvhOMVjxRYa6cw=)

clean_body: This is a testament to Alabamians who have fought so hard for equal representation | BREAKING: A federal court declares that Alabama’s congressional map must follow the Voting Rights Act Peter, In a big win for fairness in Alabama, a federal court ruled in Caster v. Allen that Black Alabamians will continue to vote under a fair congressional map. This is a testament to Alabamians who have fought so hard for equal representation — and now have the most representative congressional map of their lifetimes. The state of Alabama has repeatedly tried to dilute the voting power of its Black population. Despite Black voters making up 27% of the voting age population, the state enacted a congressional map that allowed Black Alabamians the opportunity to elect a candidate of their choice in only one district. Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), filed the first legal challenge to that map, which resulted in the Supreme Court striking the map down for violating Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act (VRA) in Allen v. Milligan. But that hasn’t stopped Alabama lawmakers, who have continued to undermine, ignore, and outright challenge the decision. The NRF has supported the plaintiffs who’ve fought back to preserve this VRA-compliant map throughout. Look: We’re not surprised that Alabama’s VRA-compliant map faced this attack. Anti-democracy gerrymanderers will stop at nothing to unjustly win and hold on to power. Today’s decision means Black voters, despite constant efforts to diminish their voting power, will continue to make their voices heard in two districts for the rest of the decade. Whether Alabama, Florida, or Louisiana: All On The Line is committed to pushing back against anti-democracy forces wherever and whenever they come for our rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, The All On The Line Team is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. name: Byron Donalds
subject: I just got off the phone with Trump
body:
The future of the MAGA Movement will hinge on one thing

| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu5eip59rh5sibd1mc6uvmm1e3kqd6u3qq2p30to_)
---
|
---
_I just got off the phone with President Trump._
We discussed the greatest dangers that lie ahead for the MAGA Movement, and we’re BOTH in agreement:
The only way MAGA can emerge victorious is with _**[YOUR support](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpj8488v5h4nlg5dkhtfkl7r44rftb71ua2c1bto_)**_ , right here, right now:

|
---
[STAND WITH MAGA](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbh5migbgj1b4qltl9iv2cfvh52mk77df8mvmadg_)
|
---
Ever since President Trump retook the White House, Democrats have mustered a ferocious counterattack.
**>** AOC and Bernie Sanders are on a National MARCH, rallying MILLIONS of radical-leftists to their socialist cause.
**>** Trump-deranged judges are bogging down Trump at EVERY chance they can get.
**>** And worst of all - radical-left billionaires are shelling out MILLIONS to flip key MAGA races - and my name is at the TOP of their list.
**President Trump gave me clear orders - hold MAGA Country at ALL COSTS.**
Top Grassroots Supporters like yourself will make or break my campaign so I have to humbly ask, will you join President Trump and _**[support my race?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z48gpi9dla9tlbkpauocv47uso5gaa4qoj4n55b8_)**_

|
---
[STAND WITH MAGA](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk1col0trfm1hqb59m4helpvpoujfvcbq8iba6h0_)
|
---
I’m **ecstatic **to be President Trump’s pick for Florida’s next Governor. But the fight ahead will be the biggest challenge of my life, and I can’t do this alone.
_**[PLEASE. Can I count on you to chip in $20.25, $50, or $100 today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv1lfgu04ult0ohpf90qbbk2v79d6kscdglmtc18_)**_

|
---
[STAND WITH MAGA](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztpt6bht1caiglm7v3tvd6d83kmmvntsvml2c0s8_)
|
---
God bless you,
Byron Donalds

| Good Morning Virginia
---
| |
---
| Two Key Reminders:
1\. Join us for a McGuire Fundraiser in Lynchburg, VA on Monday, May 12, featuring special guest Rep. Ryan Zinke. [[Click here for details.](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PJ-c_sHobpQFHIj08KFFpa65TPk1Rgad54Dicc-8u1dfkB4S10YN3HUS6mFjNa1vFVJbUwr1LRvgIxZAGvylHn9TLR1Hf8W9bzRI0NH6RyleJa8XbFGe3RXAzUoESjwC1lJYjf-DrbE6pzByfQI23u9jYX4OKbrrveFAxXA7RChHzp_COYafqi48PiPAZd9D178o5SKFAI2ATJNm3oq9AlMESnBMYGVOIxOz8qtzUADpWpH0DqS3vxD_dNrEk9mJ51NEdFG4X1G-bhNsVM-hrA5tcOAK4FSSPCPEskB_or26MiuhNtz7pd-_miOr79vBvuDL2flMgo9XFaPO2pabjmGOr1KurtJ8UGZKrdEIsAQ5qMiWTDJwuAfbHmqRWZIfOyeUZxV78e849C7TSrFd69NH-5HTlKAW&c=6NvHY5ZYtz1HxZeY3ksKCzkIcLeNkSWaWdTZrYSPQkUO-1296PEYsQ==&ch=Ke5OrPIc2SIn670_JmHnX48JEpjHLSwlBgNFVJagTyiDY8cVueLtOA==)]
2\. It's time to lock arms and support Winsome Sears for Governor, our entire statewide ticket, and House of Delegates candidates to secure victory this November. [[Click here to get involved.](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PJ-c_sHobpQFHIj08KFFpa65TPk1Rgad54Dicc-8u1dfkB4S10YN3F4jzaOh05MRiZb6lJpz_PsxmKZEBKTVTAaIHGPgPErEyakylD7-9Zh3jF_yG7IpbgJNlQJLmwy7KR6Pbbu2ZnvLbGPkENVHq5vXOFOLsEKK&c=6NvHY5ZYtz1HxZeY3ksKCzkIcLeNkSWaWdTZrYSPQkUO-1296PEYsQ==&ch=Ke5OrPIc2SIn670_JmHnX48JEpjHLSwlBgNFVJagTyiDY8cVueLtOA==)]

---
| Dear Friend,
This morning, I waved "Good Morning" to neighbors in Fluvanna County. We had another productive week in Washington, D.C. Here's a quick look at what I've been up to: • Celebrated Israel's 77th Independence Day at the Israeli Embassy. • Participated in the House Armed Services Committee's Cyber, Information Technology, and Innovation (CITI) hearing. • Held our second Tele-Town Hall with thousands of constituents across the district. • Engaged in an insightful discussion with a great American Dr. Ben Carson during the Oversight Subcommittee on Healthcare and Financial Services. • Met one-on-one with several constituents who visited my office--always a highlight of the week. • Attended a fascinating lecture at the Library of Congress on Taiwan, microchips, and semiconductors. • Gave an interview about my charity swim with fellow Navy SEALs from Alcatraz Island to mainland San Francisco. I'm still cold from that swim. • Toured the Luck Stone Rock Quarry in Goochland County to learn more about their operations and local impact. We also passed two important pieces of legislation: • The Gulf of America Act of 2025 • The DHS Restrictions on Confucius Institutes and Chinese Entities of Concern Act We continue to advance efforts on reconciliation--what we've come to call "The One Beautiful Bill." Last night we had a very successful fundraiser in Goochland County. Thank you to all involved. Tonight, I'll be attending Liberty University's graduation ceremony. It is an honor to be represent you in Congress. Wishing you and your family a joyful and restful Mother's Day weekend!

---
| I'm honored to be the first member of Congress to receive President Trump's endorsement for re-election in 2026--and proud to be the first congressman in history to call Goochland County home. Thank you for your continued support. Together, we'll take our country back

clean_body: | | | | == | == | Good Morning Virginia | | | Two Key Reminders: 1\. Join us for a McGuire Fundraiser in Lynchburg, VA on Monday, May 12, featuring special guest Rep. Ryan Zinke. ==] 2\. It's time to lock arms and support Winsome Sears for Governor, our entire statewide ticket, and House of Delegates candidates to secure victory this November. ==] | Dear Friend, This morning, I waved "Good Morning" to neighbors in Fluvanna County. We had another productive week in Washington, D.C. Here's a quick look at what I've been up to: • Celebrated Israel's 77th Independence Day at the Israeli Embassy. • Participated in the House Armed Services Committee's Cyber, Information Technology, and Innovation (CITI) hearing. • Held our second Tele-Town Hall with thousands of constituents across the district. • Engaged in an insightful discussion with a great American Dr. Ben Carson during the Oversight Subcommittee on Healthcare and Financial Services. • Met one-on-one with several constituents who visited my office--always a highlight of the week. • Attended a fascinating lecture at the Library of Congress on Taiwan, microchips, and semiconductors. • Gave an interview about my charity swim with fellow Navy SEALs from Alcatraz Island to mainland San Francisco. I'm still cold from that swim. • Toured the Luck Stone Rock Quarry in Goochland County to learn more about their operations and local impact. We also passed two important pieces of legislation: • The Gulf of America Act of 2025 • The DHS Restrictions on Confucius Institutes and Chinese Entities of Concern Act We continue to advance efforts on reconciliation--what we've come to call "The One Beautiful Bill." Last night we had a very successful fundraiser in Goochland County. Thank you to all involved. Tonight, I'll be attending Liberty University's graduation ceremony. It is an honor to be represent you in Congress. Wishing you and your family a joyful and restful Mother's Day weekend! | I'm honored to be the first member of Congress to receive President Trump's endorsement for re-election in 2026--and proud to be the first congressman in history to call Goochland County home. Thank you for your continued support. Together, we'll take our country back == | For God and Country, | Congressman John McGuire VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == -Trump Endorsed -NRA Endorsed -Susan B. Anthony's List Endorsed -RJC Endorsed -Mark Levin Endorsed Pro-Life Pro-Gun Pro-Israel American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) America First The Spirit of Virginia == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | | | == | | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | | | McGuire for Virginia | PO Box 242 | Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 US | | | | | | |

name: Byron Donalds
subject: I just got off the phone with Trump
body:
The future of the MAGA Movement will hinge on one thing

| | | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2mrep6cc341hlk9skke1d30mjlacoh1n4fb0s00_)
---
|
---
_I just got off the phone with President Trump._
We discussed the greatest dangers that lie ahead for the MAGA Movement, and we’re BOTH in agreement:
The only way MAGA can emerge victorious is with _**[YOUR support](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zea64bq6v6b53esdnqjaf84f5n390fj5hts4bh50_)**_ , right here, right now:

|
---
[STAND WITH MAGA](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5hnqqbbksql1j35fvetf832tbb94u5brl1a60f8_)
|
---
Ever since President Trump retook the White House, Democrats have mustered a ferocious counterattack.
**>** AOC and Bernie Sanders are on a National MARCH, rallying MILLIONS of radical-leftists to their socialist cause.
**>** Trump-deranged judges are bogging down Trump at EVERY chance they can get.
**>** And worst of all - radical-left billionaires are shelling out MILLIONS to flip key MAGA races - and my name is at the TOP of their list.
**President Trump gave me clear orders - hold MAGA Country at ALL COSTS.**
Top Grassroots Supporters like yourself will make or break my campaign so I have to humbly ask, will you join President Trump and _**[support my race?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrmj67gmc5pgq1bm6p856l8n4eu47mlv4ovt2vi8_)**_

|
---
[STAND WITH MAGA](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrtpa9mm19spngnv4eu2igojor9qv35b1oku342o_)
|
---
I’m **ecstatic **to be President Trump’s pick for Florida’s next Governor. But the fight ahead will be the biggest challenge of my life, and I can’t do this alone.
_**[PLEASE. Can I count on you to chip in $20.25, $50, or $100 today?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znd6tu6la0kifrir58n59aglbjmvdo2c740mpbco_)**_

|
---
[STAND WITH MAGA](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvtgva2phcq751ln8dipnrunc3eb5q01d3ijbl1g_)
|
---
God bless you,
Byron Donalds

|
---

body:
His priorities are CRYSTAL clear...
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250509_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=19790%2E878179%2E7Eubr_) _Trump’s priorities are CRYSTAL clear, folks:_

**Funding Social Security, Medicare & the Department of Education?** NOPE! ❌
**Funding a $92 MILLION parade to boost his own ego?** No problem! ✅

But Trump is NOT a dictator, and we are NOT his subjects.
We’re FIGHTING BACK, team:

[**10,000 URGENT SIGNATURES NEEDED: Cancel Trump’s DISGUSTING, wasteful taxpayer-funded, Military Parade ASAP! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250509_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=19790%2E878179%2E7Eubr_) | [ADD YOUR NAME TO TELL CONGRESS: CANCEL TRUMP’S MILITARY PARADE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250509_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=19790%2E878179%2E7Eubr_)
---
If Trump can find the funds to host a self-righteous, North Korea-style military parade, he can find the funds to save Social Security. __It’s that simple.__

**_But Trump wants us to sit back and do _NOTHING_ while he wastes MILLIONS of dollars to praise himself, spending taxpayer dollars that could be used on essential programs like Medicare and Social Security!_**

[**That’s why we urgently need your support. Sign on to our emergency petition IMMEDIATELY to call on Congress to CANCEL Trump’s Birthday Military Parade! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250509_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=19790%2E878179%2E7Eubr_)

## $2.6M Settlement in Lawsuit Over Chicago Public School Transcendental Meditation Program
The ABA Journal (Debra Cassens Weiss) reports on the settlement (in which "defendants did not admit liability"): The lead plaintiff in the suit, Kaya Hudgins, was a practicing Muslim at the time of the "Quiet Time Program," according to prior coverage by Patch and Religion News Service and an April 2024 press release. ## Student Loan Forgiveness and Its Real Cost
Each spring, as tassels are turned and degrees are conferred, college graduates across the country celebrate the culmination of years of study, sacrifice, and—inevitably for many—debt. Against this backdrop, the idea of student loan forgiveness is touted by many as a compassionate and progressive policy, a generous gift to the newest members of the workforce. Colonel Stevenson serves as House Minority Floor Leader in the Kentucky Legislature. She is often the only Democratic member to break through to Republican leadership to make the bad bills better. Her Republican opponent in the General election will likely be a minion of Mitch McConnell – **the longest-serving Republican party leader in U.S. Senate history.**

McConnell developed a reputation as “Dr. No” during former President Obama’s term. He blocked Obama’s pick for a vacancy on the Supreme Court, paving the way for Roe v. Wade to be overturned. He unified Republicans against the Affordable Care Act, and then, after it passed, he sought to undo the law. He has voted against IVF. He has an A+ rating with the Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America scorecard for consistently voting against reproductive rights. He voted against the Family and Medical Leave Act, opposes same-sex marriage, voted against the Equal Pay Act, voted against raising the federal minimum wage... and so much more.

Mitch McConnell has been horrible for America, and after enduring him for decades, the people of Kentucky – and our country as a whole – deserve better. **This is truly a once-in-a-generation chance to elect someone amazing to replace him as his seat in Washington is FINALLY open.**

**That is where Col. Stevenson comes in.**

[**From negotiating hostage crises, prosecuting child sex criminals, violent crimes, and more, Colonel Stevenson has served this country with honor. Now, she needs our help to take her experience in public service to Washington. Help ensure Col. Stevenson’s campaign has the funding it will need to be successful by pitching in a split $20.25 or more contribution today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107366754/544466666/-527673297?refcode=EM_F_250509stevenson_N_CB_90DO_8_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJiMzIxMzg2LWQ1MmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mq2mr-DHhUcokBKsqoyZ3_Lq7KUReWlCKXlWcxbBBCQ=)

Together,

Charlotte Bell
Policy Researcher

clean_body: We’re writing today about a once-in-a-generation chance to...| | | | | = Hi Peter, As you may have heard, Senator Mitch McConnell will not be seeking reelection... A phenomenal woman named Colonel Pam Stevenson (D) is officially running for his seat in the US Senate, and Her Bold Move is THRILLED to be her FIRST MAJOR ENDORSEMENT. = After serving for 27 years in the Air Force, Col. Stevenson told us that she did not take an oath on the Constitution just to watch it be shredded by the current administration in Washington. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Her Bold Move and Pam Stevenson: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Colonel Stevenson serves as House Minority Floor Leader in the Kentucky Legislature. She is often the only Democratic member to break through to Republican leadership to make the bad bills better. Her Republican opponent in the General election will likely be a minion of Mitch McConnell – the longest-serving Republican party leader in U.S. Senate history. McConnell developed a reputation as “Dr. No” during former President Obama’s term. He blocked Obama’s pick for a vacancy on the Supreme Court, paving the way for Roe v. Wade to be overturned. He unified Republicans against the Affordable Care Act, and then, after it passed, he sought to undo the law. He has voted against IVF. He has an A+ rating with the Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America scorecard for consistently voting against reproductive rights. He voted against the Family and Medical Leave Act, opposes same-sex marriage, voted against the Equal Pay Act, voted against raising the federal minimum wage... and so much more. Mitch McConnell has been horrible for America, and after enduring him for decades, the people of Kentucky – and our country as a whole – deserve better. This is truly a once-in-a-generation chance to elect someone amazing to replace him as his seat in Washington is FINALLY open. That is where Col. Stevenson comes in. = Together, Charlotte Bell Policy Researcher Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states. Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies. Support this important work with a contribution today! = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. clean_body: Do you want to see Democrats pass Articles of Impeachment ending Trump’s Presidency? | Fellow American, I’m going to cut out the B.S. and get right to the point. > Do you want to see Democrats outraise Republicans, giving them a free pass to buy the 2026 election? > Do you want to see Democrats pass Articles of Impeachment ending Trump’s Presidency? If your answer is no to either of those questions, Senate Democrats are waging an unprecedented, multi-million-dollar deception campaign to derail Trump’s Presidency and end his America First movement. If they flip this seat and the Senate Majority, they’ll have the votes to execute their plan. Support from grassroots Republicans like you Fellow American, is integral to fighting back against the lies Democrats are circulating on social media and the mainstream press. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana _

name: Senate GOP Majority
subject: Guess who voted against America? (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,

You won't be shocked by this, but you will be angry.

Three radical Democrats (Chris Pappas, Haley Stevens, and Angie Craig) who also happen to be running for U.S. Senate in 2026 _**[just voted against renaming the Gulf of Mexico to the Gulf of America.](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zktf4smg7j36u4ffmqhjbn7elqs2fb2fj85ha0lo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3i60o36c1h2bs)**_
******************************************************[DEFEND THE SENATE MAJORITY>>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrd28p0tpktuna8ovt6tv7nb8pd3b1jf70cbfi2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3i60o36c1h2bs)******************************************************
You can count on one thing: Given the option, Democrats will always find a way to put anything ahead of America.

_-> They'll fly every flag but the American one.

-> They'll fund everything but what actually helps Americans.

-> And when it comes time to stand up for this country, **they fold faster than a card table at the end of a church potluck.**_

Senate Republicans are fighting to defend our Senate majority and stop radical Democrats from regaining power.

**[If we don 't act now, these America-last candidates could take their toxic ideology straight to the U.S. Senate.](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z146o5cocvsoi176cgl9ngqqsqufjf7d538p0hog_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3i60o36c1h2bs)

[That's why we're asking you to please chip in $35, $50, $100, or whatever you can today to help us defend our Senate majority and put America FIRST. >>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9ltkgsqq9dd70c0hefbk48touvplplvfujh80j0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3i60o36c1h2bs)**

name: itsourgreatamerica.com on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: A false narrative
body:
| | | _**A message from our sponsor...**_
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d74a20428cd4432d9618181a257a4bf4&_e=i-WbeaiRbVL4BPRCWbCW60ZcDYgcK932ZEssdMndzki7jTHTGPabchs57QMNrSRyrnsApKdbOvjOw4rYKjcf-GlcMmmQ1Oa0RItRN8j5dWQy64jd177PXnu64mJ5Xrl2_iTzFhgVa4r1R5aQc0q7irBY-Njrxu1GTfep6oR2nzjVBnTRqfmMdtJULR_HXgog6crepqy_czj_gXdYp8KV58y5Kr2KLRbb5MaS3GQHQEui11scMTSZjd9kWNwFdSsMTSebsddeeALhaaERn6rLffuMrO9Mb-V6BLv882xl99AwhtMezxTgnO7Szm3rlMbGQDVJREMsXB18ttSwA6nZm9A1IFZ7gYCrtjmYk1xe7m32Nyesz1yAgL8rkyUF0jpRBwZTq22CT-WPUQP6rmEyjjxfeDpk1Wmp33dtQ2-T2yc%3D) Peter, [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d74a20428cd4432d9618181a257a4bf4&_e=i-WbeaiRbVL4BPRCWbCW60ZcDYgcK932ZEssdMndzki7jTHTGPabchs57QMNrSRyrnsApKdbOvjOw4rYKjcf-GlcMmmQ1Oa0RItRN8j5dWQy64jd177PXnu64mJ5Xrl2_iTzFhgVa4r1R5aQc0q7irBY-Njrxu1GTfep6oR2nzjVBnTRqfmMdtJULR_HXgog6crepqy_czj_gXdYp8KV58y5Kr2KLRbb5MaS3GQHQEui11scMTSZjd9kWNwFdSsMTSebsddeeALhaaERn6rLfYsonPqV8OMUHUUOf7AkjQEO_4iOdJbmbmiD_JJvxXu91UgC_fB8dClP2Olj7u8vlRShNvKxELhF8N9u-SOZ1T6MfSZymyd7_ad9aKxrkpBBYOcllGUN5qtrtCzu72i1LaNFs6NBTZeJBGUhXgzg2GE%3D) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d74a20428cd4432d9618181a257a4bf4&_e=i-WbeaiRbVL4BPRCWbCW60ZcDYgcK932ZEssdMndzki7jTHTGPabchs57QMNrSRyrnsApKdbOvjOw4rYKjcf-GlcMmmQ1Oa0RItRN8j5dWQy64jd177PXnu64mJ5Xrl2_iTzFhgVa4r1R5aQc0q7irBY-Njrxu1GTfep6oR2nzjVBnTRqfmMdtJULR_HXgog6crepqy_czj_gXdYp8KV58y5Kr2KLRbb5MaS3GQHQEui11scMTSZjd9kWNwFdSsMTSebsddeeALhaaERn6rLfX2s4w12FfR2DQPoB7yJMFcXb3BhxzJrJqgGFVrK0FYK3gJde2kttzwO641nq__c0AU6rfsaomcKirh6bE1pwu_W8yrCbgBitZiZGfa9sjrw1xXgB4Hh4HiYolpcRoOD9ScfaXNVpyIcjh67owiaszA%3D) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d74a20428cd4432d9618181a257a4bf4&_e=i-WbeaiRbVL4BPRCWbCW60ZcDYgcK932ZEssdMndzki7jTHTGPabchs57QMNrSRyrnsApKdbOvjOw4rYKjcf-GlcMmmQ1Oa0RItRN8j5dWQy64jd177PXnu64mJ5Xrl2_iTzFhgVa4r1R5aQc0q7irBY-Njrxu1GTfep6oR2nzjVBnTRqfmMdtJULR_HXgog6crepqy_czj_gXdYp8KV58y5Kr2KLRbb5MaS3GQHQEui11scMTSZjd9kWNwFdSsMTSebsddeeALhaaERn6rLfXR3XFRJWw7bHMs_qnKZggoFCvtBc0hchvF3X9uVSLNlqQsnbrNtTsY22iWwkKbhS3MAVbO0NqIk5eLqyS0xBJ5r0WI6qqgxAOKNtGwHcjy0zubnTjynKnNkppzUTItn8Vnol0SWYczbvDerPNaBz94%3D) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d74a20428cd4432d9618181a257a4bf4&_e=i-WbeaiRbVL4BPRCWbCW60ZcDYgcK932ZEssdMndzki7jTHTGPabchs57QMNrSRyrnsApKdbOvjOw4rYKjcf-GlcMmmQ1Oa0RItRN8j5dWQy64jd177PXnu64mJ5Xrl2_iTzFhgVa4r1R5aQc0q7irBY-Njrxu1GTfep6oR2nzjVBnTRqfmMdtJULR_HXgog6crepqy_czj_gXdYp8KV58y5Kr2KLRbb5MaS3GQHQEui11scMTSZjd9kWNwFdSsMTSebsddeeALhaaERn6rLfY3rRDg-aJQgm6n0tXAcl8lHUTKs5bt9zKRXJ523FiEAT-gr2teH6mrGyEovRoQLIrzjjYPhtwXZrGV3Lyyu-jZlML5pjS210UDZtlhjGIXPTFDr3h8hcw1IJrDgs625m7ofgnpOD86truC_W8JD-z0%3D) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

**By Daniel Turner**
Schadenfreude- the pleasure which derives from the suffering of your adversaries - is not a Christian virtue, but it is most definitely a political one.
Those miscreants who would pollute my country and her culture with hordes of third world invaders, who would use the FBI to put us on lists for supporting school choice or attending Latin Mass, who would elevate Adam Kinzinger to the level of national hero, I rejoice in their sufferings and revel in their pain.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..JU45zBctdLvaeVfj3trt3rpi3Aj5D0mN5hmbQur5ryI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163204322)
Nothing puts a smile on my face quicker than 2016 photos of bawling Hillary Clinton Election Night voters.
But there is something we share. We as political animals have a bond. I on the side of the right and righteous, and they, the Marxist, bottom feeding, soulless goblin creatures have a common sorrow which stems from Congressional inertia and annual cycles of once unbridled enthusiasm for a political candidate who promises the moon fizzling into routine disappoint once they get political office and become incapable of delivering anything but more government cheese.
Yes, when it comes to being politically heartbroken, left and right are the same.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together With Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/5da0adf8-f735-43b1-a5af-a086ccf771c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# What eggs do to senior brains
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5da0adf8-f735-43b1-a5af-a086ccf771c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
How often do you eat eggs?
**Did you know[it does THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/5da0adf8-f735-43b1-a5af-a086ccf771c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to senior brains?**
-Emily
P.S. If you think you know the answer, don't be too sure. If you care about your memory, **[see this now.](https://substack.com/redirect/5da0adf8-f735-43b1-a5af-a086ccf771c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/5da0adf8-f735-43b1-a5af-a086ccf771c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Piece continues)**
A recent example from the crowd of the crud eating, monkey pox left when one of theirs political leaders, Illinois Senator Tammy Duckworth, recently introduced legislation to ban assault weapons. Gun control and stepping on the Second Amendment is a favorite of the historically illiterate, castrated left, but they did not celebrate this legislative power grab. Even the dumpster dwellers know the Senator and her party are in the minority. They know this bill will never get a committee hearing, and even if it had the votes to pass the Senate (which it does not) it would never pass in the House, and President Trump would never, ever, sign it. They know this. We know this.
Duckworth may claim her gun control bill is "long overdue", but if the Senator were really serious about it, if she were sincere in her commitment to the issue, then she would have been introduced it in that two year window from January, 2021 until January, 2023, when democrats controlled all of Congress, and Joe Biden's team would blindly stick it under the autopen for signature.
She didn't. They didn't. And snot munching trolls of the left have their hearts broken.
In that Biden era two-year window democrats could have passed nearly anything they wanted: gun control, amnesty for illegals, student loan forgiveness, abortion on demand, mandatory Queer studies for pre-K children, etc. They could have passed AOC's wildly sophomoric "Green New Deal" which promised free money for those "unwilling to work" or a "Universal Migrant Healthcare" bill putting us on the hook for the glaucoma surgery of everyone in Southeast Asia. None of these big, bold, progressive policy positions made it into law, and the window-licking leftists have their hearts broken.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..JU45zBctdLvaeVfj3trt3rpi3Aj5D0mN5hmbQur5ryI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163204322)
Now, of course, I am thrilled. Thank God democrats are political cowards. The last time democrats showed such a unified backbone on progressive legislation, we got Obamacare, and healthcare costs doubled. I sympathize with the broken hearts of the "In This House We Believe" dolts, but I don't want democrats to ever find their spine again.
But I wish republicans would. I do not want my own heart broken again.
As during the first two years of Biden's Administration, President Trump has a unique opportunity in this 24-month window (nearly four of which are already gone) to pass big, bold, America First policy positions through both houses and get them signed into law. Where is Congress? Where are there plethora of patriotic, fearless, pro-America legislative actions? They are like Jim Jordan's jacket: on a shelf somewhere.
We have had some wins. Both the "Protection of Women and Girls in Sports" and the "Safeguard American Voter Eligibility" (SAVE) Act failed to get a single Democrat vote in the Senate, putting them on defense and Republicans material for ads in swing states. Only democrats could be dumb enough to want men beating the crap out of women in sports and Kilmar Abrego Garcia voting for the next President.
But that is just two legislative wins. Only two. Where is the bill to mandate English as the official language or to make it legal for dads whose underage kids were forced into "story time" by a sex pervert to repeatedly punch they/them in zim/zir's tuck?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..JU45zBctdLvaeVfj3trt3rpi3Aj5D0mN5hmbQur5ryI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163204322)
Where is the bill to stop the government from mandating or banning consumer product: cars, appliances, light bulbs, generators, ceiling fans, etc? The bill to end foreign aid to countries unless the voting Senators can point to it on a map and tell us the name of its current president (or warlord) and the official language?
In my next post I'll suggest 10 stand-alone bills that should have been introduced by now if our side really wanted to affect change.
We need Congress to move at the speed of Trump. Instead, we get a lot of elected Republicans with masterful oratory, delivered specifically for TV soundbites which will be repurposed for campaign ads, coupled with the promise of a hearing and / or investigation, and then recess.
"We hope to get this done by Labor Day," I heard a GOP Senator say of the Tax Cuts. Labor Day? What are you, a building contractor? Are you driving for Uber on the side?
Bernie Sanders broke so many Velcro-shoed hearts. He promised everything big and bold, and in the first two years of the Biden Puppet Regime, he disappeared. Now that democrats are political eunuchs, he is back to making promises. He looked downright idiotic taking a private jet to his "end oligarchy" speech at Coachella, the uber-exclusive music festival where day passes cost nearly $1000. Talk about political theater.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..JU45zBctdLvaeVfj3trt3rpi3Aj5D0mN5hmbQur5ryI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163204322)
But we have the power right now, and Congress does not seem to be willing to use it. Tick-Tock. The clock is running. Our window is closing. This moment will not last forever, and when those Maoists are back in charge again, and what will we have accomplished to preserve the nation and protect the rights and property of the free?
I fear in 2027, we will be without power, a new crop of candidates will promise to "tackle the debt" and "hold people accountable" and my broken heart will look to whiskey and tobacco for solace.
On the bright side, when they are back in power, they being the toenail chomping NPCs, their leaders will be as weak as ours, with our shared political heartbreak remaining as our bond.
Sometimes I wish I could crack open a beer, light up a smoke, and talk to my political enemies about our shared misery, maybe even get a good laugh out of it.
But then I remember: I hate them.
We keep fighting. Honor and courage.
* * *
_**Daniel Turner** is the founder and executive director of Power The Future, a national nonprofit organization that advocates for American energy jobs. Contact him at daniel@powerthefuture.com and follow him on Twitter @DanielTurnerPTF_

subject: You won’t be shocked by this

body:
Friend,

You won't be shocked by this, but you will be angry.

Three radical Democrats (Chris Pappas, Haley Stevens, and Angie Craig) who also happen to be running for U.S. Senate in 2026 _**[just voted against renaming the Gulf of Mexico to the Gulf of America.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z52cd0jv1okk65ilqtpha2lopu6jh4s7b1si65f0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3i60p74cdh2bs)**_

You can count on one thing: Given the option, Democrats will always find a way to put anything ahead of America.

_-> They'll fly every flag but the American one.

-> They'll fund everything but what actually helps Americans.

-> And when it comes time to stand up for this country, **they fold faster than a card table at the end of a church potluck.**_

name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: Do you still stand with our troops?
body:
This Military Appreciation Month, I’m asking you to take 30 sec to read...
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM1u6jAQhZ_G3hHZ49ghCy8uF6VSK1WtWLRlN3EcYmoT4_yJt6-glO3MN3M-HQzRu_aiSbEhAJ1rBgJAxD8CcP5aQpqO4eVp1T-jX53Va5DXLfy_ozM84JPB7f59d5BiNw9H_t1FJT5n_sDHS7QP-B6a2YDOX6fFljZatA3LqdW8yFVRqpIJ2ukWjTSmzpGBslJIhbYFZKa2a1WukVOngYFkkpVcABdlxnjNW9FYUxuuQHKSs1tOhsEmZ5AP44Ip9X3ITB-o1904xuEmVhGoltRnp8l4Ow2_Z6YPBKq7MoFqJlDtUtwcpli2eyKqW2lia236mN5w09Ckm7g4792gCpKzw98bOmv4CQAA__8l-nBY)
| | | **_MESSAGE FROM ANNA PAULINA LUNA:_**

---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJyckM-OmzAQxp_G3ED2GMxy4NAWpVIrVar20vYSDbaTeOt_a5ugvH0FRXmAvf7m52_GH7pozeUxkv4zAbgZlQkA4Z8IwPvv1aXlzX3_WodvaOt38cN12xS-HOodnrKXOP35-Xrt-Os9v7G_tyj4rzt76uUR9VM-ljbaobEb7adKjfyiaFvpkfWt6AcxUF7dxnmWM-3ZrAS-6Ja-DOKCrdJt3w9MXISuzAgUOtrRgXFgfGgom9mFKy1nyQR0jLR039Og08lIZLmsmFIIrpHBVXa8lRLzftiJwClruSTdrMYnrTaDwAm9x4iLNR7t4nEj0dYx5Vjv0bUz1hRMD4wxaWmwmOBd8OVW54JpDpjUls5PS3Fnp5VZHOHT_jZpX9ASENuo6LQN1sQOkMOSpCZ8yvNBJLqI5uoJn46P92eM9vyRi_4HBl-0L4RPKngsmoBAF5adAG2gIyDSVkoy_kr4VNKiqzSquBprTRY9ael1L3ir8z7CvwAAAP__dBfDFQ)

Patriot,
**_May is Military Appreciation Month_** — and as a proud Air Force veteran and military spouse, this month hits close to home.
I joined the Air Force when I was just 19 years old. It changed my life forever — taught me discipline, strength, and the true meaning of service.

My husband, Andy, is a special forces operator who was wounded in Afghanistan. We’ve lived the realities of military life: the missed holidays, the long nights, and the scars — seen and unseen — that never fully heal.
But this message isn’t about us.
It’s about the heroes who are out there _right now_ — standing guard while we sleep, risking their lives to keep America free.
And sadly, while they serve with honor, the Radical Left pushes woke politics, slashes defense priorities, and turns their backs on the very people who protect them.
That’s why I’m asking you something simple but powerful:
👉 **Do you stand with our military this Military Appreciation Month?**

clean_body: This Military Appreciation Month, I’m asking you to take 30 sec to read... | | | | MESSAGE FROM ANNA PAULINA LUNA: Patriot, May is Military Appreciation Month — and as a proud Air Force veteran and military spouse, this month hits close to home. I joined the Air Force when I was just 19 years old. It changed my life forever — taught me discipline, strength, and the true meaning of service. My husband, Andy, is a special forces operator who was wounded in Afghanistan. We’ve lived the realities of military life: the missed holidays, the long nights, and the scars — seen and unseen — that never fully heal. But this message isn’t about us. It’s about the heroes who are out there right now — standing guard while we sleep, risking their lives to keep America free. And sadly, while they serve with honor, the Radical Left pushes woke politics, slashes defense priorities, and turns their backs on the very people who protect them. That’s why I’m asking you something simple but powerful: 👉 Do you stand with our military this Military Appreciation Month? I’ll never apologize for loving this country... who will always fight for our service members... and who understand — deep in their bones — that freedom is earned. If you believe America is worth fighting for... if you’re sick of watching our troops get disrespected by the woke Left... then I’m asking you to stand with me now. | | Thank you & God Bless, Rep. Anna Paulina Luna Air Force Veteran | Military Spouse | America First Patriot Anna Paulina Luna is a retired member of the United States Air Force. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. |

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Write this down and take it home to Mama:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
These soy latte-drinking, tree-hugging Liberals have learned nothing after getting walloped at the ballot box.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zf871aj803g88qunaqe0htavrq0bkia61a5487jo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3i60p72c9h2bs "John Kennedy")
---

_Write this down and take it home to Mama:_

**No matter how bad the shellacking was in November ... the Democrat Party will NEVER go quietly into the night. Nor will they ever change. They're throwing everything they've got at us right now, including schemes to:**
* _' Trump-proof'_ blue states to hamstring Trump in court
* _Bombard_ battleground states with Fake News attack ads
* _File lawsuits_ to block and delay Trump's agenda
* And even _impeach_ your President within months of taking office

Folks, it's John Kennedy.

These soy latte-drinking, tree-hugging Liberals have learned nothing after getting walloped at the ballot box. And let me just be the first to say that they are COMPLETELY off their rockers if they think we won't fight back to stop them.

_**[In fact, that's why I'm partnering up with my buddy from Louisiana, Leader Steve Scalise, to help make sure these Trump-deranged radicals NEVER hold power ever again.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z834dq1nk5l0c7n2tl0hlf9hs3dr4emmdebh2mr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3i60p72c9h2bs "In fact, that’s why I’m partnering up with my buddy from Louisiana, Leader Steve Scalise, to help make sure these Trump-deranged radicals NEVER hold power ever again.")**_

We've seen how low they're willing to stoop despite being rejected by voters...

Just imagine what they'd be capable of if we fail to raise the resources we need to stop them. If there was ever a time to invest early so we can win, that moment is here and now.
---
| | | [I'm kindly asking you for a little help today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zt4qqgnjr90ukkk3grjju5c1k8gbvbsai4m173h8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3i60p72c9h2bs "I’m kindly asking you for a little help today.")
---
Listen,

**I couldn 't believe it when** California Liberals authorized a slush fund to fight the Trump Administration in court...

**I couldn 't believe it when** the Democrats decided to sue President Trump to allow non-citizens to vote...

**And I REALLY couldn 't believe it when** a House Democrat introduced seven Articles of Impeachment...

Who do they think they are??? They think they know better than the __majority__ of our country, which rejected them in a historic fashion.

_**[That's why we can NEVER let them barge back into power.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqdfc44233jcpdqf7j6c96eo01hk9iionl7co9c8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3i60p72c9h2bs "That’s why we can NEVER let them barge back into power.")**_
---
| | | [I'm kindly asking you for a little help today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5l83cgjnfek2mn6mf5j70hr3vl5sh646ci290qg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3i60p72c9h2bs "I’m kindly asking you for a little help today.")
---
I hope you'll join our efforts to make that a certainty.

God bless you,
John Kennedy

---
| |
* * *
---
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_
\- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration
\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_

---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zairincq9op6o2rnnr70gan0elnik4j2i0ki0mr0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c3i60p72c9h2bs "Liberal Trump Resistance")
---

If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!

**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**

body:
# [#] We are less than a day away from our next reporting deadline and $2,491 short of our goal.

But the good news is: if every person reading this email makes a donation (even just $1!), we’ll cross the finish line.MAKE A DONATION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JcKdD-Q5sEmr2Bb9s_L8tg2?amount=10]

As Governor, Josh is going to fight for YOU. He’s ready to cut taxes and protect our Jersey Values – reproductive rights, education, the environment, and more.

While the Trump administration attacks our values and our future, it’s never been more important to elect a leader like Josh. Can you chip in today to help us meet our goal and gear up for next month’s primary? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JcKdD-Q5sEmr2Bb9s_L8tg2?amount=]

Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Don't Force our Troops to March for Trump's Ego
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't Force our Troops to March for Trump's Ego](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0c8094a8-6b58-478d-bdea-9bfdfa2d4a4e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52b15f03-2958-46ec-9b36-4d2ee78a2d0c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | America's armed forces take an oath to defend America -- not to stroke the ego of a wannabe dictator. And yet, that's just what they'll be forced to do in June, with a mandated march in a parade for Trump's birthday. **[Add your name, and demand this parade be cancelled.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb63c5cbc-cf8f-4fb1-a292-e21472a1400d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** At a time when Trump, Musk, and their Republican enablers have already reignited inflation, and simultaneously pushed America into a recession, we should not be spending tens or hundreds of millions of dollars on a massive parade so Trump can feel loved. Especially considering that Trump has shown appalling disrespect for our troops, for their families, and for those who've made the ultimate sacrifice (calling them "suckers and losers"). **[Add your name, and demand this parade be cancelled.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07cb7b50-dc46-44c1-95b5-4236e195c43e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda2cf6ac-73de-4702-beab-73eda1acb02d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T86f5f8c0-545a-414b-86e8-ee3a52a3fbcc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T41215141-fba0-4f38-bc8f-45716d421c7c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T371f4a8b-4b01-43c7-89da-d7eeda56b521/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

## Vatican Posts Incredible Footage of the Moments After Leo XIV Became Pope – RedState
Thursday was a stunning day in the Vatican and outside in St. Peter’s Square as the Papal Conclave came to agreement on their choice for their next leader, 69-year-old native Chicagoan Cardinal Robert Prevost—now Pope Leo XIV. Tune into the latest installment of the Voices of Reason podcast. | | | |
---
| | | Welcome to the latest edition of _Voices of Reason_ where we’ll recap exclusive news and data featured in our most recent podcast.

This segment dives into Pennsylvania Governor Shapiro’s 2024 bid for Vice President, with bestselling author **John Allen** , who shares insights you don’t want to miss.
---
| **Big Names Make News**
---
| **Bestselling author John Allen** explains that while most candidates selected for the 2024 V.P. slot entered interviews with Kamala Harris’s team “promising what they’re going to do to support the ticket and how loyal they can be,” Gov. Shapiro, mindful that it could be seen as bold, still chose to approach it as a negotiation, stating, “if you are going to pick me and I was going to accept, here are the things I think would be part of my portfolio.” [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=79339f17f6&e=b7b3eddce2)]

**Bestselling author John Allen** elaborates that Gov. Shapiro couldn’t “say no to being interviewed for the vice presidential job,” but notes that “he might not want to get picked because there’s a reasonable chance that the ticket loses,” suggesting that Shapiro was strategically distancing himself from the opportunity, likely to avoid the risk of harming his own political future if Harris’ campaign lost. [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=aadde80374&e=b7b3eddce2)]
---
|
* * *
---
| **Numbers You Need to Know**
---
| _Public Opinion_
* After Biden withdrew from the 2024 Election, June-July national polls showed Gov. Shapiro with a **-1.3 net favorability** and **36.7% name ID recognition** as a VP candidate. [[ABCNews](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5b01e3f57e&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* Cody Balmer, 38, who breached Gov. Shapiro’s residence and evaded state troopers in **under 1 minute** , was charged on **April 13, 2025** , with attempted homicide, aggravated arson, terrorism, and multiple other crimes. [[CNN](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=56053482d2&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Voter Interests_
* Gov. Shapiro and the Department of Community and Economic Development (DCED) announced a **$64 million** investment in **11 projects** through the first round of the PA SITES program to develop shovel-ready industrial sites across Pennsylvania, aimed at attracting businesses and creating jobs. [[CommonWealth](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3b4e016b61&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* New internal records suggest that the aide’s email account, linked to a top Shapiro cabinet official, Mike Vereb's sexual harassment scandal, settled for**$295,000** , was deleted under suspicious and possibly selective circumstances, rather than as part of any routine records policy. [[B+L](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9131b3a126&e=b7b3eddce2)]

---
|
* * *
---
| **Shocking Truths Behind Governor Shapiro's Candidacy for V.P.**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ddefcf513f&e=b7b3eddce2 "Shapiro didn’t flop — he planned it | Voices of Reason – feat. Bestselling Author John Allen")
---
|
* * *
---
| **In Case You Missed It...**
---
| The _Voices of Reason_ podcast has covered the most important issues in Pennsylvania politics – from [education funding](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=31f3fb7767&e=b7b3eddce2) to [trust in elections](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cc0e365037&e=b7b3eddce2). Secretary of the Commonwealth [Al Schmidt](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=462d4b296c&e=b7b3eddce2), PA Treasurer [Stacy Garrity](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=37b1a70df8&e=b7b3eddce2), and House Appropriations Chairman [Jordan Harris](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1830039813&e=b7b3eddce2) are just a few of many influential guests who have joined us for exclusive interviews and roundtable discussions.
Visit the _Voice of Reason_ [YouTube page](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=64faef819c&e=b7b3eddce2) to experience all the great moments you missed.
---
|
* * *
---
| **Get in Touch**
---
| We like smart ideas and want to hear from you.

Send feedback and inquire about appearing on _Voices of Reason_ , at [press@politicspa.com](mailto:press@politicspa.com?subject=Voices%20of%20Reason%20Podcast%20Inquiry).

subject: Help Us Expose the Casada Corruption Circus!
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Our Tennessee Future PAC, Not Affiliated with Any Candidate or Candidate Committee
body:
The ongoing trial of Glen Casada is shaking the foundations of Tennessee politics. This is
| .
---
| [ ](http://email.email.ourtenn.org/c/eJxMzb9OwzAQgPGnsbdU8Z846XADLUQMIBAD--GzGwvXrpJr2r49ggF1_aRPPwI9BG-cDKB66wbVma2SE1gbqFNEbexjF2ykdtBbr4PX6NQXGZkAPacVOdXSvL8-nsePZzTNzuz37nuY3pr6uXvKjGVp4uX2kq25XoVtkdbq0d8wbXw9ygwT82kR5kHoUeixnmcOpWzqfJAz0OmSck6L64VtD0dM-W_iezr8ZsnwD8sV9E8AAAD__6TdRLk)
---
Dear Peter,

The ongoing trial of Glen Casada is shaking the foundations of Tennessee politics. It’s a powerful reminder of why we urgently need real, accountable leadership in our state.

The “Casada Corruption Circus” has shown us the dangers of corruption, and we cannot stand idly by while the interests of a few compromise the futures of many.

This is where you come in. We are dedicated to shining a light on this corruption and ensuring that every Tennessean understands the stakes. But we need your help to make this effort a reality.

[ Will you make a contribution of $25, $50, or any amount you can afford today? ](http://email.email.ourtenn.org/c/eJxMz81uKiEYxvGrgY3BODAfuGAx6pBzkmobbbo1r_BOJcXBDDDq3Td20XT75Fn8f1ZxiUbUFFXRlLUsKrEs6FlVclnzypQSZW9PDa9qYYqqAXkSFTQWqVNgkpsguTCwt-0m6_0_EGwl1uv6S55fWfhYdT7BEFl_e7z4UtzvpFyAnYIB8wA3N-FCvTqndI1EtIRrwnVEk0ecg0knn_F5IVzbMEBCwnXII0s4DBgjIutzyiOyKxhWEKFH7E2wSMTmvdvtjt32uG4P7aadHbr9_-4wK-io7PXmvHexbki5-LyA8z8V6a8FnzNN6ldCJ8W_AwAA___6L16i)Your support will enable us to reach more voters, share critical information, and advocate for the change Tennessee deserves.

Every dollar counts, and together, we can create a movement capable of bringing real accountability to our government.

Thank you for your unwavering commitment to justice and integrity in Tennessee!

Together for change,
Chris Murdock

clean_body: The ongoing trial of Glen Casada is shaking the foundations of Tennessee politics. This is | . | Dear Peter, The ongoing trial of Glen Casada is shaking the foundations of Tennessee politics. It’s a powerful reminder of why we urgently need real, accountable leadership in our state. The “Casada Corruption Circus” has shown us the dangers of corruption, and we cannot stand idly by while the interests of a few compromise the futures of many. This is where you come in. We are dedicated to shining a light on this corruption and ensuring that every Tennessean understands the stakes. But we need your help to make this effort a reality. support will enable us to reach more voters, share critical information, and advocate for the change Tennessee deserves. Every dollar counts, and together, we can create a movement capable of bringing real accountability to our government. Thank you for your unwavering commitment to justice and integrity in Tennessee! Together for change, Chris Murdock Our Tennessee Future PAC | . . | 901B Coral Road, Nashville, Tennessee 37204 Paid for By Our Tennessee Future PAC, Not Affiliated with Any Candidate or Candidate Committee

subject: They’re already planning…
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ34YDGIy40AggkY1JgVvOklvPghCY-MoV5LN9nFsB0CA_XpwN6ZrdfbTCc04)
---
| Dear Friend,
---
The Left is already laying the groundwork for 2026. They’re raising millions, recruiting radical candidates, and plotting how to take back the House majority.
And what’s their first order of business if they succeed?
Impeach President Trump — again.
They’re targeting Republican districts like ours, pumping millions into candidate recruitment, and using the DCCC and House Majority PAC to flip red districts blue.
I’m on their target list and you can bet that they’ll be flooding this district with dark money and attack ads to try to buy this seat.
If we let them win here, they take the House. It’s that simple.
**[So please make an urgent contribution to my Minnesota Defense Fund and help us hold the line, defend our majority, and keep the First District RED.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ34YDGIy40AggkY1JgVvOklvPghCY-MoV5LN9nFsB0CA_XpwN6ZrdfbTCc04)**

This isn’t just about one seat. It’s about protecting the entire House from being flipped back into the hands of Nancy Pelosi, Hakeem Jeffries, and their radical cronies.
If they win the majority, they will:

* Weaponize the House to impeach President Trump all over again

We cannot let them flip this district or the House...

name: Team Frost
subject: Team Frost Updates, Events, and a Note from Maxwell 💬
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL ALEJANDRO FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Peter,
Welcome to the Team Frost Newsletter — the spot where you’ll get the latest on what’s happening on our campaign, ways to get involved, and updates directly from Congressman Maxwell Frost and the team.
We’re so grateful you’re part of this movement! Whether you’re knocking doors, making calls, or chipping in to support our work, you are building the people-powered campaign that Central Florida deserves.
Stay Tuned,
Team Frost

💬 Stay Connected: New Volunteer Signal Channel
We’ve launched a Signal Channel just for Team Frost volunteers! It’s a great space to connect, share updates, and stay in the loop.
Join here: Team Frost Signal Chat! [https://signal.group/#CjQKIEKC2HbKQsSPgo18peZHt_kugDkUtReM_pgADZ3bbxWLEhAQdtps8g5fXdp4pZWvU_eJ] (And don’t worry — no classified info, we promise 😉)

Support Our Movement
Everything we’re building—from year-round grassroots organizing to community events and town halls—is powered by people like you stepping up when it counts.
Your support helps us reach more voters, stay active between election cycles, and fight for bold, progressive change—both in Washington and right here at home.
If you believe in this movement and want to help drive the work ahead, please consider making a contribution today:
Make a contribution online here! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mafnewsletter]

Canvass with Team Frost
Date: Every Saturday
Time: 10 AM
Location: Provided upon RSVP
SIGN UP HERE [https://www.mobilize.us/frostforcongress/event/765882/]

Phone Bank with Team Frost
Date: Every Sunday
Time: 10 AM - 3 PM
Location: Virtual
SIGN UP HERE [https://www.mobilize.us/frostforcongress/event/765887/]

Anna for Orlando Canvass Kickoff
Date: Saturday, May 10th
Time: 10:00 AM - 1:00 PM
Location: Provided upon RSVP
SIGN UP HERE [https://www.mobilize.us/frostforcongress/event/760720/]

The youngest member of Congress is showing his older colleagues how to punch back in the age of Trump.
Read More [https://www.motherjones.com/politics/2025/05/maxwell-frost-democratic-opposition-doge-elon-musk-donald-trump/]

'Why did the president lie to me?': Rep. Frost says Trump's voters are getting angry [https://www.msnbc.com/the-weeknight/watch/-why-did-the-president-lie-to-me-rep-frost-says-trump-s-voters-are-getting-angry-239041093796]
Democratic Rep. Maxwell Frost joins The Weeknight to break down Trump’s inconsistent trade policies – and how they’re hurting everyday Americans.
Read More [https://www.msnbc.com/the-weeknight/watch/-why-did-the-president-lie-to-me-rep-frost-says-trump-s-voters-are-getting-angry-239041093796]

'Welcome to the team': Chris Murphy, Maxwell Frost hold town halls where Republicans won't [https://www.msnbc.com/all-in/watch/-welcome-to-the-team-chris-murphy-maxwell-frost-hold-town-halls-where-republicans-won-t-238300741912]
Rep. Maxwell Frost and Sen. Chris Murphy join Chris Hayes after holding a town hall in a GOP district in North Carolina. "If you're here, and you voted for Trump in the past, my message is simple: I'm sorry you were lied to, but welcome to the team," says Frost.
Read More [https://www.msnbc.com/all-in/watch/-welcome-to-the-team-chris-murphy-maxwell-frost-hold-town-halls-where-republicans-won-t-238300741912]

Maxwell Frost arrives in El Salvador to demand release, return of deported Maryland man [https://floridapolitics.com/archives/733406-maxwell-frost-arrives-in-el-salvador-to-demand-release-return-of-deported-maryland-man/]
“As Members of Congress it is our responsibility to hold the President and Administration accountable for defying the Constitution of the United States. Donald Trump and ICE are not above the law. Today it’s Kilmar, but tomorrow it could be anyone else. We cannot and will not let Donald Trump get away with this.”
Read More [https://floridapolitics.com/archives/733406-maxwell-frost-arrives-in-el-salvador-to-demand-release-return-of-deported-maryland-man/]

Hey Peter,
Our field program is officially up and running! I couldn’t be more excited. Organizing is the heart and soul of our campaign: people talking to people, knocking doors, and building power across Central Florida. But we can’t do it without you. It’s going to take a huge volunteer effort to win, and we need as many folks as possible to get involved. If you haven’t already, I hope you’ll sign up for a shift and join us on the doors soon.

Over the past few weeks, I’ve been traveling with Senator Chris Murphy to hold town halls in places where people feel left behind. We’re showing up in communities where Republican Members of Congress refuse to listen, because we believe every person deserves to be heard. We’ve been to North Carolina, Michigan, and this weekend I’ll be in Sarasota for another town hall.

And with Mother’s Day on Sunday, I’ve been thinking a lot about the incredible women who raise, lead, and fight for our communities every day. My mom— a Cuban-American immigrant and former special needs teacher— shaped my values and inspired my commitment to service. If you're celebrating this weekend, I hope it’s filled with love and reflection.
There’s so much ahead, and I’m grateful to be in it with you.

With love & gratitude,
Maxwell Frost

info@frostforcongress.com ✦ frostforcongress.com [frostforcongress.com]
PAID FOR BY MAXWELL ALEJANDRO FROST FOR CONGRESS
Maxwell Frost for Congress
PO Box 772671
Orlando, FL 32877-2671
United States

AOC's socialism is a threat to American freedom and prosperity. We need your help to stop her...

|

| | | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=15add109b0ca4bd1b678dc7f7e3ca0f0&_e=NgzgrvwmC9HJ6svi2xWzlBQ5s9cEOYlj4ojNufq4EE_cD60m0PgHVozqUwBAyhPjogHVeLBj9ICo4U3mRy1QnUXmjqthXtwmn2Eddmbk54PcRlcUVf2INVS9soMN1jfpcS5nXpAGNnjMVPNjgXvpvxV01pEYdnOEL6cawfVWsjkWaHTvP01CXlDE797PpiR8dCsmjucP5cS5EQq5GoFTrz9Pe66KchNqCKQC45MHGUbzEs1Vf-0hyDflrhPEz6PASkrKyF_pMsb4uJbChPt4q-2NvXQBARLYf3zz-x6VscrjQHrgXt9o1ysNktWkriFdOqUtmDZCQ6_z36X1XgL3fTZjYZCGhtZDMW0-CmStoEDtt4FLS9d1f0t40iPxpf49aHBr6UARulOVde0ppvGc8A%3D%3D)
