_Dear Fellow Conservative,_

_**[We have some disturbing news to share with you.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=15add109b0ca4bd1b678dc7f7e3ca0f0&_e=NgzgrvwmC9HJ6svi2xWzlBQ5s9cEOYlj4ojNufq4EE_cD60m0PgHVozqUwBAyhPjogHVeLBj9ICo4U3mRy1QnUXmjqthXtwmn2Eddmbk54PcRlcUVf2INVS9soMN1jfpcS5nXpAGNnjMVPNjgXvpvxV01pEYdnOEL6cawfVWsjkWaHTvP01CXlDE797PpiR8dCsmjucP5cS5EQq5GoFTrz9Pe66KchNqCKQC45MHGUbzEs1Vf-0hyDflrhPEz6PAa4JFC8D7EOSlpnNQH7Xfbb_7HmhLtyKpxU6eWkT55tSVQgNCdTuTAa2_-AiqAK1TCDS1Z9JPc51QLs1GSucFLOsSNCsdqcPd8X6zKv6FQ77ImqkITMkwRPPUUeircGQsub8MwKtGrAFWJDOYl4F_nw%3D%3D "We have some disturbing news to share with you.")**_ Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (AOC) has just become the de facto leader of the Democrat Party. And her radical agenda is a threat to everything we hold dear.

Imagine a country where the government controls every aspect of your life, from your healthcare to your paycheck, a country where the socialist ideology of AOC and her allies reign supreme.

**This is not a hypothetical scenario.** AOC's rise to power is real, and her policies are already being implemented. _[She's using her massive social media following and record-breaking fundraising to spread her radical message and build a movement of far-left activists.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=15add109b0ca4bd1b678dc7f7e3ca0f0&_e=NgzgrvwmC9HJ6svi2xWzlBQ5s9cEOYlj4ojNufq4EE_cD60m0PgHVozqUwBAyhPjogHVeLBj9ICo4U3mRy1QnUXmjqthXtwmn2Eddmbk54PcRlcUVf2INVS9soMN1jfpcS5nXpAGNnjMVPNjgXvpvxV01pEYdnOEL6cawfVWsjkWaHTvP01CXlDE797PpiR8dCsmjucP5cS5EQq5GoFTrz9Pe66KchNqCKQC45MHGUbzEs1Vf-0hyDflrhPEz6PAOTQU-khxLAH736fQF4J0WuyDS6mCt2zWt1-SBAOrPqz-iXFbymBSmHooSBBdGdEaBbfNaphPV_tBYIx0T9Xp3-3O6xbEz2bML9UKRTzLdC0QtRSVx2RoXT25H9WRZbQZkcNh69mTLCzzmKhpPxryPw%3D%3D "She's using her massive social media following and record-breaking fundraising to spread her radical message and build a movement of far-left activists.")_

_**But here's the thing:** _**we can still stop her.** We can still expose her radical policies and build a grassroots movement to counter her influence. We can still elect conservative leaders who will stand up to her extremist agenda.

_**[And that's where you come in to end this madness. Your contribution will help us launch a nationwide campaign to stop AOC and the Democrat Party's lurch to the left.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=15add109b0ca4bd1b678dc7f7e3ca0f0&_e=NgzgrvwmC9HJ6svi2xWzlBQ5s9cEOYlj4ojNufq4EE_cD60m0PgHVozqUwBAyhPjogHVeLBj9ICo4U3mRy1QnUXmjqthXtwmn2Eddmbk54PcRlcUVf2INVS9soMN1jfpcS5nXpAGNnjMVPNjgXvpvxV01pEYdnOEL6cawfVWsjkWaHTvP01CXlDE797PpiR8dCsmjucP5cS5EQq5GoFTrz9Pe66KchNqCKQC45MHGUbzEs1Vf-0hyDflrhPEz6PAaU7nBm-imlZXoRyS0Z54rE6TLtAegKDJjY1DDTcubLgi7Cpvtq0rNbW0zDUwtz7kNkta6zS_aenaH9t3C38W48ulPNNPavslAwgFJTWMZVJErDqdrKei55xxWgD0M7oRdkxMmv8lpLRwXwqD1v40pQ%3D%3D "And that's where you come in to end this madness. clean_body: This Is It: The Final Stand Against AOC's Socialism AOC's socialism is a threat to American freedom and prosperity. We need your help to stop her... | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, "We have some disturbing news to share with you." Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (AOC) has just become the de facto leader of the Democrat Party. And her radical agenda is a threat to everything we hold dear. Imagine a country where the government controls every aspect of your life, from your healthcare to your paycheck, a country where the socialist ideology of AOC and her allies reign supreme. This is not a hypothetical scenario. AOC's rise to power is real, and her policies are already being implemented. "She's using her massive social media following and record-breaking fundraising to spread her radical message and build a movement of far-left activists." But here's the thing: we can still stop her. We can still expose her radical policies and build a grassroots movement to counter her influence. We can still elect conservative leaders who will stand up to her extremist agenda. "And that's where you come in to end this madness. Your contribution will help us launch a nationwide campaign to stop AOC and the Democrat Party's lurch to the left." | | | "FIGHT AGAINST AOC'S SOCIALISM >>" | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Our democracy is facing a critical threat from the proposed Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act, a piece of Republican legislation that would impose an unjust and burdensome barrier to voting.
This act, requiring all Americans to prove their citizenship with specific documentation when registering to vote, mirrors restrictive measures like those recently enacted in New Hampshire, disproportionately affecting women, low-income communities, people of color, and naturalized citizens.
Over 140 million Americans lack a passport or easy access to a birth certificate with their current legal name.
**This bill, which has passed in the House, not only suppresses votes but also undermines democracy by restricting access to the ballot box.**
_****The Local Democracy Project is committed to rebuilding democracy from the ground up, protecting voting rights at state and local levels. We need your help to combat these efforts._
**__[Join us in this fight. Sign on to tell the Senate to vote NO on the SAVE Act. Stand with us to protect democracy. name: Mike Carey
subject: I hate to share bad news…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carey for Congress
body:
Fellow Conservative, our fight to hold the House Majority is in serious jeopardy, and I need your immediate attention. In March, I wrote to you about the Cook Political Report’s 18 toss-up House seats, including 8 held by Republicans. Today, I’m sounding the alarm: the situation has worsened. |
---
Fellow Conservative, our fight to hold the House Majority is in serious jeopardy, and I need your immediate attention.

In March, I wrote to you about the Cook Political Report's 18 toss-up House seats, including 8 held by Republicans. **Today, I'm sounding the alarm: the situation has worsened.**

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ce43af564c784f2a8746ff8bbd5625ee&_e=3Fquu4ojE6C7sLCy0hT2U33E8jHJcUTTDGl9aNq3-3vzd2AvMP-dp2HQAymWbYBSIuS0iBsLNIdzqkOnpJkITVlNOrRsJiNA0Z7dvwdTml_WuqUU6ouvKz9K5pZqvjiq_4h6MNC1xPQ4dSU0B3nnewIc5OirD4Oq6qvYojj7V5HhXgpdoTPlvbvXiUemQpbZEi8YmyyZU0bgK-1HL2hycwrVHFURCQaxpIvImjx58p7e0V1a-or6zZUjdy9V2wnCH0o41rpmJiaQ1Zhu6VZ9OrUxX-oFIM9fUJn2N7uCOQCybPuYNe2NQFdAUkRtCmmXh1V7GnMUaGiKm3czmyP42bM-oFHEqiGyFT7YzVir6EsqNlN8BytYxps3D7JFMHknHMRhYUXdLwMoLiaRJOzWTw%3D%3D)
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ce43af564c784f2a8746ff8bbd5625ee&_e=3Fquu4ojE6C7sLCy0hT2U33E8jHJcUTTDGl9aNq3-3vzd2AvMP-dp2HQAymWbYBSIuS0iBsLNIdzqkOnpJkITVlNOrRsJiNA0Z7dvwdTml_WuqUU6ouvKz9K5pZqvjiq_4h6MNC1xPQ4dSU0B3nnewIc5OirD4Oq6qvYojj7V5HhXgpdoTPlvbvXiUemQpbZEi8YmyyZU0bgK-1HL2hycwrVHFURCQaxpIvImjx58p7e0V1a-or6zZUjdy9V2wnCKFWBD627BTyYXirjTRRyPJZ0WiL6-jIfNCoPGySAU41Hsr0eqSNLYobtMQn-Pwag_r_MlshBn3sgS1aNw-wLKIaM_WO7uGawR_uW0pOYjzlqsXF7HFx_7YpogUaxkhSO8NwQ69yG2DPGwLH0JlXOxA%3D%3D)

name: Tom Barrett
subject: President Trump Endorses Tom for Re-Election!
body:
Tom is a top target of Washington Democrats | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=681e18f3de43bf5aa170b125&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D681df58bb202953a3635a579%26ss_email_id%3D681e18f3de43bf5aa170b125%26ss_campaign_name%3DPresident%2BTrump%2BEndorses%2BTom%2Bfor%2BRe-Election%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-05-09T15%253A05%253A15Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_681df58bb202953a3635a579&l=en-US&s=L5ar35VeiBldKX5lqW-mhO183gI%3D)
---
| I’m excited to announce that President Trump has endorsed me for re-election!
---
|
---
[_ _ Donate to Tom _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=681e18f3de43bf5aa170b125&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Ftrump-endorses-barrett&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_681df58bb202953a3635a579&l=en-US&s=vZDTHnxE1zqROt2_3J7MsiMfkP0%3D)
---
In 2024, I fought off one of the most powerful Democrats in Michigan to flip a Democratic seat to Republican and secure our narrow congressional majority. I was outspent by more than $2.5 million but won by nearly 4 percentage points.**Let me be clear: Democrats have no path to the majority without defeating me** \- which is why I am a top target. The DCCC and House Majority PAC are already coming after me and the respected Cook Political Report has labeled the 7th District a “Toss Up” in 2026.
---
[_ _ Support Tom Barrett _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=681e18f3de43bf5aa170b125&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Ffeb-29-eom&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_681df58bb202953a3635a579&l=en-US&s=8sUDyLBUYjtFy4AYzoOr-Rmrjac%3D)
---
My team and I are working very hard to make sure we are ready for the millions that will be spent against me. Last year, Democrats spent more than $20 million to defeat me and I expect they will spend even more in 2026.[That’s why I need your help today - please join President Trump and support my re-election with a donation today!](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=681e18f3de43bf5aa170b125&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Ftrump-endorses-barrett&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_681df58bb202953a3635a579&l=en-US&s=vZDTHnxE1zqROt2_3J7MsiMfkP0%3D)Tom Barrett
---
|

name: Voter Action Project Alabama
subject: More good news, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Another happy update to end the week: In a " scathing " ruling, a panel of three federal judges struck down Alabama’s 2023 congressional map as a violation of both the Voting Rights Act (VRA) and the 14th Amendment to the U.S. Constitution.
The judges — two of whom were appointed by President Donald Trump — excoriated the state for what they called “ a deliberate decision to double down on the dilution of Black Alabamians’ votes. “
The unanimous decision strikes a blow for fair representation for Black voters in the state, and could lead to new restrictions on how Alabama makes future changes to its map. This case, which has been going on since 2021, has resulted in a huge win not only for Alabama voters, but as a precedent-setting result against gerrymandering and suppression across the country.
We'll continue to monitor Alabama's maps to make sure the state is held accountable for their suppression and that voters throughout the state get the fairly drawn districts they deserve.
Onward,
The Voter Action Project Team
This case isn't new. A three-judge panel found that Alabama's maps violated the VRA in 2022, and the Supreme Court agreed in 2023. Alabama used the court-mandated nonpartisan map in 2024, then turned right around to try and put their gerrymandered, suppressive map back in place for 2026.
When voters are silenced and votes are suppressed anywhere our democracy is harmed everywhere. Pitch in $25 or more right now to spread the word about this case and fight for fair maps nationwide >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=asbQDZdPbHsqidOidMrJ/epEpptzrYyxT3GMhhF2u6zOwcZjuYvii68Hq9+IV3AWSyUv9bGZ//QEKtYiUjJLrk12ldyJDfB8c7PK1tOZ65M=]
AP: Alabama’s congressional map at stake in federal Voting Rights Act trial [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=20.00&contactdata=asbQDZdPbHsqidOidMrJ/epEpptzrYyxT3GMhhF2u6zOwcZjuYvii68Hq9+IV3AWSyUv9bGZ//QEKtYiUjJLrk12ldyJDfB8c7PK1tOZ65M=]
Folks,
Alabama’s congressional map is at stake in a federal trial that wil decide if the state will keep the new court-created district that led to the election of a second Black representative. From the AP:
" A three-judge panel will decide whether congressional lines drawn by state lawmakers diluted the voting power of Black residents. The same panel already ruled against Alabama in pre-trial decisions that reshaped the 2nd Congressional District before Rep. Shomari Figures won election in November, giving Alabama two Black representatives in its delegation for the first time in history. "
The state of Alabama is seeking to reinstate the maps created by the suppressive state legislature. This case began in 2021 when Black voters and civil rights groups filed lawsuits over Alabama’s state-drawn congressional map they said disenfranchised Black voters.
Team, we have to make sure voters everywhere know about this case to protect fair maps in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to help us make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=asbQDZdPbHsqidOidMrJ/epEpptzrYyxT3GMhhF2u6zOwcZjuYvii68Hq9+IV3AWSyUv9bGZ//QEKtYiUjJLrk12ldyJDfB8c7PK1tOZ65M=]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:

Defenders of voting rights believe they can show a level of continuing, intentional discrimination that should once again make Alabama subject to the preclearance requirement of the 1965 Voting Rights Act.
Deuel Ross, an attorney with the NAACP Legal Defense Fund who represents the plaintiffs seeking to protect the current map, said " This is sort of exactly the thing that Alabama and other states did before the Voting Rights Act — a court would find that there was some sort of discrimination in the way in which they were drawing maps or registering voters and the state would respond by essentially doing the same thing over again, but dressing it up in a slightly different outfit ".
Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and gerrymandering more oppressive , our work to defend the right to vote must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone.

These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

clean_body: Another happy update to end the week: In a " scathing " ruling, a panel of three federal judges struck down Alabama’s 2023 congressional map as a violation of both the Voting Rights Act (VRA) and the 14th Amendment to the U.S. Constitution. The judges — two of whom were appointed by President Donald Trump — excoriated the state for what they called “ a deliberate decision to double down on the dilution of Black Alabamians’ votes. “ The unanimous decision strikes a blow for fair representation for Black voters in the state, and could lead to new restrictions on how Alabama makes future changes to its map. This case, which has been going on since 2021, has resulted in a huge win not only for Alabama voters, but as a precedent-setting result against gerrymandering and suppression across the country. We'll continue to monitor Alabama's maps to make sure the state is held accountable for their suppression and that voters throughout the state get the fairly drawn districts they deserve. Onward, The Voter Action Project Team This case isn't new. A three-judge panel found that Alabama's maps violated the VRA in 2022, and the Supreme Court agreed in 2023. Alabama used the court-mandated nonpartisan map in 2024, then turned right around to try and put their gerrymandered, suppressive map back in place for 2026. When voters are silenced and votes are suppressed anywhere our democracy is harmed everywhere. Pitch in $25 or more right now to spread the word about this case and fight for fair maps nationwide >> [=] AP: Alabama’s congressional map at stake in federal Voting Rights Act trial [=] Folks, Alabama’s congressional map is at stake in a federal trial that wil decide if the state will keep the new court-created district that led to the election of a second Black representative. From the AP: " A three-judge panel will decide whether congressional lines drawn by state lawmakers diluted the voting power of Black residents. The same panel already ruled against Alabama in pre-trial decisions that reshaped the 2nd Congressional District before Rep. Shomari Figures won election in November, giving Alabama two Black representatives in its delegation for the first time in history. " The state of Alabama is seeking to reinstate the maps created by the suppressive state legislature. This case began in 2021 when Black voters and civil rights groups filed lawsuits over Alabama’s state-drawn congressional map they said disenfranchised Black voters. Team, we have to make sure voters everywhere know about this case to protect fair maps in court. Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. # ACTION ALERT: ASK YOUR STATE REP TO VOTE YES ON GOOD BILLS
|
---
Our earlier Action Alert worked! HB 1586, HB 4076, and HB 4535 were all voted favorably out of the Calendars Committee and are now scheduled for a **floor vote** on Saturday!
|
---
# MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD
|
---
### **EMAIL AND CALL YOUR STATE REPRESENTATIVE AND ASK THEM TO SUPPORT THESE PROTECTIVE BILLS!**
Use our public [House Directory](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTUzOTMzOTc1MDEzODIwMzU0LFwiclwiOjE1MzkzNDE0OTk1NDA0NTgxNH0iLCJzIjoiODAxZjg3YTY0MTZmZjgyMCJ9) to find contact info for **your** State Representative. **Not sure** who your State Representative is? Click [here](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTUzOTMzOTc1MDIwMTExODExLFwiclwiOjE1MzkzNDE0OTk1NDA0NTgxNH0iLCJzIjoiNzE0MzQyOTIxZGVkMTcwMCJ9), enter your address, and look for:
“Representative [Name]
Texas House District [Number]”
_Your State Rep should be the second name on the list of results._
**Then use the linked directory to call and email.**
_[](mailto:kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov)_
| |
---
|
---
### ****SAMPLE EMAIL MESSAGE:
SUBJECT: Vote YES on HB 1586, HB 4076, and HB 4535
Dear Representative, I am writing to you today to ask you to please vote **YES** on these medical freedom bills that are up for a vote in the full House on Saturday, May 10. HB 1586 (Hull)
HB 4076 (Leach)
HB 4535 (McQueeney) These bills would protect medical privacy, informed consent, and patients’ rights. Thank you,
[YOUR NAME]
_[](mailto:kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov)_
|
---
| |
---
|
---
**MORE INFO ON THE ABOVE BILLS:** **HB 1586** by (Rep Hull) would allow Texans to print Reasons of Conscience Affidavits at home, streamlining the process to exempt themselves or their children from vaccination requirements.
**HB 4076** (Rep Leach) would prohibit the denial of organ transplantation based solely on the organ recipient’s vaccination status. **HB 4535** (Rep McQueeney) would require vaccinators to receive written informed consent prior to administering a COVID vaccine, and authorizes the development of an “information sheet” for COVID jabs that includes information on the risks and lack of safety testing for this particular shot.

|
---
|
##### Texans for Vaccine Choice
1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, Keller, TX 76248 United States |

Then use the linked directory to call and email. mailto:kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov | | | **SAMPLE EMAIL MESSAGE: SUBJECT: Vote YES on HB 1586, HB 4076, and HB 4535 Dear Representative, I am writing to you today to ask you to please vote YES on these medical freedom bills that are up for a vote in the full House on Saturday, May 10. HB 1586 (Hull) HB 4076 (Leach) HB 4535 (McQueeney) These bills would protect medical privacy, informed consent, and patients’ rights. Thank you, [YOUR NAME] mailto:kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov | | | | MORE INFO ON THE ABOVE BILLS: HB 1586 by (Rep Hull) would allow Texans to print Reasons of Conscience Affidavits at home, streamlining the process to exempt themselves or their children from vaccination requirements. HB 4076 (Rep Leach) would prohibit the denial of organ transplantation based solely on the organ recipient’s vaccination status. HB 4535** (Rep McQueeney) would require vaccinators to receive written informed consent prior to administering a COVID vaccine, and authorizes the development of an “information sheet” for COVID jabs that includes information on the risks and lack of safety testing for this particular shot. | | Texans for Vaccine Choice 1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, Keller, TX 76248 United States | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | You received this email because you signed up or made a purchase from us. |

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: The term from Hell.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Team, it's Senator Schumer.

I've got a lot on my mind, so I'll get right to it: **Trump 2.0 is already the term from Hell, and it's only getting worse.**

**[To stop his agenda, we MUST retake the Senate ‐‐ so will you chip in $5 right now to help Democrats do that?>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250509-ChuckSchumer-SchumerTermFromHell-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250509-ChuckSchumer-SchumerTermFromHell-ETG-sl1&akid=20231%2E9716520%2ENcDW0_)**

Donald Trump made a lot of promises out on the campaign trail. But now, 100 and some days into his second term, _all he's delivered is chaos._

**Tearing down public education. Driving our global economy to the brink. Endangering our national security. Corrupt dealings everywhere we look.**

This is what the next four YEARS are going to be like ‐‐ or at least, that's Trump's fantasy. But as long as he has a Republican Senate majority that won't lift a finger to stop him, his fantasy might not be so far off.

**Taking away his Republican Senate is the _clearest_ way we can end Trump's unchecked power and stop all this chaos.**

The good news is, we only need to flip a handful of vulnerable GOP seats to take back the Senate. But we need a massive grassroots fundraising push to stay competitive with the dark-money machine backing Trump's allies ‐‐ and we can't do it without your support.

So if you're ready to stall the term from Hell, I'll need your help: **[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to fight for a Democratic Senate majority? With enough support, we'll end Trump's power trip and win the power to hold him accountable.>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250509-ChuckSchumer-SchumerTermFromHell-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250509-ChuckSchumer-SchumerTermFromHell-ETG-sl1&akid=20231%2E9716520%2ENcDW0_)**

name: From Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Trump is trying to defund NPR and PBS. This moment demands action.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| **UPDATE: “Trump signs executive order directing federal funding cuts to PBS and NPR”**

**Below is a note from Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. Please read and sign your name by hers to protect NPR and PBS — vital public broadcasting stations.**

[**_25,000 signatures needed by midnight: Sign on now to show Trump that the American people want to protect free and accessible broadcasting >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107388016/544526737/436175811?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.05.09_Public-Broadcasting_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjViY2VhMC1lOTJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aD-Vq1yccHjYl6af_r-gB0i7wGz449aMnR2XQegXYM=&emci=dc4a91c7-502c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f65bcea0-e92c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=7659029) | | [ADD YOUR NAME ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107388017/544526738/436175811?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.05.09_Public-Broadcasting_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjViY2VhMC1lOTJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aD-Vq1yccHjYl6af_r-gB0i7wGz449aMnR2XQegXYM=&emci=dc4a91c7-502c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f65bcea0-e92c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=7659029)
---
I’m writing to you directly because a moment like this demands we stand together.

Donald Trump is once again attempting to slash funding for essential public broadcasting stations: NPR and PBS.

Let’s be clear what this move is about: **It’s about censorship and control.**

Public media is not a partisan issue. It’s how millions of Americans access free educational programming, emergency alerts and fact-based news.

[**_We’re running out of time to stop these cuts, so please: Add your name to defend public media against Trump’s censorship agenda._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107388018/544526739/436175811?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.05.09_Public-Broadcasting_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjViY2VhMC1lOTJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aD-Vq1yccHjYl6af_r-gB0i7wGz449aMnR2XQegXYM=&emci=dc4a91c7-502c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f65bcea0-e92c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=7659029)
| [ADD YOUR NAME ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107388019/544526740/436175811?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.05.09_Public-Broadcasting_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjViY2VhMC1lOTJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aD-Vq1yccHjYl6af_r-gB0i7wGz449aMnR2XQegXYM=&emci=dc4a91c7-502c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f65bcea0-e92c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=7659029)
---
As Trump's approval rating continues to plummet, he knows the only way he can stay in power is to cut off access to fair and trustworthy reporting — in his words, the “woke media.”

He knows that the more the American people hear about his proposed cuts to Medicaid, his disastrous economic agenda and his attacks on our fundamental rights, the more they will fight back.

A free press is critical to any democracy — whether it’s a positive or a negative story. We have to take a stand.

So please, I’ll be checking in with my team to make sure we hit 25,000 signatures by tonight. [**_Can you take a minute to add your name to defend public broadcasting from Trump’s censorship?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107388020/544526741/436175811?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.05.09_Public-Broadcasting_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjViY2VhMC1lOTJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aD-Vq1yccHjYl6af_r-gB0i7wGz449aMnR2XQegXYM=&emci=dc4a91c7-502c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f65bcea0-e92c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=7659029)
| [ADD YOUR NAME ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107388021/544526743/436175811?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.05.09_Public-Broadcasting_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjViY2VhMC1lOTJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aD-Vq1yccHjYl6af_r-gB0i7wGz449aMnR2XQegXYM=&emci=dc4a91c7-502c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f65bcea0-e92c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=7659029)

I hope you’ll make your voice heard.

— Kirsten Gillibrand
* * *

clean_body: | UPDATE: “Trump signs executive order directing federal funding cuts to PBS and NPR” Below is a note from Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. Please read and sign your name by hers to protect NPR and PBS — vital public broadcasting stations. | | I’m writing to you directly because a moment like this demands we stand together. Donald Trump is once again attempting to slash funding for essential public broadcasting stations: NPR and PBS. Let’s be clear what this move is about: It’s about censorship and control. Public media is not a partisan issue. It’s how millions of Americans access free educational programming, emergency alerts and fact-based news. | As Trump's approval rating continues to plummet, he knows the only way he can stay in power is to cut off access to fair and trustworthy reporting — in his words, the “woke media.” He knows that the more the American people hear about his proposed cuts to Medicaid, his disastrous economic agenda and his attacks on our fundamental rights, the more they will fight back. A free press is critical to any democracy — whether it’s a positive or a negative story. We have to take a stand. So please, I’ll be checking in with my team to make sure we hit 25,000 signatures by tonight. | I hope you’ll make your voice heard. — Kirsten Gillibrand * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Al Franken
subject: The “Powwow” Story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Gizhiiwewidamookwe, means ‘speaks in a loud and clear voice woman.’
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b1cbbee-e46e-40e1-b558-3d27e735b967/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Dear Peter, I want to tell you about someone who’s unbelievably great. Someone who understands what’s at stake in this moment, who listens, who leads, and who embodies the values that make Minnesota, well, Minnesotan. That person is Peggy Flanagan. And she’s running to represent our great state in the U.S. Senate. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7624e6db-ea2d-48de-a6cb-0f7a6860e136/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’ve known Peggy for a long time. We both grew up in St. Louis Park (not at the same time — she’s young, and I’m old). Raised by a single mom, Peggy knows the impact of federal programs that help working families. They had a home because of a Section 8 housing voucher. Other public programs helped her mom afford health insurance and child care. She gets it because she’s lived it. And that’s exactly the kind of leader we need in Washington. (And frankly, what we have way too little of.)
---
| | [HELP ELECT PEGGY TO THE SENATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T099d63cf-c2ea-4bc5-abd0-ca162bbb1c22/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Peggy’s got the experience, too. She’s currently serving as Minnesota’s Lieutenant Governor — the highest-ranking Native American woman ever elected to executive office in the U.S. Before that, she was a state legislator, a school board member, an executive director for the Children’s Defense Fund–Minnesota, she even worked for ME! But most importantly — she worked for my friend and hero, the late Senator Paul Wellstone. She and I both believe in his guiding principle: We all do better when we all do better. (Yes, it’s that simple. No, Republicans still don’t get it.) While Republicans are hiding from their constituents, Peggy is doing the opposite. She’s traveling the state hosting ‘Kitchen Table Conversations’ — actually listening to real Minnesotans, having real conversations, and working to bring people together. She doesn't just want to fight against bad stuff. She wants to build something, too. Oh, and in case you’re wondering — yes, Peggy will be the first Native American woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. It’s about time. She is Ojibwe and a member of White Earth, and her Anishinaabe name, Gizhiiwewidamookwe, means ‘speaks in a loud and clear voice woman.’ If there’s one thing I know about Peggy, it’s that she’ll use that voice to fight for all Minnesotans — whether they agree with her or not. [So let’s make it happen. Split a donation with Blue Amp Action today, and help send Peggy Flanagan to the Senate, where she’ll keep speaking up, fighting hard, and making sure we all have a good hotdish recipe.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td6cf87b0-f67a-4f3b-b68c-4b2540bcc483/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
|
---
| | | | | Al _P.S. I could go on and on about how great Peggy is. But instead, let me share a quick story from my first Senate campaign in 2008. Peggy was an organizer working with Native American communities and my advisor on Indian Affairs, and she told me if I went to the powwow at Red Lake, I should NOT dance. Good advice. But then a young man invited me to join in. So, I addressed the crowd and said, “Only if you don’t make fun of me after I leave.” They laughed and agreed, I danced, and a woman danced up to me and said, “You dance like a white guy.” I reminded her of the conditions of my dancing — to which she replied, “You said after you leave.” That was my first lesson in Ojibwe humor._

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f37b3a3-a5f2-4790-8e0b-162393455597/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Haley Stevens
subject: grateful to have you in this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
null, last month, I officially announced that I'm running for Senate in Michigan, and I’ve been overwhelmed by how many people have pitched in to make sure we hit the ground running.
---
**But I just got an update from my finance team, and we’re pacing 42% behind where we should be right now. Republicans and their billionaire buddies will dump millions into this race at the drop of a hat, so we can’t afford to miss a single goal right now.**
[_Will you give $5 or more now to help us close this gap, win in Michigan, and take back the Senate for Democrats?_](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2487?t=1&akid=104%2E49239%2EMPkU3h)
I can’t tell you how grateful I am to have you by my side in this fight. Thank you.
Haley Stevens
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
Sent: Tue, April 22, 2025 at 8:05 AM
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2494?t=2&akid=104%2E49239%2EMPkU3h)
---
Hi, Null – if you haven’t gotten to know me yet, my name is Haley Stevens, and I’m running for Michigan’s U.S. Senate seat to fight for the people I love in the state that I love.
I’ve had the honor of representing Michigan’s 11th Congressional District in the House since 2019. It means everything to me to serve my state in Congress. But as I’ve traveled around our great state, it’s clear that the people I love are afraid. _They’re afraid because of the chaos and uncertainty that Donald Trump and Elon Musk have inflicted upon our nation._
All across our state, I hear concerns about rising costs, fear of the uncertainty in our auto industry caused by reckless shoot-from-the-hip tariffs, and worries about the future of Social Security and Medicare. And you better believe people are outright disturbed by Trump’s attacks on our democracy and personal freedoms.
So for Michigan, and all Americans, I’m fighting back: I’m running for U.S. Senate to help Democrats end Trump’s supermajority and block his dangerous agenda. **[_But Republicans are already working to destroy my campaign – so if you’re with me, become a Founding Donor of my campaign by giving $5 or more right now to ensure we have the resources to compete and win right out of the gate._](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2487?t=3&akid=104%2E49239%2EMPkU3h)**
Thank you,

Haley
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** Null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you chip in now to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2491?t=4&akid=104%2E49239%2EMPkU3h) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2491?t=5&akid=104%2E49239%2EMPkU3h)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=6&akid=104%2E49239%2EMPkU3h)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Sarah McBride
subject: The USPS is not for sale (add your name)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
The Postal Service belongs to the people, not corporations.
#
**Donald Trump and his billionaire allies are pushing a plan to privatize the USPS.**
This scheme would turn over one of our most essential public services to corporations that care more about profit than people.
That would mean higher costs, slower service, and eliminated routes for rural communities. And it would mean the loss of middle-class jobs for hundreds of thousands of postal workers nationwide. Nearly 1,000 of my neighbors in Delaware would be at risk.
The USPS isn’t a business. It’s a constitutional promise built to serve the public good — delivering prescriptions to seniors, paychecks to workers, and ballots to voters.
We should be strengthening the Postal Service, not selling it to the highest bidder. **That’s why I stood on the House floor this week to speak out against Trump’s reckless plan. Now, I’m asking you to stand with me:**
[**Will you add your name to send a powerful message that the USPS is not for sale?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-usps-not-for-sale/?source=em20250509-1983&akid=1983%2E21716%2ExcmyX-)
**[Add your name »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-usps-not-for-sale/?source=em20250509-1983&akid=1983%2E21716%2ExcmyX-)**
Thank you,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250509-1&t=1&refcode2=1983_21716_xcmyX-&akid=1983%2E21716%2ExcmyX-)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: Why Democrats are going into Republican districts
body:
All across the country, Democratic elected officials are traveling to Republican states and congressional districts to hold town halls.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=577%2E2563979%2E2lUPOM)

All across the country, Democratic elected officials are traveling to Republican states and congressional districts to hold town halls.
They are doing it to talk about the Trump-Musk reconciliation bill that would take funding from lifesaving programs and give that cash to some of the wealthiest people and corporations in the country.
And they are doing it because Republicans have been told to avoid town halls and meetings in their own districts.
The events have been a huge success. Thousands of people are showing up in places Democrats don't always campaign.
And if we are able to stop this terrible bill, these events will be a big reason why.
Now - what many people don't know is that many of these events are sponsored and organized by the Democratic National Committee. It wouldn't be happening without them.
But it can't happen without a fully-funded DNC. And as we get closer and closer to a vote, we can't afford to stop now. In fact, we need to ratchet UP the pressure.
If everyone reading this donated $20 to the DNC, they would have the resources to hold endless events in Republican districts. But not everyone does give - so Democrats everywhere are counting on people like you who understand the importance of these meetings to chip-in.
[**If stopping the Trump-Musk reconciliation bill feels worth a $20 donation, that is what Kamala Harris and Democrats everywhere are asking you to donate to the DNC today. Help them continue organizing these meetings across the country.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250509-a&refcode2=577_2563979_2lUPOM&akid=577%2E2563979%2E2lUPOM)

clean_body: All across the country, Democratic elected officials are traveling to Republican states and congressional districts to hold town halls. All across the country, Democratic elected officials are traveling to Republican states and congressional districts to hold town halls. They are doing it to talk about the Trump-Musk reconciliation bill that would take funding from lifesaving programs and give that cash to some of the wealthiest people and corporations in the country. And they are doing it because Republicans have been told to avoid town halls and meetings in their own districts. The events have been a huge success. Thousands of people are showing up in places Democrats don't always campaign. And if we are able to stop this terrible bill, these events will be a big reason why. Now - what many people don't know is that many of these events are sponsored and organized by the Democratic National Committee. It wouldn't be happening without them. But it can't happen without a fully-funded DNC. And as we get closer and closer to a vote, we can't afford to stop now. In fact, we need to ratchet UP the pressure. If everyone reading this donated $20 to the DNC, they would have the resources to hold endless events in Republican districts. But not everyone does give - so Democrats everywhere are counting on people like you who understand the importance of these meetings to chip-in. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | Thank you, Team Kamala Paid for by Harris Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Harris for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.

name: Jane Fonda
subject: This is why we get involved in primaries
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
35 Democrats just gave Trump and Big Oil a win.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107390164/544532440/1328794144?refcode=ea.9c723c44-ed2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.9c723c44-ed2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljNzIzYzQ0LWVkMmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AUD4xOBR8IxAyrHoUoH9XZGAFktg3gtDqlAtxtKdQVM=&emci=3ce2bd07-db2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=9c723c44-ed2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4823105)
---
I’ve been doing this work long enough to know that progress doesn’t come easy. But sometimes, even now, I’m stunned by how deep the fossil fuel industry’s grip still runs in our government. Last week, **35 House Democrats joined Republicans and voted to repeal California’s landmark policy to phase out gas-powered cars by 2035.** A policy that 11 other states had already adopted. A policy that would have drastically cut pollution and helped protect the health of our communities, especially those hit hardest by the climate crisis. Those Democrats caved. And they gave Trump exactly what he wanted. **[This is the kind of vote that makes your head spin. If you’re furious too, will you chip in to help us elect real climate champions who won’t cower to Big Oil and their lobbyists?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107390165/544532441/2105508926?refcode=ea.9c723c44-ed2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.9c723c44-ed2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljNzIzYzQ0LWVkMmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AUD4xOBR8IxAyrHoUoH9XZGAFktg3gtDqlAtxtKdQVM=)** One of those 35 votes came from none other than Texas Rep. Henry Cuellar. You may recognize him as the anti-choice, Oily Democrat who’s in bed with the fossil fuel industry — and helped strip a provision from the Build Back Better plan that would have ended fossil fuel subsidies. He nearly lost his seat in 2022 to a young Latina climate champion named Jessica Cisneros. **We endorsed Jessica. She lost by just _281_ votes.** And it’s moments like this, when bought-and-paid for Democrats stand shoulder to shoulder with Big Oil and hand them another win, that remind me why we launched JanePAC in the first place. Because we can’t just fight Republicans. We have to fight for better Democrats. The kind who don’t take fossil fuel money or betray their own state’s climate leadership, and who show up when it matters most, not just when it’s politically convenient. **That’s why we get involved in primaries. Because if we want bold climate action, we need bold climate champions in Congress. Period.** **[If you’re with me — if you’re tired of seeing oil-funded leaders put polluters over people — then I’m asking you to help us keep supporting climate champions and building the political power we need to fight back against the fossil fuel industry’s dirty agenda.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107390166/544532442/2105508926?refcode=ea.9c723c44-ed2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.9c723c44-ed2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljNzIzYzQ0LWVkMmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AUD4xOBR8IxAyrHoUoH9XZGAFktg3gtDqlAtxtKdQVM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107390167/544532443/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.9c723c44-ed2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.9c723c44-ed2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljNzIzYzQ0LWVkMmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AUD4xOBR8IxAyrHoUoH9XZGAFktg3gtDqlAtxtKdQVM=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107390168/544532444/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.9c723c44-ed2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.9c723c44-ed2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljNzIzYzQ0LWVkMmMtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AUD4xOBR8IxAyrHoUoH9XZGAFktg3gtDqlAtxtKdQVM=)

Let’s hold the Cuellars of the world accountable. And let’s make damn sure that the next Jessica Cisneros doesn’t fall short.

clean_body: 35 Democrats just gave Trump and Big Oil a win. | I’ve been doing this work long enough to know that progress doesn’t come easy. But sometimes, even now, I’m stunned by how deep the fossil fuel industry’s grip still runs in our government. Last week, 35 House Democrats joined Republicans and voted to repeal California’s landmark policy to phase out gas-powered cars by 2035. A policy that 11 other states had already adopted. A policy that would have drastically cut pollution and helped protect the health of our communities, especially those hit hardest by the climate crisis. Those Democrats caved. And they gave Trump exactly what he wanted. = One of those 35 votes came from none other than Texas Rep. Henry Cuellar. You may recognize him as the anti-choice, Oily Democrat who’s in bed with the fossil fuel industry — and helped strip a provision from the Build Back Better plan that would have ended fossil fuel subsidies. He nearly lost his seat in 2022 to a young Latina climate champion named Jessica Cisneros. We endorsed Jessica. She lost by just 281 votes. And it’s moments like this, when bought-and-paid for Democrats stand shoulder to shoulder with Big Oil and hand them another win, that remind me why we launched JanePAC in the first place. Because we can’t just fight Republicans. We have to fight for better Democrats. The kind who don’t take fossil fuel money or betray their own state’s climate leadership, and who show up when it matters most, not just when it’s politically convenient. That’s why we get involved in primaries. Because if we want bold climate action, we need bold climate champions in Congress. Period. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s hold the Cuellars of the world accountable. And let’s make damn sure that the next Jessica Cisneros doesn’t fall short. – Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: JD VANCE APPROVAL POLL
subject: Do you approve of JD Vance?
body:
---

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

His press secretary Karoline Leavitt told reporters that Trump is open to arresting Supreme Court Justices. Trump is hemorrhaging support and subverting our Constitution, so MAGA is chilling our judiciary to avoid accountability. Trump is losing the game, so he’s threatening to arrest the refs. We’re doubling down on our IMPEACH TRUMP billboard campaign and need your help to expand to MORE STATES. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Trump is gaming the system, with no regard for the widespread impact on every person worldwide. This is not just about economics; it is about the integrity of our constitutional order. We must demand accountability and push Congress to act. Trump's actions threaten the very structure of our democracy, and we need your help to mobilize against this injustice. With Trump's favorability plummeting, now is the time to apply pressure and reclaim our democracy. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107393192/544542606/-532190170?refcode=WUEFH520_20250509_RCSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056053&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTJmMmQ2OC1mMDJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ayW27RKHdoNZxeeGrxtsjVt2ODDu8BRuARxUP5rGnBc=) Peter — We've got two major updates from Wisconsin's 3rd Congressional District, and both prove that this race is heating up fast!

First: **Donald Trump endorsed incumbent Derrick Van Orden** , the anti-choice Republican **Rebecca Cooke** is running to unseat. Trump's focus is on boosting _vulnerable_ Republicans, so this endorsement means he thinks Van Orden needs help.

Then: The _Cook Political Report_ shifted WI-03's race rating from Lean Republican to **TOSS-UP**!

This is a must-win race if we want to take back the U.S. House, and we need the full strength of the EMILYs List community to make it happen.

When we say this movement is powered by grassroots supporters like you, we mean it. Your support is what enables us to train and deploy staff to Rebecca's campaign, connect with voters, and fund the strategic investments that win elections. **EMILYs List is already working hand-in-hand with Rebecca's team to build a winning campaign, but we can't do it without you.**

clean_body: Big news from Rebecca Cooke's race — and how YOU can make the difference. | = Peter — We've got two major updates from Wisconsin's 3rd Congressional District, and both prove that this race is heating up fast! First: Donald Trump endorsed incumbent Derrick Van Orden , the anti-choice Republican Rebecca Cooke is running to unseat. Trump's focus is on boosting vulnerable Republicans, so this endorsement means he thinks Van Orden needs help. Then: The Cook Political Report shifted WI-03's race rating from Lean Republican to TOSS-UP! = | = This is a must-win race if we want to take back the U.S. House, and we need the full strength of the EMILYs List community to make it happen. When we say this movement is powered by grassroots supporters like you, we mean it. Your support is what enables us to train and deploy staff to Rebecca's campaign, connect with voters, and fund the strategic investments that win elections. EMILYs List is already working hand-in-hand with Rebecca's team to build a winning campaign, but we can't do it without you. The EMILYs List community has helped elect and reelect hundreds of Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot. With your help, Rebecca can be next, and WI-03 can be the race that flips the House. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Trump Birthday Parade Alert via Our Revolution
subject: CONFIRMED: Trump's Birthday Parade is ON
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

The Army just confirmed alarming news (and Donald Trump's dream): they're
staging a MASSIVE military parade on Trump's birthday this June.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26897?source=email-20250509&t=1011&akid=8431%2E5885482%2Eut8fT3 ]Headline: Army confirms military parade for its 250th anniversary will
be held on Trump's birthday

Trump has repeatedly dreamed of an extravagant, authoritarian-style
military spectacle – a dazzling showpiece straight out of the handbook of
autocratic regimes. Now those plans are OFFICIALLY moving forward. But
here's the good news: Congress still has the power – and the moral
responsibility – to withhold taxpayer dollars from funding Trump's
dangerous vanity parade.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25232?source=email-20250509&t=1012&akid=8431%2E5885482%2Eut8fT3 ]Add your name now to tell Congress loud and clear: Not one penny of our
tax dollars for Trump's militarized birthday celebration.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25232?source=email-20250509&t=1013&akid=8431%2E5885482%2Eut8fT3 ]ADD YOUR NAME

Trump first floated this ridiculous idea as president in 2018, seeking a
pageantry-style military march reminiscent of North Korea and Russia. The
plan was IMMEDIATELY condemned as a wasteful way to feed Trump's ego while
misusing our military and disrespecting veterans.

The idea was scrapped during Trump's first presidency, but now he's hell
bent on making it happen. And sources say it could cost up to $45 MILLION
dollars.

Sinking millions into Trump's parade for himself at a moment when Congress
is racing to pass a budget that SLASHES funding for nutrition programs and
health care isn't a great look. So NOW is the moment to force Congress to
listen to millions of voices demanding our tax dollars fund urgent needs –
not flashy displays that only serve ego-driven politicians. But we have to
move quickly.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25232?source=email-20250509&t=1014&akid=8431%2E5885482%2Eut8fT3 ]Add your name immediately to send Congress an unmistakable message –
this wasteful militaristic spectacle must be stopped NOW.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25232?source=email-20250509&t=1015&akid=8431%2E5885482%2Eut8fT3 ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

name: Sen. Mark Kelly
subject: Roger Stone just called for me to be charged with treason and executed.
body:
Let me lay this out, clear as day:

I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024.

And the President said he’ll back Marjorie Taylor Greene to challenge me.

This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.

If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight — please rush $5 to my re-election campaign and the Democratic National Committee today.

Here’s the link to donate: https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/defend-Jon?t=1001&akid=578%2E2563979%2EGTljfQ

Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.

Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.

More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.

Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.

I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.

I also ran — years before the Dobbs decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.

Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history. In his first 100 days:

He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
Purged independent watchdogs across government.
Stacked key agencies with loyalists—and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
Defied and threatened federal judges.
Undermined the press.
Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him.
Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.

This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.

In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history—and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.

Now we must win again. And we will win again.

Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.

So I’m asking:

Please make a contribution to my re-election campaign and the Democratic National Committee today of $5 or any amount that works for you.

The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.

All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.

CONTRIBUTE: https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2891?t=1002&akid=578%2E2563979%2EGTljfQ

Thanks for being part of this team.

As always,

Jon Ossoff

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.kamalaharris.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=578%2E2563979%2EGTljfQ

name: Maxine Dexter, me
subject: Fwd: Just got back from El Salvador
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Oregon Congresswoman Maxine Dexter here. I’m a mom, doctor, Congresswoman and, most recently, Ted Cruz's target on Twitter/X.
After President Trump illegally deported Kilmar Abrego Garcia, I flew to El Salvador to speak with Kilmar and demand justice.
Of course, Trump-crony Ted Cruz doesn’t like it when people use their voice to actually fight for due process and uphold our Constitution. That’s why he’s hiding behind tweets instead of fighting for what we all know is right. Good thing, I don’t work that way.
You can read more about fight for due process below, but first, will you consider rushing now to show MAGA extremists like Ted Cruz that cowards can't control the narrative and that our democracy is worth fighting for? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250509_ElSalvadorRecap_actrs]
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Maxine Dexter <info@maxinefororegon.com>
Date: Fri, Apr 25, 12:45 PM
Subject: Fwd: Just got back from El Salvador
Hey Peter,
I just got back from El Salvador, and I wanted to reach out.
It’s been over a month since Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a Maryland resident and father of four, was illegally deported by the Trump administration to a Salvadoran gulag.
This is an unimaginable violation of due process and human rights.
We must act. So I bought a plane ticket and flew with three of my House colleagues to demand the release of Abrego Garcia.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250509_ElSalvadorRecap_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250509_ElSalvadorRecap_actrs]
Watch my interview on ABC News [https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/video/us-lawmakers-denied-meeting-kilmar-abgrego-garcia-121050225]
When we arrived, we weren’t allowed to see him or receive any assurances of his well-being. Prison and government authorities wouldn’t even tell us if he was still alive.
This happened despite a federal judge and the Supreme Court ordering the Trump administration to facilitate Abrego Garcia’s return to the United States. This is a constitutional crisis, a presidential overreach, a state-sanctioned but unlawful kidnapping of a Maryland resident. If Donald Trump can defy the courts for one family, he can do it to us, too.
Instead of innocent until proven guilty, the Trump administration decided Abrego Garcia doesn’t deserve legal rights because of his race and where he was born.
Abrego Garcia is still imprisoned—but we won’t stop fighting.
We’ll continue filing suits for Abrego Garcia and the other people who have been kidnapped by the Trump administration. We’ll press the Salvadoran government to provide proof that these men are alive and healthy. And we’ll force the Trump administration to back down by showing that the American people are on our side.
This is bigger than one man. This is setting a precedent for protecting our democracy.
That’s why we need more people-powered, grassroots defiance to hold this administration accountable and boot out Trump’s enablers. Will you donate what you can today? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250509_ElSalvadorRecap_actrs]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_250509_ElSalvadorRecap_actrs] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=X_250509_ElSalvadorRecap_actrs]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=X_250509_ElSalvadorRecap_actrs] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=X_250509_ElSalvadorRecap_actrs]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_250509_ElSalvadorRecap_actrs] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_250509_ElSalvadorRecap_actrs]
I’ll never stop fighting for our families,
Maxine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250509_ElSalvadorRecap_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250509_ElSalvadorRecap_actrs] Maxine Dexter is a critical care physician with decades of experience using facts and following science to help her patients.
Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare.
To learn more about Maxine, visit MaxineForOregon.com [https://maxinefororegon.com/] .

Will you donate what you can today? >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] OTHER [] I’ll never stop fighting for our families, Maxine [] Maxine Dexter is a critical care physician with decades of experience using facts and following science to help her patients. Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare. To learn more about Maxine, visit MaxineForOregon.com [] . name: Sarah McBride
subject: Stephen Miller just attacked me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down. | | | | [](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTSc6VWQyrIEwcklXwav9inBgTLCPj8kMrPCJm0PnxHtFQx9Hv242msDZcSIhxt9kxlU9CY2zeFhZ_29VfzNq8SE79jmzC-LuV6L7tXrIFuxU5FPSmwM8u-aRoxaYDWLB5VMQtb8lefIf1XFLuAbo-JxsBK8yx3aW6YPssFLWT5S75vLSHkYGKfx5EQV8dvZzHmKPj1GIyAIWYFvkOEz76Q1sTP-X5GdeQXMAtMXUARAbUk8KCTsAWwyUygbA8CdaJY2ljBAzTcNqpk6XBM0KzNjvvjoyX5Gk-V1gHazZipQt3-8D4OJiq_wxCf5dis2cxEhs7xxgE-cahf4RjT1qYcg/4gc/ZwstC_9YRPKjmJq5fsqo2Q/h0/h001.grWKYASf_Lg_wcnx8HxouUTqCGXWh4GyGMzUFSp_4GM)
---
Friends, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride.
Recently, I sat on the Capitol steps and shared one of the most painful memories of my life: holding my husband Andy’s hand as he took his last breaths after a battle with cancer.
That experience is why I will never stop fighting Republican attempts to cut access to health care.
**Predictably, Stephen Miller jumped at the opportunity to distract his audience by using schoolyard taunts against me.**
[ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTSc6VWQyrIEwcklXwav9inBgTLCPj8kMrPCJm0PnxHtFQx9Hv242msDZcSIhxt9kx1aYu669AythGD0kIqAfNMCcCL4dD4zo1LOQ9bvpbtdZlLetyFQx3A-oaeUpPVDaHg2s5B6PE0VlSMmMEvOU2GnlKdunbKKOa9YdgFJ7bXOPjQvFiWlUkBtEuHkwzTMkKxnRjwT0qAERlN5jje6MW6Fjey76ANPof8ODKQSfDhREsrwe6ibvEMmqLDxzz9RYQq5U28PfMZSwJzlJaChDNPx6UOalPmJD60SQX9gRpacceVaOMT4l1OXxx3df3Cyy9Eb0vbaxIMtOnOhJT0b7OUw/4gc/ZwstC_9YRPKjmJq5fsqo2Q/h1/h001.crmF2neXmTDtDrH0Ms6fmm29LOHy-2wthfJAJlHoa8U)
---
**Notice what Stephen is doing here.** He doesn’t _actually_ care about women — men, _or_ anyone for that matter. He’s trying to distract from the fact that the far-right wants to take away health care from millions of Americans.
The only “pretending” that’s happening here is the Republicans pretending to care about working people while doing everything they can to make life harder for them. I’m sick of it.
**I’m not here to play into Stephen Miller and the GOP’s bigotry, friend. No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down. I will protect health care from their sticky fingers.**
[**_Friends, will you stand with me by splitting an urgent donation of $5 between me and NV Dems right now? Every dollar helps us fight back — and stay laser-focused on what matters._**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTSc6VWQyrIEwcklXwav9inBgTLCPj8kMrPCJm0PnxHtFQx9Hv242msDZcSIhxt9kxwma2zS9ixc1yhIF5sox7w26npSmTm3FsH2gKd6cklUDPp38nAA_AGS97aUbzkCpI0tZUxO-fPhevJtZ9qrf15Ghs9Lz51X6tOVzFs4sNk0QS3f5ha_0XeBIG2q8sCd6cByfFbzGAO1rfhba_WCX8grwXHlC1V2KOnep8pbEqZcY2TGUK2z3xaD6S_eU0WDsfdw7byYiD__p19geDVPi7N310Cjknxrblsygwd-6fdxF7i11vbrfCNfYhHVMBmlvo1GpFaEp7GjJgmO_uvSZ_7Q/4gc/ZwstC_9YRPKjmJq5fsqo2Q/h2/h001.VY_69a-RPGkhYPdEY3ve_pftxHUc6t52MlnSq_zY2iY)

clean_body: No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down. | | | | Friends, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride. Recently, I sat on the Capitol steps and shared one of the most painful memories of my life: holding my husband Andy’s hand as he took his last breaths after a battle with cancer. That experience is why I will never stop fighting Republican attempts to cut access to health care. Predictably, Stephen Miller jumped at the opportunity to distract his audience by using schoolyard taunts against me. Notice what Stephen is doing here. He doesn’t actually care about women — men, or anyone for that matter. He’s trying to distract from the fact that the far-right wants to take away health care from millions of Americans. The only “pretending” that’s happening here is the Republicans pretending to care about working people while doing everything they can to make life harder for them. I’m sick of it. I’m not here to play into Stephen Miller and the GOP’s bigotry, friend. No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down. I will protect health care from their sticky fingers. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thank you. Your support means so much to me. Sarah The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. body:
Nellie just got a new endorsement

| |

Team, Last month, Nellie was endorsed by the League of Conservation Voters, and now, our momentum continues to grow. **Now, Nellie's re-election campaign was officially endorsed by Reproductive Freedom For All!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107395274/544550182/-200729754?refcode=250508_hq_repro_img&ms=250508_hq_repro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTU3MDQ4YWItZjQyYy1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-LK4igxuOEZrntnFBe-Z8EXHag17KczvI3dWI3s5EHE=) As a mother and grandmother, this endorsement means a lot to Nellie. In Congress, she will fight every day to make sure her kids and grandkids have the same reproductive healthcare that she did. She will never back down from this administration's abhorrent attacks on women's healthcare. It's strong stances like restoring the Roe decision that keep Nellie firmly on Mike Johnson and the NRCC's target list. ### About Nellie Pou

['What the hell's going on?': Biden slams Trump for 'appeasing' Putin in first interview since leaving office](https://substack.com/redirect/57ed019f-312e-4b0c-8141-0f5cb3235306?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via The Independent
[ICE Agents Are Targeting DC Restaurants](https://substack.com/redirect/83dd646c-560a-4742-b3e4-b8d0cb3ef0ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via The Washingtonian
[Congressional Democrats Should Stop Lying About Medicaid](https://substack.com/redirect/bda1f141-b666-4497-80cf-14d760449012?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Center for a Free Economy
[Antarctic ice has made a surprising rebound in mass, scientists say](https://substack.com/redirect/cf675e88-4abf-4ced-94ca-115cbba540db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via New York Post
[Bush official claims US built secret $21T underground 'city' for rich and powerful to live if 'near-extinction event' happens](https://substack.com/redirect/63a108f5-e3e8-4b1b-9805-f866ccaba127?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via New York Post
[Organizers confirm pulling WorldPride events from 'inhospitable' Kennedy Center -- not canceled by it](https://substack.com/redirect/8acafcd3-1ad4-499c-9e7b-c3f33cf70331?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via The Advocate
**Plus, check out my opinion piece in the Washington Examiner:[A stronger border starts with stronger trade policy](https://substack.com/redirect/d3a3265e-2596-4b8d-bb59-4dc524ae94b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
## Next week on The Sean Spicer Show
Next week we've got a lot to cover, Biden on The View, some immigration discussions, an update on MAHA with Senator Roger Marshall on the show. A great panel as always, Bradley Devlin, Steve Cortes, Grace Curley. Don't miss it!
[Subscribe now](https://substack.com/redirect/9f0ae707-e48d-47bc-87ab-f72b2de7fd58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Call Bishop Gold!
Gold is over $3000 per ounce! NOW is the time to invest in gold and precious metals, and if you call my friends at Bishop Gold, you'll get FREE silver included.
[Learn more here](https://substack.com/redirect/bb8e844f-0fe2-41a3-9f44-e3ade775c0fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9ac0f8c7-845b-402f-818d-6c5ec2c3e867?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## Spinning their wheels?
Democrats have a real problem.
Just take a minute and think about who is the leader of each party- for Republicans it's pretty obvious: Trump.
But who is leading the Democrats? Can you come up with a name? Two?
Ever since the coup that ousted Biden from the presidential race, Democrats have been both aimless and leaderless.
Sure there's plenty of people trying to gain the title - names like Gavin Newsom, Gretchen Whitmer, Rep Jasmine Crockett and AOC come to mind.
But as far as cohesive leadership, Democrats have zip.
What seems to be the issue?
I think I know...
