name: Ro Khanna
subject: TAKE ACTION: Protect Public Lands from Private Sale!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
BREAKING NEWS: At 1:00 a.m. on Wednesday, Republicans slipped an amendment into the budget bill, greenlighting the sale of public lands in Nevada and Utah to the highest bidder.
It’s unprecedented. We’ve never seen legislation like this pass in modern history. It opens the door for Big Oil to ravage protected land.
SIGN THE PETITION: Tell Congress to protect federal lands. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/public-lands-petition?contactdata=FyWT/cT7l9Z8fEGfuZuehY695GoPeKgjkrHilNIvkS7Punn9gKtdthlIOlV7Rvshkt/e/IykoZD1TxFxaB1LhlPKirlYYFag/GROQAZU71VvU+AddfbKXkhCvhA9cdIgkI+DvWbLsZUFpvcUsUq6TXMaQNvM1apEHATZKXtwon1skbvUKkp8Ucu2IZN3qwpI]
Public lands are meant to be enjoyed by all, giving every generation access to the great outdoors. We can’t let Republicans sell them off to benefit corporate interests.
https://act.rokhanna.com/a/public-lands-petition?contactdata=FyWT/cT7l9Z8fEGfuZuehY695GoPeKgjkrHilNIvkS7Punn9gKtdthlIOlV7Rvshkt/e/IykoZD1TxFxaB1LhlPKirlYYFag/GROQAZU71VvU+AddfbKXkhCvhA9cdIgkI+DvWbLsZUFpvcUsUq6TXMaQNvM1apEHATZKXtwon1skbvUKkp8Ucu2IZN3qwpI [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/public-lands-petition?contactdata=FyWT/cT7l9Z8fEGfuZuehY695GoPeKgjkrHilNIvkS7Punn9gKtdthlIOlV7Rvshkt/e/IykoZD1TxFxaB1LhlPKirlYYFag/GROQAZU71VvU+AddfbKXkhCvhA9cdIgkI+DvWbLsZUFpvcUsUq6TXMaQNvM1apEHATZKXtwon1skbvUKkp8Ucu2IZN3qwpI]
Thank you for your activism and everything you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

name: Mauricio Leone
subject: Will you help a mom feel loved this Mother’s Day?
body:
I’m Mauricio, the Senior Director of Operations at Live Action.

| [ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/1xFJ8vOly7fakK1QhRhIKiV4zGICCr4WP6MsIDchbk1Rpj45U6tu9iCa1v7_VttIWM0NCoDc5LzB-H9ldKdFeYfy1qACzNxa-vgJJZFEMbOXrE4QbNeCJ0R2g0dJSk6l4zfURXKN0iAv9vbtjoDA56Oaj8HJh3uYh36g2CVJJWM6gnrcVkzy_EUWMEJe61gdu0RHLPWAXKKCpHB_UIIVQ6dTKThlIX1Xn-KRg0t25jjy_nDQ8dQ_Fsqc7bDigo4IRlkqZCiP1mYRSFln4028KIWk18FDRs2uEJ3DAmFI41JDxk5HI-5R6rfn1K8-A-UXNbhRh9nrdwhX3xIMtbP-QwRkuJE466wkH53SH-f2lUe2kAA1zfUeg9_3iUeXh1z0UA0Z1-AGNX6uWV8aOqHEIBiscv9Q_COd7OTIjRnUcHA/ENnh3-eWxELs5bBCWPK5-gF62-CAI07Q/8)
---
#
Dear Friend of Life,

I'm Mauricio, the Senior Director of Operations at Live Action.

I want to make sure you heard about our **[special project](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/cR9KETWF8aOh1Po-lJIcXL8HlExXKWVRIX35j5EJPGaFRXXQ8qGaIVnbrZI15c9UaiYLe8ki8Fv04uPW8jRwzZ5X4c1xbRCwVeNHVn-qN1HbudZYSiKIH3eDu3Yrz5j2_8lMAFX4DN0rSY4oZ_dnux2jGUZzIpEhno8cLnk5D-42vsQrRqWeQyxl0kakzhz1-okjGj_E5teD6Y5A4vUtMYtYN6l3Up5F8LbAQIzgBli2u4scLAv0_XD4yE8ZUIN5-LHNbR9hnalfRqU6kMLEIpo3xCmH5x6VWJrNjPheC6mGd2KbvIhEYibZ3b0i747C9FDiJTmF9rQXvywMa776v2Qm9XtIYm6Ca6uZqV33mG-Be_izlzlpqMsNhKU-AtA8AgbXBHhA8Mbhrmad6eybbF6jChwmTZd0ri58tjfd9rY/tQx-oRRxVhUPizhtL-u3nyesdAnVvXch/8)** to provide mothers in need with care packages through pregnancy resource centers (PRCs) in Southern California.

Before I joined Live Action, I worked for nearly nine years running pregnancy clinics through a major PRC network. One of the services we provided to the abortion-minded women who visited our clinics was care packages.

These care packages served two important purposes for mothers. The first is obvious: offering practical support through essential baby items. For women considering abortion due to financial difficulties, the provision of basic necessities -- like diapers, wipes, and baby clothes -- can be the difference between life and death for their preborn babies.

However, the second purpose was equally important and often proved to be more powerful. Our care packages gave women something tangible that would continue to speak to them after they left our clinic and serve as a reminder of their babies.

Many of the women we served at the PRCs in our network would return to difficult realities after their visits with us, feeling pressure or fear that could lead them toward abortion. Our thoughtfully prepared packages served as a strategic, emotional touchpoint, encouraging them to continue thinking about the new human lives growing within them.

This desire to help mothers facing these same pressures today is what drives our care package initiative. **Our goal is to bless at least 300 mothers with care packages this Mother 's Day. Will you join us to help make this happen?** [ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/DUcAuZv-jA65pTKwMGkmewrxsvePq9ib_hEYiZagcrbxbBjzlBwC_UiG5JqUYtgdw6YkqUu982kID7Yisniabe69Zp_PgmHZOoSDnfdwh7qJC8k4z8rDwewKjLFaz46dOQqQdiz8gnfKnFEKJjCzrxZZr5xicEBLv8UsaMZ9bpZw83-JwPc10tavFcnsoJyaaMuiUiMPcb9Ab2dMFA0-QKTvPpoahHDuLabCIfpDbuOJXbgaRuXHFrmUeRcn09R42TqHNhUW7Ilmp8_maKvZQu-KsRsZt3aWiXP7IaOFdTUF7FwE5rXHIpYFtzm99iAX4kTZwODj9GLRd4XFdGraE7OT1qU2Gn6SgShApUBqw8WHJnwmuJDGanD4VTQCFRG69zNLaki3Xt-Jp-aEnco_aWKjsDTtSoTEg_Jdyq1kEG4/7nPjl4_ExZwahQNHwCk2FsYHfg8XOOK-/8)

**Each generous gift of $65 provides one care package (items shown in the image above) while also supporting the ongoing work of Live Action to end abortion and save lives.**

**Click here to learn more about what 's in each package and to provide one for a mother and child: [give.liveaction.org/send-a-care-package](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/7GPp05PSX2x5-aL1gcHkyTdbwywfxQf6_qmZh5ub1tkld_ekyR8OJuLP_H4gQxKFfWSECWo7EOCpi8wtcG-6SEhg52w0bmdldLDKdwlU_5aeSeZMXkKv-_OncAX-gj0XWAnjhpETeQgsdCY0Q4C2tWpTm83fuV9BjZxNFLvbP2G44wM3iSkrOEdn5ER0EDBukorrsa9kf_eRbN03fJfmFmgWSCcckneZ1PCD2Q0X0NJJ-EM-K501LIHDmnx6_9li7AeHF8BeZE2uvhwhPS8UE_BY78cvmlPnjML0u-B6a9Rv3N-IncncGNKDNZFS53d6zlCqWZat8SUcrcazajoIrr-tDqHrtx2AOweLRbGXSnS9ac2me3VYBnW32mLOkytbb8ZVgXOlw44fHfdGulAYkzlhbG6zb1BOL8a4mXqBNiA/SDSqY--8t78wYwvTWAqggIUep-80Jt5b/8)**

Together, we can give a tangible reminder to these mothers that they and their babies matter and that it is good that they exist.

Thank you for everything you do to defend the most vulnerable!

For Life,

**Mauricio Leone**
Senior Director of Operations

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/-Nk4SCd0uRi6bB5oHGX_tggXTTDxzp9M5afQMyhCllXOPjjuWkUfp9IiVw-jVMmaSfVWhGt7O514PGkFaflQb3uNF2u4-P6404OJg90Mkgm-NdO5CB67aR53aJ47GO6EVTd2oB_DTC-bLyhLfCx08uRRA8fWaEdAImngx7PbFacOMQZWvozsR2I9O1-mHLy1_yQ8tcHSzw8mPvKd6JUAQip5azByG2X8XtPZmj9bDexWd5zyrupW0yVomUol9gyIxSzJjAZ2I0TBWfy4eN9yqlwaVHRuvDRlkw7Ue4bGsLw5DJWzNSh7Gtxp8rQxwqh4ue8D6bSTjzhnE_Zb5lZUDtHJgFb8YPnDmXjlNBUeXReJ6RJRREjDieWva6IUwRorlcQyLC55RQXQ-OIiSsqu-zi8rSaEv0y2qroJi1WDoEY/0rIZRSBnrRSr4VZiBOPVoq-IFVFu4voG/8)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

Friends, May marks Asian American and Native Hawaiian/Pacific Islander (AANHPI) Heritage Month, a time when we celebrate and honor all of the incredible diversity of AANHPI communities. At a time when there are forces in this country working to erase the diversity of our communities, I’m committed to investing in communities across Los Angeles. This month and every month, I hope you’ll join me in celebrating the traditions, cultures, and the impact that the AANHPI community has made on our wonderful city. Thank you for your time,

| | Peter,

I firmly believe that we as Americans have more in common than what separates us. It’s my job as your representative to listen to the concerns of our community and fight for our shared priorities, and I’m willing to work with anyone in order to deliver on that promise.

But, that people-over-politics approach has put me squarely in the crosshairs of far-right extremists whose only goal is to expand their power by further sowing division and chaos.

**We’ve proven time and again that a successful movement is a well-organized one. We know that hyperpartisanship and extremism do nothing to make our streets safer or lower everyday costs for working families. That’s why I was grateful to sit down with Ezra Klein and talk about finding common ground in a divisive political climate in order to address those issues and more.

Thanks to you, we’ve built up a strong, broad grassroots coalition around that shared agenda of leveling the playing field and removing barriers to economic self-determination.

**While I’m continuing that work in Congress, extremists have started launching attacks against me earlier than ever, in hopes of flipping WA-03 – we need to fight back.** [Can I count on you to help us prepare for anything they throw at us on the road ahead?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107396324/544553799/544333919?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_250509_1_2&refcode2=0070f608-f72c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDcwZjYwOC1mNzJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yze0JvqTUqAS8bg5or2yQ4QS3TEHorH-k_lHf0kMrOo=)

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: TSA’s facial recognition program
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Everyone who values privacy, freedom, and civil rights should be concerned about the federal government’s increasing, unchecked use of facial recognition technology.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107396319/544553792/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODZmZjYwOC1mNzJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kBquyh48YTcR8a8j2K-qPmbF97cXoIEnbg423KvhPfE=&emci=ec9cf92d-082c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f86ff608-f72c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Your face is your identity — unique, personal, and not for the government to track without cause. Anyone who values privacy, freedom, and civil rights should be opposed to the federal government's increasing, unchecked use of facial recognition technology. **At airports around the country, the Transportation Security Administration is deploying a facial recognition screening system to verify your identity.** The TSA program matches passengers' faces with their government ID on file without any proof of its effectiveness or ability to protect passenger privacy. That's a fast track into a surveillance state, and if we don't stop it now, we risk trading our fundamental rights for a false sense of security. TSA claims participating in the facial recognition screening is optional, but I've personally experienced agents making it difficult to opt out. I've been sounding the alarm for years: the TSA is on a path to mandate facial recognition technology for all American air travelers, eliminating the current opt-out system. **I've introduced bipartisan legislation to guard your privacy and block the TSA from using airports as a site to quietly build a national database of Americans' sensitive facial biometric data with no oversight. And I'm about to introduce legislation protecting your right to opt out of facial recognition!** We've seen the damage unchecked facial recognition technology does to privacy and freedom in other countries around the world — governments trample dissent, silence dissent, and monitor people's moves. **Let's not let that happen here.** Join me in saying NO to the TSA using facial recognition in our airports. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

clean_body: Everyone who values privacy, freedom, and civil rights should be concerned about the federal government’s increasing, unchecked use of facial recognition technology. | | | | Your face is your identity — unique, personal, and not for the government to track without cause. Anyone who values privacy, freedom, and civil rights should be opposed to the federal government's increasing, unchecked use of facial recognition technology. At airports around the country, the Transportation Security Administration is deploying a facial recognition screening system to verify your identity. The TSA program matches passengers' faces with their government ID on file without any proof of its effectiveness or ability to protect passenger privacy. That's a fast track into a surveillance state, and if we don't stop it now, we risk trading our fundamental rights for a false sense of security. TSA claims participating in the facial recognition screening is optional, but I've personally experienced agents making it difficult to opt out. I've been sounding the alarm for years: the TSA is on a path to mandate facial recognition technology for all American air travelers, eliminating the current opt-out system. I've introduced bipartisan legislation to guard your privacy and block the TSA from using airports as a site to quietly build a national database of Americans' sensitive facial biometric data with no oversight. And I'm about to introduce legislation protecting your right to opt out of facial recognition! We've seen the damage unchecked facial recognition technology does to privacy and freedom in other countries around the world — governments trample dissent, silence dissent, and monitor people's moves. Let's not let that happen here. Join me in saying NO to the TSA using facial recognition in our airports. Onward! subject: Democrats put you on the hook for her legal bills
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF MICHAEL HENRY

Friend,
---
This is outrageous.
---
From the _New York Post_ : **“...taxpayers could be on the hook for legal bills New York Attorney General Letitia James racks up during [Trump] Justice Department probes into her alleged fraudulent real estate dealings.”**
---
_Letitia James could receive**$10 MILLION** in _taxpayer_ funds to cover her legal bills if the Justice Department launches a criminal probe into her alleged acts of fraud._
---
_And it’s all because her Democrat cronies SNUCK language into the budget to save her._
---
**There’s one set of rules for the well-connected liberal political elite, and another set of rules for everyday citizens like you and me.**
---
_Friend, imagine if YOU were accused of committing serious acts of fraud. Think the government would give you $10 million to hire a legal team to clear your name?_Of course not!__
---
It’s time to end the two-tiered system of justice that makes a mockery of our Republic.
---
**And _no one_ better embodies the RIGGED justice system than Letitia James who abuses the law to attack her enemies and protect herself.**
---
_As the ONLY Republican running to FIRE Tish James, I certainly don’t want you to think that we are powerless against Tish James and the left-wing political machine that protects her._
---
_Do not forget that everyday grassroots Americans like _YOU_ just helped usher in one of the greatest political comebacks in history even as Letitia James tried to destroy President Trump with the “corporate death penalty.”_
---
And now grassroots Americans like you have the chance to do it again... **Our campaign has officially hit the number of donations necessary to qualify for a __VERIFIED__ 600% MATCH on grassroots donations to FIRE Letitia James from office!**
---
So, while Tish relies on the powerful to shield her from the law, grassroots Americans will lead a movement to FIRE her from office and end the two-tiered system of justice once and for all.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to help FIRE Tish James as Attorney General now that we’ve qualified for a REAL 600% MATCH on donations between $5 and $250.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---

Thank you,

Michael Henry
_Republican for New York Attorney General_

name: Team Kelly Morrison
subject: Still think Democrats aren’t fighting back? Introducing Kelly Morrison ➡️ article inside!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morrison for Congress
body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter,
Team Kelly here. We hope you’re well and able to get outside during this warm and sunny week!
We were thrilled to see this article pop up this week - titled, Still think Democrats aren’t fighting back? Introducing Kelly Morrison, published in the DailyKos. The author walks their readers through Kelly’s background, and highlights what she has been doing to fight back against Trump and the Republican majority in Congress. You can read the full article [https://www.dailykos.com/story/2025/5/5/2320358/-Still-Think-Democrats-Aren-t-Fighting-Back-Introducing-Kelly-Morrison] here [https://www.dailykos.com/story/2025/5/5/2320358/-Still-Think-Democrats-Aren-t-Fighting-Back-Introducing-Kelly-Morrison] [https://www.dailykos.com/story/2025/5/5/2320358/-Still-Think-Democrats-Aren-t-Fighting-Back-Introducing-Kelly-Morrison] !
Rep. Kelly Morrison standing with Beth Benike in the Busy Baby warehouse [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109390/images/people/kelly-morrison_beth-benike.png]
Kelly and Beth Benike - Minnesota’s Small Business Person of the Year
One paragraph really stood out to us - Americans need to join with those engaged in the fight against Trump. Their actions need to be highlighted, their work recorded, and their courage supported. It is for this reason that I chose to amplify the vast majority of Democrats, especially those like Kelly Morrison, that are unheralded and less well known, who are meeting the moment with strength and resolve every day.
We have had the honor of witnessing Kelly’s compassion for her constituents and incredibly hard work ethic for years now, and we are so proud that the rest of the country is starting to get to know her too.
We also appreciate that they highlight the way Kelly is working to share accurate information – whether it’s through social media, her town halls, or round table events – it is so clear that Americans are hungry for information and community during these tumultuous times, and we are glad that Kelly can be a resource for her constituents and beyond.
This was also a good reminder that midterm elections are around the corner, and MN-03 has only recently begun trending blue. Prior to Congressman Phillips' election in 2018, this seat was held by Republicans for almost 60 years. While Kelly succeeded in 2024, we need to have her back to ensure this seat stays blue in 2026.
Peter, the more we fundraise in 2025, the less likely this seat gains attention from national Republicans and becomes competitive. Our goal is to have the resources we need to run a successful campaign and do our part to flip the U.S. House, and lift up other Democratic campaigns in the district.
With this being said - could you chip in any amount today to help us reach our 2025 fundraising goals? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=10] Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=25]
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=50] Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=100]
Donate Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
Thank you so much for your continued support, Peter.
With gratitude,
Team Kelly
https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress [https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress] https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN [https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN] https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress [https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress] kellyforcongress.org [kellyforcongress.org]
Email is the best way to keep our supporters up to date.
If you only want to receive our most important emails, click here to receive fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hHyPtKcXyUeK_xcY7BEsAQ2]
We’d hate to see you go, but if you want you can unsubscribe here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/4Dh5T9ni_kaWmPt-auzpZw2?unsubscribedata=ZdPCl4Uxc%2FxPHtDFAGtMVMuqJ0nbIVGbbsfjILd3w49gdGfTEMi8S8HXwPrLkYTxamXNYXKSp8YuPG%2F6KBWoKlHdB%2FdWWU%2BcUKJb2B6tdp9d8Zq70uUE5bo%2BQTtWGbtt8qsGspbGy8e6F7dSHlNeBSWw5O2LryL2Idk8W7BrurqrZSDKPyvYZBhf9wqhDpHE%2B98pQ9CBcOHCCwThO8wJeGf9E0ZZuVW1oVq4jzUum7KdNcCMIQxYYzoF%2FVPtMBJH6D26PEw3MXmO%2BtQO%2BtxXA6815jWQv06y5BQhicuWjUUGHZbbgxsx6iwJQVXoT8PTfSJYvZGOhu4wfDbJfvJZqCa20np6pbjmdNlP09cArVK9cR4wMF79F%2BEk8svSt8JOC09%2FogtUibBqQ6t9PBbJ%2Flc5w6YguUM9L7DlO4VtHg3DZeKz42cUgDGslTSPL9M6] .
Morrison for Congress

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Their 2026 revenge plan.
body:
Fellow American, I didn’t fight every day of 2024 to Secure the Senate to turn around and lose it next year. I traveled to battleground states, rallied voters, and, with your generous support, raised critical funds for exceptional candidates. Together, we built a U.S. Senate majority to last. |
---
Fellow American,

I didn't fight every day of 2024 to Secure the Senate to turn around and lose it next year.

I traveled to battleground states, rallied voters, and, with your generous support, raised critical funds for exceptional candidates. **Together, we built a U.S. Senate majority to last.**

**But now, the Democrats are gearing up for the fight of their lives.** After a terrible 2024 for the Left, they are doubling down and raising more money than I ever thought was possible to defeat us in the midterms. They are already mobilizing for 2026 with a fierce determination to undo our victories.

**They're coming for us, Fellow American, and this time, it's personal.**

**[I'm up for re-election in 2026, and there is no doubt my seat will be the Left's #1 target for standing with President Trump.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f1fc25ac9faa44a0bd914aa7f3d47f30&_e=rbkc2HryapAFNytz2BTqBacPUODUlLVr5XPUg5kMWBOAz4svUmEIHJ0sAs-kEngc-t3Ut8R0xoR4lLONw4xu3z_hhzLoebguUBI_HcLdAlx2x502ebBRizhdkPRX0bGYts_NlQxDfACI0ZPzihsRLVwrCTA21x20O_FtD85pzCGVl9ch_I4RVIw1zsddskoQAtfvye0zIv9AS5wh9aGdK8fezaDv_cHukn0TWzFp1ohLbw3hOCKBY3dNFVkoaeq9j2kaVdSH55jExsxJ52DEe2dRZTiH27sP6kXst-7ByMPyLOH7t5PComsAhgon3PhetSssJc1qfUtPGjTvdkD7_zP7A-iQFyoq_gY92Co_EhMyRYDnNzwVPtj_idCsIkXtRKIb9oi7EGWMDpf_8v4WZZwQL1qBhGpGXjIgXxrZQfo%3D)**

They want to flip South Carolina **Blue,** end my work alongside President Trump, and dismantle everything we've achieved together.

**We cannot let the Democrats succeed.**

| [**KEEP SOUTH CAROLINA RED**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f1fc25ac9faa44a0bd914aa7f3d47f30&_e=rbkc2HryapAFNytz2BTqBacPUODUlLVr5XPUg5kMWBOAz4svUmEIHJ0sAs-kEngc-t3Ut8R0xoR4lLONw4xu3z_hhzLoebguUBI_HcLdAlx2x502ebBRizhdkPRX0bGYts_NlQxDfACI0ZPzihsRLVwrCTA21x20O_FtD85pzCGVl9ch_I4RVIw1zsddskoQAtfvye0zIv9AS5wh9aGdK8fezaDv_cHukn0TWzFp1ohLbw3hOCKBY3dNFVkoaeq9j2kaVdSH55jExsxJ52DEexeo-vvUlN-XT7SeX2oay115cc_JWhsi3zLLTmTAuq7hMVr2IoHqVxM_TEs2DEYeHw9RwO-n4odU2Spgo2HsGUO5aA6U4HwevOmN1hYI3tskdIWc1uk_icMxSfbJbsP6c8Z9sVLlBToHl6dB-T1Oxlw%3D)
---

Our 2024 success came from starting early, uniting, and acting decisively. We must do it again. By replicating our winning strategy now, we can build a campaign strong enough to stop the Left and keep America winning.

Together, we built a U.S. Senate majority to last. | Fellow American, I didn't fight every day of 2024 to Secure the Senate to turn around and lose it next year. I traveled to battleground states, rallied voters, and, with your generous support, raised critical funds for exceptional candidates. Together, we built a U.S. Senate majority to last. But now, the Democrats are gearing up for the fight of their lives. After a terrible 2024 for the Left, they are doubling down and raising more money than I ever thought was possible to defeat us in the midterms. They are already mobilizing for 2026 with a fierce determination to undo our victories. They're coming for us, Fellow American, and this time, it's personal. subject: Honoring our educators
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress

|

Hi Peter, This week is Teacher Appreciation Week, an opportunity for us to honor the educators who work every day to shape America’s youth and move our nation in a positive direction. I am a proud product of Arizona public schools, and am so lucky to have had a laundry list of selfless, passionate teachers throughout my life who helped me get to where I am today. In fact here’s a throwback picture: 8-year-old Yass, who was bullied for being a “teacher’s pet,” with my art teacher who I absolutely adored. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107397718/544558625/-1074210638?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250509_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjNhZGQyOC1mODJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2bDov__wb53YkIZS5wd3LyqMc15XsbAVTu88Z5-_Fgk=) Thanks to this grassroots team made up of teachers, small business owners, and members of our community in AZ-03, I’m proud to be in Congress fighting for a better future for all of us. clean_body: | Hi Peter, This week is Teacher Appreciation Week, an opportunity for us to honor the educators who work every day to shape America’s youth and move our nation in a positive direction. I am a proud product of Arizona public schools, and am so lucky to have had a laundry list of selfless, passionate teachers throughout my life who helped me get to where I am today. In fact here’s a throwback picture: 8-year-old Yass, who was bullied for being a “teacher’s pet,” with my art teacher who I absolutely adored. = Thanks to this grassroots team made up of teachers, small business owners, and members of our community in AZ-03, I’m proud to be in Congress fighting for a better future for all of us. Our campaign was honored to receive the endorsement of the American Federation of Teachers, and I’ll never stop fighting for our teachers and students. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, Yassamin Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting AGAINST the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting FOR it...The terrifying reality is that the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just pushing the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively forcing it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- transgender ideology is everywhere. They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. **AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM. While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue. Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology, you in advance for your help. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Roger Stone just called for me to be charged with treason and executed.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I called out Trump for his blatant corruption... In response, they sent Roger Stone after me.
#

Trump’s longtime political advisor, Roger Stone, just called for me to be charged with treason and executed.
You heard me right.
I called out Trump for his blatant corruption — making millions of dollars from his own crypto coins — and I co-sponsored a bill to make it illegal for the President, the Vice President, administration officials, and members of Congress to do the same.
In response, they sent Roger Stone after me.
Peter, when I joined the Navy, I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution. I did it again when I was sworn in as Arizona’s United States Senator. I will continue to uphold that oath, and because it matters to our democracy, I will do everything I can to stop the blatant corruption in Washington.
Guys like Donald Trump and Roger Stone are only looking out for themselves. And it’s clear they’re scared of the attention we’re bringing to them and their corrupt deeds.
I’ll be honest with you, though. If Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and now Roger Stone are all lining up against me, it’s going to take a big team to fight back.
[**Please, if you can afford it, split a donation between my campaign and Ruben Gallego as we take on the corruption in Washington and fight back against the Trump Administration. It adds up fast when lots of people are chipping in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-mek-em-mar25.qIyu4X&refcode=em250509-1-90&t=1&akid=3864%2E734936%2Ekz2o2k)

With Anti-Semitism at an all time high - we should eliminate the Hitler analogies.... Jim doesn't and continues to sting like a bee. [Last month's article ](https://substack.com/redirect/553782c9-2fa1-4f0a-86fb-920651757c85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)exemplifies Himes' misinformation to project his beliefs while instilling fear to secure his progressive base with their hatred for President Trump.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..xRqz4QDgQyvaplAfM60TLPe7jjbJpVxlyJTIAbb74XI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163221718)
In Progressive terms, Himes has _**conscious and unconscious bias**_ towards Marxism; he was so enthralled with the Marxist dictator of Nicaragua, Daniel Ortega that he spent 2 months in Nicaragua while at Harvard. This resulted in his almost 100 page essay that glorified this Marxist dictator who ran that government like a King.
Himes instills fear by falsely alleging that President Trump wants to be a king. Over the past 100 plus days of his administration, Trump's actions demonstrate his desire to represent the American public that supported him at the polls by draining the swamp, and by calling out and dismantling the totalitarian policies supported by Himes and his progressive left colleagues. These gems include AOC, Bernie Sanders, and Connecticut's Chris Murphy and Rosa DeLauro and so many others.
Himes also talks about how "Our politics have become ugly really ugly. I mean politics have always been tough, but you know more Americans than ever before -- some 40% -- think that violence is okay in certain circumstances." He makes that soundbite and ignores the reality that his supporters and the Indivisible and Hands-Off movements throughout this country are really behind the destruction and violence - _**it wasn 't conservatives destroying Teslas and it wasn't conservatives looting and pillaging stores and setting cities on fire during the "summer of love"**_ - They are Jim's base.
**Conservatives aren 't taking over college campuses and wearing Kufiyahs spouting antisemitic remarks** \- It is the progressives acting like the Nazis by blocking Jewish students from learning. The Anti Defamation League put out a report and "In 2024, ADL recorded 1,694 antisemitic incidents on college campuses, which is 84% higher than in 2023. Campus incidents comprised 18% of all incidents, a larger proportion than in any previous Audit." [See Report ](https://substack.com/redirect/b058dd75-e3ad-4c33-86ee-a27f190fcc65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
With regard to the violent antisemitism that is taking place on college campuses, especially at Himes alma mater Harvard, Himes congratulates Harvard for resisting the Federal Government's retaliation against the hate crime of antisemitism. **This is the worst case of university tolerated antisemitism since the 1930 's antisemitic riots against Jews in Hitler's Nazi Germany**. It is expected to increase given the riots at Columbia this week and destruction of the university in the name of Free Palestine by protestors.
Himes' endorsement of hate mongers will result in additional physical violence against Jewish Harvard students by calling these students **courageous** for telling Trump to go pound sand as this is true resistance. **Sorry - this is hate mongering so entrenched that they are not willing to change.**
As for general antisemitism, the ADL found that "In 2024, ADL tabulated 9,354 antisemitic incidents across the United States. This represents a 5% increase from the 8,873 incidents [recorded in 2023](https://substack.com/redirect/a66761eb-8c72-44fc-8016-f35b3bd62908?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), **a 344% increase** over the past five years and a 893% increase over the past 10 years. It is the highest number on record since ADL began tracking antisemitic incidents 46 years ago.
**We the public, should not be funding institutions that promote antisemitism and hate against jews, the canary in the coal mine**. As demonstrated in Nazi Germany, once they get finished with hating Jews, they'll go on to hate somebody else - hate is a parasite that always finds a new host. _**Qatar is responsible for $6.3 billion in support for US universities buying influence.**_
Himes enthusiastic support of these Islamo-Fascists is misguided; it demonstrates once again Congressman's true deep-seated ideologies and the hope for a Marxist regime here in the US.
In response to this regime change in Himes' utopian Nicaragua, 20% left and 7% of the Nicaraguan population now lives in the United States. On a relative basis that would be the equivalent of an exodus of 70 million people from the US. _**To put that in perspective, Kamala Harris received 75 million votes so this would amount to 93 percent of those that voted democrat in November.**_ Such an exodus would never happen in a government that was well liked and popular among the people. Himes' affinity for such a regime is a major warning sign.
**This is not the first time Himes and his progressive team get it wrong**
Himes and his progressive left buddies have been wrong for a while with the greatest blunder on the silence on Biden's open border policy that resulted in 20 million illegal aliens that came here to take and destroy the fabric of our democracy, rather than contribute and be self-sufficient. The result was criminals, gang members and terrorists. Himes and his cohort refused to sign a bill to deport illegal aliens that were convicted of sexually assaulting women and experienced due process.
Himes also believes that transgender males should be engaged in boxing matches and other contact sports with biological females.
In the Middle East, Himes plays both sides. He is somewhat supportive of Israel, preventing Iran from nuclear weapons, but at the same time, he panders to an entity known as CAIR. It is one thing to support religious freedom and Islam; it's another to support CAIR by name and its leaders that praised the Hamas murderers on October 7th.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/23b3e5b3-0aed-482c-8a92-78dcd10afe24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Jim's X Post right after October 7th
[Pledge your support](https://substack..xRqz4QDgQyvaplAfM60TLPe7jjbJpVxlyJTIAbb74XI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163221718)
**Other Blunders**
Himes ran cover while Biden's senility was affecting how our country was run without an active president. When the money pipeline shut down and it was impacting his re-election chances, Jim did a quick 180 and was one of the first to turned on Biden.
Despite an office in Bridgeport, Himes has abandoned the poor Democrat cities with the worst school rankings. He refuses to allow school choice. The result is deprivation of educational opportunities which is the real "systemic racism" that his party claims it is trying to eradicate. In reality it's an oppressive hand to secure the base that has been mobilized for decades. When Democrats are behind the scenes all to secure the support of the teacher's union that democrats have been beholden to for the votes, it is hypocrisy that they cannot be called the oppressors and systemic racists that they really are.
Himes also stated "I don't ever want to draw an analogy to the Third Reich or to what happened in the 1930s in Europe. That's not where we are," said Himes. "But that's another example of an aristocracy, of an educated elite, of a church caving, the most powerful institutions caving to obvious evil."
The violent attack of Jews at Harvard and at Columbia this week and other elite institutions is symbolic of the greater pandering to the evil of the progressive left elite that runs Jim's party. While the far right was traditionally associated with antisemitism, a [recent study](https://substack.com/redirect/a49b8759-8794-4ac9-acc8-dff809f6fd98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) indicates that almost 95 percent of antisemitic incidents post October 7th have involved the far-left or "unidentified activists"
Here in Connecticut, Himes is on the wrong side of this and so many other issues; he does not represent mainstream views of the average Connecticut citizen and most of the public does not know who he is. It is time for new voters to come out of the wood work.
He is protected by the media that will not call out his ways and that is why we need to continue to expose him and replace him in 2026.
**Thank you for your continued support and please reach out for assistance. Please subscribe and spread the word as we need your support to grow this message.**
Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein
_The father-son team continues on_ so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT and this country together in a meaningful way.

Himes' endorsement of hate mongers will result in additional physical violence against Jewish Harvard students by calling these students courageous for telling Trump to go pound sand as this is true resistance. Sorry - this is hate mongering so entrenched that they are not willing to change. As for general antisemitism, the ADL found that "In 2024, ADL tabulated 9,354 antisemitic incidents across the United States. This represents a 5% increase from the 8,873 incidents , a 344% increase over the past five years and a 893% increase over the past 10 years. It is the highest number on record since ADL began tracking antisemitic incidents 46 years ago. We the public, should not be funding institutions that promote antisemitism and hate against jews, the canary in the coal mine. As demonstrated in Nazi Germany, once they get finished with hating Jews, they'll go on to hate somebody else - hate is a parasite that always finds a new host. Qatar is responsible for $6.3 billion in support for US universities buying influence. Himes enthusiastic support of these Islamo-Fascists is misguided; it demonstrates once again Congressman's true deep-seated ideologies and the hope for a Marxist regime here in the US. In response to this regime change in Himes' utopian Nicaragua, 20% left and 7% of the Nicaraguan population now lives in the United States. On a relative basis that would be the equivalent of an exodus of 70 million people from the US. To put that in perspective, Kamala Harris received 75 million votes so this would amount to 93 percent of those that voted democrat in November. Such an exodus would never happen in a government that was well liked and popular among the people. Himes' affinity for such a regime is a major warning sign. This is not the first time Himes and his progressive team get it wrong Himes and his progressive left buddies have been wrong for a while with the greatest blunder on the silence on Biden's open border policy that resulted in 20 million illegal aliens that came here to take and destroy the fabric of our democracy, rather than contribute and be self-sufficient. The result was criminals, gang members and terrorists. Himes and his cohort refused to sign a bill to deport illegal aliens that were convicted of sexually assaulting women and experienced due process. Himes also believes that transgender males should be engaged in boxing matches and other contact sports with biological females. In the Middle East, Himes plays both sides. He is somewhat supportive of Israel, preventing Iran from nuclear weapons, but at the same time, he panders to an entity known as CAIR. It is one thing to support religious freedom and Islam; it's another to support CAIR by name and its leaders that praised the Hamas murderers on October 7th. | | ---|---|--- Jim's X Post right after October 7th Other Blunders Himes ran cover while Biden's senility was affecting how our country was run without an active president. When the money pipeline shut down and it was impacting his re-election chances, Jim did a quick 180 and was one of the first to turned on Biden. Despite an office in Bridgeport, Himes has abandoned the poor Democrat cities with the worst school rankings. He refuses to allow school choice. The result is deprivation of educational opportunities which is the real "systemic racism" that his party claims it is trying to eradicate. In reality it's an oppressive hand to secure the base that has been mobilized for decades. When Democrats are behind the scenes all to secure the support of the teacher's union that democrats have been beholden to for the votes, it is hypocrisy that they cannot be called the oppressors and systemic racists that they really are. Himes also stated "I don't ever want to draw an analogy to the Third Reich or to what happened in the 1930s in Europe. That's not where we are," said Himes. "But that's another example of an aristocracy, of an educated elite, of a church caving, the most powerful institutions caving to obvious evil." The violent attack of Jews at Harvard and at Columbia this week and other elite institutions is symbolic of the greater pandering to the evil of the progressive left elite that runs Jim's party. While the far right was traditionally associated with antisemitism, a indicates that almost 95 percent of antisemitic incidents post October 7th have involved the far-left or "unidentified activists" Here in Connecticut, Himes is on the wrong side of this and so many other issues; he does not represent mainstream views of the average Connecticut citizen and most of the public does not know who he is. It is time for new voters to come out of the wood work. He is protected by the media that will not call out his ways and that is why we need to continue to expose him and replace him in 2026. Thank you for your continued support and please reach out for assistance. Please subscribe and spread the word as we need your support to grow this message.** Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein The father-son team continues on so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT and this country together in a meaningful way. | A guest post by| Consultant, Political Consultant, Campaign Manager, Construction Consultant and Corporate Attorney. |

| | |
The waste and abuse are finally being exposed. **Elon Musk's DOGE has blown the lid off USAID's most egregious boondoggles, and it's worse than we thought.**

Here are just a few of the outrageous programs that USAID and our government was funding with YOUR tax dollars:

❌ **$1.5 million** to "advance DEI in Serbia's workplaces and business communities"
❌ **$70,000** for a "DEI musical" in Ireland
❌ **$47,000** for a "transgender opera" in Colombia
❌ **$32,000** for a "transgender comic book" in Peru
❌ **$2 million** for sex changes and "LGBT activism" in Guatemala
❌ **$6 million** to "fund tourism" in Egypt
❌ **Millions** of dollars to EcoHealth Alliance for COVID research
❌ **Funding** for contraceptive initiatives and programs that benefited terrorists in several countries

It's no wonder that Secretary of State Marco Rubio has called for a complete overhaul of USAID. **But we need to hear from YOU, Peter**.

name: Rick Larsen
subject: This upcoming Mother’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
This policy is not just about supporting mothers; but about supporting all families.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107398370/544561311/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWZiZTYzOC1mYjJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DAZnjvWoV1xo25BZQ4kssPAGaRCY3TYwxa2BsU4S2do=&emci=8f280be6-7f2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=19fbe638-fb2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=9494239)
---

| | In preparation for this upcoming Mother's Day, Happy Mother’s Day to all of the moms and caregivers, especially my wife, Tiia. Without her dedication to our family, our sons, Robert and Per, would not be the incredible young men they are today.

This will also be my first Mother’s Day without my mom, Yolanda Jean Larsen (neé Rosenbach), who passed on April 29th. She just celebrated her 88th birthday last month. Mom was the center of our lives for me and my seven brothers and sisters as kids and adults. I also want to take a moment to reflect on the invaluable role that mothers, parents, and caregivers play in our lives and what we can do to best support them. **One of the first things that comes to mind is paid family leave and similar programs that allow families to be together.** At some point, nearly every person needs to take time away from work for a serious illness or injury, or to care for a child or family member. No one should have to choose between a paycheck and caring for themselves or someone they love. Fortunately, Washington is one of the thirteen states that have passed paid family and medical leave legislation. The Bureau of Labor Statistics found that only about 27% of the private sector workforce has access to paid family leave. I am working in Congress to fix that and provide a better work-life balance for families:
* **I supported the Family and Medical Insurance Leave Ac****t,** a bill that would establish a national paid family and medical leave insurance program and ensure that workers can take paid family and medical leave when they need it.
* **I am a cosponsor of the Healthy Families Act,** which would require employers to provide up to seven days of paid sick leave for workers to care for themselves or a family member.
* **I support the Schedules that Work Act and the Strong Start Act****,** the first of which would provide flexible, predictable, and stable work schedules so families can plan time together. The other would give workers access to high-quality, early-learning opportunities and more affordable child care, creating stability at home.

**Paid family leave is not just good for families — it also helps businesses.** Paid family leave yields higher employee retention rates and reduces turnover costs for businesses. It also promotes gender equality and diversity in the workplace by leveling the playing field for those bearing the brunt of caregiving responsibilities. When everyone has the support needed to balance work and family, they can fully participate in the workforce, driving innovation and productivity. **As we celebrate Mother's Day, we should honor the mothers and caregivers in our lives and advocate for policies like paid family leave that support them and their families.** Together, we can create a more equitable and prosperous society for all. clean_body: This policy is not just about supporting mothers; but about supporting all families. | | | | In preparation for this upcoming Mother's Day, Happy Mother’s Day to all of the moms and caregivers, especially my wife, Tiia. Without her dedication to our family, our sons, Robert and Per, would not be the incredible young men they are today. This will also be my first Mother’s Day without my mom, Yolanda Jean Larsen (neé Rosenbach), who passed on April 29th. She just celebrated her 88th birthday last month. Mom was the center of our lives for me and my seven brothers and sisters as kids and adults. I also want to take a moment to reflect on the invaluable role that mothers, parents, and caregivers play in our lives and what we can do to best support them. One of the first things that comes to mind is paid family leave and similar programs that allow families to be together. At some point, nearly every person needs to take time away from work for a serious illness or injury, or to care for a child or family member. No one should have to choose between a paycheck and caring for themselves or someone they love. Fortunately, Washington is one of the thirteen states that have passed paid family and medical leave legislation. The Bureau of Labor Statistics found that only about 27% of the private sector workforce has access to paid family leave. I am working in Congress to fix that and provide a better work-life balance for families: I supported the Family and Medical Insurance Leave Ac**t, a bill that would establish a national paid family and medical leave insurance program and ensure that workers can take paid family and medical leave when they need it. I am a cosponsor of the Healthy Families Act, which would require employers to provide up to seven days of paid sick leave for workers to care for themselves or a family member. I support the Schedules that Work Act and the Strong Start Act, the first of which would provide flexible, predictable, and stable work schedules so families can plan time together. The other would give workers access to high-quality, early-learning opportunities and more affordable child care, creating stability at home. Paid family leave is not just good for families — it also helps businesses. Paid family leave yields higher employee retention rates and reduces turnover costs for businesses. It also promotes gender equality and diversity in the workplace by leveling the playing field for those bearing the brunt of caregiving responsibilities. When everyone has the support needed to balance work and family, they can fully participate in the workforce, driving innovation and productivity. As we celebrate Mother's Day, we should honor the mothers and caregivers in our lives and advocate for policies like paid family leave that support them and their families. Together, we can create a more equitable and prosperous society for all. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . name: Becca Balint
subject: My rule of thumb
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
What matters most is that working people have someone fighting for them in Congress — regardless of what the politics are. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107398532/544561688/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250509_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzk4YmU2MC1mYjJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTMc1j1eiQztugqVovyYy2JRTX1G5oYF7PUvvYh_M7g=)
---
Ever since I got to Congress, Peter, I’ve set a rule of thumb for myself:

As soon as I stop being me, **I’m out. ** I don’t let myself go down the slippery slope of letting the ends justify the means. I believe how we do the work matters. And I push myself to not choose comfort over courage, even if it’s really hard in the moment or if I feel like I’m the only one. While too many politicians are focused on creating viral sound bites and cozying up to special interests, I’m focused on what really matters: **delivering for Vermonters, alleviating suffering for regular working families.** It’s what I’ve done my entire career. I’ve always been laser-focused on fighting for people on the margins — from my time as a rural middle school teacher to my work now as a member of Congress. **Because what matters most is that working people have someone fighting for them in Congress — regardless of what the politics are. ** I don’t pretend to know everything, Peter. I’m not an expert on every situation and every policy issue, which is why, unlike most politicians, I try to bring people into this work and listen rather than lecture. While other politicians chase money from billionaires and special interests, I’m focused on building a strong grassroots base of supporters made up of everyday folks like you to guide and power my work in Congress. **[I don’t work for billionaires, Peter. I work for people like you. So if you can, please pitch in a grassroots donation today to fuel my fight for working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107398533/544561689/-186789909?amount=&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250509_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzk4YmU2MC1mYjJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTMc1j1eiQztugqVovyYy2JRTX1G5oYF7PUvvYh_M7g=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107398534/544561690/-186789909?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250509_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzk4YmU2MC1mYjJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTMc1j1eiQztugqVovyYy2JRTX1G5oYF7PUvvYh_M7g=)

clean_body: What matters most is that working people have someone fighting for them in Congress — regardless of what the politics are. | = Ever since I got to Congress, Peter, I’ve set a rule of thumb for myself: As soon as I stop being me, I’m out. I don’t let myself go down the slippery slope of letting the ends justify the means. I believe how we do the work matters. And I push myself to not choose comfort over courage, even if it’s really hard in the moment or if I feel like I’m the only one. While too many politicians are focused on creating viral sound bites and cozying up to special interests, I’m focused on what really matters: delivering for Vermonters, alleviating suffering for regular working families. It’s what I’ve done my entire career. I’ve always been laser-focused on fighting for people on the margins — from my time as a rural middle school teacher to my work now as a member of Congress. Because what matters most is that working people have someone fighting for them in Congress — regardless of what the politics are. I don’t pretend to know everything, Peter. I’m not an expert on every situation and every policy issue, which is why, unlike most politicians, I try to bring people into this work and listen rather than lecture. While other politicians chase money from billionaires and special interests, I’m focused on building a strong grassroots base of supporters made up of everyday folks like you to guide and power my work in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Education is supposed to be the great equalizer, but not if the GOP has its way.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107398572/544561871/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250509_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWI0ODg3Ny1mYjJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MLYJlvRKKy1e8defqhFgfJ9JOlfqHYx2SsZfUqmi4-I=&emci=b8b48877-fb2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=beb48877-fb2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15529135) | Hi there, Last week, the House Education Committee held a markup for the annual congressional budget. I called out Republicans for proposing major cuts to Pell Grants and student loan programs, which would force students toward predatory private loan markets and increase the already extreme debt that so many students face. 50% of students in the higher education system would not be able to receive the financial aid they need to complete their degree. This would make college less affordable and reduce the number of students pursuing a college degree. _**And for what gain? All to provide tax cuts to the ultra-wealthy in this nation?**_ I will not let this stand. **Over 50% of college students in my district rely on Pell Grants**. I will not let the GOP eliminate this lifeline. **Education is supposed to be the great equalizer, but this legislation would perpetuate inequality. ** **[Your support helps me fight back against the cruel cuts to education proposed by the GOP. clean_body: | | Hi there, Last week, the House Education Committee held a markup for the annual congressional budget. I called out Republicans for proposing major cuts to Pell Grants and student loan programs, which would force students toward predatory private loan markets and increase the already extreme debt that so many students face. 50% of students in the higher education system would not be able to receive the financial aid they need to complete their degree. This would make college less affordable and reduce the number of students pursuing a college degree. And for what gain? All to provide tax cuts to the ultra-wealthy in this nation? I will not let this stand. Over 50% of college students in my district rely on Pell Grants. I will not let the GOP eliminate this lifeline. Education is supposed to be the great equalizer, but this legislation would perpetuate inequality. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = More soon as I keep up the fight for our students, Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: “rightwing extremists”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
I really need you to see this.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/f575b0d10d3d843b/?utm_campaign=20250505&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend,

Something deeply troubling is happening in our country.

Judges are inciting legal warfare against our Republic...

...A rogue judge issued a restraining order against Elon Musk to shut
down the Department of Government Efficiency.

...A rogue judge wants the Trump Administration to get individual
warrants for EACH illegal alien that the Administration deports!

_AND NOW, THE FATE OF MY FREEDOM – AND FRANKLY, MY LIFE – IS IN
THE HANDS OF A JUDGE APPOINTED BY OBAMA’S HOMELAND SECURITY
SECRETARY, JANET NAPOLITANO._

This is the same Homeland Security Secretary who issued a report to
crack down on “rightwing extremists” in America.

Those so-called rightwing “extremists” are you and me: _people who
believe in freedom, individual rights, true justice, and limited
government._

AND NOW I’M BEING PUT ON TRIAL IN A SHAM STATE CASE WHERE PRESIDENT
TRUMP HAS NO AUTHORITY TO PARDON ME.

_When I hear the Left call us “rightwing extremists,” I’m
reminded of the time Democrats arrested me in one of the most violent
jails in America and called me_ P01135780.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/f575b0d10d3d843b/?utm_campaign=20250505&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]
__

_The “P” in my mugshot number is supposed to stand for
“prisoner.” But to me, it stands for PATRIOT!_

_The Left sees all of us freedom-minded individuals as prisoners,
deplorables, and extremists. But we’re one thing and one thing alone
– PATRIOTS._

AND AS A RED-BLOODED PATRIOT, I WILL FIGHT FOR MY RIGHTS, I WILL FIGHT
FOR MY JUSTICE, AND I WILL FIGHT FOR MY LIFE SO THAT I DO NOT SPEND MY
100TH BIRTHDAY IN A PRISON CELL AS AN INNOCENT MAN.

But to WIN against the cabal of rogue judges that want to treat us
like political prisoners for simply believing that we have a God-given
right to life and liberty, I’m going to need your support funding my
Legal Defense Trust – which truly stands as my last remaining hope.

_BUT IF YOU CANNOT AFFORD TO, PLEASE JUST STOP READING HERE AND GO
ABOUT YOUR DAY. I MEAN IT!_

PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO MY LEGAL DEFENSE TRUST – THE RUDY
GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND – TO HELP ME FIGHT FOR MY FREEDOM, JUSTICE,
AND ULTIMATE VINDICATION AS THE DEMOCRATS TRY TO JAIL ME FOR THE REST
OF MY LIFE.

In Episode 3 of _Slingshot The Podcast_ , hosts Kadida Kenner and Charles Gregory unpack what it means to “listen to our ancestors” in today’s turbulent political climate. From the wisdom of Harriet Tubman and Fannie Lou Hamer to modern-day trailblazers like Rep. Jasmine Crockett and former VP Kamala Harris, the hosts explore how Black women have long been the backbone of social and political change—and why it's time we trust their leadership. This episode dives into:
* Honoring the legacy of Black women who fought for freedom, voting rights, and equity
* Understanding why some Black communities are choosing to #SitStill and #StayHome
* The truth about the Hands Off rallies and the difference between protest and movement
* The power of multiracial organizing and civic action in 2024

A passionate call to action on voter registration and participation in local elections, Kadida shares a powerful personal story of meeting Rosa Parks and reflects on the enduring wisdom passed down through generations. Charles challenges us to consider the difference between yard signs and real action. Together, Kadida and Charles shine a light on what it means to move with purpose, protect Black joy, and organize across lines of race and difference. If you’re feeling overwhelmed, unheard, or fired up—this episode is for you. This isn’t just a podcast. It’s a movement. clean_body: | | | | | | "Listening to Our Ancestors" | | Episode 3 of Slingshot The Podcast is called “Listening to Our Ancestors” — and it’s a word you don’t want to miss. — where the misunderstood voice becomes the culture’s power is hosted by our Founding CEO, Kadida Kenner, and Charles Gregory , from In this deeply personal and politically charged episode of Slingshot The Podcast, host Kadida Kenner delivers truth with urgency and unapologetic pride. In Episode 3 of Slingshot The Podcast , hosts Kadida Kenner and Charles Gregory unpack what it means to “listen to our ancestors” in today’s turbulent political climate. From the wisdom of Harriet Tubman and Fannie Lou Hamer to modern-day trailblazers like Rep. Jasmine Crockett and former VP Kamala Harris, the hosts explore how Black women have long been the backbone of social and political change—and why it's time we trust their leadership. This episode dives into: Honoring the legacy of Black women who fought for freedom, voting rights, and equity Understanding why some Black communities are choosing to #SitStill and #StayHome The truth about the Hands Off rallies and the difference between protest and movement The power of multiracial organizing and civic action in 2024 A passionate call to action on voter registration and participation in local elections, Kadida shares a powerful personal story of meeting Rosa Parks and reflects on the enduring wisdom passed down through generations. Charles challenges us to consider the difference between yard signs and real action. Together, Kadida and Charles shine a light on what it means to move with purpose, protect Black joy, and organize across lines of race and difference. If you’re feeling overwhelmed, unheard, or fired up—this episode is for you. This isn’t just a podcast. It’s a movement. Listen to us on , , , , and . Plus, watch us on Connect with us: Instagram: Facebook: Youtube: TikTok: Email: info@newpaproject.org | | | Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania Project P.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 4126996771 | | | | | ---|---|---

# ¡El pueblo, unido, jamas sera vencido!
---
**On May 5, we proudly represented Keystone Progress Education Fund at two powerful rallies in Harrisburg.** One stood in solidarity with our immigrant communities; the other demanded a long-overdue raise of Pennsylvania's minimum wage to $15/hour (more on that below). Right now, the federal government is aggressively targeting immigrants and tearing families apart, [deporting hundreds of people](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMdUS12fSrk6MMZIR1Ut2K6ejDe8DlWKdTujRDI_A1KVT76kMgYQ6e9Db5pidSdpmlhOZvJfHONikmsLfIbyrL3baK-slCYz0bcy-ct46trnTiNPZTbYNUqcnox8yRTHulJXpIIaFlvtuJRdC33LqkGOy36-ahLCmIFTyjaebiGxagUojgK7vpkV8cnvyPuwl6LwuAiZi-O-MkEYMiReISqu1lcJ3oc5jYioz4VXx-zStZaY99mCdgOt0pc1J8JprxivmB_6LvZEJUVJ8v7yGIwI6sw17emgtVJCe9BIs-duzFiM77lMCz3aQZB18OuUwSGnt9r2N7ftw_am0jiat9LTlx8MQ2HD3_eS7aXgaWyb0YiFkkf9YIVzBG-UzTTd9I_itVG__Hls0VvM9rzWMbHs/4gc/IBjTJo9MQpWnHSuckaeZsA/h1/h001.MTqe6VZvW_J9Xq8fO39Qnoza11zfvn2sBCfC-COPtmY) they label as "terrorists" with no due process and, in many cases, no direct evidence of any crime. In an additional terrifying move, the U.S. is paying millions of dollars to incarcerate over 200 of the deported people in a prison notorious for human rights abuses. We joined human rights organizations across the state to co-sponsor this rally and call on Governor Josh Shapiro to use his authority to enact real protections for immigrant communities across Pennsylvania. **Couldn 't make it? **Watch the full livestream on our [Facebook page](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.RNKlYhK-gnABEpCnH88uwC2HgdfBqr-wmP_d5r0ZR5jpPaPJ9r8T76LoZcbHzw0uF2Ed4caujmf2KwsjTIs7X_HMDGqCTipVT1zX20imQNq8W3D-GXAVl9dwEzz3bjgU53ZCMhTShdTZ9NPDZxx7CkfEmiZs7DxnN3VtbA-Tssay4AIVecSLU_ID5xlTJZwHea_f7PCpbcsPL7aFuTmyDo2MqvTSbc52LJn0Ij6vgEaSd10gEc_MFvpQPpxc4PYo1zfm7y9nynPRZEhZEcSUoalstANTwsdoIUmTO81Huw9H9hKV1uOSsTMKWEgYpdgo2wTD7mfVmLqGHzGOtuvILA/4gc/IBjTJo9MQpWnHSuckaeZsA/h2/h001.aj8wbRbOwWIKHrINMVzUfB_BCbMtPGeSZ6jI17nyD58)!

# PA Minimum Wage is Lower than OH and WV
---
**If you had to choose between feeding your family or paying your bills, what would you do?** That's the reality for thousands of minimum wage workers across Pennsylvania. It's been over 15 years since PA has raised its minimum wage. In the meantime, **32 other states, including every state surrounding Pennsylvania have increased theirs.** On Monday we rallied in Harrisburg demanding that our representatives pass **Rep. Roni Green 's bill to raise the minimum wage to $15/hour! ** Every worker deserves dignity and respect and no one should be forced to decide between their basic needs. **One Job should be enough!** Other states have raised their minimum wage while keeping businesses strong, there's absolutely no reason why Pennsylvania can't do it too. **Couldn't be there in person? **Watch the [full livestream](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.RNKlYhK-gnABEpCnH88uwBGSYFEwmgvO-iLnyUpL9DoxV4Rr3UNf7dJ9NrJl3oFNOJUnNE7hpcXALODa3-4u6aJpyM8ARRleveJWF-Qa5KHbFlQazUgKdk9bFxlqi3AOWmv2mdNFVa5UFg6SMOtyeiFHsz3sNS_J_dsdHhaJBf6aHmUxor2on9CK36FyPDNIlQs1xN30KxNdSibPpej9FRbjcHktlKd6AJuiFAtgXZSSxiLrqNCFt1JSMrJH_ntnZt6wfwOOac2etDkOEt-tu7AwFqOXGgjicqiQN2a5EQefmDz2Hm7miSgpUC8S3iOWqdvGIsbqT0axiiHNole0-w/4gc/IBjTJo9MQpWnHSuckaeZsA/h3/h001.2ie6-xLA7XxyLw27tAFcNbkEhcm3IEk2crzHr7-5iDA) on our Facebook Page

## Take Action
---
**This year our state representatives will vote on a living wage bill!** Rep. Roni Green's bill, HB1525, will raise the wage to $15/hr for all workers, include an annual cost of living increase, and grant local control to municipalities so they can raise their own higher wage. **Tell your Reps to raise the wage -- [sign the petition here!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBRMdJziQYq9L7TCLxkuprwbG-rRj07vGVN0Ol6xw9a8LV8AHwNZxMJKz8WgNxljS3ZP8KH9KshGgU0f-kf8WnrUPIXUWuSo4utN19nsN-tr-Q5ICbvWNUk5dsN0OTZFYzVdgwwAS4vvSJQETNtPkiqEX2B-wYGaBqi3hVdU5w--gn2F2ldr4iITJaB0Vg5emrz6rP8WUUKmRGSB4KRKh26c-B6PD4o6mXR_b4HdELmndgNOLa7UPXdTetdWGg4FoV-xy_3uR5SMw-qhd-Zl6sfiV91Y_maUqJ6Apd1emwUCbUrGNdVZh0QPUk3xAgbqnNRfKpLuUEcRLjanlwHPHVIWA/4gc/IBjTJo9MQpWnHSuckaeZsA/h4/h001.C6vwnL4VZGjnN9_XXhZuvroE4cIAa5Y4ZFRkyK23nn0)** This week, the FDA abruptly suspended its milk and dairy quality-control testing program. This is just one of the casualties following the termination of 20,000 Department of Health and Human Services employees. Originally launched in response to the H5N1 bird flu outbreak in dairy cattle, the program was a vital safeguard to ensure the safety of our milk supply.

# Repro Roundup
---
Cuts to medicaid would have a devastating impact on reproductive rights. Our Partners at All* Above All published a great piece in [Ms. Magazine](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.A3cd-kVlFz1CzUMSYeTvVTjLGj9yTb4AEjeQ-8wDgkIYiEDYP8dZt0kMNwQ3c2rGNfZAhC0EzzR4EWzgvGKEZOTSu6E1h8v22oQMrOJ6KrxLWbJGfxmmvDTB-kYSeHUT4ArlWA3cS2qTuBDCwAfyxR_zftNz_cDOy5FTu6Pfki0PAangDXtsF3yRJssxDaLzcP06SHj1UuAWq8csY6MhHKZr0vbOZ3s0F8Dg_o0aL6j5r4LaNB7o_pq7AyV1pFY_oIDIdJ3OztSl_GYYa8NKpG77xrVG_gng0PHuPa4J2xEE1EPLr4ZFxb_L9v83C9HmWGCdlTc632cTUmkdSZtCWVbXCmVD16YAiegsnDs4I1u6ze9DBtL50bHg0wp9hQRukx0XzyiD8Khoa3mGSRdpefKz6p1Uuj_QAGmdZYo2wvsAeTNxeWGE7cumbHNxHapRaZYDhd6GhUkzNen1WD8GgWKn_ozowNkJIWj3woTQxxwX0Sb1Ct1l2uFqhEZsZzVkTlxaF0w4qcX--LUXNgn_aKTBX50zBNlZDSWD_VNqP2w/4gc/IBjTJo9MQpWnHSuckaeZsA/h5/h001.-z9McVeA9rzXfPeVrHxdYGeaWzHzVfy1C_oGWcXtxUM) laying this out in the context of Trump's first 100 days in office. Here are some of the highlights (or lowlights):
* Signed an executive order declaring Hyde the law of the land and demonstrating his Administration will do all they can to make abortion access more difficult.
* Pardoned those charged under the FACE Act for violence at reproductive health clinics and toward patients and providers.
* Has halted Title X funds from going to clinics - causing closures across the country and cutting off thousands of people in states like Utah, Maine, Montana and more. This will impact an anticipated 846,000 patients.

The hits keep coming, but we'll be right there fighting back with our partners and supporters like you! Stay tuned for actions to demand our right to access comprehensive reproductive healthcare.

# Disability Justice
---
**Who Is the Lady Trying to Upend Disability Law?** The [Supreme Court heard oral arguments in A.J.T. v. Osseo Area Schools](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMdUS12fSrk6MMZIR1Ut2K6e8FuJzNAsO71wCXtZCTB6eicFvBRePdjcY7az7fgAKDPGn0nxYOiaMl36nFwQ5Zn8ptH1lt0h89l75bDolac-mNXUJDq8kW0nEadvxf6nQGW-UjkUkIQ5rmvIbHAV7dm3DRzAgJf9yejf4VAYFQ5FzRGRkPUgESZhC8KQkc3faSohbWpVa0KqEsUoPLT-J7sm7cZO_RVbPefsGec-xUtzWMMMgg1bnD0gKOtfrFU40GzL6V5Dr9xMWgHmlw6q3lS6fwfJbNIhNXbmGVwEhNlr97ENMvh-2Xu2DO5zQsGBj3rJ41gUYjF7MIqH-ibj1b0VjYNYocCoR9lisTtaFseR4g-6w34qb6Ny6Ghbk9bSjBp3kYzvVNEfV9Wflfordnx4/4gc/IBjTJo9MQpWnHSuckaeZsA/h6/h001.q_kRTyYmgAG3j9P6CkS30jmSXcpIyw7B9OBcmXF95do). It was supposed to be a narrow education rights case that looked at whether students have to meet an impossibly high bar to sue schools under the Americans with Disabilities Act. Then Supreme Court litigator Lisa Blatt came in, trying to make it difficult for anyone with disabilities to bring forth discrimination cases, and even the Supreme Court justices were confused. What's at stake is the future of access to appropriate education for millions of disabled students. This great episode of Rewire Newsgroup's podcast[ _Boom! Lawyered_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZq1PHJ3oYOTTutytC4dgm6HioNWGaTjFzQHzdL_HxlQeLUfU7myNE9snpXj7d0PSqakaSMCPT_tgMSTq5saciR-7PgnQ9D-WvjvpEsjEdL9oObgto_-EP63EShMguqPneqcwYGr94ftf4ZxkSwXbSvqXDFNHaidlAF5umvSCw1yiyTX4Dy7FWcyl90wtx_9dh_Y9h58SglnyHAuuQddcAaCPiI3pkG9UCIC93nSeiVoOLkjamrU4zRKkuDt6ElLVGtJwMhaFfUIPWQiVX2IRtCPoMUr3siXrXdde0Zw4RKJOWywoCB1VlcuNWujkEr1cYdwW0KaBdogI7GA12IWdno_X9zPIACqdOshAnnQuwFdw7eux48-lrM59AU1FDVgSXH7cuZb1PcdWNCIV93M4nt4/4gc/IBjTJo9MQpWnHSuckaeZsA/h7/h001.f-I-CM7_cZOGF1wGDTYH0RJSIF17oySSZzevzqtCWoI) delves into all of the Supreme Court shenanigans.

On May 5, we proudly represented Keystone Progress Education Fund at two powerful rallies in Harrisburg. One stood in solidarity with our immigrant communities; the other demanded a long-overdue raise of Pennsylvania's minimum wage to $15/hour (more on that below). Right now, the federal government is aggressively targeting immigrants and tearing families apart, they label as "terrorists" with no due process and, in many cases, no direct evidence of any crime. In an additional terrifying move, the U.S. is paying millions of dollars to incarcerate over 200 of the deported people in a prison notorious for human rights abuses. We joined human rights organizations across the state to co-sponsor this rally and call on Governor Josh Shapiro to use his authority to enact real protections for immigrant communities across Pennsylvania. Couldn 't make it? Watch the full livestream on our ! | PA Minimum Wage is Lower than OH and WV If you had to choose between feeding your family or paying your bills, what would you do? That's the reality for thousands of minimum wage workers across Pennsylvania. It's been over 15 years since PA has raised its minimum wage. In the meantime, 32 other states, including every state surrounding Pennsylvania have increased theirs. On Monday we rallied in Harrisburg demanding that our representatives pass Rep. Roni Green 's bill to raise the minimum wage to $15/hour! Every worker deserves dignity and respect and no one should be forced to decide between their basic needs. One Job should be enough! Other states have raised their minimum wage while keeping businesses strong, there's absolutely no reason why Pennsylvania can't do it too. Couldn't be there in person? name: Letitia James
subject: I want to hear directly from you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107399801/544566058/-1997846894?code=jtk1937-su-nd&refcode=jtk1937-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2IzZTMwMS1mZTJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5P1VY4zUDTFYbxglezHPvQUgnlLNLJMfC5ojnp7DBRE=)
---
Peter, yesterday, I had the honor of hosting a town hall in New York with my fellow attorneys general from across the country.
From budget cuts that hurt our schools and hospitals, to attacks on civil liberties and immigrant communities, to threats to our reproductive rights, we heard directly from New Yorkers whose lives have been impacted by the Trump administration’s dangerous policies.

**And in response, we shared how our offices have been fighting back against the Trump administration's chaos agenda.**
We’ve sued to block attempts to gut birthright citizenship.

We’ve challenged federal budget cuts to K-12 education, public health research, and critical services our communities rely on.

And when this administration has tried to bulldoze the Constitution, we've taken them to court – _and won!_
**This work doesn’t happen in a vacuum. It’s powered by people like you – people who care deeply about justice, fairness, and the future of our democracy. That's why today, I need 7,500 fearless fighters to share where your priorities are as we move forward.**
**[Will you take just two minutes to complete my priorities survey and share what issues matter most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107399802/544566059/1945634563?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1937-su-nd&refcode=jtk1937-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2IzZTMwMS1mZTJjLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5P1VY4zUDTFYbxglezHPvQUgnlLNLJMfC5ojnp7DBRE=&emci=c23b46e0-552c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=53b3e301-fe2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=25369504)**

– Letitia James
