body:
Today is the final day of Teacher Appreciation Week

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107403557/544578982/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTM5MzkwMS0wNTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5jvw0t_xYfBOhCvXYdMIQH_1O5xACG4hWCV6nv-7PEc=) Today is the final day of Teacher Appreciation Week, and I couldn't be more grateful to the thousands of teachers across Kansas who have dedicated their lives to inspiring the next generation. But our teachers deserve far more than just recognition. They deserve better pay, more resources and supplies, and consistent support from their government. And right now, it’s clear that Republican leadership has little interest in actually offering that support. That’s why I wanted to reach out and ask: [_**Will you sign my new petition calling on Congress to stand up for teachers and support public education?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107403558/544578983/-492725348?refcode=email_050925_Teachers&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTM5MzkwMS0wNTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5jvw0t_xYfBOhCvXYdMIQH_1O5xACG4hWCV6nv-7PEc=&emci=0911550e-e52c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c1393901-052d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=22117458) I am a proud product of Kansas public schools, so I understand that teachers do so much more than just classroom instruction. They serve as mentors, role models, support systems, and helping hands for children who are just beginning to learn about the world and themselves. At times, our teachers are juggling a dozen different jobs at once. But right now, that hard work is not valued enough by our leaders in government. And because of their inaction, states across the country, including Kansas, are facing serious teacher shortages. It’s clear that National Republicans are unwilling to offer real solutions to teachers and students across the country. Instead, they’re more than happy to play politics with public education — all while our children are forced to suffer the consequences. [_**Teachers in Kansas and across the country deserve far more than a thank you card at the end of the school year. They deserve good pay and adequate resources to do their jobs. If you agree, sign your name to my new petition today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107403559/544578984/1759814517?refcode=email_050925_Teachers&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTM5MzkwMS0wNTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5jvw0t_xYfBOhCvXYdMIQH_1O5xACG4hWCV6nv-7PEc=&emci=0911550e-e52c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c1393901-052d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=22117458) | | [Sign Your Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107403560/544578985/1759814517?refcode=email_050925_Teachers&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTM5MzkwMS0wNTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5jvw0t_xYfBOhCvXYdMIQH_1O5xACG4hWCV6nv-7PEc=&emci=0911550e-e52c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c1393901-052d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=22117458)

This Teacher Appreciation Week, I couldn’t be more thankful for my own teachers growing up, and the hard work of our nation’s teachers today.
-Sharice

I lived in Public Housing.

I depended on SNAP to eat.

I saw my parents agonize over paying the bills.

But with a little hard work and the support of critical safety nets like SNAP and Public Housing – a young boy growing up in poverty went on to become a United States Congressman.

Trump and his Republicans want to make life hard for folks like you and me by gutting these vital programs.

That's why I'm running for the US Senate to Block the GOP's dangerous agenda and protect critical services like SNAP, Medicaid and Social Security.

So please, help me defend these critical programs from Donald Trump and his far-right cronies' pathetic attempts to gut these programs to give tax cuts to the ultra wealthy. * * *
### A Fuck You by Any Other Name Still Smells Like Condemnation
It'd seem "The Holy See"-- or the Vatican central government now led by its chosen Pope, Leo XIV--Has Seen Enough of Trump's America. In a plot twist that could short-circuit Dan Brown's laptop, the Vatican **just sent the clearest possible message** : _We 've seen the face of American-style fascism, and we'd rather not burn in it, thanks._
Enter Pope Leo XIV--a Jesuit like Francis, progressive in theology, compassionate in tone, and, wait for it...American. So, when the College of Cardinals picked a U.S.-born pope, sure, it very much seemed like a rebuke of the most anti-Christian--or Christ, if you will--person to ever engulf the Oval Office in his stink. Of course, some thought it might be a nod to America's global cultural presence or a spiritual Hail Mary to reengage wayward U.S. Catholics. And there's likely some truth in that--but then we saw the Pope's Twitter account, which is what you might call, The Tell.
The Pope didn't tweet in 2024. He only tweeted in 2025 for 2 reasons--or, I should say, 2 people to whom he issued verbal poenae (thanks 7th grade Latin). These weren't subtweets, leaving the reader to figure out whom he was castigating. Nope, the pontiff threw some serious holy shade at Trump and his couch-loving sidekick.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b6477235-8a49-4586-a793-18c0b6059775?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Ruh roh: The Pope schools Catholic/Name convert JD James Donald Hamel Bowman Vance_
It's almost poetic. Just as Trump tries to wrap himself in Jesus cosplay and pretend he's God's chosen one with a sophomoric image of himself as Pope--the kinda thing that you'd tell your 6th grader was dumber than Caroline Leavitt on goofballs--**the actual Vatican taps a man who 's called him out **_**by name**_. I dunno, maybe the cheating with a porn star while his wife was home with the newborn, or the 34 felony convictions, did it? Or the fact he still can't tie a fucking tie correctly?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2262007d-e00e-4a3a-88ba-3e4a84c2c564?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Pontiff RTs a tweet criticizing 2 doofus dictators --Trump & Bukele for--lack of conscience_
* * *
From what he's said and tweeted, and where he's lived (Peru), he clearly is very disturbed--as are many of us, Christian and non-Christian alike--by Trump & Vance's cruelty-based immigration policy. Perhaps all of this led an historically traditional organization to take a good look at the worldwide damage caused by America's gaudy, gauche, Biff-Tannen'd pumpkin-head of a Presisent who's intellectually infested with the all the stupid compiled over millennia of human existence.
And, after some thought, they decided picking a forward-thinking, compassionate person from our environs was exactly how to counter Trump's influence around the world. To undo some of the damage done by one of the worst humans alive by showing the world the face of a very different American--one who wouldn't toss toilet paper at desperate people who just survived a vicious hurricane.
No, this was no mistake. The Catholic Church has, in the past, switched off between more progressive reformers & traditionalists, before reform goes beyond where they want it. They clearly chose to follow a reformer with a man who had a very public record of reproaching goo-brained MAGA fascists on a very public platform. Again: In 2024, Leo XIV tweeted nothing. Silence. Reflection. Then 2025 rolls around and the new pope logs in--specifically to rebuke the false prophets of Mar-a-Lago.
His tweets weren't vague prayers for civility. They were surgical strikes. Trump? A destroyer of decency. JD Vance? A grifter in crucifix drag (don't forget the eyeliner!). When a spiritual leader has better public political takes than American corporate media, it's probably time to postulate that the choice may have been, as Mitt Romney might say "severely" purposeful. Don't forget: Canada and Australia, both countries that had recent elections with conservatives initially running ahead, got a good look at Trump over the last few months and reacted with a resounding: No. Fucking. Way.
So their electoral fortunes went the way of shitty Catholic Rudy Giuliani's hair dye.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/10ef5740-9d7e-47bb-ae27-56545f75b1bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The punchline? While American right-wing troglodytes scream about holy wars & apocalyptic invasions at the southern border, the Vatican reminds us what actual moral leadership looks like: Someone who lifts the poor, protects the environment and doesn't use a beer bong to inhale narcissism, nationalism and nickel from willing buyers. Pope Leo XIV isn't just a rejection of Trump. He's the anti-Trump.
Where Trump tweets threats, Leo offers clarity. Where Trump hugs flags, Leo embraces suffering. And while the MAGA faithful pray to a Golden Calf at Mar-a-Lago, the rest of the world--and now, the Catholic Church--has loudly said: _Enough._

A Fuck You by Any Other Name Still Smells Like Condemnation It'd seem "The Holy See"-- or the Vatican central government now led by its chosen Pope, Leo XIV--Has Seen Enough of Trump's America. In a plot twist that could short-circuit Dan Brown's laptop, the Vatican just sent the clearest possible message : We 've seen the face of American-style fascism, and we'd rather not burn in it, thanks. Enter Pope Leo XIV--a Jesuit like Francis, progressive in theology, compassionate in tone, and, wait for it...American. So, when the College of Cardinals picked a U.S.-born pope, sure, it very much seemed like a rebuke of the most anti-Christian--or Christ, if you will--person to ever engulf the Oval Office in his stink. Of course, some thought it might be a nod to America's global cultural presence or a spiritual Hail Mary to reengage wayward U.S. Catholics. And there's likely some truth in that--but then we saw the Pope's Twitter account, which is what you might call, The Tell. The Pope didn't tweet in 2024. He only tweeted in 2025 for 2 reasons--or, I should say, 2 people to whom he issued verbal poenae (thanks 7th grade Latin). These weren't subtweets, leaving the reader to figure out whom he was castigating. Nope, the pontiff threw some serious holy shade at Trump and his couch-loving sidekick. | | ---|---|--- Ruh roh: The Pope schools Catholic/Name convert JD James Donald Hamel Bowman Vance It's almost poetic. Just as Trump tries to wrap himself in Jesus cosplay and pretend he's God's chosen one with a sophomoric image of himself as Pope--the kinda thing that you'd tell your 6th grader was dumber than Caroline Leavitt on goofballs--the actual Vatican taps a man who 's called him out by name. I dunno, maybe the cheating with a porn star while his wife was home with the newborn, or the 34 felony convictions, did it? Or the fact he still can't tie a fucking tie correctly? | | ---|---|--- Pontiff RTs a tweet criticizing 2 doofus dictators --Trump & Bukele for--lack of conscience From what he's said and tweeted, and where he's lived (Peru), he clearly is very disturbed--as are many of us, Christian and non-Christian alike--by Trump & Vance's cruelty-based immigration policy. Perhaps all of this led an historically traditional organization to take a good look at the worldwide damage caused by America's gaudy, gauche, Biff-Tannen'd pumpkin-head of a Presisent who's intellectually infested with the all the stupid compiled over millennia of human existence. And, after some thought, they decided picking a forward-thinking, compassionate person from our environs was exactly how to counter Trump's influence around the world. To undo some of the damage done by one of the worst humans alive by showing the world the face of a very different American--one who wouldn't toss toilet paper at desperate people who just survived a vicious hurricane. No, this was no mistake. The Catholic Church has, in the past, switched off between more progressive reformers & traditionalists, before reform goes beyond where they want it. They clearly chose to follow a reformer with a man who had a very public record of reproaching goo-brained MAGA fascists on a very public platform. Again: In 2024, Leo XIV tweeted nothing. Silence. Reflection. Then 2025 rolls around and the new pope logs in--specifically to rebuke the false prophets of Mar-a-Lago. His tweets weren't vague prayers for civility. They were surgical strikes. Trump? A destroyer of decency. JD Vance? A grifter in crucifix drag (don't forget the eyeliner!). When a spiritual leader has better public political takes than American corporate media, it's probably time to postulate that the choice may have been, as Mitt Romney might say "severely" purposeful. Don't forget: Canada and Australia, both countries that had recent elections with conservatives initially running ahead, got a good look at Trump over the last few months and reacted with a resounding: No. Fucking. Way. So their electoral fortunes went the way of shitty Catholic Rudy Giuliani's hair dye. | | ---|---|--- The punchline? Pope Leo XIV isn't just a rejection of Trump. He's the anti-Trump. Where Trump tweets threats, Leo offers clarity. Where Trump hugs flags, Leo embraces suffering. Selling access should be completely unacceptable to all Americans regardless of party. I’m leading the charge in Congress to hold Trump – and anyone looking to use the government to get rich – accountable. About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.

name: Team Deb
subject: Green Chile Chicken Posole
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Chip in any amount today, and we’ll send you Deb’s Green Chile Chicken Posole recipe.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1844%2E400544%2E2TcApY)
Cooking has always been one of Deb’s favorite ways to build community – from potlucks at law school and meals for water protectors at Standing Rock to now on the campaign trail.
She learned by watching her grandmother bake bread in her mud oven and stir massive pots of posole for family feasts. **Now, Deb wants to share a special recipe with you.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250509_1_posole?refcode=em20250509-1844&refcode2=1844_400544_2TcApY&akid=1844%2E400544%2E2TcApY)
**[If you make a donation of any amount today, we’ll send you Deb’s personal Green Chile Chicken Posole recipe in the ActBlue receipt – straight from her kitchen to yours!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250509_1_posole?refcode=em20250509-1844&refcode2=1844_400544_2TcApY&akid=1844%2E400544%2E2TcApY)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250509_1_posole?refcode=em20250509-1844&refcode2=1844_400544_2TcApY&akid=1844%2E400544%2E2TcApY)**
This dish is more than a family staple.
It’s a powerful reminder of what this campaign is all about: nourishing and protecting the people and places we love — and building a future rooted in care and community.
**[So if you’ve been waiting for the right moment to pitch in, this is it. Chip in any amount today, and we’ll send you Deb’s Green Chile Chicken Posole recipe.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250509_1_posole?refcode=em20250509-1844&refcode2=1844_400544_2TcApY&akid=1844%2E400544%2E2TcApY)**
Your donation is a delicious way to fuel our grassroots movement and help us elect Deb as New Mexico’s next governor!
Be fierce,
Team Deb

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=2&akid=1844%2E400544%2E2TcApY)

| Last month, I went live on MSNBC shortly after my town hall in North Carolina with Chris Murphy. Here’s why this was a huge deal: **Republicans voters across the country are seeing the crowds, the headlines, and the pressure we’re building. And they’re waking up.** [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/bqj078mFTxvQLVPwlbC_qQ~~/AAPPABA~/YDnI50aQ5Kt_ZBs8aAlngSS3wBDVaPCWbqj81pVew-P3yYVhMq9Y3T_yNeMbxRIqrMAPUbHCiitGg0qHvWTCemE4IkjnPx4v_NtEoF3JtzZ31BQWp-XKXaloiRhHI1H6A68u_ChSaiAwk_T57zyVZqV1BA7_vi-FXG-uzSIE0QGzC7cLtbXVcK3amHn_96dUxj_s12gERyMA94-_4uY22SI9ZFfkNEwwm1e4X-Wnrm-PwjMhaQ3T2qdQqDqag89Kqht3RJGbcy_gqFP9KlKUKBV4899OeCX1ySV6LC-RK8p_cEYRzO4JLYblpAsaCK__62DCyAt5U0A36iRMROur0ulWPcPqsI4ZZLd5TQy8ILg~) **This isn’t Democrats vs. Republicans — it’s the People vs. the Problem.** Trump is the problem. Musk is the problem. And Representatives hiding from their constituents while they gut Social Security, Medicaid, and other essential services? **Definitely the problem.** I’m hitting the road and holding town halls in districts where Republicans are failing their constituents — bringing the truth directly to the people, organizing across party lines, and making sure the media knows about it. But these town halls take a lot of resources, which is why I need your help. This isn't just a lapse in judgment, it’s a dangerous pattern of reckless behavior from someone who holds one of the most powerful national security roles in the country.

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Protect Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
A woman’s ability to access critical reproductive care in Michigan shouldn’t depend on her ZIP code. |
#
---
This is unacceptable, team. **Planned Parenthood announced that it’s closing three clinics in Michigan because of the Trump administration’s funding freeze for family planning. ** **[If you agree that Michiganders deserve access to critical reproductive health services through groups like Planned Parenthood and other independent abortion providers, add your name today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107405101/544584284/1601428259?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250509_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjlkZWE5Y2ItMDcyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0lwfbFFr5VcCpCyEmlks--9PJvQamKqcBKhIee-UqUI=&emci=11c6e3b6-192c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=69dea9cb-072d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1028753)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107405102/544584285/1601428259?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250509_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjlkZWE5Y2ItMDcyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0lwfbFFr5VcCpCyEmlks--9PJvQamKqcBKhIee-UqUI=&emci=11c6e3b6-192c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=69dea9cb-072d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1028753)
---
Michiganders have been very clear about where they stand on this issue.
After the right-wing majority on the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , a sizable majority of voters went to the polls to enshrine abortion rights in our state’s Constitution. They also reelected me and gave Democrats a full trifecta in government for the first time since 1983 with a clear mandate: **protect and expand reproductive freedom in Michigan. **
That’s _exactly_ what we did, but the Trump administration’s assault on reproductive care represents a significant threat to our progress.
Closing three Planned Parenthood locations — including the _only_ one in the state’s Upper Peninsula — could have devastating consequences for women who rely on their services.
**[A woman’s ability to access critical reproductive care in Michigan shouldn’t depend on her ZIP code. Stand with me in this fight to protect abortion providers and safeguard health care access for every woman across Michigan by adding your name today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107405103/544584287/1601428259?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250509_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjlkZWE5Y2ItMDcyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0lwfbFFr5VcCpCyEmlks--9PJvQamKqcBKhIee-UqUI=&emci=11c6e3b6-192c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=69dea9cb-072d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1028753)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107405104/544584289/1601428259?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250509_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjlkZWE5Y2ItMDcyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0lwfbFFr5VcCpCyEmlks--9PJvQamKqcBKhIee-UqUI=&emci=11c6e3b6-192c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=69dea9cb-072d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1028753)

I’ll never stop fighting like hell to ensure that Michiganders can receive the care they need. Thanks for all your support.
— Gretchen

clean_body: A woman’s ability to access critical reproductive care in Michigan shouldn’t depend on her ZIP code. | This is unacceptable, team. Planned Parenthood announced that it’s closing three clinics in Michigan because of the Trump administration’s funding freeze for family planning. | Michiganders have been very clear about where they stand on this issue. After the right-wing majority on the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , a sizable majority of voters went to the polls to enshrine abortion rights in our state’s Constitution. They also reelected me and gave Democrats a full trifecta in government for the first time since 1983 with a clear mandate: protect and expand reproductive freedom in Michigan. That’s exactly what we did, but the Trump administration’s assault on reproductive care represents a significant threat to our progress. Closing three Planned Parenthood locations — including the only one in the state’s Upper Peninsula — could have devastating consequences for women who rely on their services. I’ll never stop fighting like hell to ensure that Michiganders can receive the care they need. Thanks for all your support. — Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

# [#]
Peter, we need to know if you’re standing with us against Abbott’s School Voucher Scam that he signed into law over the weekend. Will you take our brief approval poll to help TOP PAC send the message that Texas DOES NOT back this?

TAKE THE POLL → https://secure.everyaction.com/c7K4qtUdqkmVPtDlYC6ZWQ2?refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_POLL_050925_VOUCHERS_30DO_D1_S1

School vouchers are an AFFRONT to Texas’ taxpayers. They will reroute tax dollars from our public schools to private institutions. They have been linked to increased segregation and discrimination. To put it simply, it’s hurt disguised as help, and we see right through it.

Our students and education professionals deserve better, and it’s up to us to take a stand, but we can’t do so without your support. Will you take our poll now? [https://secure.everyaction.com/c7K4qtUdqkmVPtDlYC6ZWQ2]

Thanks, Peter!

We don’t know exactly when they’ll make it official. But here’s what we do know: we need to be ready.
Rush in a donation of $10 right now to help us prepare for whatever comes next! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250509-email&amount=10]
Running a strong, winning campaign takes resources. It takes grassroots supporters like you stepping up early, so we’re prepared for anything that comes our way.
Every contribution helps us stay strong, stay competitive, and stay focused on what matters: fighting for justice, freedom, and opportunity for every Coloradan.

Cutting it will cost them. | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107405679/544586278/2141984067?sourceid=1150650&utm_campaign=25emeus-0501aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc5MzQyNS0wOTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wSechhLbvdvYhZmsKUDGq9oRROf9kHxGKLzbeQVNVO0=&emci=6f793425-092d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=77793425-092d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107405682/544586280/2141984067?sourceid=1150650&utm_campaign=25emeus-0501aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc5MzQyNS0wOTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wSechhLbvdvYhZmsKUDGq9oRROf9kHxGKLzbeQVNVO0=&emci=6f793425-092d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=77793425-092d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=954237)

Peter,

[**16.75 million women of reproductive age are at risk.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107405685/544586283/779474356?sourceid=1150650&utm_campaign=25emeus-0501aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc5MzQyNS0wOTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wSechhLbvdvYhZmsKUDGq9oRROf9kHxGKLzbeQVNVO0=&emci=6f793425-092d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=77793425-092d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=954237)

Right now, extremist lawmakers are moving to gut billions of dollars in Medicaid funding in the United States—jeopardizing care for **1 in 5 people**. Medicaid covers 42% of all births, funds 75% of public family planning services, and provides essential care for communities historically excluded from the health system. | [**SAY NO** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107405688/544586287/779474356?sourceid=1150650&utm_campaign=25emeus-0501aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc5MzQyNS0wOTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wSechhLbvdvYhZmsKUDGq9oRROf9kHxGKLzbeQVNVO0=&emci=6f793425-092d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=77793425-092d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=954237 "SAY NO")
---
If they succeed, the consequences will be devastating:

🚨 **Planned Parenthood and other essential providers** could be forced to close.

🚨 **Maternal mortality and health disparities** will worsen.

🚨 **People of color, rural and low-income communities, LGBTQ+ individuals, and people with disabilities** will be disproportionately harmed.

[**Medicaid isn't a luxury—it's a lifeline.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107405692/544586291/779474356?sourceid=1150650&utm_campaign=25emeus-0501aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc5MzQyNS0wOTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wSechhLbvdvYhZmsKUDGq9oRROf9kHxGKLzbeQVNVO0=&emci=6f793425-092d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=77793425-092d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=954237)
[**TELL CONGRESS: HANDS OFF MEDICAID** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107405696/544586294/779474356?sourceid=1150650&utm_campaign=25emeus-0501aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc5MzQyNS0wOTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wSechhLbvdvYhZmsKUDGq9oRROf9kHxGKLzbeQVNVO0=&emci=6f793425-092d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=77793425-092d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=954237 "TELL CONGRESS: HANDS OFF MEDICAID")
---
This is a direct attack on sexual and reproductive health care: from birth control and cancer screenings to maternity care and HIV treatment. Defunding providers would strip millions of people of affordable, essential services and devastate reproductive health care access across America.

[**The stakes are too high to stay silent. Join us now to protect health care for millions.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107405701/544586299/779474356?sourceid=1150650&utm_campaign=25emeus-0501aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc5MzQyNS0wOTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wSechhLbvdvYhZmsKUDGq9oRROf9kHxGKLzbeQVNVO0=&emci=6f793425-092d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=77793425-092d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=954237)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: ADD YOUR NAME: Hands Off Medicaid and SNAP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Healthcare and nutrition are basic needs, and proposed cuts to programs will threaten lives. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW2ls3jz6TXBQ7P5g-yIxVepMQngcf-wHUFDJo3doMR1J8CnIqLWYQyaHEb8xXrqpznRkeE24WSAsk9MuPG2vdbEz3k7bipbN3Sayyug82ZrUdIvJdNJbW52K2LwL3mN67bOXwnnCZovu0brJ8D6ZAlaBRtD0rGsvoeiqenfdEX5N6QoshpSTkIskhWNyQUXGP/4gc/yquNEFr8QWSEx3W8djNKlA/h0/h001.bonOZEVOjmwplMZwmxf7zEQRIirTuoRjOuDWSOJ2MrM)
---
Friend, Next week, several House committees are expected to vote on devastating cuts to Medicaid and SNAP nutrition benefits, as well as a renewal and expansion of Trump’s 2017 tax scam for the rich and large corporations. Let us be perfectly clear: **Republican proposals to kick tens of millions of people off of their healthcare and nutrition benefits have nothing to do with balancing the budget or “trimming fat” from Medicaid and SNAP.** These proposed cuts to life-saving programs are meant to pay for more tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy and billion-dollar businesses—while also funding an expansion of Trump’s mass deportation policies, which are tearing families and communities apart while attacking our constitutional rights. We have a chance to block these attacks by passing the **Hands Off Medicaid and SNAP discharge petition** , which would prevent the largest cuts to Medicaid and food assistance in U.S. history. [**We need 218 members of Congress to sign on in order to force this vote. Congressional Republicans are trying to fast-track a budget that takes critical health and nutrition programs away from our communities in order to pay for even more tax breaks for billionaires and large corporations.
They know this is deeply unpopular with the American people, which is why they are attempting to hold this budget vote quickly, within the next two weeks.
**My Democratic colleagues and I are fighting back. This week, we introduced a Hands Off Medicaid and SNAP discharge petition, which, if passed, would prevent the largest cuts to Medicaid and food assistance ever.**

Nearly 80 million people rely on Medicaid and the Children’s Health Insurance Program (CHIP) to meet their basic healthcare needs.1 And more than 40 million people rely on SNAP nutrition benefits each month to put food on the table.2
But that only just begins to tell the story of the critical impact that Medicaid and SNAP have on our communities. More than 40% of births in the U.S. are covered by Medicaid, including roughly 50% of births in rural areas.3
Medicaid also covers more than 60% of nursing home care, making it the primary funder for the majority of nursing home residents in the U.S.4
**Proposed cuts to nutrition benefits will impact kids, veterans, seniors, people with disabilities, and more.** Food security is linked to so much more than just reducing hunger.
Having enough nutritious food has health, life, school, and work benefits that affect every aspect of our lives. SNAP improves food security and allows families to maintain healthy diets, which in turn leads to long-term positive health outcomes.5
Plus, each $1 spent on SNAP generates more than $1.50 in economic activity, supporting local farmers and grocery stores while also creating jobs.6
**Healthcare and nutrition are basic needs.** Cutting these to pay for more tax cuts for billionaires is obscene.

body:

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

---
Peter,New reports show **71% of Republicans now identify as part of the MAGA movement**. That’s right – support from President Trump’s base is _surging_. The America First revolution is stronger, louder, and more fired up than EVER before. But now we have one question for you: **[**Are YOU with us?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-kt1YC2RzkF4JADJ4zegfA)**

[ ** YES - I’m MAGA ** ](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

[ **NO - I’m not MAGA** ](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
The radical Left is doing everything it can to divide us, like spreading lies about our leaders and distracting us with fake news stories. **_-They fear the MAGA movement because we fight back._****_-They fear YOU because your voice, vote, and values are winning._** **_-They fear the new Republican Party will turn 100% MAGA and become an unstoppable force in the next era of American politics. _** We need to keep the momentum going, so we’re reaching out to you, Peter: **Do you identify as MAGA?********[**Take the Official MAGA ID Poll NOW >>**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._lY4CRhTix1Q)**

[ **SUBMIT ANSWER** ](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

We’re not backing down. **_We’re doubling down_**. Thank you for your urgent response.

-MAGA Patriots (via Team Downing)

Hi folks,
We can’t believe it has already been ONE MONTH since Michael launched his campaign to be Colorado’s next Governor.
You know what they say, time flies when you’re having fun. ✨
Our campaign is off to a phenomenal start, and we’ve certainly felt the support and excitement from Coloradans in every corner of our state.
Michael knows that Colorado is the best state in the nation. And he knows that together, we can solve some of the biggest challenges facing our state and provide the rest of the country with a better path forward.

body:
Republican voters deserve the truth. Please watch

Donald Trump’s tariffs are wreaking havoc on our economy.
They are hurting people in blue states and they are hurting people in red states -- even if most Republican voters aren't getting the truth about their impact.
That is why I am airing an ad on Fox News all weekend -- to send the Trump administration, and his voters, a clear message.
**[Watch the ad now:](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4180?t=1&akid=2333%2E4767699%2Ea7k67s)**

Thank you,
Gavin Newsom

body:
The moment real change arrives: they blame President Trump, they blame YOU.

| |
---
| | | **These Democrats have been in power since before the Berlin Wall even fell:**
* _Nancy Pelosi - 20 terms,_ 37 YEARS
* _Chuck Schumer - 17 terms,_ 50 YEARS
* _Bernie Sanders - 15 terms,_ 44 YEARS

They've failed us at every turn.

They looked the other way while our cities were overrun with crime. They opened the floodgates at the border, allowing MILLIONS of illegal immigrants to pour into our country. They stood by while our schools taught an entire generation to hate America.

And now? Instead of taking responsibility - they blame President Trump.

Radical Democrats are desperate to hang on to power, pretending they have the answers when all they've done is wreck everything they've touched.

_It 's time to end the reign of do-nothing politicians who've failed this country for nearly half a century. **[We have a plan to do just that but it's fully reliant on YOU:](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/eqFZCkGJT-BXu4by2XW1Ywg7ROrPNCXCO0WRPukKUGxlsZ0zL914FpOV412n2aKqwW2alLsb55R6gwd__9yF2lJ-O_OnMsOB93W_Yn8lVV8ishGKSwD1AsbKuzINyjD7cMwAd4jQrms6Iz-4bKKigfICyXCOyiWFXiKBJPkZdkzQIwm8MvbcT5KCGN_UDxOavNUVYLjo8vYZHAJsKEkWw9l8-1Vk2Ul7uZfT6pBxd0qdXyRpyghvWp-vE6Jg1TInd6WdFkX_mCDxNMD39-v97RVWhwZhSd84R6I70KtM1XO_kuNuLrBU1QKK49RFUjy17nEFmp3PEd8qon1PDD8vZQ-5OEZcWYBAkBdQDv_249aPLk7zSO0-CRMpmZoQcU4Cz40wSrtljEOwLs4kWgxssQwzBg09qBsFFKD-E9lqInKL3M9yDWDquHoH-RGeXHc0BQAph1m7shKynkm4lwxucHxHQZJFzi32Z_NgOxybsbYpYDoQafx2lZh14TN_AmtqjDNSUiCK5Lwqo7JOhG8dSHMX8iKaYh1X/5Es19vs_i98DgBGbdWyt-8vET7f6YPnN/8 "We have a plan to do just that but it's fully reliant on YOU:")**_

We are up against a ruthless political class that's been playing the system for a lifetime.

**If we lose control now, everything we 've fought for will vanish.**

We're asking EVERY Patriot reading this to chip in just $5, $10, or $25. If we get 100% participation, we'll have what it takes to show these Radical Democrats the door.

---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Y6meATRDlwnd35L9QBKYFJSYgnnwMGUsNw73ciyohHRXl148iU1DBq5qoJqvJ_nCrLBhXbXf3zgaiKNX5hCdKlipU1mWqxyA7dSIvy1CIaKKUEw5kY9Cjqdgpo-67NT1Ht53WTpl7EBgn9BhuY6yJ6Tz6Jtyljc2PIbwVZnwICRfaFXmkLIJM-fIi1GqSmPK36sFimiaPShsq4rz-gieKeptE1x8Y7tDnKyYVXVxNhWzwVUHOrbHhZRYxUFF0vsTk3M5AvnsauKHk8Bb0H2GOeVl16-C--8hpbn2yIWnOsepm-pjSKMTQqOJ5pMLnLlK8dvfQ344WdKkh2Yu_rwDZvaRBA3VMzFV5GMafdUP6U3OsJ4obxCF8FDC6cWuYRdvTC9hAB_BuB6-TZkkU44QnXQBLLEE1tWuMTJJtl0emdgeg9in5gyljw6eIJKeWvJTE68HxXuJgUJQWPWWnpI6qbisSxIEEEfZGTMYcjldlHgD4q4dB-Yt4tBnhRA2_xIRS81q2cLaUZJkK8PwibVrHDTyTBgYb-rZ/9O8YJd0lshe7qJBEPtgAxtUEiwedZKRi/8 "CHIP IN NOW")

**Don 't forget:**

They lied for decades, they got rich while we struggled, they sold out our values, and they always put themselves before the American people.

**[The Democrats smashed us in fundraising last month, we need to be serious about the Midterms or else these do-nothing politicians could BARGE BACK into power. So we're pleading with you to pitch in anything you can.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/beRlWLJRpuM0AoR0ldndUbS0H6eGJrLWtQCfd90CePQnv02-qMecFi3uFGKV7MP-yQ_qYjlieighVOdFZcbw61iq8c-O2wzykGg89mYGHQwjEbfGWIziTq7LBQjMaxCu6qzGVJqjhShcixhcxQc2XtUWT_bLJ7al2TFXxO-QEby93lOe0OXhFfHmlS9kUl0mY4uDzHCbDooyBjnyE__uoVL62ZbTP4iE06iBjE3Y26bPYpgc_LKoKhQ4eDOt-c62lWFvgwWk10mmneEkhD8cdp0JD02bPwH6mxK0oP2DR5NAAzAO4xtBRGAu5RqSZx8QuPmC4FbsSE0E-0UUlH-4WnIR4NKIXAMj_OM9DhAIOrZoNsJbS60wiJfRYruUhQ3g8Yb_6mBkVEGuoZammXI-kM_nmmWLQ6tYg7Na8NOFVpGyPpYg5MEFpNCgMB-R4h-iBnCOSHTXx0XCT4stKTGfAICnbKYzb9CYjygKPqlQG6L3diLNZ_Ur5CUzoxIzhfs2lYYgc-AUpyTBEzAm05vXICWEmrPD0lz-/NMPLUH5oo7Ho3kXMYR0vcqCrEcUhR5Cc/8 "The Democrats smashed us in fundraising last month, we need to be serious about the Midterms or else these do-nothing politicians could BARGE BACK into power. So we’re pleading with you to pitch in anything you can.")**

We're not going anywhere. We're not backing down. And we're not done fighting.

Thank you for everything you do,

House Republicans

\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_
\- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration

name: Team Pramila
subject: Housing is a human right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila won’t let Trump slash these critical programs without a fight.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250509-5026-footer&t=1&akid=5026%2E420207%2EyrcVQ4)
Peter, amid a historically unaffordable housing market, the Trump administration wants to *cut* programs that are helping people in Seattle keep a roof over their heads because they’re “woke.” Yes, seriously:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250509?refcode=em20250509-5026&amount=3&refcode2=5026_420207_yrcVQ4&akid=5026%2E420207%2EyrcVQ4)
**Housing is a human right, full stop** — and Pramila won’t let Trump slash these critical programs without a fight.
Trump and his billionaire-first administration aren’t concerned about what working people are going through. All they care about is juicing profits for themselves and their billionaire friends.
**And Peter, they’re going to keep doing these things until millions of us across the country join together and mobilize to demand a government that puts working people first.**
Pramila is working to grow our progressive movement with year-round organizing, the Resistance Lab grassroots trainings, and more, but that work takes resources, and she’s counting on your help to do it.
[**So if you’re ready to help Pramila build a government that puts working people before billionaires’ profits, please pitch in $3 or whatever amount you can today to power this movement.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250509?refcode=em20250509-5026&amount=3&refcode2=5026_420207_yrcVQ4&akid=5026%2E420207%2EyrcVQ4)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250509?amount=3&refcode=em20250509-5026&refcode2=5026_420207_yrcVQ4&akid=5026%2E420207%2EyrcVQ4)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

name: John Fetterman
subject: I need to know yinz are with me (Social Security)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1&akid=10079%2E434096%2Eql6DV6)
| | |
---
Derek, it's John. I’m reaching out because I need to hear from you.
The GOP is out here talking about gutting Social Security to fund tax cuts for the wealthiest dudes in America – so there's a lot at stake.
It’ll only take a minute to share your thoughts, **[so will you please take my Social Security survey now?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51059?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk95-su-fl&t=2&akid=10079%2E434096%2Eql6DV6)** 🙏
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51059?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk95-su-fl&t=3&akid=10079%2E434096%2Eql6DV6)
---
Hardworking people in Pennsylvania and across this country have paid into Social Security their entire lives.
They've earned this benefit, so it's only right they see those checks come through after they retire – it's their money!
The current administration is already throwing things into chaos by closing Social Security Administration offices, cutting staff, and making it harder for seniors to get help over the phone.
**So while I will ALWAYS fight to protect Social Security, I need to know yinz are with me –[click here to take the survey now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51059?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk95-su-fl&t=4&akid=10079%2E434096%2Eql6DV6)**
Thanks for your response,
John ❤️
| |

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: | | | Derek, it's John. I’m reaching out because I need to hear from you. The GOP is out here talking about gutting Social Security to fund tax cuts for the wealthiest dudes in America – so there's a lot at stake. It’ll only take a minute to share your thoughts, 🙏 | | Hardworking people in Pennsylvania and across this country have paid into Social Security their entire lives. They've earned this benefit, so it's only right they see those checks come through after they retire – it's their money! The current administration is already throwing things into chaos by closing Social Security Administration offices, cutting staff, and making it harder for seniors to get help over the phone. So while I will ALWAYS fight to protect Social Security, I need to know yinz are with me – Thanks for your response, John ❤️ | | | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

body:

Peter, Over the past 4 months of the new administration, we've seen what near unrestrained power looks like for MAGA when they control the Presidency, House, and Senate. El Salvadorian torture prisons, DOGE taking a chainsaw to key departments & laying off 100k+ civil servants, and the ground work being laid for a Trump 2028 run.
The only thing holding back MAGA from enacting the worst of the Project 2025 agenda: **Judges**.

Local, state, and federal judges have been the only thing stopping the flurry of executive orders and initiatives _flooding the zone -_ stifling Trump's agenda to dismantle the American constitution and legal system. In response, Trump has planned a counterattack: _Project 2026._ He and his oligarch cronies plan** ** to**depose of the judges blocking Project 2025 & replace them with ultra-MAGA loyalists - by any means necessary.** Fearing recounts and legal challenges in 2026 and beyond, the focus of these efforts to remove judges centers around key swing states. That's why in April, _Elon Musk pumped over $40 million into the Wisconsin Supreme Court race in a failed plot to buy Trump a Supreme Court Justice_. And it's why far-right mega donors are already pledging to pump over _$30 million_ into the **November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention race** \- an attempt to ensure Pennsylvania will not be a swing state in the 2026 midterms, the 2028 presidential where Trump plans to seek a third term, and beyond. [Defend Our Courts is sounding the alarm about the PA supreme court battle. _No Democrats_ are talking about this race and**the Republicans are assembling a war chest that will make Wisconsin 's spending look like a small town mayoral race**. We can't wait until the last minute to mobilize. Can we count on you to rush a donation to help Democrats prepare for what will be the biggest fight of the year?

name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Caraveo for Congress
body:
Pictures attached 📎

Peter, I wanted to share a bit more about my story and why I’m in this fight. To put it frankly, the fight for CO-08 will be one of the toughest races in the country. **[So, if you’re already with me, please chip in $8 or whatever you can to help me reach my first end-of-month goal and flip this seat →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107407176/544590895/-1687806176?refcode=email_050925_mystory-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTZiZDUxYS0wZDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZ6auQxWnjdOwdf_Ak_UI4_Q996TLwolPm4peGWz7gg=)** | | [DONATE NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107407179/544590896/-1687806176?refcode=email_050925_mystory-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTZiZDUxYS0wZDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZ6auQxWnjdOwdf_Ak_UI4_Q996TLwolPm4peGWz7gg=)
---
**My family means everything to me.** I was raised by parents who came to Colorado from Mexico in search of a better life. They knew that hard work and caring for others are the values that build strong communities and families. They raised me and my siblings with those values – on a construction worker’s salary in Adams County.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107407181/544590899/-1483475117?refcode=email_050925_mystory-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTZiZDUxYS0wZDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZ6auQxWnjdOwdf_Ak_UI4_Q996TLwolPm4peGWz7gg=)
**I became the first in my family to graduate from college and became a pediatrician** – a testament to the American Dream. I chose to work in Adams County to give back to the community that raised me, but I quickly realized that families were struggling with rising healthcare and drug costs.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107407183/544590901/-1483475117?refcode=email_050925_mystory-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTZiZDUxYS0wZDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZ6auQxWnjdOwdf_Ak_UI4_Q996TLwolPm4peGWz7gg=)**
**That’s why I ran for the state legislature.** There, I took on Big Pharma, helped pass a first-in-the-nation cap on the price of insulin, and worked to lower the cost of prescription drugs. But I knew I could do more.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107407185/544590903/-1483475117?refcode=email_050925_mystory-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTZiZDUxYS0wZDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZ6auQxWnjdOwdf_Ak_UI4_Q996TLwolPm4peGWz7gg=)
**So, I ran for Congress in 2022.** Thanks to this grassroots movement, I defied the odds and won – becoming the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. I worked every day to build on my work to lower healthcare costs, address the high cost of living, and defend working families.
But in 2024, I came up just short against Gabe Evans, losing Colorado’s 8th District by _just 2,449 votes_.
Now, Gabe Evans has gone all-in on Trump and his extreme agenda, making life harder for working families in Colorado and threatening healthcare for millions across the state – all while giving handouts to billionaires.
[**That’s why I’m running to win back CO-08 and continue my work in Congress to protect healthcare and fight for hard working Coloradans – but I can’t do it alone. Your support is critical to flipping this seat and taking back the House. So please, will you donate today to help my campaign reach our first end-of-month goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107407187/544590905/-1687806176?refcode=email_050925_mystory-rs&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTZiZDUxYS0wZDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZ6auQxWnjdOwdf_Ak_UI4_Q996TLwolPm4peGWz7gg=)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Will I see you there?
body:
Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204nh8crcfws2ub8l6s10mziiw4caapatxwozckcrz31nn1f4ks722eyrs1thry2gmoj506i72zerkzedjz&__stmp=sw0erv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

| | | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw0erv&__onlt=h)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to **[sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw0erv&__onlt=h)** If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_. But today, all that has changed. The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.” Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series. And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw0erv&__onlt=h)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw0erv&__onlt=h)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw0erv&__onlt=h)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw0erv&__onlt=h)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw0erv&__onlt=h)
---
| But that’s just not true. <\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true. THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw0erv&__onlt=h)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse. But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.” That may be good for your family – for now. But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw0erv&__onlt=h)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.” I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood. But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian. When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit. And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **Brave Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism. And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit. >> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves. >> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **Brave Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile. In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States. And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books. It was incredible. But here’s the greatest part... From there, parents and grandparents started asking **Brave Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own. And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states. On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. **I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots...** ...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children. The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you! It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That’s why I hope you’ll give a sponsorship gift of $175, $350, $525 or more today.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw0erv&__onlt=h)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **Brave Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA. Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[**please consider a sponsorship gift of $175.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw0erv&__onlt=h)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower please get your sponsorship gift in within the next 48 hours so we know how many libraries we can get into this August!](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw0erv&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw0erv&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---

clean_body: Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours? | | | | | Fellow Conservative, Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web. But today, all that has changed. The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.” Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series. And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true. <\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | But that’s just not true. THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse. But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.” That may be good for your family – for now. But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.” I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood. But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian. When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named Brave Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit. And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism. And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit. >> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves. >> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile. In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States. And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books. It was incredible. But here’s the greatest part... From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own. And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states. On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots... ...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children. The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you! It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA. Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304 **** | | ---|--- To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

Dear Friend, Some of our states are already out of session for the year, but that doesn't mean our state freedom caucus members return home and stop fighting. In fact, now is the time to push even harder.Remember, we are helping **PART-TIME** lawmakers become **FULL-TIME** Freedom Caucuses. That means fighting all year round to defend your liberties.
---
|
---
**GEORGIA** Session ended in Atlanta almost a month ago, but earlier this week, 23 state attorneys general - all Republican - signed a letter stating their support for President Trump's nomination of Ed Martin to be the U.S. Attorney for DC.Absent from that list of AGs was **Georgia Attorney General Chris Carr**. The **Georgia Freedom Caucus** was quick to publicly rebuke Carr for failing to support President Trump and Ed Martin. See below for their statement.Unfortunately, lacking the votes in the Senate to get confirmed, Trump was forced to withdraw Martin's nomination. But the key point here is that Carr now knows that every letter he signs (or doesn't sign) going forward will be carefully watched by our GA Freedom Caucus. And his actions will be publicly broadcast for all voters to see. In the past, such a move by Carr would typically go unnoticed. Not anymore!
---
[](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjja-2FX-2BHiJMkQeHavsUeprX-2Bmb6rZOv5CYPNdPI-2Bv5JW8lttBZSmzw50ZIYDVzqkjwPIdNccBNLAZCPl1ocepLoo-3Dg3KE_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHernYQQOR3h2ZfwTjoswBl0OuG3O-2F1KMRngeprlduEdFG8cva2RDN2zxTBd3jVUaBxZ4LYV-2BSxUOEjWSrSM5xtM-2FZPnDCEow121InpF5EnGuDY0LoxV5Cmk4h3cdnjgH49WlynTBI2Maa5izNXcqf09l8Gp1vo20wqMuZLviaerAdEQu-2FA92XB16r6doKVMNEwhqRa-2BlXNUWsQtIKyV4GzMqUIPofzNFeTKst89dXh3Huc-3D)

The **Georgia Freedom Caucus** wasn't done though. After Governor Brian Kemp declared he wasn't going to run for U.S. Senate in 2026, they alerted the public that Republican Congressman Buddy Carter, who announced his intent to run, was no conservative either. Carter is a "go along to get along" congressman who is deceiving voters by calling himself a "MAGA warrior" while voting with the Swamp to fully fund USAID and the War in Ukraine. He also doesn't want to help Trump cut spending in the federal budget - he recently said he wants to keep the green energy subsidies that Biden delivered as part of the Inflation Reduction Act. Each week in their newsletter, they proclaim a "Villian of the Week".This week, they gave out their inauspicious "award" to the entire **Montana Freedom Caucus**. Being called "villains" by an organization that works with Democrats and liberal Republicans to grow government and restrict liberties is a badge of honor!

Summer is a critical season in our fight to defend liberty, uphold the Constitution, and preserve the conservative values that make our nation strong.

The battles ahead require resources—and your generosity ensures we can continue to speak boldly, equip citizens, and stand firm against the growing threats to our freedoms.

Will you help us protect liberty this summer?

Your donation directly fuels our mission to promote limited government, free markets, and individual responsibility. Every gift—large or small—makes a real impact.

That means fighting all year round to defend your liberties. | GEORGIA Session ended in Atlanta almost a month ago, but earlier this week, 23 state attorneys general - all Republican - signed a letter stating their support for President Trump's nomination of Ed Martin to be the U.S. Attorney for DC.Absent from that list of AGs was Georgia Attorney General Chris Carr. The Georgia Freedom Caucus was quick to publicly rebuke Carr for failing to support President Trump and Ed Martin. See below for their statement.Unfortunately, lacking the votes in the Senate to get confirmed, Trump was forced to withdraw Martin's nomination. But the key point here is that Carr now knows that every letter he signs (or doesn't sign) going forward will be carefully watched by our GA Freedom Caucus. And his actions will be publicly broadcast for all voters to see. In the past, such a move by Carr would typically go unnoticed. Not anymore! | The Georgia Freedom Caucus wasn't done though. After Governor Brian Kemp declared he wasn't going to run for U.S. Senate in 2026, they alerted the public that Republican Congressman Buddy Carter, who announced his intent to run, was no conservative either. Carter is a "go along to get along" congressman who is deceiving voters by calling himself a "MAGA warrior" while voting with the Swamp to fully fund USAID and the War in Ukraine. He also doesn't want to help Trump cut spending in the federal budget - he recently said he wants to keep the green energy subsidies that Biden delivered as part of the Inflation Reduction Act. Here's the GAFC's statement on Carter: | WYOMING Democrats and liberal Republicans HATE that conservative lawmakers in the state have come together to create a Wyoming Freedom Caucus. WYFC Chair, Rep. Rachel Rodriguez-Williams penned pointing out their hypocrisy. Must read. | ILLIINOIS On Wednesday, the Illinois Freedom Caucus joined DHS Secretary Kristi Noem in Springfield, IL, for a press conference to discuss Governor Pritzker's lawless sanctuary city policies.Pritzker is positioning himself to be a presidential candidate in 2028 and the Illinois Freedom Caucus is doing its part to make sure the voters know that, despite whatever he says, Pritzker is a hardcore progressive leftist. | MONTANA A Far Left organization called "Forward Montana" exists to promote liberal policies in the state like Medicaid expansion and "climate change" regulations. Each week in their newsletter, they proclaim a "Villian of the Week".This week, they gave out their inauspicious "award" to the entire Montana Freedom Caucus. Being called "villains" by an organization that works with Democrats and liberal Republicans to grow government and restrict liberties is a badge of honor! | Summer is a critical season in our fight to defend liberty, uphold the Constitution, and preserve the conservative values that make our nation strong. The battles ahead require resources—and your generosity ensures we can continue to speak boldly, equip citizens, and stand firm against the growing threats to our freedoms. Will you help us protect liberty this summer? Your donation directly fuels our mission to promote limited government, free markets, and individual responsibility. Every gift—large or small—makes a real impact. We'll be back with another update next week. Until then, please be sure to our efforts so that we can support our State Freedom Caucuses!In Liberty, Andy RothPresident State Freedom Caucus Network |

subject: The “Liberal Tea Party” moment is here

body:
NY Mag: “It’s going to be a long, hot summer for incumbents.”
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250509-1&t=1&akid=2108%2E587540%2Ejo9Ttr)
Did you catch this, Peter? _New York Magazine_ wrote about the “Liberal Tea Party” moment with organizations like Leaders We Deserve leading the way:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250509_1_liberal_tea_party?refcode=em20250509-2108&:amount=5&refcode2=2108_587540_jo9Ttr&akid=2108%2E587540%2Ejo9Ttr)
Our co-founder, David Hogg, was interviewed alongside folks from other groups that are in the fight for generational change. David explained our work perfectly:
**“We are going to revive democracy by reviving the Democratic Party by getting the best Democrats possible in safe Democratic seats, electing people who have credible experience in working across generations and in fighting for the people they were elected to represent.”**
This isn’t about pulling the party to the left as much as it is about ushering in the generational change that we sorely need to see among our Democratic leaders.
With Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP running roughshod over our Constitution, trampling on our fundamental rights and freedoms, and putting us all at risk by wrecking our economy, people are hungry for leadership from the minority party.
**Leaders We Deserve is investing $20 million in the fight to elect new leaders** who will fight for the people and do everything they can to defeat Trumpism and stop the MAGA agenda. We are going to elect Democrats in competitive seats – and we’re going to challenge ineffective, blue-seat Democrats who need to retire.
We’ve got big plans, but we’ll only be able to make them happen with your help. We don’t have right-wing billionaires or corporate PACs – we have the grassroots. Every dollar this team pitches in puts us closer to turning our vision into a reality.
**[Make a $5 contribution now to help elect a new generation of Democrats.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250509_1_liberal_tea_party?refcode=em20250509-2108&amount=5&refcode2=2108_587540_jo9Ttr&akid=2108%2E587540%2Ejo9Ttr)**

Thank you!
Leaders We Deserve

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Ban Transgender Surgery for Minors
body:
I’m fighting, but I need Friend’s eyes on this
| | | | Friend – I have had enough of our children being preyed upon.
Years ago, **rogue insurance companies,** **evil doctors,** and **mentally ill leftists** formed an unholy trinity built off of **_greed_** and a **_twisted ideology_** that seeks to mutilate innocent people and children under the guise of "care."
These predators exploit vulnerable minors, pushing transgender treatments that irreversibly alter young bodies and minds, **all while raking in profits** and **applause from the woke mob.**
**_Our kids deserve protection, not experimentation._**
I introduced the Protect Children’s Innocence Act, a bill that would **_classify it as a felony for any doctor to perform “gender-affirming care” on a minor._**
It would ensure that **not one red cent of**** _your_****taxpayer dollars** fund transition surgeries for minors.
And it would **prohibit American educational institutions** from providing instruction on **transgender surgery for children.**
---
