name: Indiana GOP
subject: Looking Forward From a Historic Session
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**Looking Forward From a Historic Session**_
---
Friends, This week, Governor Mike Braun signed Indiana’s biennial budget, keeping us debt-free, preserving our AAA credit rating, and investing in the core priorities that matter most: education, public safety, and real tax relief. Governor Braun and the General Assembly have delivered a budget that reflects real Hoosier priorities and positions Indiana to move forward more efficient, more responsive, and more secure than ever. Now, with session behind us, we as Indiana Republicans must turn our attention to what comes next. We must continue building the infrastructure and energy necessary to compete and win in every corner of our state. That means growing our ranks, investing in our grassroots leaders, and keeping our members engaged. The 2026 election cycle will be here before we know it. To keep Indiana on the right track, we need a party that’s unified, energized, and ready to fight for conservative victories up and down the ballot. With your support, we will continue to reach new voters, energize our base, and ensure Indiana remains a national model for commonsense conservative leadership. Here at Indiana GOP HQ, we stand ready to support you in all the incredible work you do, and I am confident that together we will continue delivering historic victories for Hoosiers. As always, thank you for being a part of our team. Please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with.
---
| |
---
| | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
_**Governor Braun Signs State's Biennial Budget**_
---
**Governor Mike Braun** , on Tuesday, signed Indiana's Biennial Budget. This budget ensures Indiana remains debt free and fiscally secure, protects the state services Hoosiers rely on, and provides much needed relief. **What he said** : “This budget will preserve our reserves, maintain our AAA credit rating, and deliver on key priorities—including education, public safety, and tax relief for Hoosiers." \- **Governor Braun** , via [X](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/JHcWg-s8PcmrQE3p0tZI5zAoinNFD1ztLQmYQ1SoyJzPLsr05IYQ5Fsq83gOYgMkoE4L2j72as6zl5K-DB-Sv6mPue-BtLVVryYIv8v-yAW2HWnu8zvOL8dGKuPBzk_iNP1fIkBpSmi9HaXswmS33jnpDTWLcTFVrQmf4UlWW--D4JmTBsgrBK8bmS8Uk-lfgvtaz-cRwcqSmDHh53n_Nbtg3-9bnu0Qtyrz84rZqi20LaVvc0RXtaWIFQbDg9o1UNfNOvyc2m1mAeW_2H7wMqTbA0EI5GqDsAShQw/mwveH0Yf-EoqGBjYEULirs2nRxfkTaNo/8).

clean_body: | | | | | | | Looking Forward From a Historic Session Friends, This week, Governor Mike Braun signed Indiana’s biennial budget, keeping us debt-free, preserving our AAA credit rating, and investing in the core priorities that matter most: education, public safety, and real tax relief. Governor Braun and the General Assembly have delivered a budget that reflects real Hoosier priorities and positions Indiana to move forward more efficient, more responsive, and more secure than ever. Now, with session behind us, we as Indiana Republicans must turn our attention to what comes next. We must continue building the infrastructure and energy necessary to compete and win in every corner of our state. That means growing our ranks, investing in our grassroots leaders, and keeping our members engaged. The 2026 election cycle will be here before we know it. To keep Indiana on the right track, we need a party that’s unified, energized, and ready to fight for conservative victories up and down the ballot. With your support, we will continue to reach new voters, energize our base, and ensure Indiana remains a national model for commonsense conservative leadership. Here at Indiana GOP HQ, we stand ready to support you in all the incredible work you do, and I am confident that together we will continue delivering historic victories for Hoosiers. As always, thank you for being a part of our team. Please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with. | | | | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman | | | | | | Governor Braun Signs State's Biennial Budget Governor Mike Braun , on Tuesday, signed Indiana's Biennial Budget. name: GOP Health Cuts Alert via Care in Action
subject: Add your name: No GOP Medicaid Cuts
body:
We can stop the cuts to Medicaid *before* they ever go to a full vote in the House.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107407825/544593313/664783965?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-committee&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWYwOWIzMC0xMDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E85DO3z4V4ya9sLu3LqyuCVY3R1OlZ2FXDvmGc6HXuA=&emci=05af3c14-652c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=45f09b30-102d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)
**Right now just 30 GOP lawmakers are making critical decisions about the future of Medicaid** in the House Energy and Commerce Committee.
This handful of lawmakers will make decisions that could set the stage for a massive $880 billion cut to healthcare through Medicaid, **but vulnerable Republicans in tight seats are _terrified_ **that a vote to kick thousands of their constituents off Medicaid will cost them their jobs.
If these 30 GOP committee members hear from their congressional colleagues in tight seats and across the country that massive Medicaid cuts are politically toxic, **we can stop the cuts to Medicaid * before * they ever go to a full vote in the House.**
[**Every member of Congress needs to hear from all of us before the Committee votes: Add your name to call on Congress to oppose cuts to Medicaid!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107407828/544593317/1867379779?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-committee&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWYwOWIzMC0xMDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E85DO3z4V4ya9sLu3LqyuCVY3R1OlZ2FXDvmGc6HXuA=&emci=05af3c14-652c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=45f09b30-102d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107407830/544593320/1867379779?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-committee&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWYwOWIzMC0xMDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E85DO3z4V4ya9sLu3LqyuCVY3R1OlZ2FXDvmGc6HXuA=&emci=05af3c14-652c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=45f09b30-102d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)
The House Energy and Commerce committee is now finalizing the Republican plan to slash Medicaid before the reconciliation bill can move to a full vote in the House – all to afford massive new tax cuts for billionaires.
**That means the fate of Medicaid lies in the hands of the 30 Republican members** of this Committee, who will decide just how brutal the cuts to Medicaid will be:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107407833/544593323/1867379779?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-committee&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWYwOWIzMC0xMDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E85DO3z4V4ya9sLu3LqyuCVY3R1OlZ2FXDvmGc6HXuA=&emci=05af3c14-652c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=45f09b30-102d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)
Thanks to the work of this community and our allies, members of Congress know their constituents deeply oppose drastic Medicaid cuts and are nervous about being held accountable. In fact, a **dozen House Republicans warned GOP leaders that they won’t back a reconciliation package that includes massive cuts to Medicaid.**
As the House Energy and Commerce committee weighs the future of Medicaid, let’s make sure these 30 GOP lawmakers hear from every constituent, every colleague, and in every conversation that cutting Medicaid funding is politically toxic.
[**Add your name to keep up the pressure and protect Medicaid! We'll personally deliver the petition – with your signature – straight to Congress, ensuring our voices and stories are heard loud and clear.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107407837/544593327/1867379779?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-committee&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWYwOWIzMC0xMDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E85DO3z4V4ya9sLu3LqyuCVY3R1OlZ2FXDvmGc6HXuA=&emci=05af3c14-652c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=45f09b30-102d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107407839/544593335/1867379779?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-committee&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWYwOWIzMC0xMDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E85DO3z4V4ya9sLu3LqyuCVY3R1OlZ2FXDvmGc6HXuA=&emci=05af3c14-652c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=45f09b30-102d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)

clean_body: We can stop the cuts to Medicaid before they ever go to a full vote in the House. Right now just 30 GOP lawmakers are making critical decisions about the future of Medicaid in the House Energy and Commerce Committee. This handful of lawmakers will make decisions that could set the stage for a massive $880 billion cut to healthcare through Medicaid, but vulnerable Republicans in tight seats are terrified that a vote to kick thousands of their constituents off Medicaid will cost them their jobs. If these 30 GOP committee members hear from their congressional colleagues in tight seats and across the country that massive Medicaid cuts are politically toxic, we can stop the cuts to Medicaid before they ever go to a full vote in the House. The House Energy and Commerce committee is now finalizing the Republican plan to slash Medicaid before the reconciliation bill can move to a full vote in the House – all to afford massive new tax cuts for billionaires. That means the fate of Medicaid lies in the hands of the 30 Republican members of this Committee, who will decide just how brutal the cuts to Medicaid will be: Thanks to the work of this community and our allies, members of Congress know their constituents deeply oppose drastic Medicaid cuts and are nervous about being held accountable. In fact, a dozen House Republicans warned GOP leaders that they won’t back a reconciliation package that includes massive cuts to Medicaid. As the House Energy and Commerce committee weighs the future of Medicaid, let’s make sure these 30 GOP lawmakers hear from every constituent, every colleague, and in every conversation that cutting Medicaid funding is politically toxic. Thank you, The Care in Action Team

## Brain Implant Puts Conductor Back on Podium
An Ohio orchestra conductor sidelined by Parkinson's is [back behind the baton](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGymzAQxvHTQLeMkAWGgiKNu5c2JbNIC2wstIy0z4xvn3GKXCAX-Ob_-359zV_IkdP2Ew-a1m2ddZU50VUiqVKe0UsK314lFy8HLeifm0hQmq2xHZgOzDgH5PieXR2mlcjSraapvbt-sK0Z-nqfhtGiGYd1vZs79iOG2-J8N464LNQ5amuePmumM6M1xjnXDLgMbW8Je7-2wYyVMxRYJTe_hZPutMa3vCg3Xo46TrvqWarbj8o-Kvu4rqv5RH4YifSS_Gwkb5V9_MPAxbrDifnJqUgqsJEWWDJygqJ8fEdUlgSBXuwJVKConFB2fFKBIrATeEwQCQNI9jsVzQiSPAFuyKmyjzpP4bw4Ri79vXJmO5Dj32D976dfk_0TAAD__-7CmbE) thanks to a breakthrough brain implant. Rand Laycock received a deep brain stimulation device at [the Cleveland Clinic](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGy2yAQQE8jdWgQkrBcqEjj7qdNqVnDIm8MLANreXz7TFLkAv8Cb957v772L6BI-fgJCbdwhF0C7xnfLaII1h0cZ_9ywrU5TngH9zyYveButFmUXpS-7h4ofva591tANDj1uI2X2a5m1KvtH9ti9DwFWMzo_eLNFMBetb0E7bWd4A49bX9petFXo_U8z8MK93W0BsG6MHp97WaNnoTr8JspywND_PCJdXCc-rg9RErrph-duXXmlj6Di3hihOxdpExu4Hp05lZACLOoJlwJW2duq11VejVy6n-naohNFahPyo1zU-2TinBqilKpfKJ6kzwUeChCJyqPWNS9AmXVhNIrghDnvm6-vClGavbSzfpIQPGfrXx787mZPwEAAP__akKYmA) after tremors in his right hand made it nearly impossible to lead his 100-piece orchestra. The "brain pacemaker" adjusts in real time to his symptoms and has nearly eliminated his shaking. Now entering his 47th year of conducting, Laycock calls the technology "life-changing." [Watch a video report.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuqzAUxvGnMVuQMQacwcPVrdIOTSt1qdTFMj7H4NZwUjgJyttX9BW6fp_0G_7vZ3f2Kad5ePET2jhEx5HcjNuakRkX5wPNcA1Myxpowt6Hr4EIGJ2SqjnI5iCPDnzKd6cLsBFRYV2grTrdGlVJ0xajrUwnoQEFvu-rGBpTA4QG0CjQpqtVkeyuyUYelZRa69L43lStQt-GWIE8Ci0REtNSflKaecSY73TDpQw0FdmOzJdV1P-EOgl12ratvNOVrz3u_754DqOoTzdRP2zf_x-f39rXpw8qFguXLeWc1rYTWg6TT_mX5D-3uFn1EwAA__9043Sa)
## Teens Surprise Injured Neighbor with Kindness
After a basketball injury left Richard Munoz on crutches, [he dreaded passing a group of teens](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u6yAUhFdjd1hA8F9B8Rp3ee0tLQwHQ4IhguOg7P7K2cLtZ0bffD_39a588HH_rw6Qdrcr2rRGqCUAIuRV6RTNqTHlotMBm9LPPSWDsHLKe0J7QufVKB8-q2iNtAAcbi1INoph4oxOQ-sk2ybd3-zGxnne1Ki2cdZWMyEMTDBZ1np5rdGezpxSIUQ3qW1iAwc1aMsMnRtBwXhMuXskH9GBDZ_0htzpdLRBOsRXaW7_Gr40fKm1dhfkdSMC1pSfXcp7wxcHpKpCfHycGQypHh3R-UTtoJDqIBJF9pzOF0mWFK3yhyBALCRZC1cDHZCnjyZCKd8MZhV3yKXhS5uleVUfgi_D2Ai6H8qHLyD-2exb8t8AAAD__33qk7w) near his apartment known for smoking and spray-painting fences. But instead of mocking him, a few ran up and offered to carry his bags--a gesture that sparked months of unexpected kindness. Over time, the group kept helping--taking out his trash, checking in on him, even letting him skip the line at the store. Their support not only eased his recovery but also challenged his assumptions, shaped by past bullying, about who deserves the benefit of the doubt.
## Tortoise Found 9 Months After Escape
After vanishing from his owner's garden last July, [Leonardo the tortoise](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO4yAYBOCnsTsiwBjbBcU16XLtlei3-bG5BX4LSKK8_cr7Clt_0sxo_j3sA0IMef8LCY3fvW2ebMZ3jdgaFgsbZffcGpW6UcIVtq-dyDW0ksuR8ZHxxToI8WNV74xHlDj0aMSk9CwFn3V_GCfEOKxqHIRCsYIbQAOA1ADrjOO09sFcaXzki-RcKXWbYZ2Flgh688LxpVMcXWhUbv8p5Hagjx96YbltlPpojtbO2g1_Onnv5P1EOiNe1Ml7eWZ4w4c1Ko1CRZZCrSHvbGGJcjsq8_TMjlG-KCLzhRI7KCETYrpGyb4Yd75DjKHqqVN8TxDiT3P79WUvI78DAAD__9N8gyo) was found nine months later--alive and well--just a mile down the road. The 13-year-old pet had disappeared from a home in England, sparking months of worry until a local pet shop posted a photo of a tortoise handed in by a dog walker. Aside from a sore eye, Leonardo was in good shape, likely thanks to hibernating through the winter. [It wasn't his first escape](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFu9CAUBODT4G6tx1uwTUHxN-72b1MiDA-WBJsVJrb29pFzhXQjjfRJMx8P87Appy3-tyvpEINpoZiNzj1Ta1SNdWXz366Vuruy0mLdVyzFNzIIKG8gb6CMtym_jei8DkRI9440H8UwIYdp6J4aByn8IpxUiqTyowqSe3EP1kpE5L5L-tJAgkIAIUQ_2WXiA5IdXOAeFBNAPrVS-8-StvakkN_loNq7snZZP1t77ez-j-HMcD7Ps18Wd3UM52sMw9nWllymKzp1EI6vCDyWrmr_OlPOaR9GJiCuNuVftf35jkPjTwAAAP__OrJ0_Q), but it was his longest. His owner called him the "world's best escape artist."

Thanks for reading The Feel Good Flyover. Have yourself a slow and happy weekend! 🐢 We're sponsored this afternoon by . Get started on your weight loss journey with their affordable GLP-1 medications. | Brain Implant Puts Conductor Back on Podium An Ohio orchestra conductor sidelined by Parkinson's is thanks to a breakthrough brain implant. Rand Laycock received a deep brain stimulation device at after tremors in his right hand made it nearly impossible to lead his 100-piece orchestra. The "brain pacemaker" adjusts in real time to his symptoms and has nearly eliminated his shaking. Now entering his 47th year of conducting, Laycock calls the technology "life-changing." Teens Surprise Injured Neighbor with Kindness After a basketball injury left Richard Munoz on crutches, near his apartment known for smoking and spray-painting fences. But instead of mocking him, a few ran up and offered to carry his bags--a gesture that sparked months of unexpected kindness. Over time, the group kept helping--taking out his trash, checking in on him, even letting him skip the line at the store. Their support not only eased his recovery but also challenged his assumptions, shaped by past bullying, about who deserves the benefit of the doubt. Tortoise Found 9 Months After Escape After vanishing from his owner's garden last July, was found nine months later--alive and well--just a mile down the road. The 13-year-old pet had disappeared from a home in England, sparking months of worry until a local pet shop posted a photo of a tortoise handed in by a dog walker. Aside from a sore eye, Leonardo was in good shape, likely thanks to hibernating through the winter. , but it was his longest. **Thank you for opening my email.**

99% of people scroll right past — but not you. That means **_everything_** to me. I’m Derrick Evans: a husband, father, and rancher from West Virginia. I’m just a working man with a family to raise and bills to pay—not a D.C. insider with a team of _lobbyists and lawyers on speed dial_. Peter,

For months, Kim and other Democrats have been sounding the alarm about the GOP’s dangerous plan to slash Medicaid — and now, a Republican super PAC is dropping **$7 MILLION** on ads to try and cover it up.

They’re claiming these cuts are about “ _fighting fraud_ ” and “ _wasteful spending_.” But let’s be clear: These cuts are about funding tax breaks for Donald Trump’s wealthy friends. And it means disaster for Washington’s 8th District:

– Rural hospitals closing their doors;
– Thousands of families losing access to healthcare;
– Vulnerable seniors and children left with nowhere to turn.

clean_body: Peter, For months, Kim and other Democrats have been sounding the alarm about the GOP’s dangerous plan to slash Medicaid — and now, a Republican super PAC is dropping $7 MILLION on ads to try and cover it up. They’re claiming these cuts are about “ fighting fraud ” and “ wasteful spending.” But let’s be clear: These cuts are about funding tax breaks for Donald Trump’s wealthy friends. And it means disaster for Washington’s 8th District: – Rural hospitals closing their doors; – Thousands of families losing access to healthcare; – Vulnerable seniors and children left with nowhere to turn. Democrats have been speaking out about these cuts for a reason and we need to ensure our voices remain louder than ever. Kim is doing everything she can in Congress to protect Medicaid and the people who rely on it—but it's not a fight she can win alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. #### **Frozen Odds -**
**Alaska — vast, untamed, and unpredictable. Beneath its snow-covered peaks and icy rivers lies a political battlefield unlike any other. This is the story they didn’t want you to know.****Powerful names — Lisa Murkowski, Hansjörg Wyss, Arabella Advisors, and George Soros — echo through the corridors of influence, shaping the future of the Last Frontier. From the manipulation of Ranked Choice Voting to the backdoor funding of initiatives like the Minimum Wage Increase, Alaska has become a testing ground — a proving ground — for tactics designed to tilt democracy itself.****Groups like Salmon State, Outdoor Alliance, and the Alaska Venture Fund, Alaskans For Better Elections, No on 2, etc. have operated quietly, weaving a web of influence across the state's political landscape. What seemed like grassroots efforts were anything but — and the connections go far deeper than anyone imagined.****This isn't just about Alaska. It’s a warning to the rest of America.****Help bring this story to life, flying experts to Alaska, traveling the state for interviews. We have already raised nearly 40% what we expected for the entire film to cost.****A huge Thank You,****Phil Izon**

name: Rob Bonta
subject: It’s not a lot to ask…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250509&t=1&akid=1780%2E1088799%2EwGGiSe)
Did you see this recent piece in the _Los Angeles Times_ highlighting California’s lawsuits against the Trump administration?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250509?refcode=em20250509-1780&amount=5&refcode2=1780_1088799_wGGiSe&akid=1780%2E1088799%2EwGGiSe)
It’s true: Every time Trump violates the law or the Constitution and hurts Californians, we’ll see him in court. Period. Full stop.
It’s not a lot to ask that the President of the United States follow the law... but my office at the California Department of Justice will _make sure of it._
**We only just passed the first 100 days of Donald Trump’s second term, with 1,352 to go. But we’ve got a full tank of gas, tons of energy, and we’re ready to roll!**
Staying on top of legal challenges to the MAGA agenda and Trump’s lawlessness takes a lot of resources, so I can’t spend as much time fundraising for my re-election campaign.
**[That’s where you come in. Can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, or anything you can afford to ensure we stay on track with fundraising while I continue to hold Trump accountable?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250509?refcode=em20250509-1780&amount=5&refcode2=1780_1088799_wGGiSe&akid=1780%2E1088799%2EwGGiSe)**

Thanks for all you do,
Rob

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I need you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM right now.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=26a55cace67f486ca5662a6c5bf6c5b9&_e=VFaOlfhv7V47D3Cw1C-N27cMcdU71P8PkZ_zSYC4VZ5383g9fi-Qfgb980-s9d61LWQ0ios-ceFYe80nb3jZJjPgKNDlWfod8rH1E9Dyks7zBhxZSxaiB6ptLhVcFpnhe7tBmjywciLTKINXmyh9_yjJMoeAHHLnEVX_16FkWs1Uk0-d3WjpeVpp3EZ24bHaLWcMdhkTaOyHr_RZd0E9Lt9HSSpQXvvte-_xNzWuFNjqIDFB2MiY0sdWMS_W0g3WU4mlCgPo_z6mqPd5_ZiMJP6mY_lfHHWwogIKtEnX3a4Yli6R7EOGJtKXLF2XQSSuqVUteWzdV23rlud6WZNM6-HCOWM3I1yO3_eL0r-gzJI%3D)** Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the **false narrative** that the majority of Americans **_are backing the radical transgender movement and_** **_want to block President Trump’s executive orders._** This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.**But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children.** This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found **_“High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”..._**
---
_“Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)”_
---
Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations:
---
* “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”.
* “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.”
* 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care.

---
As a senior how do you feel about their findings? _Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?__**_Or_**_**...****Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults _WHO ARE_ right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls?** _Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?”_** __Or_ ..._****Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,_and be injured by,_ a biological male?** _Are you worried that_ 38% _of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_**__Or_ ..._****** **Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?****I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children.** **And that’s why I need your immediate response:[Take your AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM _right now_ to stand with conservative seniors who want to protect America’s children _._](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=26a55cace67f486ca5662a6c5bf6c5b9&_e=VFaOlfhv7V47D3Cw1C-N27cMcdU71P8PkZ_zSYC4VZ5383g9fi-Qfgb980-s9d61LWQ0ios-ceFYe80nb3jZJjPgKNDlWfod8rH1E9Dyks7zBhxZSxaiB6ptLhVcFpnhe7tBmjywciLTKINXmyh9_yjJMoeAHHLnEVX_16FkWs1Uk0-d3WjpeVpp3EZ24bHaa9nPJrDl_fkC0d5OfJ3KGmuF1c456m2VDJu6S_n2P3LRjLvwLbyMnkNpxaSV9p0Xu-rbYvFYp9Nij9lgBIJO8_P5uW5VfnOomGfa9EJ_YgoycjJyjwx_Hq99fGEEXpoMu5vR_NQvMGFqVWxmlJ90svG3R9xMjz1_Vve-EI-I0DE%3D)**
---
[ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=26a55cace67f486ca5662a6c5bf6c5b9&_e=VFaOlfhv7V47D3Cw1C-N27cMcdU71P8PkZ_zSYC4VZ5383g9fi-Qfgb980-s9d61LWQ0ios-ceFYe80nb3jZJjPgKNDlWfod8rH1E9Dyks7zBhxZSxaiB6ptLhVcFpnhe7tBmjywciLTKINXmyh9_yjJMoeAHHLnEVX_16FkWs1Uk0-d3WjpeVpp3EZ24bHaOlfU2SxFAxbNQ6eNznhjWm7xvTjDmBjpozrgs_KTl7FOlMgZAxHvBTihqa6Dw17njY7TOssCehf5JzrXGyL_Q5gWk0iDC7c_WrjUqQmZuvbMXrh6inh0neacGL2-9M5KevO9cjpnPKm2f8WpLrhxVHgScgi_dmcbdb4ajKslgpA%3D)
---
**My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. **** ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. **With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** **[And today I’m asking you to stand with us to correct the narrative being pushed by radical organizations.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=26a55cace67f486ca5662a6c5bf6c5b9&_e=VFaOlfhv7V47D3Cw1C-N27cMcdU71P8PkZ_zSYC4VZ5383g9fi-Qfgb980-s9d61LWQ0ios-ceFYe80nb3jZJjPgKNDlWfod8rH1E9Dyks7zBhxZSxaiB6ptLhVcFpnhe7tBmjywciLTKINXmyh9_yjJMoeAHHLnEVX_16FkWs1Uk0-d3WjpeVpp3EZ24bHayMMmQ0xZaS6-D0dyeed0WMOLVmB_utpjIqFJnD2AKME4AwGY9z_OVAQ5Ejj9f7YeFKi4V_SQiRnHbXFoDN-LQMfvO09IORPfXN8WAgrTEd82Y48l7khMNYnFWPtBSVs70z64dRXIpbEg4t_2itRp1Y191L0JVGq_XmJAemms-jM%3D)** At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting **_AGAINST_** the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting **_FOR_** it...The terrifying reality is that **_the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year_** fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just _pushing_ the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively _forcing_ it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- **_transgender ideology is everywhere._** They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. ****AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.**** While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue.**[I'm counting on you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=26a55cace67f486ca5662a6c5bf6c5b9&_e=VFaOlfhv7V47D3Cw1C-N27cMcdU71P8PkZ_zSYC4VZ5383g9fi-Qfgb980-s9d61LWQ0ios-ceFYe80nb3jZJjPgKNDlWfod8rH1E9Dyks7zBhxZSxaiB6ptLhVcFpnhe7tBmjywciLTKINXmyh9_yjJMoeAHHLnEVX_16FkWs1Uk0-d3WjpeVpp3EZ24bHajueM2pmu9n6AhO1wI9JEaNAG5FlinxFXVRaT4AQDU2s8Hrgx9Xe0kQhyQC_ixojmyJBDwJ88m_QqsUWt5B2QE30yfA0Spon3LlzxdS-7bdy774UXEszqKqYrhln1rtUo1690yEnoo7XE4glr_pg0ArICAcj65vcnFAlz3pJZU8g%3D)**
---
[ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=26a55cace67f486ca5662a6c5bf6c5b9&_e=VFaOlfhv7V47D3Cw1C-N27cMcdU71P8PkZ_zSYC4VZ5383g9fi-Qfgb980-s9d61LWQ0ios-ceFYe80nb3jZJjPgKNDlWfod8rH1E9Dyks7zBhxZSxaiB6ptLhVcFpnhe7tBmjywciLTKINXmyh9_yjJMoeAHHLnEVX_16FkWs1Uk0-d3WjpeVpp3EZ24bHaDOpsCXuQw8wkiPfRJg83IQRA4owR68G84pDCoO3G2Eu0yNNcauS7y6cuVVY_GRwh2_QgrTjktDwg8x_BSRVpy2jna1UWP1jM5rk-oqUtvE2J0AAoB104m8EfBhDgCuRxaoAshmv41pGIPHZN9NzgWS5-wsJu0aaGzgj8KqG9jWc%3D)
---
Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.**To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology,[we need your answers to the AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=26a55cace67f486ca5662a6c5bf6c5b9&_e=VFaOlfhv7V47D3Cw1C-N27cMcdU71P8PkZ_zSYC4VZ5383g9fi-Qfgb980-s9d61LWQ0ios-ceFYe80nb3jZJjPgKNDlWfod8rH1E9Dyks7zBhxZSxaiB6ptLhVcFpnhe7tBmjywciLTKINXmyh9_yjJMoeAHHLnEVX_16FkWs1Uk0-d3WjpeVpp3EZ24bHaOHRFKdylMbbM-8kop7uthbxP2f11DvH6tSptVM1gehc-myRVP9aVf7FGyx4gQfKdRj8RSiHNWFkK5YCxF3vS2PPTZRHnzC_pjsTy6n38-JriWhrN024cBEEp9MuQ_bHztJCm2p-AA86xBXikTJ07w6GjBWv8EYqaGfH2yszyIYM%3D)**Thank you in advance for your help.
---
| | For Freedom,
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the false narrative that the majority of Americans are backing the radical transgender movement and want to block President Trump’s executive orders. This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children. This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found “High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”... “Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)” Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations: “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”. “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.” 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care. As a senior how do you feel about their findings? Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?Or...**Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults WHO ARE right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls? Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?” Or ...Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,and be injured by, a biological male? Are you worried that 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_Or ...** Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?**I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children. And that’s why I need your immediate response: My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting AGAINST the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting FOR it...The terrifying reality is that the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just pushing the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively forcing it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- transgender ideology is everywhere. They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. **AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM. While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue. Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology, you in advance for your help. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | -

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Not Again…
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

A new Fox News poll just dropped — and its bad news.

Democrats are in a stronger position heading into the 2026 midterms than they were in 2018 when they flipped 40+ seats and took back the House.

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

We cannot let history repeat itself.

Because if Democrats seize the majority again, they won’t just raise taxes and open the border — it’ll be endless impeachment hearings, sham investigations, and non-stop political warfare aimed at one man: President Trump.

That’s why I’m stepping up to defend our majority — and launching my America First Majority Fund – but I can’t defend it alone.

[So please make a contribution to my America First Majority Fund so that we can defend the Republican House majority and continue delivering victories for President Trump and the American people.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

[CONTRIBUTE $25 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=25)

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=50)

[CONTRIBUTE $75 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=75)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=100)

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=250)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A&amount=other)

This isn’t just about winning re-election. This is about defending the entire America First agenda, and I’m ready for the fight!

I was just in Michigan, campaigning for one of the most critical toss-up races in the country — and that’s just the beginning. I’m taking the fight to every battleground district where the majority will be won or lost.

The Democrats have already lined up their donors, their attack ads, and their media allies.

But we’ve got something more powerful: the truth and millions of Americans behind us.

If we fail to defend the House, they’ll bury President Trump’s agenda and put America last once again.

We’ve got to fight like hell and hold the line.

So I’m asking — will you step up today and be one of the first supporters of my America First Majority Fund?

Let’s win this fight together.

In Service

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Dan Crenshaw

name: Tobias Read
subject: My friend, Mayor Paige Cognetti
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-cognetti?refcode=250509em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-cognetti?refcode=250509em]
Hi folks, it's Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
The 2024 election showed the country how important it is to win in swing states.
Today, I’m reaching out to you about Paige Cognetti, a devoted public servant running for reelection as mayor of Scranton—the most competitive city in the most competitive state at an incredibly important time for our country.
I’m about to explain why I’m reaching out for your help in supporting Paige for reelection, but if you’re short on time, I’d be grateful if you could split a $10 contribution (or any amount) right now to benefit both of our campaigns. Can I count on you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-cognetti]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-cognetti?refcode=250509em]
I’ve been friends with Paige for years. She grew up here and went to the University of Oregon, and her parents were my constituents when I was a state representative.
Now, she’s the mayor of a battleground city in a battleground state, fending off the economic impacts of President Trump's harmful tariffs in the rust belt and revitalizing a community that has struggled to make ends meet.
I’m proud to support her in her campaign because we both share a fundamental truth: Sensible, straightforward, common-sense governance is the best way to combat the partisan divisions that have plagued our politics in the past few years.
She and I know we can accomplish more for the people by working together, reaching out across party lines and ideological divisions to make real progress.
That’s how she’s managed to reinvigorate the city’s economy while laying a solid foundation for an even brighter future.
And as she seeks re-election to another four-year term, she’s projecting an optimistic vision for Scranton by prioritizing responsible government, economic growth and investment, and improving the quality of life for everyone who calls the city home.
That’s exactly what I’m working to accomplish here in Oregon as Secretary of State, so I couldn’t be more honored or thrilled to be supporting Paige at this moment.
If you’d like to stand with me and Paige as we fight to restore confidence in government and build a brighter future for our constituents, can we count on you to split a $10 contribution between our campaigns right away? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-cognetti?refcode=250509em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-cognetti?refcode=250509em]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250509em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250509em]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=5pNrliBaZRcdF6HfqZKtH%2BnCIHyfmlHXwfxPktqm1P53p95C95s7KgHFQXmo7%2Fhy0Ou5NW2gEuqNQDuCahXCb8ONUy63GWwAf%2BkIj1ZtO6utVScQBEQeeox%2FbiTO1m%2BSIjbzZktZ0NrH5q1t9P0LKu4Mub6DxfI7RoNvJlS4VJf%2B0hTIBCLiiYEEpAYspKrX1GGEQLTrc4dpYAHzc7uWDRHkaQkorMVLpAzTGzLRREX%2F9qfRRhNY478EYhgOM5mJzc1iHF4E0KUP7LFXhVrdwuqAhShm1nVJ0Jb%2FZIdnBWCAet%2FSbC5XSVKncJGb7%2B3clFSKlCVU2pWeUmJwFRz2qqB8hTKhGwK4QUBI1PGw%2Fg0Co5ABOiW6cUuuCK9r7hRZYAqgI13Tl%2FqXohGSab%2BDuGl7Ws6O6qXkVpmgP1CM0u5c5TDTDUWDUt6iVIGPhet6 .

He even voted _against_ making it a felony to sell deadly fentanyl that kills Virginians. **We can’t afford to go backward.** Jason Miyares is the first challenger in 100+ years to defeat a sitting AG — and he’s delivering real results: ✅ Violent crime is down 30%
✅ Fentanyl deaths are down 23%
✅ Over $1.1 billion secured from Big Pharma

Are you with us?
| Pete Buttigieg just brought down the hammer on Trump and his minions for breaking their promise to protect Social Security: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89948?t=6&akid=19799%2E878179%2EjRU0n9) [**JOIN OUR ANTI-TRUMP TASK FORCE: RUSH $7 BY MIDNIGHT TO SECURE YOUR SPOT AND FIGHT BACK »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89948?t=7&akid=19799%2E878179%2EjRU0n9)
* * *
**ON THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL:** Donald Trump swore up and down that he wouldn’t touch Social Security.

**THEN:** Trump gave Elon Musk unfettered access to YOUR Social Security number as he destroyed the agency and fired thousands of employees.

**NOW:** Trump’s handpicked Social Security Commissioner has threatened to HALT Social Security payments if Trump doesn’t get his way. WHAT?! [**Unless 22 more local Democrats join our Anti-Trump Task Force today, we’ll be DEFENSELESS against Trump’s attacks! We can’t fight back without your support: Rush $7 to add your name and stop Trump! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89948?t=8&akid=19799%2E878179%2EjRU0n9) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89949?t=9&akid=19799%2E878179%2EjRU0n9)

[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89950?t=10&akid=19799%2E878179%2EjRU0n9)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89948?t=13&akid=19799%2E878179%2EjRU0n9)
Together,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19799%2E878179%2EjRU0n9). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19799%2E878179%2EjRU0n9).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19799%2E878179%2EjRU0n9) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=19799%2E878179%2EjRU0n9). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19799%2E878179%2EjRU0n9)

subject: Sign on to protect Medicaid →

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=gsXMrm%2F5AyIZ2XM80PiZFW1FRVmsqSk%2Bxi1hvwtNW7kqjQaN4iAV%2FfGhbNNtZNXUCb7mj%2BO6RqJtYj7%2BG23YPJEu3UhAI%2Bq0SWf47ttl0qxBodROSFAQbgJ9GCxWIhgCmWgO6uRlT8gRMAGHpkN1cYMhn2HAj1g4WzCMM%2BO5t4JNkQfqT8Zf%2Bbyk3Cb726jO7dbxGOEE6NK%2B24flx0zYT2on9%2FyeBJTjNNi6rFu4ytVHO7fu7OpzKnXobAYEZEPIq%2BMprUyhwcYSi%2FvZOvpvs5z4pVAR034AcEsolSqPLntF9IM9mFcFFQ9PWvxVixg6KcJNEMT4x7PKSFQO3HjGL4EYrIwTeijD4X28fquu8fx8MpnBLoiz91CL2sVfH3Ey4L2Eiqf0P1Y3sY89eJd%2FJu5VgS22tOu7cBvsC5VijoJFmfxvG%2BBscz0o2pd7iZTV)

It's Raul. Last week, I met with the Democratic Doctors Caucus — because at a time when Republicans are launching coordinated attacks on health care, we believe it’s time to expand it — not cut it. As a physician, I know firsthand that programs like Medicaid are lifelines for millions of Americans, including families right here in CA-25, and I’m going to fight like hell to protect them. [Will you take 30 seconds to sign our petition to defend Medicaid and show House Republicans where we stand?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107409234/544597979/-1910187354?source=SBD_RR_EM_POLL_050925_MEDICAID_30DO30DNTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGFiYWJmMTItMTUyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7KxMIAmTThX72TIbue4gmvMm6UQJSi_tZO3PLEXSypE=&emci=86babf12-152d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=8ababf12-152d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4131986) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107409235/544597980/-1910187354?source=SBD_RR_EM_POLL_050925_MEDICAID_30DO30DNTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGFiYWJmMTItMTUyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7KxMIAmTThX72TIbue4gmvMm6UQJSi_tZO3PLEXSypE=&emci=86babf12-152d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=8ababf12-152d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4131986)**
---
The GOP continues to prioritize tax breaks for billionaires over access to life-saving care. These cuts to Medicaid would take away health care, food security, and peace of mind from millions of Americans who are already struggling to make ends meet.
I’m doing everything I can in Congress to protect Medicaid and ensure the people of our district are heard. But I need you with me. [Sign the petition now to help us send a clear message: we will not let Republicans gut the programs that keep our communities healthy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107409236/544597981/-1910187354?source=SBD_RR_EM_POLL_050925_MEDICAID_30DO30DNTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGFiYWJmMTItMTUyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7KxMIAmTThX72TIbue4gmvMm6UQJSi_tZO3PLEXSypE=&emci=86babf12-152d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=8ababf12-152d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4131986)

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

subject: Are you up for this responsibility, Friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

| | Dear Peter,
---
| | In 2020, at the height of the COVID pandemic, worshippers marched onto the Golden Gate Bridge and declared that **Jesus Christ is Lord!** We declared it over the fear, over the paranoia, over the government’s overreaching control—and out of that declaration, _Let Us Worship_ was born. What many people believed would be a season of darkness and death, God was calling to be a season of revival and light. What they thought would be just a moment turned into a **movement**!
---
[](http://email.letusworship.co/c/eJxc0c12gjgYxvGriTs98CaQsGChUvwqalWw7YYTQoDIt1DQXv2cTs90Mev_71k9sc2lgQWeSFunxGSAic4mmS0kJTJh1AQRSS0GnVuRFmFKKSFRwmCibNDA0AzNAo1gzGaaSSgkOBHUEDKhCSJaIfuvbqzvXaaamagnhZ31fYPwHIGLwC1UlXez_yEEbofAFQjcz3YvyduJ7_qmvSmoz2lVdcQPihUdDXV9uONRf5X-JW4XrAofOHmp1fX6XKjTEEhPDZe2HBrjLDblsFgtPXbQjocj2T88V0zl6T13k5Ex9v6s6s7B5zdLx-F071zIPXVz9hHydlf4KvPD4PP7dlyFTmBF9S7qx9s0OZr5Log21c1nibVOX5ThxIHx7WwHrxeyNWk1nLGfX_0iO4Q5Fs_T_bpfjwNR-3PHhstdmVXmeSc2j5ejXDbh54vYBm-j01DJzbWXJ6_9Gb8OwonDDBf75_dweg9JQBjXxxYvvrqd5BIr8_ARL-Oct-xyubW-ZczD-QOBy_Se1kV6lNN1vTq5Xp5uyu4cDs3W2zqr5eaHTErZ85j33EZ0gQBK2XU8lZsYAfz7ETATGCMYrIhjYgrMpLAwMOAGMVgcJT8Qlgigl2VT8P5vq1MTM4Mav7W51zcp-v8imNQiv0XwsuEqrf52mDBGqI6oM7nbcTOqolCdSRHR0pKrYibqcjLY8E8AAAD__y8U2MY)
---
The Golden Gate Bridge is the birthplace of a movement. From here, God used _Let Us Worship_ to bring worship to nations all around the world. We are not stopping. We’ve got our foot on the gas. Our hearts are exploding with expectation. In these 17 cities, we are going to see what God did in San Francisco in 2020 continue—but in a greater measure than we’ve ever experienced before. Join us and be a part of the next chapter of the _Let Us Worship_ story! _**🔥Summer of Revival Schedule🔥**_

May 15 - Washington, DC (US Capitol worship)
May 23 - Mass Baptisms on 30A (Santa Rosa)
May 24 - Miami, FL
May 26 - Jensen Beach, FL
May 31 - Philadelphia, PA
June 1 - Boston, MA (Life Month Launch)
June 6 - Los Angeles, CA (ROOFTOP worship)
June 8 - Colorado - Hold The Line (TBA)
June 24 - Washington, DC (TBA)
July 22-27 - Canada (East Coast)
Aug 8 - Rochester, NY
Aug 9 - Detroit, MI
Aug 16 - Chicago, IL
Aug 17 - Minneapolis, MN
Aug 19-24 - Canada (West Coast)
Aug 30 - Seattle, WA
Sept 1 - Yakima, WA
Sept 6 - Texas TBA
Sept 7 - Texas TBA

**Text “ _REVIVE_ ” to 20221 **
---

Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Donald Trump won.

name: Bryan
subject: Prosecuting Election Fraud
body:
I just submitted my investigation to DOJ, and Democrats are already panicking!

| | | | | [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=e41c5483a2&e=e907534017)
| | | | | **May 9, 2025**
---
| | | | | _**I just submitted my investigation to DOJ and Democrats are already panicking!**_
Over the past 18 months, I’ve led a [**detailed investigation**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=844d316b15&e=e907534017) into **ActBlue** , uncovering a serious lack of fraud prevention and questionable activity. This week, I submitted my findings to **Attorney General Pam Bondi** , to partner with her and **President Trump** to _**expose the truth**_ and _**secure our elections.**_
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=586a872744&e=e907534017)
| [READ MORE](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5e62d01eb1&e=e907534017)
---
| But the moment I took this step,**the Left** went into overdrive — filing lawsuits and launching a [full-scale](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=c5813d6a45&e=e907534017) effort to take **OUR** seat and shut down the conservative agenda.
They know they can’t win on their radical policies—so they’re trying to take down conservatives who are fighting to secure our elections and prevent fraud.
_But I won’t back down._
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=e6063c2f8e&e=e907534017)
| We are running for reelection and we will win! Just like last cycle when [**Hakeem Jeffries**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=809c8db8ad&e=e907534017) and **the Left** came after us, spent **MILLIONS** on negative ads, and we still beat Barca by 10 points!
[**Can I count on you to chip in right now?**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=36385bfa34&e=e907534017)
The Left is back with Big Tech, mainstream media, and out-of-state donors behind them ready to take OUR seat. And with control of the _**U.S. House**_ and _**our conservative agenda**_ on the line, you can bet they won’t spare a penny.
---
| We are already out working, but must raise [**$1,500** ](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=35eacea891&e=e907534017)in the next [**48 hours**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=25b4601e06&e=e907534017) stay on track to win this race.

subject: my values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
As we approach Mother’s Day Weekend, I’m reflecting on where we come from, who we fight for, and the values we carry forward.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107410049/544600817/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-05-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTQwZjM5MS0xODJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KXrBSj1WItTNY92xw9iS2yUlhDMV2Mq0bGKJ7iwg3K8=)
---
| Peter,

As we approach Mother’s Day Weekend, I’m reflecting on where we come from, who we fight for, and the values we carry forward.

For me, everything always comes back to family.

I was born and raised in Southern California, the proud daughter of Mexican immigrants. My dad was an industrial mechanic. My mom didn’t have a high school education at first, but she attended night school while raising our family and eventually became an elementary school teacher. Together, they made sure all seven of their kids became college graduates.

My family taught me the value of hard work, community, and showing up for those you love. As a working mom, daughter, and someone committed to building a better future for all our families, that’s what drives me every single day in Congress.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107410050/544600818/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-05-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTQwZjM5MS0xODJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KXrBSj1WItTNY92xw9iS2yUlhDMV2Mq0bGKJ7iwg3K8=)
When my sister Loretta and I became the first pair of sisters to serve in Congress, it wasn’t just a personal milestone — it was a testament to what families like mine, like yours, are capable of when we have opportunity, support, and someone in our corner.

That’s what I try to be for my constituents.**A fighter. A protector. A voice.**

**This Mother’s Day Weekend, I'm more determined than ever to keep fighting for economic security, affordable child care, reproductive freedom, and policies that honor the sacrifices mothers make every day.**

If you're with me, I hope you'll take a moment to stand by my campaign — and all the working families we're fighting for.
| | As the chair of BOLD PAC, Linda is at the forefront of electing Democrats up and down the ballot who fight for **all working families.**

[_**Will you chip in $10 to Linda’s campaign right now to power her efforts?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107410051/544600819/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-05-09_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTQwZjM5MS0xODJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KXrBSj1WItTNY92xw9iS2yUlhDMV2Mq0bGKJ7iwg3K8=)

name: Team Lizzie
subject: Thanks to Moms of Team Lizzie
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
This Mother’s Day, we’re celebrating the moms who lead with courage, love, and unwavering commitment to their families and communities—and the many moms who are part of Team Lizzie.
Across Texas and around the country, mothers are doing the hard work of mothering, working, leading, serving and shaping our communities and our future.
Too often, they’re doing it without the support they need and deserve. That’s why Lizzie is fighting every day to stand up for moms—because she knows that supporting mothers means protecting their rights, their health, and their futures.
From ensuring the right to make personal decisions about reproductive health care and to access birth control, to addressing the Black maternal health crisis and the high cost of child care, Lizzie is working to protect the dignity and freedom of every mom in Texas.
But while Lizzie is fighting to move us forward, the Trump administration and Congressional Republicans are trying to take us backward. Next week, they will be taking up a bill that guts maternal health programs so many moms rely on. Throughout this Congress, they have offered proposals eliminating access to reproductive medicine and services and pushing creepy, controlling policies to reward women for having more babies. At the same time, their other proposals do not help them support kids they already have—like Children’s Health Insurance (CHIP) and paid family leave.
Our country already has the highest maternal mortality rate in the developed world, and it’s getting worse.
Moms aren’t asking for medals or bonuses. They are asking for equal rights, access to health care, real economic opportunity, and leaders who respect their decisions and humanity.
Team Lizzie isn’t backing down. Together, we’re standing up for mothers. We’re defending their rights. And we’re building a future where moms—and all of us—can thrive.
Thank you for being part of this fight.
As we approach the weekend, we wish a Happy Mother’s Day to all the Moms of TeamLizzie—the moms, grandmoms, stepmoms, foster moms, aunts, and many more mother figures who are a part of this incredible team. We celebrate and honor you—and we wouldn’t be here without you!
—Team Lizzie

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe2505mothersday?refcode=lpfe2505mothersday]

We celebrate and honor you—and we wouldn’t be here without you! —Team Lizzie DONATE [] VOLUNTEER [] 3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098 PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: www.lizziefletcher.com []

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: I was on Morning Joe earlier this week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=292%2E181023%2EVlRx0R)
Folks, I was on Morning Joe earlier this week to talk about my new book, “The Purposeful Warrior.” I also talked about this movement we’re building in this campaign and why I’m running for governor.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q22025.rGq0NW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250509_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=292%2E181023%2EVlRx0R)
I’m running for governor of Michigan because I’m the mom of an 8-year-old son.
In 10 years, he will be 18 and deciding what he does with his life, and the next 10 years will define his childhood and determine his future, and the future of all of our kids:
Will Michigan be a place where our kids _want_ to go to school, _want_ to find a job, and _want_ to stay?
Michigan has given me so much, and now it’s time to make Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home.
Right now, we need a warrior for a governor — someone who will stand up to this administration, but who will also work with anyone to improve the well-being of all Michiganders. We need an economy where everyone can prosper and thrive, where you don’t have to choose between access to child care and putting food on the table.
That’s what’s driving me in this campaign — standing up for our rights and freedoms, and building a brighter future for my son and all the kids in Michigan.
**[If you believe in this vision and building a brighter future for our state, will you chip in to my campaign for governor today?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q22025.rGq0NW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250509_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=292%2E181023%2EVlRx0R)**

You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Team: On his first day in office, President Donald Trump rescinded former President Joe Biden’s 2021 executive order promoting voting access and expanding voter registration.
Biden’s order expanded access to voting and accurate election information in many ways, such as allowing federal agencies to share data with states that seek to establish automatic voter registration efforts and making federal workers and resources available to assist at polling locations. Now, Trump has taken that away.
We're looking to see how our supporters feel about this order. Please take our quick survey:
Team: Do you agree with rescinding this order that helped promote voter access and expand registration?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=FK1AX2B5URm4ESWXr4C8Dwu7tZBNZnmdtqmTdCUv/sZnmy15u/IPeqiOveidjx9f2+fnf7fqKVstq+zqL0naoKrF+TAsvMXly3/8e7D7PeA=]

name: Joe Neguse
subject: I refuse to stand idly by
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
I’m committed to doing my part to defend our democracy |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107410857/544603558/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWFkYjZjZS0xOTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nQ9i1MP4drc1LhFtcmRLuaorPzjOdpKtH91oCqJ_DAs=&emci=2ba2e69b-f52c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=29adb6ce-192d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=7878003)
Hi friend, Rep. Joe Neguse here. You may have seen the recent news highlighting my new role — as the Assistant Democratic Leader of the House of Representatives — leading House Democrats’ “multi-pronged opposition” to President Trump’s unconstitutional executive orders. As a public servant, proud American, and former impeachment manager who prosecuted Trump’s second impeachment, I’m committed to doing my part to defend our democracy. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107410858/544603559/-366449013?&refcode=E13235-20250509-NeguseSplit-Image-SplitSend&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWFkYjZjZS0xOTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nQ9i1MP4drc1LhFtcmRLuaorPzjOdpKtH91oCqJ_DAs=) As a son of immigrants who lived the American Dream, and as someone who has committed his life to serving our community, I refuse to stand idly by as the Trump administration dismantles our core freedoms. That is why I’m leading the effort to push back against the administration’s attacks against the rule of law — joining with my friend and colleague Rep. Swalwell as we work together to defend our Constitution. | _This is not the first time Neguse has been tapped by leadership to take on a high-profile assignment. Former Speaker Pelosi asked Neguse to be part of the team to lead the floor debate around the presidential certification on January 6th. And when Congress moved to impeach Donald Trump for the Capitol riot that followed,[he was also an impeachment manager for that](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107410859/544603560/-1633248660?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTBjOWM5Yi0wYTI1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImpkbmVndXNlQGhvdG1haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KeUb-Z4U8JUjUzzbGhEYMRDkys0kuiJaVExr6ux0Bys=&emci=89290931-5421-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=b50c9c9b-0a25-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4981755&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWFkYjZjZS0xOTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nQ9i1MP4drc1LhFtcmRLuaorPzjOdpKtH91oCqJ_DAs=).” - CPR News_
---
As the representative for Colorado’s 2nd Congressional District — an area larger than eight states (and over 12,000 square miles) — I know what it means to truly show up, and stand up, for the American people. Whether it’s leading the effort to ban stock-trading by members of Congress or defending our democracy as an impeachment prosecutor, I’m ready to continue taking on the consequential challenges of our time.
[**If you support my efforts to defend our democracy, would you please consider splitting a donation between Eric Swalwell and my campaign? As a public servant, proud American, and former impeachment manager who prosecuted Trump’s second impeachment, I’m committed to doing my part to defend our democracy. = As a son of immigrants who lived the American Dream, and as someone who has committed his life to serving our community, I refuse to stand idly by as the Trump administration dismantles our core freedoms. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Remember when Donald Trump and Elon Musk promised DOGE would root out all federal "waste, fraud, and abuse"?
Well, it turns out, DOGE is the waste, fraud, and abuse.
The math is out, and it's damning: After months of boasting $165 billion in "savings," DOGE can only verify a fraction of that — much of it thanks to typos, expired contracts, and accounting sleight of hand. And even if we're generous, the real savings amount to about 0.2% of federal spending.
Meanwhile, Musk and Trump are slashing funds for HIV prevention, gutting USAID, and cutting public health grants to underserved communities, all while planning to expand the Trump tax cuts by $500 billion a year.
Let's be honest: DOGE was never about fiscal responsibility. It was a weapon to wage war on anyone Trump-world deems an enemy — immigrants, scientists, civil servants, LGBTQ+ communities, and low-income families.
And unless we organize like hell, they'll keep getting away with it.
But GOTV PAC is mobilizing to win in the most competitive races this year from the statewide to the local level, but our program to turn out voters only works if people like you step up.
So, will you donate $15 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout efforts in places like Virginia, Pennsylvania, New Jersey, and Texas to shut down the MAGA-DOGE agenda? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05092025&amount=15]

If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It's Gabe. I just wanted to quickly recap how things have unfolded since Trump handed Elon Musk unprecedented power 3 months ago: 1. Massive job cuts have swept across the federal government under DOGE, with thousands of federal workers targeted, hitting agencies like Education and Veterans Affairs hard. 2. Despite these cuts, costs are going UP thanks to Trump's chaotic trade war. 3. Now, Trump is going after ActBlue, the grassroots fundraising platform that fuels Democratic campaigns like ours, aiming to silence millions of small-dollar donors and hand even more unchecked power to billionaires. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = If Donald Trump and Elon Musk continue to have their way, we could see the end of democratic elections as we know them. Without ActBlue, it would be nearly impossible for campaigns like ours to fundraise — making it nearly impossible to win any race against them. This isn’t democracy — this is billionaires stripping us of our rights to participate and be heard at the ballot box. Flipping the House next year is the only way we can stop this assault on our democracy and start making real change. That’s why your support is so crucial right now. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = In this fight together, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. | I’m fighting every day to deliver on the promises we’ve made to veterans.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4709%2E35263%2E9zRfe3)
Peter, With so much chaos coming out of Washington, it’s **crucial** that we not lose hope. Don’t forget that, together, we defied the odds and elected Judge Susan Crawford, overcoming the _millions of dollars_ Elon Musk threw into Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race. This win was possible because we reached voters where they were and showed up for our shared values across the state. That's how we're going to win back the Senate in 2026, but our work starts **now**. I’m fighting to deliver for working families in Wisconsin, and with your support, we can turn out voters and secure a Democratic Senate majority that will do the same. **[So if you can, please consider pitching in a grassroots donation to fuel my work today. Every dollar brings us closer to more wins, more progress, and a brighter future for Wisconsin and our country.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4513?c0=stb-em-may25.qIHRRA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250509_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4709%2E35263%2E9zRfe3)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-may25.N_R_0O&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250509_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4709%2E35263%2E9zRfe3)

subject: Addressing the rumors about running for U.S. Senate

| | | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/jS6ZwOdLUy9Rncdm4w8PedALK95FiGz9hlNzoHm3dq9TMN5ZL7x5vM1UlXvD402OfyB0TT-8RXJWypStJKe5EUnaHZf-Mh367sstJoZ0coJhpqA_RD9tx8kV97TIP_hwuFX-kOkKTt1Vssh18V8Nr7pw4FSm6q4jbYwzDqW8WOX6aoprzqVj0EK_YzQ8ewsDR1X5m4fkbRwsFsH3veR3xskFysABfltW7Y6e65CjALINxD7lxLByOBJqhBlwEXfXEsPJCWI5sdNQ6pb5IF6EwrcqH0rI6-rDN2hLhQ0FPcEG2JQg118Uv7FDD9sX6BbcimOZwGtrQA0PzIF_pEzUILc9CZtBOPEf2dLip-LJsMe7RaBfgck70Ce6L8N5OxxlmUJvhuNPUScBjh5kAehPrGjdAHIiu22q81O3KNWYJ4J52BSEDmVa8hRvSqEx1AwKm_NHgTKGGeAg8sZqsrlT/QoPPYF0S6-8xI3hhWeSmYrC3nHY3205H/8)
