Peter,
I didn’t run for office 5 years ago to become famous or get invited to swanky cocktail parties in Washington, D.C.
I ran because I was sick and tired of seeing our country speeding towards a cliff with career politicians from both parties at the wheel, and I decided to do something about it.
Then I got to Congress and saw firsthand just how corrupt and broken our government really is, and let me tell you, one of the biggest hurdles we face in our movement to save America is the U.S. Senate.
**The worst of them is Jon Ossoff, or as I like to call him, Radical Transgender Activist Jon Ossoff.**
Ossoff is already working behind the scenes to impeach and remove President Trump from office, he even admitted it at his recent town hall.
**He’s even running his re-election campaign as if I’m already his opponent****, smearing me every chance he gets, and using my name to fundraise from liberal online donors.**
**_[That’s right... Jon Ossoff can’t raise money without using MY NAME](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/KlsdoebmXN8fOGxOPNNugU670HJnfhyf1l1DH_PqBjfgo9xWJoctX9zwYk2BPFtrkk95RzqA-lStuYiZljdxtT_2S8fb0_H-COlw6qtTqW9vZO-M92ysCelQ7SbiZzbcvMu2DqFL1vLI7VtgnS6O5kNC33Tp-J6_dULqzBTHxxef0dAN98yXTRXsTXvK_404zPq5f4Y9MKZN-SYJC9lEYVBj4qLGja7GJt_CIx6Lx-ZuRs-LZz_nDejwm9XDp7GMVVjvxzJ73uCdiPJjwMJfOAC81TTwgc0sn2fHids50S-aVO4dIKMN3T-FdYIGWm5lDTqIiJVDwa83Gte72gu2tcMttuCfiXLbQMYAKSDq7gwgB3oeVp7v0YdpBR7b630jVUvo616pUNQvLXs7ULgMHaj1YGrE5KdEwJ7NgNjjK7EMGnaIC983lkGkRrgWWqa5MSlRVq4zjaufI8AHbn5E/RrmLSNUN8iaDa6a_EPqb6HDtUh2o1sVG/8)_.******
**[He is obviously terrified of me running for Senate... So maybe that’s exactly what needs to happen???](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/ffRQMso-yXQprWMb1soMUcMkAAf_VA6UPysHKXFDwQ8xV8pTSRBGT6aHc4JFkPhRAW-11Keh3Idj77lPOfAF8-lpOvQKgXfn14nz0BF830fKudEKJ4_Cefvc5PN7PhI9qBEn4bljn151ZlfRNLwb7L8v2ocB2XJys-m4NCehxCpNF3JQSfkAvl5JYvc5bk1FUbD0yglQ_CpLbivpb1NCAZYf_XzBjY8ZpONl7iuEoMxQioK2QezlzXKtH4yhG-Sn98cXtjSF3HIiAJHQiTn6mUyakMJY3waXd2UUuI8wcjdb5-fnoBWL8yyh2m80L9e_n8oS1m545Btzr5KqrmlSd9VFe1NIK69SwU_Vnj3ZglF9iklBzZDqu83ToBhxGmyDNQGSlLcW21_uAulI86_5iwoM2QiAOtVCHTK9PQ3BYt2_ytfj9-4_xupsr3bZ_-_KlGoyjBlLYCAsRUJbXILp/oTATSkkiQOb4jck9eRZf8FQh2ksgXd2V/8)**
Peter: Before anything further happens - Before I move to the next step - **_[I need to hear from you](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/pZwZUsXRabuZTWPR6PHiSoUH64eQxZAqHQ8hUtc082-GOqKVUAX5k158etOU9yIn3o7puKF9pmAdvhCXWl0PaweXKH29kRVD11rtu1C172BCmp1cOQEckV6EBxwhjmn1UIwcSh0ewbjqGOyuJdozzuzj7uee1Am8Gu_XJE-_AjQVqZ0XfD9PeH-y01JTSKTPz4I3Qv_oKs8ZVtwuBiHjLfUGBKK73cJ2t4k30hTInNyxxsi276kbEXQ_9QuDQ4x3pt8aet5TfkfKcIG2NdoYo-o6MYFalyaplFXAiaP8qYyWngqDAWg9SD6G_pgQsic6K051mfhpAVdQenUCkOTHlCJZJzr3f2lKD-EogzWTvVZXL4MaWmQ2ABhGjPbJ0wp3bxlasPWiAu9EuSg3W0t8sBhq1Ees-xQPqreXwUeMR5PQnBMVoBc7sNWPrZ-5uhMVl_GroTGNB_0iDqGIyc2m/2hTkq7khzgaY8yq0Pd5QJvhc3Y6vj_V9/8)_.**
**I need to know if I should run for Senate in Georgia, and if I should I need to know if I will have your support or not.**
This would be the biggest fight of my life, the most important, the most brutal, and the most high-stakes.
_The radical Left_ ,_the fake news media_ , _the RINOs_ , _the globalist billionaires_ \- they would all come after me with everything they’ve got.
But I’m not afraid of them. I’m only afraid of running this race without the full support of the America First patriots who have had my back since day one...
**[So I need you to tell me now:](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/f6MkuMy5TYVNMhyPHvnc41JUTyQJDmpvOhhNAXbhR2bW3QzA1WOD7Cv-btmomIxDP748WyCiXTUN9JPKYjwCe0vwyguDCrcP4wazNWViDexk8RmgrWDGc7xss32LcF5pYgfAXe5QHmU-1KNDHtvwMmAaV_YR7xSoJPhp-aljRWvb-QkUKNDM3E9_1GZ7h0VtWCsZ8cU381sIFshaEyztOucR9Q3-EHH0dFiwhQ7jb_LB5SYuejBjO3gQ4BcTGKxFf7FhzYqwAETeCgI2cYITHCt6gWts9VWFFawqs5xyZtxRbpxBs8HgtoqNH346nOzK9qHJJFNBv2usbtfIpZJJaIvAivADkyY4Keyp6_Ls_VAUTkP-vuwNdZUszBh8N7lwGyQZRkg5jLl9ffv20UmSQl6kiaoKhIX8MWleQ0DSwt2gvqLVmjv4ay_GEUvI_Kz65lQuu0pao7GS6NpTwRht/dUTaOZvQbqjeTSx-OU2ePqoPeBDvKxqD/8)**

clean_body: | | | | Peter, I didn’t run for office 5 years ago to become famous or get invited to swanky cocktail parties in Washington, D.C. I ran because I was sick and tired of seeing our country speeding towards a cliff with career politicians from both parties at the wheel, and I decided to do something about it. Then I got to Congress and saw firsthand just how corrupt and broken our government really is, and let me tell you, one of the biggest hurdles we face in our movement to save America is the U.S. Senate. The worst of them is Jon Ossoff, or as I like to call him, Radical Transgender Activist Jon Ossoff. Ossoff is already working behind the scenes to impeach and remove President Trump from office, he even admitted it at his recent town hall. He’s even running his re-election campaign as if I’m already his opponent, smearing me every chance he gets, and using my name to fundraise from liberal online donors. .** Peter: Before anything further happens - Before I move to the next step - . I need to know if I should run for Senate in Georgia, and if I should I need to know if I will have your support or not. This would be the biggest fight of my life, the most important, the most brutal, and the most high-stakes. The radical Left ,the fake news media , the RINOs , the globalist billionaires \- they would all come after me with everything they’ve got. But I’m not afraid of them. I’m only afraid of running this race without the full support of the America First patriots who have had my back since day one... In Strength, Marjorie Taylor Greene** %unsubscribeurl% |

| Peter,

As more women answer the call to run for public office and serve their community in the face of the Trump Administration's dangerous policies, Emerge stands ready to meet the urgency of this moment.

For the last 20 years, Emerge has helped transform the face of government by recruiting and training strong community-focused women who are leaders in their communities.

Our award-winning training programs are specifically designed to empower our alums by providing them with the knowledge, resources, and network of support they need to make a major impact in elections across the country, so we can build an even stronger defense for our most fundamental rights and freedoms.

The numbers speak for themselves. The national average win rate for first-time candidates is between 10% and 15%. **For first-time candidates who go through the Emerge program,_the rate soars to 50%!_**

When you make an investment in Emerge, you’re making an investment in the future of Democratic leadership. The women we train today will be the leaders of tomorrow.

name: Dan Goldman
subject: The Trump family’s latest grift
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
The Trump family’s use of the Presidency to profit from only gets worse, Peter. **Donald Trump Jr. is now opening a private invite-only club for the wealthy and well connected called the “Executive Branch” – giving access to high-level administration officials to the highest bidder.** We already knew that the Trump family’s brazen corruption has reached breathtaking and unprecedented proportions. During the campaign, Trump made clear to oil and gas executives that he would take care of them if they supported him, which they did. Right before the inauguration, Trump introduced his own meme coin — a digital product that has no value — which netted him hundreds of millions of dollars. After inauguration, Trump’s crypto company launched a stablecoin _while he is pushing stablecoin legislation that would directly benefit his financial interest._ Trump is also selling a White House tour to the 25 largest shareholders of his crypto company, which has gone up in price by 50% since he announced it. **And perhaps most egregiously, last weekend Trump’s crypto company entered into a _$2 billion_ deal with a UAE-backed company that will net him hundreds of millions of dollars.** One thing is crystal clear: The Trump administration puts billionaires first, and everyday Americans last. I’m working in Congress to stop this brazen corruption and bring it to light. Every Friday, I plan to unveil an aspect of corruption within the Trump administration to make sure that nothing is being hidden from voters like you. That’s why I wanted to make sure you saw this headline: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107411577/544605331/-647979915?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250509_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWVkMTU3Ny0xYzJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AYUgtalHd6IZm6kUNZnaWdb1ufVX20_3RED2umjExB8=) **You can read it plain and simple: Donald Trump wants to “remake Washington” so that it serves himself, his family and his billionaire allies instead of _you_ , Peter.** The Trump family’s plan to essentially sell access to the most powerful office in the world for personal profit is a _blatant_ violation of the Constitution and other laws. Congressional Republicans know that the Trump family is personally profiting from the presidency — but they’ll do nothing to stop it. clean_body: | The Trump family’s use of the Presidency to profit from only gets worse, Peter. Donald Trump Jr. is now opening a private invite-only club for the wealthy and well connected called the “Executive Branch” – giving access to high-level administration officials to the highest bidder. We already knew that the Trump family’s brazen corruption has reached breathtaking and unprecedented proportions. During the campaign, Trump made clear to oil and gas executives that he would take care of them if they supported him, which they did. Right before the inauguration, Trump introduced his own meme coin — a digital product that has no value — which netted him hundreds of millions of dollars. After inauguration, Trump’s crypto company launched a stablecoin while he is pushing stablecoin legislation that would directly benefit his financial interest. Trump is also selling a White House tour to the 25 largest shareholders of his crypto company, which has gone up in price by 50% since he announced it. And perhaps most egregiously, last weekend Trump’s crypto company entered into a $2 billion deal with a UAE-backed company that will net him hundreds of millions of dollars. One thing is crystal clear: The Trump administration puts billionaires first, and everyday Americans last. I’m working in Congress to stop this brazen corruption and bring it to light. Every Friday, I plan to unveil an aspect of corruption within the Trump administration to make sure that nothing is being hidden from voters like you. That’s why I wanted to make sure you saw this headline: = You can read it plain and simple: Donald Trump wants to “remake Washington” so that it serves himself, his family and his billionaire allies instead of you , Peter. The Trump family’s plan to essentially sell access to the most powerful office in the world for personal profit is a blatant violation of the Constitution and other laws. Congressional Republicans know that the Trump family is personally profiting from the presidency — but they’ll do nothing to stop it. That’s why we must stay the course and make sure voters across the country know about this rampant corruption. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

May 9
---

---

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/kristi-noem-shuts-up-condescending?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem refused to let Democrat Rep. Veronica Escobar steamroll her during tense questioning at
**[Noem doesn't back down to anyone, watch the clip:](https://substack.com/redirect/e3ddc08d-c5ee-4c23-8d80-2330f52778c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e3ddc08d-c5ee-4c23-8d80-2330f52778c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e3ddc08d-c5ee-4c23-8d80-2330f52778c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Escobar pressed Noem about the manner in which American citizen children are deported along with their illegal immigrant parents, citing an I.C.E form called "The Caregiver Designation at Arrest Form."
"Were any of the individuals who were deported who has U.S. citizen children,... were they given an opportunity to sign that form?" Escobar asked Noem.
"The specific cases that you're referencing, it was the parents choice to take their children with them," Noem clarified. **["It is the policy of the Trump administration to keep families together." ](https://substack.com/redirect/e3ddc08d-c5ee-4c23-8d80-2330f52778c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Escobar became frustrated that Noem didn't just give her a "yes" or "no" answer.
"Ma'am, the questions are really simple, yes or no, was that formed used in any of those cases?!" she asked again.
Noem calmly answered that she would get back to the congresswoman about the specific forms in question.
"Ma'am, please! Ma'am, reclaiming my time! I'd like you to avoid the filibusters!" Escobar snapped.
**["I'm answering your questions with facts!"](https://substack.com/redirect/e3ddc08d-c5ee-4c23-8d80-2330f52778c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Noem fired back.
You could cut the tension in the air with a knife... watch the congress clash here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e3ddc08d-c5ee-4c23-8d80-2330f52778c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Stocks stumble as Trump prepares to talk to China**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3c51d7c7-b731-4d3b-9c94-a1c6551fb66e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The major indexes capped a choppy week in the red, **[with the S&P 500, The Dow and Nasdaq all closing lower](https://substack.com/redirect/f3437e7a-4a33-4cbc-88f1-5aa96f3b02d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **as the US and China trade delegations heads to Geneva for tariff talks this weekend.
**Why it matters** : Investors are jittery after President Trump hinted at slashing tariffs on Chinese goods from 145% to 80%, a move that could ease tensions but leaves markets on edge.
**Dive deeper:** Mixed signals fueled the volatility. Strong earnings from tech giants like Nvidia provided some lift, but renewed tariff fears and a Federal Reserve rate decision caused concern.
**What 's next**: As negotiators prep for the talks in Switzerland, investors are strapped in for more turbulence. Will tariffs soften, or is this just another cliffhanger?

Veronica Escobar steamroll her during tense questioning at Escobar pressed Noem about the manner in which American citizen children are deported along with their illegal immigrant parents, citing an I.C.E form called "The Caregiver Designation at Arrest Form." "Were any of the individuals who were deported who has U.S. citizen children,... were they given an opportunity to sign that form?" Escobar asked Noem. "The specific cases that you're referencing, it was the parents choice to take their children with them," Noem clarified. Escobar became frustrated that Noem didn't just give her a "yes" or "no" answer. "Ma'am, the questions are really simple, yes or no, was that formed used in any of those cases?!" she asked again. Noem calmly answered that she would get back to the congresswoman about the specific forms in question. "Ma'am, please! Ma'am, reclaiming my time! I'd like you to avoid the filibusters!" It's Friday and we have the most amazing show for you today! Alex Bruesewitz is the CEO of X Strategies, the digital media manager for President Trump during his campaign. President Trump created legendary viral moments during his campaign run and Alex Bruesewitz was with the president strategizing the podcast and digital media appearances. From Theo Von educating President Trump on the effects of cocaine to the "Trump Dance" with Adin Ross and " the weave" with Andrew Schultz. These viral moments took fire on the internet and boosted President Trump's popularity like no other. One of the biggest viral moments was the "cats and dogs" song that President Trump mentioned during the debate with Kamala Harris . It was a crucial turn and left Democrats in the wilderness. President Trump with Bruesewitz and team, ran as successful a media run you could have and it all culminated with the 3 hour conversation on the Joe Rogan show. Alex walks us through the behind the scenes strategy, including working with Barron Trump, the Trump family and creating one of the most epic social and digital media campaigns of all time.
Featuring:
**Alex Bruesewitz**
CEO | X Strategies
https://xstrategies.com/

name: John Padora
subject: Boebert opposes trains
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
| | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/26FVpG4bNLm5IzpbP-4rwF5Z031z0KEJq-dvrjxiV_6uvyAXhqHQZXTR9QJ2AMUJnfhsi1KVR06knm0XS9Ik6x9FHzJy6r6579qrwbq6vhATUs9YXnmfLSCsUlAdLGwS92wvZmtazAuD3edQGlQyBx_bhrjUivm_nKetUyjeo-sCXaJMKcv-77Nfl6JlYiayYUjy0MgVe3vYpPgMd17CgtpKlyfF7ny6aSueiWapQYOVynLm8PWFBDepX3tYYvrhKJDW4Isst_nGvVfKF7aAI11Go2eMq9mkeE8zpvvVNCruNk-dFIr0WtP3Wqc999hVLULmERem8DlSGyrbEIA3bGyU8DjoiQZVngnN7SCeMqHFhDZ848QYKSIV2SankKTQVR3reAJVLcI1koBSV2SrJsyOi3gRPImpckE6sCeUEMQx_EGGd4pa7EGPwuDHsAyXGgxqgoP9RpgMjXdTXCg/LIhZRgYr87LifDyexC9O6yMwrBMpadKt/8) Friend, Just when you thought Lauren Boebert couldn’t get more out of touch, she found a new enemy: **trains.** That’s right — Boebert is now opposing a major plan to bring passenger rail to Colorado’s Front Range. The same kind of infrastructure project that could actually connect communities, boost local economies, and cut commute times? She’s against it. Why? Because DOGE says it’s bad. **[Lauren Boebert doesn’t do a lot of thinking for herself. She lets Trump and Elon Musk do it for her. name: Ron Wyden
subject: Repeated rubber-stamping
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
|
---
| | Unfortunately, Frank Bisignano was confirmed by the Senate this week as Social Security Commissioner. Every Republican voted for him, despite his documented lies and connections to DOGE. **Once again, Senate Republicans have rubber-stamped a deeply unqualified Trump nominee who's going to implement policies that hurt the American people.** As long as Republicans control the Senate, it's clear most Trump nominees will continue sailing through. **We've got to get to work to change that.** [**Will you chip in $19 to fuel my efforts to help Democrats retake the Senate in 2026? We face a tough map, but if we have the resources to mobilize and make our case early, a lot can change in the next 18 months.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107413359/544611461/-2044921950?refcode=2025-05-09-ssa&recurring=0&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=313dbae8-222d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTNkYmFlOC0yMjJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPAzzGzvXJ2PcUZl2Eg2vfvVCnTXW0nzl7hMCG0QxnE=) Onward, _Ron_ Forwarded Message | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107413360/544611462/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTNkYmFlOC0yMjJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPAzzGzvXJ2PcUZl2Eg2vfvVCnTXW0nzl7hMCG0QxnE=&emci=13c94f1f-122d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=313dbae8-222d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=9818364)
---

Tomorrow, the Senate will vote on whether to confirm Donald Trump's nominee to run the Social Security Administration, Frank Bisignano. **You can mark me down as**** _hell no._**
During the confirmation process, Bisignano lied to me, my staff, and the Finance Committee multiple times. He directly contradicted a confidential whistleblower report I received, which showed Bisignano's close ties to DOGE operations at Social Security.
According to the whistleblower, he has been involved with top-level staffing decisions, and receives regular briefings about DOGE's operations at the Social Security Administration.
Trump has let Elon Musk's DOGE team run roughshod throughout the Social Security Administration, cutting off customer service, closing field offices, and delaying services. **The next administrator**** _must_****be an independent voice who's willing to stand up against blatant interference.**
Social Security is a lifeline for millions of seniors and Americans with disabilities. A missed check could be the difference for someone to be able to pay rent, buy groceries, or pick up their prescriptions for the month.
**But Trump and his inner circle of billionaire buddies are too out of touch to even know that – or care.**
Mr. Bisignano was nominated by Trump not because he has a plan to improve customer service and make it easier for seniors to get their earned benefits, but because Trump knows that he will be a hatchet man on day one – eager to bring down whatever destruction on the program that Trump and Musk are planning.
If Republicans in the Senate confirm this nominee, it will be a death sentence for Social Security as we know it.
**This is too big a risk to take.** I vigorously oppose Frank Bisignano's confirmation, and I'm urging as many of my colleagues as possible to join me.

clean_body: | | | Unfortunately, Frank Bisignano was confirmed by the Senate this week as Social Security Commissioner. Every Republican voted for him, despite his documented lies and connections to DOGE. Once again, Senate Republicans have rubber-stamped a deeply unqualified Trump nominee who's going to implement policies that hurt the American people. As long as Republicans control the Senate, it's clear most Trump nominees will continue sailing through. We've got to get to work to change that. = Onward, Ron Forwarded Message | Tomorrow, the Senate will vote on whether to confirm Donald Trump's nominee to run the Social Security Administration, Frank Bisignano. You can mark me down as hell no. During the confirmation process, Bisignano lied to me, my staff, and the Finance Committee multiple times. He directly contradicted a confidential whistleblower report I received, which showed Bisignano's close ties to DOGE operations at Social Security. According to the whistleblower, he has been involved with top-level staffing decisions, and receives regular briefings about DOGE's operations at the Social Security Administration. Trump has let Elon Musk's DOGE team run roughshod throughout the Social Security Administration, cutting off customer service, closing field offices, and delaying services. The next administrator mustbe an independent voice who's willing to stand up against blatant interference. Social Security is a lifeline for millions of seniors and Americans with disabilities. A missed check could be the difference for someone to be able to pay rent, buy groceries, or pick up their prescriptions for the month. But Trump and his inner circle of billionaire buddies are too out of touch to even know that – or care. Mr. Bisignano was nominated by Trump not because he has a plan to improve customer service and make it easier for seniors to get their earned benefits, but because Trump knows that he will be a hatchet man on day one – eager to bring down whatever destruction on the program that Trump and Musk are planning. If Republicans in the Senate confirm this nominee, it will be a death sentence for Social Security as we know it. This is too big a risk to take. I vigorously oppose Frank Bisignano's confirmation, and I'm urging as many of my colleagues as possible to join me. name: Josh Harder
subject: A note about the attacks against me
body:
Sigh.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107413589/544612198/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZjYjFkYjYtMjQyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EgCdv3G0FthYrv3jiJXft-s0x7Tc9pG3SOPk4wmCVTc=) | Hey Peter, Like clockwork, National Republicans have launched a fresh wave of attacks against me this week. It feels like there’s a new smear every single day. We always knew I would be a top target now that I represent a Trump district, but I didn’t expect the onslaught to be _this_ relentless. It’s a reminder of how messed up our politics have gotten. Ultimately, I see it as a sign of desperation. Republicans can’t run on how their policies help people (quite the opposite!) so they have to attack us vulnerable Democrats. **Well, I for one am not taking the bait.** I’m not going to back down from fighting back against Donald Trump’s reprehensible actions. I truly believe we are in a make-or-break moment for our country. Republicans can attack me all they want, I will not stop speaking out. I need to show them we’re still in this fight — and that we won’t be silenced by their fear tactics. But I can’t do it without your help. If you can, please chip in today to help me defend this seat: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-May2025-FR-May**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107413590/544612199/-1759382976?&refcode=E13226-20250509-PersonalAttacks-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZjYjFkYjYtMjQyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EgCdv3G0FthYrv3jiJXft-s0x7Tc9pG3SOPk4wmCVTc=) As always, grateful to be in this with you, Josh
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. [**Josh doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money, so please chip in now to our campaign!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107413591/544612200/1618730853?refcode=E13226-20250509-PersonalAttacks-footer-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZjYjFkYjYtMjQyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EgCdv3G0FthYrv3jiJXft-s0x7Tc9pG3SOPk4wmCVTc=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107413592/544612201/-1860252395?refcode=E13226-20250509-PersonalAttacks-footer-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZjYjFkYjYtMjQyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EgCdv3G0FthYrv3jiJXft-s0x7Tc9pG3SOPk4wmCVTc=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107413593/544612202/1618730853?refcode=E13226-20250509-PersonalAttacks-footer-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZjYjFkYjYtMjQyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EgCdv3G0FthYrv3jiJXft-s0x7Tc9pG3SOPk4wmCVTc=) If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. name: VoteVets.org
subject: You deserve an explanation...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Here’s the truth
#
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution directly to VoteVets. But first, you deserve to know how we will use your donation and why this request is so important.
Here's the truth:
As you read this, Donald Trump and the Republican Party are pulling up the couch cushions looking for any programs they can slash in order to pay for tax cuts for billionaires.
Sadly, that includes programs many Veterans rely on. We're talking about Veterans health care, housing and more.
At the same time, he is trying to hold this ridiculous military parade on his birthday in Washington, D.C. An event that would debase the military and one that must be stopped.
We also have critical elections coming up fast, and we need to re-take the House or Senate to serve as a check against Trump in the next two years.
In each of those instances, it is the voices of Veterans and military families that will play key roles.
VoteVets is one of the top outside spending organizations every cycle, but what you may not know is that almost all of the donations we receive come from people chipping-in in response to emails like this — so we are asking:
[**Can you please make a $5 contribution to VoteVets to help us stop Trump's push to slash Veterans programs, hold a parade in his honor, and to help elect a Congress that will hold him accountable?**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-may25.QbUJE_&refcode=em250509-1-30&t=1&akid=34404%2E3013755%2EXLRjQX)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Roger Stone just called for me to be charged with treason and executed.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8560%2E5257348%2EJSkFKq)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em_kelly.tS2nMv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250509_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8560%2E5257348%2EJSkFKq)
Trump’s longtime political advisor, Roger Stone, just called for me to be charged with treason and executed.
You heard me right.
I called out Trump for his blatant corruption — making millions of dollars from his own crypto coins — and I co-sponsored a bill to make it illegal for the President, the Vice President, administration officials, and members of Congress to do the same.
In response, they sent Roger Stone after me.
Derek, when I joined the Navy, I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution. I did it again when I was sworn in as Arizona’s United States Senator. I will continue to uphold that oath, and because it matters to our democracy, I will do everything I can to stop the blatant corruption in Washington.
Guys like Donald Trump and Roger Stone are only looking out for themselves. And it’s clear they’re scared of the attention we’re bringing to them and their corrupt deeds.
I’ll be honest with you, though. If Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and now Roger Stone are all lining up against me, it’s going to take a big team to fight back.
[**Please, if you can afford it, split a donation between my campaign and Adam Schiff as we take on the corruption in Washington and fight back against the Trump Administration. It adds up fast when lots of people are chipping in.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em_kelly.tS2nMv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20250509_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8560%2E5257348%2EJSkFKq)

clean_body: | Trump’s longtime political advisor, Roger Stone, just called for me to be charged with treason and executed. You heard me right. I called out Trump for his blatant corruption — making millions of dollars from his own crypto coins — and I co-sponsored a bill to make it illegal for the President, the Vice President, administration officials, and members of Congress to do the same. In response, they sent Roger Stone after me. Derek, when I joined the Navy, I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution. I did it again when I was sworn in as Arizona’s United States Senator. I will continue to uphold that oath, and because it matters to our democracy, I will do everything I can to stop the blatant corruption in Washington. Guys like Donald Trump and Roger Stone are only looking out for themselves. And it’s clear they’re scared of the attention we’re bringing to them and their corrupt deeds. I’ll be honest with you, though. If Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and now Roger Stone are all lining up against me, it’s going to take a big team to fight back. _Braun Cancels Free Lunch Program for Hundreds of Thousands of Hoosier Children_
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107413644/544612369/-2055444779?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTk2OTgwZC0yNTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=89XUcK1eP8MmhPp6tmJGCuo24q0yFK8cw76Cly0cJ84=&emci=36c4b8e9-0b2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=a596980d-252d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535)**
[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107413645/544612370/-2055444779?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTk2OTgwZC0yNTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=89XUcK1eP8MmhPp6tmJGCuo24q0yFK8cw76Cly0cJ84=&emci=36c4b8e9-0b2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=a596980d-252d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535) This week, [reporting from the Indiana Capital Chronicle](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107413646/544612371/1381570878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTk2OTgwZC0yNTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=89XUcK1eP8MmhPp6tmJGCuo24q0yFK8cw76Cly0cJ84=&emci=36c4b8e9-0b2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=a596980d-252d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535) showed that Governor Braun decided not to renew Indiana’s participation in the SUN Bucks program, which provides funding to families to feed over 600,000 Hoosier children. The State wouldn’t say how much it costs to administer the program, but the funding to families is covered by the federal program. The program has provided low-income families $120 per month per child to purchase food while schools are closed in the summer. Now, families will be forced to go to a free meal site to get meals in the summer. Unfortunately, that raises a problem for those families whose kids are home alone during lunch and can’t get a ride to the meal site. Indiana is one of just 13 states this year to deny funding for the program. ****_Indiana Deep In Bottom Half of State Rankings_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107413647/544612372/-2068912278?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTk2OTgwZC0yNTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=89XUcK1eP8MmhPp6tmJGCuo24q0yFK8cw76Cly0cJ84=&emci=36c4b8e9-0b2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=a596980d-252d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107413648/544612373/-2068912278?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTk2OTgwZC0yNTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=89XUcK1eP8MmhPp6tmJGCuo24q0yFK8cw76Cly0cJ84=&emci=36c4b8e9-0b2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=a596980d-252d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535) This week, the 2025 edition of US News and World Report’s state rankings were released. Indiana continues to rank far in the bottom half of states, landing at 33rd overall for the current year after 20-plus years of one-party Republican control. Indiana’s rankings were driven down by poor showings in both healthcare and economics. 20 years of one party rule has left us with one of the 10 weakest economies in the country. Our healthcare system clocked in the bottom 15 states, placing 35th. It’s clear that Hoosier workers and families deserve better. To read more about Indiana’s rankings, [click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107413649/544612374/1421656686?outputType=amp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTk2OTgwZC0yNTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=89XUcK1eP8MmhPp6tmJGCuo24q0yFK8cw76Cly0cJ84=&emci=36c4b8e9-0b2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=a596980d-252d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535) ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** Braun Cancels Free Lunch Program for Hundreds of Thousands of Hoosier Children This week, showed that Governor Braun decided not to renew Indiana’s participation in the SUN Bucks program, which provides funding to families to feed over 600,000 Hoosier children. The State wouldn’t say how much it costs to administer the program, but the funding to families is covered by the federal program. The program has provided low-income families $120 per month per child to purchase food while schools are closed in the summer. Now, families will be forced to go to a free meal site to get meals in the summer. Unfortunately, that raises a problem for those families whose kids are home alone during lunch and can’t get a ride to the meal site. Indiana is one of just 13 states this year to deny funding for the program. Indiana Deep In Bottom Half of State Rankings This week, the 2025 edition of US News and World Report’s state rankings were released. Indiana continues to rank far in the bottom half of states, landing at 33rd overall for the current year after 20-plus years of one-party Republican control. Indiana’s rankings were driven down by poor showings in both healthcare and economics. 20 years of one party rule has left us with one of the 10 weakest economies in the country. Our healthcare system clocked in the bottom 15 states, placing 35th. It’s clear that Hoosier workers and families deserve better. To read more about Indiana’s rankings, Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Indiana House Democrats are launching the Hoosier Voices Tour across Indiana in the coming weeks and months. There will be more dates to come, but for now events have been planned in Carmel, Chesterton, East Chicago, Evansville, Fishers, Fort Wayne, Indianapolis, Michigan City, Portage, Terre Haute, South Bend, and more. Feel free to look at their social media post above for the full list of dates planned. While Republicans are hiding from Hoosiers, Democrats are showing up and listening to Hoosier communities. People’s Town Hall Series There are two upcoming People’s Town Hall events yet to come! Sign up for our events on TOMORROW in Terre Haute and on May 13 in Culver. We hope to see you there if you’re in the area! Terre Haute – Friday, May 9, 2025 at 6:00-7:30 PM ET Vigo County Public Library, 680 Poplar St, Terre Haute, IN 47807 Culver – Tuesday, May 13, 2025 at 6:00-7:30 PM ET Culver-Union Township Library, 107 N Main St, Culver, IN 46511 Greenwood – Friday, May 16, 2025 at 6:30-8:00 PM ET Greenwood Fieldhouse, 411 S Madison Ave, Greenwood, IN 46142 Muncie – Saturday, May 17, 2025 at 10:00-11:30 AM ET Patterson Block Building, 3rd Floor Ballroom, 108 S Walnut St, Muncie, IN 47305 Make Your Voice Heard! Submit Public Input on Upcoming Indiana Projects DUBOIS AND MARTIN COUNTIES – INDOT is taking public comment on the Mid-States Corridor project. Comments may also be shared by calling or visiting the project office. The project team requests comments be submitted by May 12, 2025. FRANKLIN TOWNSHIP, INDIANAPOLIS – Residents in Franklin Township in Southern Indianapolis are invited to provide comments for an upcoming data center project. There is a City Rezoning Hearing May 15th. SOUTH SHORE LINE RATE INCREASE – NITCD is taking public comment until June 12 on a potential 10% rate increase for riders on their line. Public hearings will be on May 8 and June 12. ** Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Monday, May 12th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on The Secrets to Successful Fundraising Emails. U.S. Sen. Katie Britt joined U.S. Sens. Ted Cruz (R-Texas), Rick Scott (R-Fla.) and Mike Lee (R-Utah) in introducing the Reaffirming Every Servicemember’s Trust Over Religious Exemptions (RESTORE) Act on Thursday. The legislation would require the Department of Defense (DoD) to establish a special review board to audit the service-wide handling of religious accommodation requests related to the COVID-19 vaccine mandate during the Biden administration. The board would be charged with identifying those who were unjustly penalized and correcting the career and personnel records of affected service members, according to Britt's office.

[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=cdd3f42bc457449296b587f665d93ed9&_e=sXTEDwKvXFEKkjWjHpVRMGhTbI7CETyk5lxeoxNAbM4frp8W4KsAsEFgKyuXDNg2phf7s6yrX9xiKkptEeluoCcIxJnh_ntXJBuk8GEHkdTvzPJSrv2duW36nnZwzp_fXRFB_tH_SRlQuSnDU0_c_4fKyL23qM7NxrbfjfKMqXN114Wdnggl9yml3kOGw714bR_1zDuLVlt63S4YdaBAwXRx_eBhNS3af3RaHfev2APqLl_XJw8FCMDkmLg5n7C3VMzTFdrM_-jB1omUyoE4kguBYbHdEgg9qsOrHDPUIGCUeFT4nGku_QtdkbyaS6yr)

More than 4 million youth and young-adult families face homelessness, statistics show, prompting rare bipartisan action in Congress to expand federal support and address the growing crisis. Sens. Angela Alsobrooks, D-Md., and Katie Britt, will introduce the Homeless Children & Youth Act on Wednesday, which is the former’s first piece of major bipartisan legislation in her short tenure since being sworn-in in January. Officials must ensure that children experiencing homelessness can get the support they need to exit that situation for good, Alsobrooks told Fox News Digital.

More than two years into her first term, U.S. Senator Katie Britt (R-Montgomery) is quickly becoming one of the Senate’s most vocal advocates for families, mothers and children. Ahead of Mother’s Day, Britt is reintroducing the More Opportunities for Moms to Succeed (MOMS) Act, a cornerstone of her pro-life, pro-family legislative agenda. The bill aims to support women during pregnancy, postpartum, and early childhood development by connecting them to key resources and services.

clean_body: | | | | | Official Team Britt Newsletter | | Britt unveils legislation to audit Biden admin's handling of religious exemptions related to COVID-19 vaccine mandate for troops U.S. Sen. Katie Britt joined U.S. Sens. Ted Cruz (R-Texas), Rick Scott (R-Fla.) and Mike Lee (R-Utah) in introducing the Reaffirming Every Servicemember’s Trust Over Religious Exemptions (RESTORE) Act on Thursday. The legislation would require the Department of Defense (DoD) to establish a special review board to audit the service-wide handling of religious accommodation requests related to the COVID-19 vaccine mandate during the Biden administration. The board would be charged with identifying those who were unjustly penalized and correcting the career and personnel records of affected service members, according to Britt's office. | | Dems, GOP form rare alliance on youth homelessness bill as crisis impacts nation More than 4 million youth and young-adult families face homelessness, statistics show, prompting rare bipartisan action in Congress to expand federal support and address the growing crisis. name: Team DNC
subject: Two things…
body:
---
Hi Derek, We’re continuing to build a strong Democratic Party that can do two things: 1\. Mobilize and organize against Trump, Elon Musk, and their Congressional allies’ harmful policies. 2\. Build the infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats at all levels of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. Here’s what that looks like: We’ve filed multiple lawsuits against Trump. We’re using every tool at our disposal — _including taking Trump to court_ — to stop Trump’s power grab attempts. We’re holding People’s Town Halls across the country, showing up in districts where Republican representatives won’t. We’re giving everyone an opportunity — regardless of how they voted — to show up and make their voice heard. At the same time, we’re making a historic $1 million monthly investment in our state parties, and we’re building a robust on-the-ground organizing operation. We’re already seeing our work pay off: Democrats have massively overperformed in nearly every special election this year. The work we are doing right now is not flashy, but it’s absolutely essential. There has never been a more important time to join the fight, and it’s going to take all of us stepping up to check Trump and his administration at every turn while working to elect Democrats who will do the same. [So we’re asking: Can you make your first $3 contribution of 2025 to help support this work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250509_3385_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3385_22930333_n6VekJ&akid=3385%2E22930333%2En6VekJ) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250509_3385_fr&refcode2=3385_22930333_n6VekJ&akid=3385%2E22930333%2En6VekJ)**

clean_body: Hi Derek, We’re continuing to build a strong Democratic Party that can do two things: 1\. Mobilize and organize against Trump, Elon Musk, and their Congressional allies’ harmful policies. 2\. Build the infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats at all levels of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. Here’s what that looks like: We’ve filed multiple lawsuits against Trump. We’re using every tool at our disposal — including taking Trump to court — to stop Trump’s power grab attempts. We’re holding People’s Town Halls across the country, showing up in districts where Republican representatives won’t. We’re giving everyone an opportunity — regardless of how they voted — to show up and make their voice heard. At the same time, we’re making a historic $1 million monthly investment in our state parties, and we’re building a robust on-the-ground organizing operation. We’re already seeing our work pay off: Democrats have massively overperformed in nearly every special election this year. The work we are doing right now is not flashy, but it’s absolutely essential. There has never been a more important time to join the fight, and it’s going to take all of us stepping up to check Trump and his administration at every turn while working to elect Democrats who will do the same. Peter - The Senate's last-ditch chance to restore election integrity is **NOW!**

You already know the shocking truth: illegal immigrants are being allowed to vote in radical-left cities like San Francisco and New York City. _**But with President Trump 's leadership and a conservative Senate majority, we've never been closer to ending this disgraceful attack on our republic.**_

The House passed the SAVE Act to permanently ban illegal immigrants from voting--a victory conservatives like us have fought tirelessly for.

_But here 's the danger:_ Democrat senators are already plotting to filibuster this bill. If we fail, millions of illegal aliens admitted under Biden's open-borders regime could swing elections in 2026, 2028, and beyond. **We can 't let that happen!**

* Illegal aliens are influencing school board elections, mayoral races, and even congressional elections.

But with President Trump 's leadership and a conservative Senate majority, we've never been closer to ending this disgraceful attack on our republic. | | | **These Democrats have been in power since before the Berlin Wall even fell:**

They've failed us at every turn.

They looked the other way while our cities were overrun with crime. They opened the floodgates at the border, allowing MILLIONS of illegal immigrants to pour into our country. They stood by while our schools taught an entire generation to hate America.

And now? Instead of taking responsibility - they blame President Trump.

Radical Democrats are desperate to hang on to power, pretending they have the answers when all they've done is wreck everything they've touched.

Peter, It's been over 100 days of the Trump Administration – and I want you to know I'm here, I’m listening, and I’m doing everything I can to protect the people of Oregon. So today, I have one question for you: **What do you want me to know? ** I’m not just asking – I actually read through your responses. The feedback my team collects from you has been valuable to my work for Oregon as your Governor. Your voice is important to me, and I want to hear from you. I want to hear your concerns, what you talk about at your kitchen table, or anything else you’d like me to know right now. **[Will you fill out this one-question survey? Celebrating You This Mother's Day

Dear Mom,

Today, we honor you – the heart of the home, the defender of values, the nurturer of dreams. Your strength, love, and sacrifices
shape generations. From all of us at Moms for America, thank you for being the powerful, irreplaceable force you are.

To celebrate YOU, we're launching our brand-new Moms for America online merch store, with a

Special Mother's Day Giveaway!

You can now rep Moms for America in everyday comfort, with new styles designed by moms, for moms, while still embracing our
classic purple for events and rallies.

Enter to win a $550 Merch Bundle from our new store!

HOW TO ENTER:

LIKE the giveaway post (link below)

FOLLOW the Moms for America account

COMMENT by tagging a mom you’d love to shop with and tell us your favorite item from the store

If you don’t have Instagram, you can LIKE and SUBSCRIBE to our X or our FB Posts (link below) and if you complete all of these,

clean_body: Enter to win a $550 Merch Bundle from Moms for America's new store! No Purchase Necessary! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] Celebrating You This Mother's Day Dear Mom, Today, we honor you – the heart of the home, the defender of values, the nurturer of dreams. Your strength, love, and sacrifices shape generations. From all of us at Moms for America, thank you for being the powerful, irreplaceable force you are. To celebrate YOU, we're launching our brand-new Moms for America online merch store, with a Special Mother's Day Giveaway! You can now rep Moms for America in everyday comfort, with new styles designed by moms, for moms, while still embracing our classic purple for events and rallies. Enter to win a $550 Merch Bundle from our new store! HOW TO ENTER: LIKE the giveaway post (link below) FOLLOW the Moms for America account COMMENT by tagging a mom you’d love to shop with and tell us your favorite item from the store If you don’t have Instagram, you can LIKE and SUBSCRIBE to our X or our FB Posts (link below) and if you complete all of these, you will get one entry per social media platform. BONUS ENTRY: Share the post to your Story (Instagram) or Timeline (Facebook) and tag us! GIVEAWAY POST [] [] [] Prize: One lucky mom will win a $100 Moms for America merch bundle! Deadline: Entries close May 11, 2025 at 11:59 PM PST Winner Announced: May 12 via our social media stories/posts GIVEAWAY POST [] Celebrate yourself – and other amazing moms – with the gift of community, purpose, and patriotic style. With love, The Moms for America Team Open to U.S. residents 18+. No purchase necessary. Check Out Our New Store [] PLEASE CHECK OUT MOMS FOR AMERICA'S UPCOMING EVENTS! body:

| Hey team –

It’s Jesse, Hillary’s husband. I wanted to reach out before Mother’s Day weekend with a favor to ask.

I’ve watched Hillary pour her heart into everything she does – as a social worker, a lawyer, a Congresswoman, and most importantly, as an incredible mom to our two boys.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107416264/544619882/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-05-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjdjMWRjOS0yZjJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k2NgjLcfO6O502cbASf6eSWd-oc7HkdS6MqBc9oRKzA=)
Her job in Congress isn’t easy. She works long hours, the pressure is intense, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. But no matter how busy things get in Washington, Hillary always finds a way to show up for our family and for the people she represents.

**This Mother’s Day, I want to show Hillary just how much her hard work means not just to us, but to families across Michigan.**

[_**Will you join me in making Mother’s Day extra special for Hillary with a contribution to her campaign? clean_body: It’s Jesse, Hillary’s husband. I wanted to reach out before Mother’s Day weekend with a favor to ask. | = | Hey team – It’s Jesse, Hillary’s husband. I wanted to reach out before Mother’s Day weekend with a favor to ask. I’ve watched Hillary pour her heart into everything she does – as a social worker, a lawyer, a Congresswoman, and most importantly, as an incredible mom to our two boys. = Her job in Congress isn’t easy. She works long hours, the pressure is intense, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. But no matter how busy things get in Washington, Hillary always finds a way to show up for our family and for the people she represents. This Mother’s Day, I want to show Hillary just how much her hard work means not just to us, but to families across Michigan. = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for celebrating Hillary with us, Jesse * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_may25?refcode=0509-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_may25?refcode=0509-email]
Friend,
The Trump administration's threat of suspending the writ of habeas corpus [https://www.cnbc.com/2025/05/09/trump-deportation-habeas-corpus-miller.html] is another hostile action towards basic human rights from this administration.
Make no mistake, this threat is directed at the courts where many civil cases are being decided regarding undocumented immigrants.
>From provoking trade wars, cutting public education, and now threatening to suspend the writ of habeas corpus, these policies harm our country.
Would you be willing to chip in $25 today to help us build the campaign needed to fight back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_may25?refcode=0509-email]
Thank you for standing with me.
- Amanda Edwards

# [The Truth About the India-Pakistan Crisis](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=163243130&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMjQzMTMwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDY4MzQ0OTQsImV4cCI6MTc0OTQyNjQ5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.W_o0BLwitpDa57RZQ9Xvfn1bGpJo-l_SdaVB9VWCCOY)
### What you need to know about the crisis, its history, and what resolution might look like
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| May 9
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=163243130&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMjQzMTMwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NjgzNDQ5NCwiZXhwIjoxNzQ5NDI2NDk0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zb_g8Ajqjas_-SmS7K563xWKU2nySuE0AMIq8xzM2Ik&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=163243130&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMjQzMTMwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDY4MzQ0OTQsImV4cCI6MTc0OTQyNjQ5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.W_o0BLwitpDa57RZQ9Xvfn1bGpJo-l_SdaVB9VWCCOY&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=163243130&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMjQzMTMwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDY4MzQ0OTQsImV4cCI6MTc0OTQyNjQ5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.W_o0BLwitpDa57RZQ9Xvfn1bGpJo-l_SdaVB9VWCCOY)

| | [](https://substack..zhAna-bR9-O4syUBA9nWuz0jXXqW62Ntrz1lm5q4mBc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/the-truth-about-the-india-pakistan?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Confused by what's happening between India and Pakistan? Here's your breakdown.
On April 22, 2025, a devastating terrorist attack in Pahalgam claimed the lives of 25 Indians and one Nepali tourist. As the dust settled, India pointed fingers at Pakistan-based militant groups, vowing swift and decisive retaliation. Pakistan, for its part, unequivocally condemned the attack, denied any involvement, and demanded concrete evidence to substantiate the claims. Islamabad (Pakistan's Capitol) even went a step further, calling for an independent investigation to determine the real culprits--an offer that New Delhi promptly rejected. So where does that leave us now and why are tensions and violence still escalating? **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This is made possible by you, the thoughtful person reading this. Join our movement by subscribing below.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..zZzu1-ZfJFz63_qs1sUQR23zlVoj0V2Ks1chsnXtzE8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=163243130)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0824543a-5cb6-48a9-984f-1b30a15a4e6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Less than two weeks after the initial act of violence, on May 6, 2025, India launched targeted strikes on six locations within Pakistan. Civilian casualties were reported, and while India claimed that only militant bases were hit, Pakistan countered with claims of indiscriminate bombing of civilian areas. In the immediate aftermath, Pakistan announced that it had shot down six Indian fighter jets, including a Rafale, along with several drones.
The situation escalated further when 125 Indian and Pakistani fighter jets engaged in a dramatic hour-long dogfight--the largest aerial battle since World War II. The skies over South Asia were filled with roaring engines and plumes of smoke, signaling a terrifying reminder of the volatility between these two nuclear-armed nations.
But to understand these tensions today, we need to take a step back at understand history.
### **The Historical Context: A Legacy of Partition and Conflict**
To understand this crisis, we must go back to the origins of the India-Pakistan conflict, rooted in the 1947 Partition of British India. When the subcontinent was divided, princely states, including Kashmir, were given the option to join either newly-formed India or Pakistan, or to remain independent. Kashmir's Maharaja Hari Singh hesitated, hoping for independence, but eventually acceded to India under controversial circumstances during a tribal invasion from Pakistan. Thus began the bitter dispute over Kashmir, a conflict that has simmered--and often boiled over--for nearly eight decades.
In 1948, Pakistan's then-Foreign Minister, Sir Muhammad Zafrullah Khan, advocated forcefully at the United Nations for a _plebiscite_ (i.e. the direct vote of all the members of the electorate) to allow Kashmiris to determine their own fate. He proposed a peace plan centered around three core elements:
1. A fair plebiscite under international observation.
2. The withdrawal of troops from both sides.
3. A no-war pact to ensure stability and peace.

India, however, rejected these proposals, cementing the path to a long and bloody conflict.
**If you 're finding value in this human rights content, join our movement of 131,000+ activists and subscribe.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..zZzu1-ZfJFz63_qs1sUQR23zlVoj0V2Ks1chsnXtzE8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=163243130)
### **UN Resolutions and India 's Military Presence**
In 1948, the United Nations Security Council passed Resolution 47, calling for a plebiscite in Kashmir to allow its people to decide their future. Despite this international mandate, a plebiscite never took place, and India has since stationed over 500,000 troops in Indian-administered Kashmir, citing the need to suppress armed rebellion and maintain order. This massive military presence has resulted in a myriad of human rights abuses, including arbitrary detentions, disappearances, and a culture of impunity for Indian security forces.
The situation further deteriorated in 2019, when India's ruling BJP government unilaterally revoked Kashmir's special status under Article 370 of its Constitution. This move, widely condemned by international human rights organizations, effectively stripped Kashmiris of their limited autonomy and opened the floodgates for settler colonialism in the disputed region.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d79914bc-105c-46d5-89da-ebb543eb15f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### **The Simla Agreement and Diplomatic Stalemates**
The diplomatic freeze deepened as India clung to its position that Kashmir is strictly a bilateral issue, citing the 1972 Simla Agreement, which mandates that all disputes between the two nations be resolved bilaterally. Pakistan, in contrast, has consistently advocated for international mediation, highlighting the critical role of global institutions like the United Nations to broker peace and ensure justice for the Kashmiri people.
India and Pakistan have fought three of their four wars over Kashmir, with tensions flaring up repeatedly, most notably during the 2019 Pulwama attack. Each escalation carries with it the grim specter of nuclear conflict, a nightmare scenario for both regional stability and global security.
### **Now In 2025, A Call for Justice and Accountability**
The recent conflict is not just another chapter in a long history of skirmishes; it is a dire warning of what unchecked militarism and nationalistic zeal can produce. The people of Kashmir--women, children, and families--are caught in the crossfire, their voices muffled by military occupation and political posturing.
This is not just a call for a ceasefire; it is a call for accountability, for adherence to international law, and for global recognition of the basic human rights of Kashmiris. We cannot sit idly by while two nuclear-armed nations edge ever closer to catastrophe, using the lives of innocent civilians as bargaining chips.
Justice demands more than condemnation; it demands action. Now is the time for the international community to pressure both India and Pakistan to return to the negotiating table, to implement the UN-mandated plebiscite, and to pave the way for lasting peace. Self-determination should not be a privilege for the powerful, but a right especially protected for the otherwise powerless.
In the coming days, I will continue to provide updates and analysis on this rapidly evolving situation. This is about more than geopolitics--it's about the fundamental human rights of millions. For those committed to human rights and absolute justice, I encourage you to subscribe and support our efforts. Together, we can hold power accountable, elevate the voices of the oppressed, and work towards lasting justice.

So where does that leave us now and why are tensions and violence still escalating? Let 's Address This. Let's Address This is made possible by you, the thoughtful person reading this. Join our movement by subscribing below. | | ---|---|--- Less than two weeks after the initial act of violence, on May 6, 2025, India launched targeted strikes on six locations within Pakistan. Civilian casualties were reported, and while India claimed that only militant bases were hit, Pakistan countered with claims of indiscriminate bombing of civilian areas. In the immediate aftermath, Pakistan announced that it had shot down six Indian fighter jets, including a Rafale, along with several drones. The situation escalated further when 125 Indian and Pakistani fighter jets engaged in a dramatic hour-long dogfight--the largest aerial battle since World War II. The skies over South Asia were filled with roaring engines and plumes of smoke, signaling a terrifying reminder of the volatility between these two nuclear-armed nations. But to understand these tensions today, we need to take a step back at understand history. The Historical Context: A Legacy of Partition and Conflict To understand this crisis, we must go back to the origins of the India-Pakistan conflict, rooted in the 1947 Partition of British India. When the subcontinent was divided, princely states, including Kashmir, were given the option to join either newly-formed India or Pakistan, or to remain independent. Kashmir's Maharaja Hari Singh hesitated, hoping for independence, but eventually acceded to India under controversial circumstances during a tribal invasion from Pakistan. Thus began the bitter dispute over Kashmir, a conflict that has simmered--and often boiled over--for nearly eight decades. In 1948, Pakistan's then-Foreign Minister, Sir Muhammad Zafrullah Khan, advocated forcefully at the United Nations for a plebiscite (i.e. the direct vote of all the members of the electorate) to allow Kashmiris to determine their own fate. He proposed a peace plan centered around three core elements: 1. A fair plebiscite under international observation. 2. The withdrawal of troops from both sides. 3. A no-war pact to ensure stability and peace. India, however, rejected these proposals, cementing the path to a long and bloody conflict. If you 're finding value in this human rights content, join our movement of 131,000+ activists and subscribe. UN Resolutions and India 's Military Presence In 1948, the United Nations Security Council passed Resolution 47, calling for a plebiscite in Kashmir to allow its people to decide their future. Despite this international mandate, a plebiscite never took place, and India has since stationed over 500,000 troops in Indian-administered Kashmir, citing the need to suppress armed rebellion and maintain order. This massive military presence has resulted in a myriad of human rights abuses, including arbitrary detentions, disappearances, and a culture of impunity for Indian security forces. The situation further deteriorated in 2019, when India's ruling BJP government unilaterally revoked Kashmir's special status under Article 370 of its Constitution. This move, widely condemned by international human rights organizations, effectively stripped Kashmiris of their limited autonomy and opened the floodgates for settler colonialism in the disputed region. | | ---|---|--- The Simla Agreement and Diplomatic Stalemates The diplomatic freeze deepened as India clung to its position that Kashmir is strictly a bilateral issue, citing the 1972 Simla Agreement, which mandates that all disputes between the two nations be resolved bilaterally. Pakistan, in contrast, has consistently advocated for international mediation, highlighting the critical role of global institutions like the United Nations to broker peace and ensure justice for the Kashmiri people. India and Pakistan have fought three of their four wars over Kashmir, with tensions flaring up repeatedly, most notably during the 2019 Pulwama attack. Each escalation carries with it the grim specter of nuclear conflict, a nightmare scenario for both regional stability and global security. Now In 2025, A Call for Justice and Accountability The recent conflict is not just another chapter in a long history of skirmishes; it is a dire warning of what unchecked militarism and nationalistic zeal can produce. The people of Kashmir--women, children, and families--are caught in the crossfire, their voices muffled by military occupation and political posturing. This is not just a call for a ceasefire; it is a call for accountability, for adherence to international law, and for global recognition of the basic human rights of Kashmiris. We cannot sit idly by while two nuclear-armed nations edge ever closer to catastrophe, using the lives of innocent civilians as bargaining chips. Justice demands more than condemnation; it demands action. Now is the time for the international community to pressure both India and Pakistan to return to the negotiating table, to implement the UN-mandated plebiscite, and to pave the way for lasting peace. Self-determination should not be a privilege for the powerful, but a right especially protected for the otherwise powerless. In the coming days, I will continue to provide updates and analysis on this rapidly evolving situation. This is about more than geopolitics--it's about the fundamental human rights of millions. For those committed to human rights and absolute justice, I encourage you to subscribe and support our efforts. Together, we can hold power accountable, elevate the voices of the oppressed, and work towards lasting justice. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.** | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?
